title: Advanced Compressor Stall Warning Using Cross-Correlation and Deep Learning Based Approaches
abstract: Abstract This study presents and evaluates three independent stall warning approaches based on unsteady casing pressure measurements acquired above the rotor blade tips. The methods are applied to two different axial compressors, each exhibiting distinct stall characteristics and inception mechanisms. The first approach utilizes a cross-correlation technique to detect small perturbations propagating circumferentially just prior to stall onset. The second method employs a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), trained on labeled time-resolved pressure data, to accurately classify operating ranges as stable and unstable. The third approach is based on an autoencoder trained on pressure data exclusively recorded at design flow conditions; deviations from the learned patterns are flagged as anomalies. This unsupervised technique enables the detection of any prestall anomalies - including those, not identifiable through visual inspection - that precede conventional stall indicators such as spikes. Importantly, none of the three approaches rely on manually tuned threshold values to trigger stall warnings. As a result, most of the proposed methods remain valid even with changing tip clearances, making them highly robust. All methods are validated using independent datasets, and their accuracy is quantified using stall margin-based metrics. Robustness under varying signal-to-noise conditions further demonstrates the applicability of these techniques for reliable stall warning. While the deep-learning approaches consistently provide precise warnings at about 5% stall margin, the cross-correlation method only triggers at a similar level if the compressor is free of pre-stall instabilities such as rotating instability.

summary_zh: 本研究提出并评估了三种基于叶尖非稳态压力测量的压气机失速预警方法：互相关技术、卷积神经网络（CNN）和自编码器。方法在两种不同失速特性的轴流压气机上验证，均无需手动阈值，对叶尖间隙变化鲁棒。深度学习可在约5%失速裕度时预警，互相关法仅在无预失速不稳定性时有效。
method: 实验研究，在两种轴流压气机上采集转子叶尖非稳态压力数据，采用互相关、CNN分类和自编码器异常检测三种方法。
innovation: 提出三种无需手动阈值的失速预警方法，其中自编码器无监督学习可检测视觉不可见的预失速异常，且对叶尖间隙变化鲁棒。
conclusions: 1. 深度学习方法可在约5%失速裕度时提供精确预警。2. 互相关法仅在无旋转不稳定性等预失速扰动时有效。
limitations: 仅基于两种压气机实验数据，未考虑变转速、变几何等复杂工况；互相关法对预失速不稳定性敏感。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦叶尖间隙畸变下的失速预警，与用户课题（预测叶尖畸变下稳定裕度）高度相关。

title: Generating Coupled Total Pressure and Swirl Distortions Using S-duct Plate
abstract: Abstract The S-duct plate, consisting mainly of a baffle plate and an S-shaped duct, is designed to generate coupled total pressure and swirl distortions. The flow distortions generated using 94 S-duct plates are experimentally investigated using both steady and dynamic probe rakes. Typical coupled total pressure and bulk or paired swirl distortions, are generated by adjusting the circumferential locations of the baffle plate. The swirl vortices may exist in fully developed or underdeveloped states, which affect the characteristics of the coupled total pressure and swirl distortions. Owing to the interactions between low-energy fluid and swirl vortices, the patterns of coupled total pressure and swirl distortions are more complex than those of individual total pressure distortions. Using linear regression models, the correlations between flow distortion intensities and the geometrical parameters of the S-duct plates are established and can be used to design S-duct plates at the preliminary stage.

Airforce Engineering University, Xi'an, Shaanxi, 710038, People's Republic of China

venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文设计了一种S形管道板，用于产生耦合的总压和旋流畸变。通过94种构型的稳态和动态实验，研究了畸变特征，发现旋涡的充分发展状态影响畸变特性，并建立了畸变强度与几何参数的线性回归模型。
method: 实验研究，使用稳态和动态探针耙测量94种S形管道板产生的流动畸变，并采用线性回归分析几何参数与畸变强度的相关性。
innovation: 设计了S形管道板以同时产生总压和旋流耦合畸变，并系统研究了旋涡发展状态对畸变特性的影响，建立了初步设计阶段的几何参数关联模型。
conclusions: 1. 通过调整挡板周向位置可产生典型的耦合总压和整体或配对旋流畸变。2. 旋涡的充分发展状态影响畸变特性，耦合畸变模式比单独总压畸变更复杂。
limitations: 仅基于实验数据建立线性回归模型，未考虑非线性和高马赫数效应，且未进行实际压气机验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Tip-leakage flow in a low-pressure compressor: comparison between low- and medium-fidelity modelings
abstract: Abstract This paper evaluates a low-order three-dimensional hybrid panel method (HPM) for predicting inviscid flow around low-pressure compressor rotors. This approach provides input to specific models for the tip-leakage flow (TLF) characteristics. With a computational cost under one minute, it enables rapid aerodynamic analysis and design exploration. Results are compared with Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) simulations of the LMFA NACA65 low-speed rotor, using a vortex tracking algorithm to extract the TLF features. The study investigates the sensitivity to the inlet incidence and tip gap height on rotor aerodynamics and TLF. Key metrics are tip-leakage vortex (TLV) trajectory, circulation and mixing loss. The rotor aerodynamic behavior shows a good agreement between the two methods. Concerning the TLF characteristics, the HPM agrees quite well with RANS at tip gaps less than 1% of chord length, but struggles with the more complex TLF behavior at larger clearance. Despite limitations, HPM captures key TLF trends, to support early-stage design before higher-fidelity refinement.

summary_zh: 本文评估了一种低阶三维混合面板法（HPM）用于预测低压压气机转子无粘流动，并与RANS模拟对比。HPM计算成本低于一分钟，能快速捕捉叶尖泄漏流（TLF）特征，如涡轨迹、环量和掺混损失。在间隙小于1%弦长时与RANS吻合良好，大间隙时精度下降。
method: 数值方法：低阶三维混合面板法（HPM）与RANS模拟对比，采用涡追踪算法提取TLF特征，研究进口攻角和叶尖间隙的影响。
innovation: 提出一种计算成本极低（<1分钟）的HPM方法，用于快速预测叶尖泄漏流特性，支持早期设计探索。
conclusions: 1. HPM在叶尖间隙小于1%弦长时与RANS吻合良好；2. HPM能捕捉TLF主要趋势，但大间隙时复杂行为预测困难。
limitations: 仅评估无粘HPM，未考虑粘性效应；大间隙时精度不足。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对压气机性能的影响，与用户关注的叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度相关。

title: Numerical Study on Prediction and Mitigation of Aeroelastic Instabilities in Labyrinth Seals
abstract: Abstract Labyrinth seals are non-contact fluid sealing elements widely employed at rotor–stator interfaces in turbomachinery to minimize leakage and maintain pressure differentials across various stages, thereby enhancing overall efficiency. However, their lightweight and compact configuration often leads to reduced structural stiffness, making them susceptible to aeroelastic instabilities. In this study, a fluid–structure interaction (FSI) analysis is conducted to evaluate the aeroelastic behavior of a labyrinth seal. The methodology involves importing mode shape data from structural modal analysis into an unsteady CFD simulation with mesh deformation to compute aerodynamic modal damping. Simulations are performed over a range of pressure ratios, revealing increased aeroelastic instability with higher pressure ratios. Additionally, the influence of seal-clearance variation is analyzed, showing a decrease in aerodynamic damping as clearance increases. The computed damping ratios are validated against established analytical aeroelastic stability criteria. Based on a qualitative analysis of aerodynamic work distribution on the fluid–structure interface, geometric modifications were introduced in the labyrinth seal by progressively increasing the fin tip clearance in the direction of flow. The modified configuration resulted in a 454% increase in the aerodynamic modal damping ratio (ξaero) compared to the baseline design, indicating a significant improvement in aeroelastic stability. Additionally, the modified seal demonstrated approximately a 4% reduction in leakage flow, reflecting enhanced sealing efficiency alongside flutter suppression.

summary_zh: 本研究通过流固耦合（FSI）分析评估迷宫密封的气动弹性行为，采用模态数据导入非定常CFD计算气动阻尼。发现高压比和大间隙降低稳定性，通过沿流向增加翅尖间隙的几何修改，使气动模态阻尼比提高454%，泄漏减少4%。
method: 数值方法：流固耦合（FSI）分析，结合结构模态分析与非定常CFD（含网格变形），计算气动模态阻尼。工况参数：压力比范围、密封间隙变化。
innovation: 提出通过沿流向渐进增加翅尖间隙的几何修改策略，同时抑制颤振并提升密封效率，实现了阻尼比454%的提升和泄漏4%的降低。
conclusions: 1. 高压比和大间隙加剧气动弹性失稳；2. 改进的密封设计使气动模态阻尼比提高454%，泄漏减少4%。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；几何修改策略可能不适用于所有密封类型。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性稳定性分析，与压气机稳定性相关，但研究对象为迷宫密封而非压气机叶片。

title: Quantitative Analysis of Tolerance-Induced Static and Couple Unbalance in Steam Turbine Rotors
abstract: Abstract Rotor-system unbalance is a critical factor affecting the vibration performance and operational reliability of steam turbines and is strongly influenced by geometric and assembly tolerances introduced during manufacturing and installation. In blade--rotor systems, tolerance-induced deviations propagate through complex geometric relationships, leading to mass eccentricity and angular misalignment, and ultimately resulting in static and couple unbalance. However, a unified quantitative description linking typical geometric tolerances to rotor unbalance remains limited. In this study, a quantitative tolerance—unbalance transmission framework is developed to investigate the effects of blade and shaft tolerances on rotor unbalance. Based on coordinate transformation, the unbalance contributions of individual blades are mapped into the rotor reference frame, enabling explicit evaluation of static and couple unbalance. The framework is combined with parametric modeling and Monte Carlo simulation to capture stochastic variations in blade mass properties and assembly deviations. Sensitivity and interaction analyses are performed to identify dominant tolerance parameters and coupling mechanisms. The results demonstrate that static and couple unbalance are governed by fundamentally different mechanisms. Static unbalance is primarily controlled by blade-related geometric deviations associated with mass eccentricity, whereas couple unbalance is dominated by assembly clearance tolerance that induces blade tilt and angular misalignment, with significant nonlinear coupling effects among selected tolerances. These findings provide practical guidance for tolerance allocation and vibration-oriented design of turbomachinery rotors.

summary_zh: 本研究针对汽轮机转子系统，建立了公差-不平衡定量传递框架，通过坐标变换将叶片公差映射到转子参考系，结合参数化建模和蒙特卡洛模拟，分析了叶片和轴公差对静不平衡和偶不平衡的影响。结果表明，静不平衡主要由叶片质量偏心几何偏差控制，而偶不平衡由装配间隙公差主导，存在非线性耦合效应。
method: 数值方法：基于坐标变换的公差-不平衡传递框架，结合参数化建模和蒙特卡洛模拟，进行敏感性和交互作用分析。
innovation: 建立了统一的公差-不平衡定量传递框架，区分了静不平衡和偶不平衡的不同主导机制，揭示了公差间的非线性耦合效应。
conclusions: 静不平衡主要由叶片质量偏心几何偏差控制；偶不平衡由装配间隙公差主导，且存在显著的非线性耦合效应。
limitations: 仅针对汽轮机转子，未考虑气动载荷和运行工况的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子振动控制，但聚焦于公差引起的静/偶不平衡，与压气机气动弹性、稳定性等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Analytical Body Forces in Actuator Disk Models of Propellers
abstract: A generalized analytical model for representing body forces in numerical actuator disk models of propellers is proposed and compared to existing designs using momentum theory. The model is an extension of a previously developed load model for wind turbines, which is extended and applied to propellers. Two different versions of the model are developed. The first is based on the rotor disk subject to a constant circulation, which is modified for tip and root effects, corresponding to an optimum operating Joukowsky rotor. By adding a parabolic circulation distribution, corresponding to a solid-body approach of the near-wake flow, it is possible to take into account losses associated to off-design loads (nonoptimum operating conditions). The second model is based on an optimum design originally proposed by Betz, who, by using a variational principle, showed that the wake formed by an optimum propeller generates a spiraling vortex structure of constant helicity. The advantage of the models is that they do not depend on any detailed knowledge of the actual propeller; they only require information on the thrust coefficient and the advance ratio. The models are validated for different propellers under a wide range of operating conditions. The comparisons show errors improved the earlier version of the model. The maximum deviation over the designed maximum is less than 6.5%; the average error is [Formula: see text]. For the first model, the maximum deviation is 17.5%, with an average error of [Formula: see text].
affiliations: Technical University of Denmark
University of Manchester
summary_zh: 本文提出一种用于螺旋桨数值激盘模型的广义解析体力模型，扩展自风力机载荷模型。基于恒定环量（Joukowsky转子）和抛物线环量分布（考虑非设计损失）以及Betz最优设计两种版本，仅需推力系数和进速比即可建模。验证显示最大偏差低于6.5%，平均误差约3%。
method: 数值方法，基于动量理论和变分原理，开发解析体力模型，在多种工况下与实验数据对比验证。
innovation: 提出两种解析体力模型，无需螺旋桨详细几何信息，仅依赖推力系数和进速比，并考虑非设计工况损失，精度优于先前版本。
conclusions: 1. 基于Betz最优设计的模型最大偏差小于6.5%，平均误差约3%。2. 基于恒定环量的模型最大偏差17.5%，平均误差约5%。
limitations: 模型假设理想流动，未考虑黏性效应和三维非定常流动细节。
relevance_reason: 激盘/体力模型是压气机稳定性分析的重要工具，但本文针对螺旋桨，与压气机叶尖畸变直接相关度中等。

title: Role of Duty Cycle in Burst-Modulated Synthetic Jet Flow Control
abstract: The effect of duty cycle (DC) and blowing ratio on synthetic jet flow control over a stalled NACA 0025 airfoil at [Formula: see text] was investigated experimentally. A finite-span microblower array operating with burst modulation was tested across a wide range of control parameters to assess aerodynamic performance, power consumption, and flow stability. Flow reattachment was achieved once a threshold momentum coefficient was met via increasing either the DC or the blowing ratio. Control effectiveness increased sharply upon reattachment, with additional momentum providing incremental improvements in midspan lift, spanwise control, and flow stability, though these effects eventually saturated. Substantial midspan lift improvements are observed at DCs as low as 5%, indicating that brief, high-momentum bursts were the most power-efficient for achieving reattachment at the midspan. However, flow stability was reduced at low DCs due to the inconsistent streamwise dissipation of the spanwise vortices responsible for flow control. Higher DC control strategies resulted in more consistent boundary layer control. These results provide a framework for selecting control strategies that balance aerodynamic performance and stability with power efficiency.
affiliations: University of Toronto
Institute for Aerospace Studies
summary_zh: 实验研究了占空比和吹气比对失速NACA 0025翼型上合成射流流动控制的影响。发现达到再附阈值后控制效果急剧提升，低占空比（5%）即可显著改善中展升力且能效最高，但流动稳定性降低；高占空比策略提供更一致的边界层控制。
method: 实验研究，在NACA 0025翼型上使用有限展向微吹气阵列进行脉冲调制合成射流，改变占空比和吹气比，测量气动性能、功耗和流动稳定性。
innovation: 系统揭示了占空比在脉冲调制合成射流中的关键作用，量化了低占空比高能效与流动稳定性之间的权衡，为平衡性能与能效的控制策略选择提供了框架。
conclusions: 1. 达到动量系数阈值后，再附使控制效果急剧提升，低至5%占空比即可显著改善中展升力。2. 低占空比能效最高但降低流动稳定性，高占空比提供更一致的边界层控制。
limitations: 仅针对单个翼型（NACA 0025）和固定攻角，未考虑三维效应及实际发动机环境。
relevance_reason: 研究流动控制与稳定性，但对象为翼型而非压气机，与叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向间接相关。

title: Direct solution of an analytical model to investigate duct acoustic treatments at low and high frequencies
abstract: • Analytical model for computing acoustic flow in a fan intake • Suitable for flutter bite and noise studies at low and high frequencies • Supports arbitrary number of acoustic treatments in the model • Well-conditioned formulation enables use of direct solvers • Application to the contribution of liners to fan flutter Acoustic treatments are used in modern aeroengines to reduce community noise. Recent studies have highlighted an acoustic-driven instability known as flutter bite. This phenomenon arises at frequencies lower than those associated with noise, where an upstream acoustic wave, generated by fan vibration, is reflected at the duct inlet, forming a feedback loop. To study acoustic behavior over a wide frequency range, we introduce a new model. It consists of an annular duct with an arbitrary number of sections, each potentially featuring different acoustic treatments. The acoustic wave propagation inside the intake is solved analytically, and a mode-matching technique is employed to handle transitions between sections. Unlike previous approaches, we formulate the problem to obtain a numerically well-conditioned linear system, enabling the use of direct solvers instead of iterative ones. We discuss the convergence with respect to the number of radial modes and improve it through an appropriate choice of projection functions, even for low impedance values. Two illustrative applications are presented: the analysis of flutter bite in a fan intake with a single liner, and a study of the effect of multiple acoustic treatments.
affiliations: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid
Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, ETSI Aeronáutica y del Espacio, Plaza del Cardenal Cisneros 3, Madrid, 28040, Spain
summary_zh: 本文提出一种解析模型，用于计算风扇进气道内声学流动，支持任意数量的声学处理段，采用模式匹配技术处理段间过渡，并通过优化投影函数改善低阻抗下的收敛性。模型适用于低高频的颤振咬合和噪声研究，并分析了单衬套对风扇颤振的贡献。
method: 理论解析模型，结合模式匹配技术，求解环形管道内声波传播，使用直接求解器处理数值良态线性系统。
innovation: 通过问题公式化获得数值良态线性系统，允许使用直接求解器替代迭代方法，并通过优化投影函数改善低阻抗下的收敛性。
conclusions: 模型能有效分析低高频声学行为，包括颤振咬合现象；单衬套可影响风扇颤振稳定性。
limitations: 模型为解析方法，未考虑三维流动效应及非线性影响，可能限制实际复杂几何的适用性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及风扇颤振（flutter bite），与气动弹性相关，但主要聚焦声学处理，非直接压气机稳定性建模。

title: Effect of Shock Wave Interference on Aeroelasticity of Hypersonic Airfoils
abstract: Shock wave interference is a common phenomenon in hypersonic vehicles. It modifies the load distribution across the wing surface, thereby affecting the aeroelastic characteristics. This paper investigates the influence of shock wave interference location and intensity on the flutter characteristics of a hypersonic airfoil using a method based on a reduced-order model. The flutter mechanism under shock wave interference is revealed through root locus analysis and the unsteady aerodynamic work method. When the shock wave interference moves from the leading edge to the midpoint of the airfoil, the critical flutter velocity gradually increases but remains lower than the critical flutter velocity in the absence of shock wave interference. When the shock wave moves from the midpoint to the trailing edge, the critical flutter velocity reaches its maximum value and then gradually decreases. The influence of shock wave interference intensity on the flutter characteristics exhibits monotonic behavior. Finally, this paper finds that, in order to improve the aeroelastic stability of hypersonic airfoils, the first step is to move the shock wave interference location away from the front area of the airfoils. Second, the flutter mode can be changed to increase the critical flutter velocity.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
summary_zh: 研究激波干扰对高超声速翼型气动弹性的影响，采用基于降阶模型的方法分析激波位置和强度对颤振特性的作用。发现激波从前缘移至中点时临界颤振速度逐渐增大但仍低于无干扰情况；从中点移至后缘时先达最大值后下降。提出改善气弹稳定性的措施。
method: 数值方法，基于降阶模型进行根轨迹分析和非定常气动力功计算，研究激波干扰位置和强度参数。
innovation: 揭示了激波干扰位置和强度对高超声速翼型颤振特性的影响规律，并提出了通过移动激波位置和改变颤振模式提高稳定性的策略。
conclusions: 激波干扰位置从中点移至后缘时临界颤振速度先增后减；激波强度影响呈单调性。改善稳定性需将激波移离前缘区域并改变颤振模式。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型，未考虑三维效应及真实飞行条件中的复杂耦合。
relevance_reason: 研究高超声速翼型气动弹性，与压气机叶片的颤振/强迫响应有一定关联，但非直接针对压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Analytical Responses of Rotor–Nacelle Systems Subjected to Nonwhite Aerodynamic Moments
abstract: Tilt-rotor aircraft may be subjected to long-correlated random loads in their complex flight environments, potentially inducing dynamics distinct from those based on deterministic force or idealized white-noise assumptions in existing studies. In this paper, we explore the whirl flutter of tilt-rotor aircraft subjected to nonwhite random aerodynamic moments, modeled as two-degree-of-freedom nonlinear rotor–nacelle systems with fractional Gaussian noise. Firstly, a harmonic balance method is employed to obtain the amplitude response characteristics of the deterministic rotor–nacelle systems. Subsequently, a dimensionality reduction approach based on diffusion approximation theory is proposed for the analysis of stochastic rotor–nacelle systems. To achieve a precise and efficient calculation of system responses, a memory-dependent Fokker–Planck–Kolmogorov equation method is further introduced. Finally, numerical simulations are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the proposed solution methodology. In addition, the statistical characteristics of the responses of stochastic rotor–nacelle systems are examined in detail, and the influence of system parameters on the responses is systematically studied. We discover that the second-order central moments of the system responses increase with the decrease of the Hurst index of the FGN, while they increase with the increase of the freestream-to-blade-tip velocity ratio, the rotor angular velocity, and the noise intensity. The results reveal that both structural and noise parameters have significant impacts on the dynamic stability of the systems, further threatening the safety of tilt-rotor aircraft.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
Tokyo Institute of Technology
Institute of Science Tokyo (Former Tokyo Tech)
summary_zh: 本文研究倾转旋翼机在非白噪声随机气动力矩下的涡动颤振，将系统建模为含分数高斯噪声的二自由度非线性转子-短舱系统。采用谐波平衡法、扩散近似降维和记忆依赖Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程法分析响应，发现系统响应的二阶中心矩随Hurst指数减小而增大，随速度比、转子角速度和噪声强度增大而增大。
method: 数值模拟与理论分析结合，采用谐波平衡法、扩散近似降维和记忆依赖Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程法，工况参数包括Hurst指数、速度比、转子角速度和噪声强度。
innovation: 首次将非白噪声（分数高斯噪声）引入倾转旋翼机涡动颤振分析，提出记忆依赖Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程法精确计算随机响应。
conclusions: 系统响应的二阶中心矩随Hurst指数减小而增大，随速度比、转子角速度和噪声强度增大而增大，表明结构和噪声参数显著影响动态稳定性。
limitations: 仅考虑二自由度模型，未涉及三维流动效应或结构非线性细节。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子系统气动弹性稳定性，但研究对象为倾转旋翼机而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: A novel framework for spatiotemporal dynamic modelling of rotary drilling with uniformly alternating full and partial blades
abstract: • Developed a dynamic model of drilling with uniformly alternating full/partial blades • Utilized a rock morphology model to accurately capture multiple regenerative effects • Identified the key stable operating parameters to suppress undesired vibration • Revealed the spatiotemporal dynamics characterized by axial-torsional coupling In this article, an integrated model in spatiotemporal domain is developed to study the coupled axial-torsional dynamics of a drill-string. Unlike most models that only consider the interaction between an idealized drill-bit with identical radial blades and rock, this study introduces a drill-bit that aligns to engineering practicability more closely, with a structural configuration of uniformly alternating full and partial blades. According to the cutting geometry at bit-rock interface, the evolution of rock surface morphology (RSM) at well-bottom is formulated through algebraic equations to accurately capture the multiple regenerative effects induced by bit-rock disengagement, i.e., bit-bounce. The entire drill-string structure and rock formation are spatially discretized by using the finite-element (FE) method, and the resultant dynamic model is tested by checking its numerical convergence, showing that the model is robust. Then, a comparative analysis is conducted between the traditional state-dependent-delay (SDD) model and the proposed RSM model. The results demonstrate that the RSM model maintains volume conservation for the total cuttings generated in drilling process while achieving lower computational cost, whereas the SDD model fails to preserve volume conservation. Hence, the proposed RSM model can capture the cutting dynamics of the drill-bit more accurately. Finally, a simulation-driven case study under various drilling conditions is conducted to reveal the nonlinear dynamic characteristics of drill-string system. These findings provide a theoretical framework for subsequent development of model-based active control strategies to suppress detrimental drill-string vibration, specifically targeting stick-slip vibration and bit-bounce.

summary_zh: 本文提出了一种时空域集成模型，研究钻柱的轴向-扭转耦合动力学。与传统模型不同，该模型引入了均匀交替全/部分叶片的钻头结构，更贴近工程实际。通过岩石表面形态模型精确捕捉钻头-岩石脱离引起的多重再生效应，并采用有限元法离散化钻柱和岩层。与传统状态依赖延迟模型对比，该模型能保持体积守恒且计算成本更低。案例研究揭示了钻柱系统的非线性动力学特性，为抑制粘滑振动和钻头弹跳提供了理论框架。
method: 数值方法：基于有限元法离散化钻柱和岩层，结合岩石表面形态模型描述钻头-岩石界面切割几何，通过数值收敛性检验验证模型鲁棒性。
innovation: 提出均匀交替全/部分叶片钻头结构模型，更符合工程实际；采用岩石表面形态模型替代传统状态依赖延迟模型，实现体积守恒并降低计算成本。
conclusions: 1. 岩石表面形态模型能保持总切削体积守恒，而传统状态依赖延迟模型不能。2. 该模型可准确捕捉钻头切削动力学，为抑制粘滑振动和钻头弹跳提供理论依据。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；仅考虑轴向-扭转耦合，未涉及横向振动。
relevance_reason: 研究钻柱动力学与转子振动控制相关，但对象为钻头而非航空发动机压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙、畸变等核心方向。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Reduced-Order Modeling of Turbomachinery Blisks With Small and Large Mistuning
abstract: Abstract Comprehensively predicting the structural dynamics of turbomachinery blisks is of critical importance to the gas turbine industry. Located in the compressor and turbine stages, vibrations of these structures are amplified by their inherent small or sometimes large mistuning. Hence, it is paramount for the safe operation of gas turbines to predict mistuned blisk vibration responses. However, this requires significantly higher computational effort compared to computing cyclic system (i.e., tuned) responses. To address this issue, physics-based and data-driven reduced-order models (ROMs) have been developed. While many physics-based ROMs have been developed for predicting blisk responses with small and large mistuning, they require large finite element (FE) models to characterize the system dynamics, and they cannot be enhanced using experimental data. Thus, this paper proposes a novel physics-informed data-driven approach to compute blisk responses with both large and small mistuning. Similar to classical physics-based approaches (i.e., PRIME), this paper utilizes two physics-informed neural networks to compute the transfer function matrices of two systems: (1) a cyclic pristine blisk with small mistuning, and (2) a cyclic rogue blisk with small mistuning. These transfer functions are then introduced in a linear system of equations to compute the blade root responses of a blisk with small mistuning and rogue blades. Blade tip responses can then be computed using root responses through a third neural network. This proposed method has been tested using a blisk lumped mass model with 18 blades. Results show highly accurate predictions, with absolute errors below 10% for all mistuned blisk configurations explored. Future work focuses on enhancing accuracy by optimizing neural network architecture and hyperparameters.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种物理信息神经网络方法，用于预测具有小和大失谐的涡轮机械叶盘结构动力学响应。该方法利用两个物理信息神经网络计算传递函数矩阵，并通过线性方程组求解叶片根部响应，再通过第三个网络计算叶尖响应。在18叶片集中质量模型上测试，绝对误差低于10%。
method: 数值方法：物理信息神经网络（PINN）结合传递函数矩阵，用于失谐叶盘降阶建模。工况参数：18叶片集中质量模型，小和大失谐。
innovation: 提出物理信息数据驱动方法，结合物理先验与神经网络，无需大型有限元模型，且能利用实验数据增强，适用于小和大失谐。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法对失谐叶盘响应预测绝对误差低于10%。2. 未来可通过优化网络架构和超参数进一步提高精度。
limitations: 仅测试了18叶片集中质量模型，未在真实几何或实验数据上验证。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动预测，但主要关注失谐叶盘结构动力学，与压气机气动稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Comprehensive Nonlinear Flutter Instability Analysis via Time-Domain Modal Decomposition in Rotorcraft
abstract: Aeroelastic instabilities are emerging as a significant challenge in both fixed-wing aircraft and propeller design. Although the general conditions that lead to their onset are understood, accurately characterizing the underlying mechanisms remains complex. This paper presents a time-domain modal analysis technique aimed at tracking the development of such instabilities, with particular focus on their onset behavior. Coupled computational fluid dynamics/computational structural dynamics simulations are performed on a flat-plate rotor configuration, and evidence points to a mode-coalescence-type flutter instability that, over a specific range of rotational speeds [Formula: see text], evolves into a limit-cycle oscillation driven by stall flutter. The results show satisfactory agreement with available experimental data, although areas for improvement in the simulation setup are identified, including material modeling choices and the absence of hysteresis effects associated with blade loading. The proposed analysis method has been validated only for the flat-plate geometry that, despite offering simplifications in simulation setup, introduces complex aerodynamic nonlinearities. As such, future work will focus on extending the validation to classical airfoil sections.
affiliations: Universitat Politècnica de València
Université Fédérale de Toulouse Midi-Pyrénées
Université de Toulouse
summary_zh: 本文针对旋翼飞行器气动弹性不稳定性，采用时域模态分解技术，通过CFD/CSD耦合模拟平板转子构型，发现模态融合型颤振在特定转速范围内演变为由失速颤振驱动的极限环振荡。结果与实验数据吻合良好，但模拟设置存在改进空间。
method: 数值模拟：耦合CFD/CSD，平板转子构型，特定转速范围[公式:见原文]
innovation: 提出时域模态分析技术追踪不稳定性发展，特别关注起始行为，并揭示模态融合到极限环振荡的演变过程。
conclusions: 1. 平板转子在特定转速范围内发生模态融合型颤振，并演变为失速颤振驱动的极限环振荡。2. 模拟结果与实验数据吻合良好。
limitations: 仅验证了平板几何，未考虑经典翼型；模拟中材料建模和迟滞效应缺失。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性颤振分析，但研究对象为旋翼而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Aeroengine Turbine-Induced Reverse Effects on Combustion and Aerothermal Features
abstract: Modern aeroengines require compact combustor/turbine integration with intensified cross-domain interactions. Current studies neglect turbine-induced reverse effects, contradicting physics. Conventional interface-based methods (sliding mesh/Multiple Reference Frame) enforce artificial pressure continuity at stationary/rotating interfaces, inducing numerical dissipation that attenuates reverse-propagating pressure waves and weakens turbine-to-combustor feedback. To address this, this study proposes an interface-free rotating framework with radiation modeling, capturing rotation-induced reverse-propagating pressure gradients through direct solution of global compressible flow equations. This approach simplifies mesh generation processes, achieving 16.7% computational time savings without compromising solution accuracy. The detailed analysis reveals that turbine structures constrain dilution-zone vortex development via adverse pressure gradients, driving hot streak expansion, and exacerbating temperature nonuniformity. Critically, rotation-induced pressure gradients propagate in reverse to the combustor, steepening existing pressure gradients and amplifying velocity fluctuation amplitudes. Low-speed fluctuations (less than or equal to 13,300 rpm) are dominated by swirl intensity; increasing speed attenuates swirl strength, progressively reducing fluctuations. At high speeds (greater than or equal to 19,950 rpm), turbine-induced reverse-propagating gradients constitute a dominant contribution, counteracting swirl decay. At this regime, the influence of this reverse effect traces back to the combustor front section. These findings provide critical guidance for suppressing hot streak diffusion and mitigating instability risks in combustor designs.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
summary_zh: 针对航空发动机涡轮对燃烧室的反向效应被忽视的问题，提出无界面旋转框架结合辐射模型，直接求解全局可压缩流动方程，捕获旋转诱导的反向传播压力梯度。发现涡轮结构通过逆压梯度限制稀释区涡发展，加剧温度不均匀性；低速时波动由旋流主导，高速时反向梯度占主导，影响可追溯至燃烧室前段。
method: 数值模拟，采用无界面旋转框架与辐射模型，直接求解全局可压缩流动方程，工况转速范围13,300-19,950 rpm。
innovation: 提出无界面旋转框架，避免传统滑移网格/多参考系方法的人工压力连续假设和数值耗散，更准确捕捉涡轮-燃烧室反向反馈。
conclusions: 1. 涡轮诱导的反向压力梯度在高速（≥19,950 rpm）时主导流动，抵消旋流衰减，影响可追溯至燃烧室前段。2. 低速（≤13,300 rpm）时波动由旋流强度主导，高速时反向梯度贡献增大。
limitations: 未考虑燃烧化学反应及真实几何细节，可能简化了实际耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转流动和压力梯度反向传播，与压气机稳定性中的非定常流动和畸变传播有相似物理机制，但研究对象为涡轮-燃烧室，非压气机。

title: Nonlinear dynamics analysis of rotor systems based on extended nonlinear modal theory with gyroscopic coupling
abstract: The nonlinear dynamic characteristics of rotor systems exhibit dual dependence on rotor speed and vibration amplitude, a phenomenon originating from the synergistic effects of gyroscopic coupling and inherent nonlinearities such as dry friction. Current research faces two critical challenges: (A) the insufficient characterization of gyroscopic coupling mechanisms in nonlinear modal analysis, particularly for large-scale rotor systems; (B) the lack of efficient methods for predicting critical speeds and unbalance responses in nonlinear regimes. To address these issues, this paper proposes an Extended Nonlinear Mode Synthesis (ENMS) framework with three fundamental innovations: (A) Establishment of a gyroscopic-coupled governing equation incorporating antisymmetric matrix formulation, enabling systematic characterization of speed-dependent nonlinear modes; (B) Development of amplitude-speed correlation models revealing the nonlinear transition mechanisms of modal characteristics; (C) Derivation of an efficient computational scheme for critical speed determination and approximate unbalance response prediction. The proposed methodology demonstrates breakthrough advantages in computational efficiency while maintaining high precision when validated through missile engine rotor case studies. This study establishes a complete theoretical framework for gyroscopic-coupled nonlinear modal analysis, providing a paradigm-shifting tool for complex rotor dynamics design and vibration control.

summary_zh: 针对转子系统非线性动力学特性对转速和振幅的双重依赖，提出扩展非线性模态综合（ENMS）框架，引入陀螺耦合反对称矩阵方程，建立幅-速关联模型，实现临界转速和不平衡响应的高效预测。通过导弹发动机转子案例验证，在保持高精度的同时显著提升计算效率。
method: 理论推导与数值验证，建立陀螺耦合非线性模态综合框架，通过导弹发动机转子案例进行验证。
innovation: 首次在非线性模态分析中系统表征陀螺耦合机制，提出反对称矩阵方程和幅-速关联模型，实现临界转速与不平衡响应的高效预测。
conclusions: 1. 转子非线性模态特性随转速和振幅非线性转变；2. 所提方法在导弹发动机转子案例中计算效率突破性提升，精度保持高水准。
limitations: 仅针对导弹发动机转子案例验证，未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变等压气机特定问题。
relevance_reason: 研究转子系统非线性动力学和振动控制，与压气机转子振动相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变等核心方向。

title: Fundamental Model for Compressor Cavity Heat Transfer: Theory and Validation
abstract: Abstract The buoyancy-driven flow inside compressor cavities is three-dimensional and unsteady and features a large range of time and length scales. The temperature and rotation of the fluid core of the cavity are influenced by an exchange (and recirculation) of enthalpy and momentum with an axial throughflow of cooling air at low radius. The complexity of the flow and conjugate nature of the heat transfer to the discs creates a challenge for the aero-engine designer when calculating thermal stresses, radial expansion, and blade-tip clearances. This article presents a low-order model to predict the radial variation of disc and fluid-core temperatures, and the mass exchange (entrainment) to the rotating cavity. Fundamental physical principles and experimental data are used to create a single set of Rayleigh–Grashof correlations for heat transfer and radial mass flow of buoyant plumes. The model is applied to 11 test cases from experimental rigs at Bath, Dresden, and Sussex, each with unique instrumentation, thermal boundary conditions, geometries, and throughflow swirl. Empirical correlations for exchange and recirculation mass flow were determined for each rig using a common theoretical methodology. The model captures the heat and mass transfer characteristics with accuracy quantified relative to experimental data. New experimental data from the Bath Compressor Cavity Rig is used to validate the model under conditions of asymmetrical heating, demonstrating the effects associated with the axial gradient of temperature in the compressor are captured appropriately. The consistent agreement with experimental data and correlation methodology demonstrates a robust framework appropriate for application to thermo-mechanical design codes in the aero-engine.
affiliations: University of Bath
University of Bath Department of Mechanical Engineering, ,   ,
summary_zh: 本文提出一种低阶模型，用于预测压气机腔内盘和流体核心温度的径向变化以及质量交换。模型基于瑞利-格拉晓夫关联式，结合实验数据，应用于巴斯、德累斯顿和苏塞克斯的11个实验案例，准确捕捉了传热传质特性，并在非对称加热条件下得到验证。
method: 理论建模与实验验证相结合，基于瑞利-格拉晓夫关联式建立低阶模型，应用于11个不同实验台架案例。
innovation: 首次提出基于单一瑞利-格拉晓夫关联式的低阶模型，统一描述压气机腔内浮力驱动流动的传热传质，并适用于多种几何和边界条件。
conclusions: 模型能准确预测盘和流体核心温度及质量交换，与实验数据一致；非对称加热条件下模型仍有效，表明其适用于航空发动机热机械设计。
limitations: 模型基于特定实验台架，可能未涵盖所有实际发动机工况；未考虑叶片振动或气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究压气机腔内传热与叶尖间隙相关，但未直接涉及稳定性或畸变预测。

title: Impact of Nozzle Guide Vane Trailing Edge Damage on High-Pressure Turbine Stage Performance
abstract: Abstract In this paper we consider the impact of nozzle guide vane trailing edge burn-back (damage) on cooled high-pressure turbine stage performance. We analyse four levels of simulated burn-back ranging from new parts to severely damaged. The burn-back geometries are based on a statistical analysis of real deterioration data from operating engines. We use unsteady stage simulations to predict the impact of burn-back on capacity, reaction, specific work, and efficiency, among other performance metrics. Experimental data from a full-annulus nozzle guide vane cascade test (operated at engine-matched conditions) was used to validate the computational fluid dynamics (CFD) predictions. We find that for fixed stage pressure ratio, increasing burn-back leads to: a significant decrease in vane efficiency due to the formation of a pair of counter-rotating vortices at the burn-back edges, an increase in rotor efficiency due to weakened secondary flow in the rotor passage, a marginal overall decrease in stage efficiency, a decrease in stage specific work despite an increase in mass-mean absolute turning angle due to a greater magnitude of contrary change in rotor inlet and outlet velocities, a significant increase in vane capacity due to an increase in the effective area of the controlling region, a milder decrease in vane capacity due to an increase in the intrastage static pressure, and a significant increase in stage reaction. Taken together with a related study on vane-only aerodynamic performance and flow capacity, these results improve understanding of the impact of burn-back on whole-life engine performance.
affiliations: University of Oxford
Science Oxford
University of Oxford Department of Engineering Science, ,   ,
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Rolls-Royce plc , WH88, PO Box 3,   ,
summary_zh: 本文研究了高压涡轮导向叶片尾缘烧蚀对级性能的影响。通过模拟四种损伤程度，结合非定常数值模拟和全环叶栅实验验证，发现烧蚀导致叶栅效率下降、转子效率上升、级效率略微降低，同时级反应度和叶栅通流能力显著增加。
method: 采用非定常CFD模拟，结合全环叶栅实验验证，分析四种基于实际退化数据的烧蚀程度对涡轮级性能的影响。
innovation: 基于实际发动机运行数据的统计损伤几何，系统评估了尾缘烧蚀对级性能的全面影响，并揭示了流动机理。
conclusions: 烧蚀增加导致叶栅效率显著下降（因对转涡），转子效率上升（因二次流减弱），级效率略微下降；级反应度和叶栅通流能力显著增加。
limitations: 仅针对高压涡轮级，未考虑燃烧室出口畸变或叶片振动等耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涡轮叶片损伤对性能的影响，与压气机稳定性方向间接相关，但方法可借鉴。

title: Minimal Modeling for Noise and Vibration Propensity of Low-Speed Axial Flow Rotor Blades Due to Vortex Shedding
abstract: Abstract The subject of the paper is the phenomenon of shedding of vortices (termed herein as profile vortex shedding) from the region being upstream of the trailing edge (TE) of sections of blade profiles. The shed vortices correspond to noise generation at the trailing edge, and lift force fluctuations which cause temporarily fluctuating bending moments on the blade. The simplified models presented herein aim at capturing the main qualitative trends and giving order-of-magnitude quantitative estimates on vortex shedding noise and vibration. A synthesis is given on the results of investigations on a classic RAF-6E profile and on a circular-arc cambered plate profile of 8% relative camber, both considered as being representatives for low-speed axial flow rotors. The flow field related to the various numerical simulation scenarios has been surveyed in detail, for comprehension of underlying physics. The results of minimal models have been processed in a merged way for the two blade profiles, they have been generalized and compared to literature data for validation purposes. The vortex noise model is found to resolve the qualitative trends and can be further developed for brief quantitative predictions. The lift force fluctuation model captures the order of magnitude of computational results effectively.
affiliations: Budapest University of Technology and Economics
Department of Fluid Mechanics, Faculty of Mechanical Engineering, Budapest University of Technology and Economics , Műegyetem rkp. 3 , Budapest H-1111 ,
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文针对低速轴流转子叶片尾缘上游的涡脱落现象，建立了简化的噪声和振动预测模型。通过数值模拟研究RAF-6E翼型和圆弧弯板翼型，捕捉了涡脱落噪声和升力波动的定性趋势及量级估计，并与文献数据对比验证。
method: 采用数值模拟方法，对RAF-6E翼型和8%相对弯度的圆弧弯板翼型进行流场分析，建立最小模型预测涡脱落噪声和升力波动。
innovation: 提出了简化的最小模型，能够快速捕捉涡脱落噪声和振动的定性趋势及量级，为低速轴流转子叶片噪声和振动提供初步预测工具。
conclusions: 涡噪声模型能解析定性趋势，可用于快速定量预测；升力波动模型有效捕捉了计算结果的量级。
limitations: 模型基于简化假设，仅适用于低速轴流转子，且未考虑复杂三维效应和实际工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶片振动预测，但主要关注涡脱落噪声和升力波动，与压气机稳定性及叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Part-span approximation of linear tone noise propagation in an aeroengine intake
abstract: • Proposed a ‘part-span approximation’ for in-duct tone noise predictions. • Characterised errors introduced by the approximation. • Applied to noise radiation from a realistic intake geometry. • Demonstrated a potentially significant computational saving. A part-span methodology is proposed for the propagation of linear tone noise in aeroengine intake ducts. For fan rotor-associated tone noise sources in particular, but also rotor-stator interaction tones, much of the acoustic energy flux is concentrated towards the duct outer wall, offering the opportunity to reduce the computational expense of numerical predictions by neglecting low-span regions of the duct. Conventional computational fluid dynamics (CFD) methods can predict the acoustic field with reasonable accuracy but are too computationally expensive for iterative application during the design process. The methodology is investigated in four stages, starting with the impact on mode shape representation and in-duct propagation of individual Fourier-Bessel eigenmodes in a cylindrical duct through to far-field radiation. The approach is then applied to cases involving an axisymmetric, yet otherwise realistic, intake geometry, including a test case that considers steady flow distortion effects. Negligible errors for in-duct and far-field predictions are observed in many applied cases. Higher error levels are introduced for modes at low azimuthal harmonics and with ducts of high hub-tip ratios. In-duct, the error is closely linked to the amount of acoustic energy truncated in an approximated duct with an artificial hub wall and is associated with the redistribution of high-order radial mode components. Potential sources of error are identified and categorised: source truncation error, in-duct propagation error, and far-field radiation error. Computationally, the approximation can significantly reduce the size of the mesh required to resolve the acoustic field.
affiliations: University of Southampton
Institute of Sound and Vibration Research, University of Southampton, Southampton, SO17 1BJ, UK
summary_zh: 提出一种用于航空发动机进气道线性单音噪声传播的“部分跨度近似”方法，通过忽略低跨度区域降低计算成本。在圆柱管道和真实轴对称进气道中验证，发现对多数模态误差可忽略，但低方位角谐波和高轮毂比时误差较大。
method: 数值方法，基于傅里叶-贝塞尔模态分解，在圆柱管道和轴对称进气道中分析部分跨度近似对模态传播和远场辐射的影响。
innovation: 首次提出部分跨度近似方法，利用声能集中于外壁的特性，显著减少网格规模，同时系统量化了源截断、管内传播和远场辐射三类误差。
conclusions: 部分跨度近似在多数应用场景下误差可忽略；低方位角谐波模态和高轮毂比管道中误差较大，主要源于高阶径向模态能量截断。
limitations: 仅针对线性单音噪声，未考虑非线性效应或复杂三维几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及进气道声传播和数值方法，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Enhancing Blade Durability to Foreign Object Damage Through Multidisciplinary Design Optimization
abstract: Abstract Foreign object damage (FOD) poses a significant challenge to the durability of compressor blades in aero engines. Impacts from foreign objects can threaten structural integrity and increase maintenance costs. This study presents a multidisciplinary optimization approach to improve rotor blade durability against FOD while preserving aerodynamic performance. A fully automatic aero-structural process chain is developed, combining finite element and computational fluid dynamics analyses. The optimization uses the meta-heuristic algorithm AutoOpti to maximize the allowable stress concentration factor Kt along FOD-sensitive regions without compromising aerodynamic efficiency and stability. The 1.5-front stage of an axial high-pressure compressor serves as a test case, focusing on critical rotor areas. The results show a significant improvement in FOD robustness, with optimized designs achieving up to a 42% increase in allowable Kt and improved surge margin. This work aims to investigate essential design factors for FOD-resistant airfoils using a multidisciplinary framework, providing insights into the impact of design variables on rotor robustness. The developed methodology has broad applicability for addressing the issue of FOD robustness during the design phase and is applied for a test case in this work.
affiliations: Technical University of Munich
Technical University of Munich Chair of Turbomachinery and Flight Propulsion, ,   ,
MTU Aero Engines (Germany)
MTU Aero Engines AG ,   ,
summary_zh: 本研究提出一种多学科优化方法，通过结合有限元和CFD分析，使用元启发式算法AutoOpti最大化压气机转子叶片对外物损伤的容许应力集中系数Kt，同时保持气动性能。以轴流高压压气机1.5级前段为测试案例，优化设计使Kt提高42%，并改善喘振裕度。
method: 数值方法：结合有限元与CFD的全自动气动-结构过程链，采用元启发式算法AutoOpti进行多学科优化。工况为轴流高压压气机1.5级前段。
innovation: 将外物损伤耐久性纳入多学科优化框架，同时考虑气动性能和稳定性，通过最大化应力集中系数Kt来增强叶片抗FOD能力。
conclusions: 优化设计使容许Kt提高42%，并改善了喘振裕度，表明多学科优化可有效提升叶片抗FOD能力而不牺牲气动性能。
limitations: 仅针对特定压气机级和FOD场景，未考虑实际发动机运行中的多因素耦合。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机叶片耐久性和喘振裕度，但核心是外物损伤而非叶尖间隙畸变或稳定性预测模型。

title: Design Optimization of Complex Total Pressure Distortion Screens for Gas Turbine Engine Testing
abstract: Abstract In a gas turbine engine, inlet flow distortion occurs due to factors such as flow separation in the aircraft inlet due to aircraft maneuvers and flight conditions. The distorted inlet flow significantly impacts the compressor performance, reducing the efficiency and operability of the gas turbine engine, as it can provoke early stall or rotating stall and cause aeromechanical issues. In a compressor ground test facility, distortion screens are employed to simulate the distorted inlet flow experienced in flight conditions. In the present work, a methodology is developed to design complex total pressure distortion screens. First, the total pressure loss characteristics of uniform porosity screens are evaluated by computations for screen porosities ranging from 0.20 to 0.90 and inlet Mach numbers ranging from 0.01 to 0.67. The influence of porosity on the total pressure loss for various inlet Mach numbers is highlighted in both incompressible and compressible flow regimes. Second, an inverse design methodology is formulated with the objective function to minimize the difference between the target and achieved total pressure patterns. Finally, this inverse design methodology is posed as an optimization problem, which is then iteratively solved using a gradient-based method until the target total pressure pattern is obtained. The proposed design optimization methodology is tested for several cases including actual gas turbine distortion patterns. The present work resulted in a robust design framework that can be utilized to design distortion screens based on the target total pressure distortion pattern for arbitrary inlet Mach numbers.
affiliations: M S Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences
M S Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences Department of Aerospace and Automotive Engineering, ,   ,
Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur Department of Mechanical Engineering, ,   ,
summary_zh: 本文针对燃气轮机测试中进气畸变问题，开发了一种复杂总压畸变屏的设计优化方法。通过计算均匀孔隙率筛网的总压损失特性（孔隙率0.20-0.90，进口马赫数0.01-0.67），建立了反设计方法，并采用梯度优化迭代求解，最终实现了目标总压畸变模式的精确模拟。
method: 数值计算与反设计优化：计算不同孔隙率和马赫数下的总压损失，构建目标函数，采用梯度法迭代优化畸变屏设计。
innovation: 提出了一种基于反设计思想的畸变屏优化框架，可针对任意进口马赫数生成目标总压畸变模式，具有通用性和鲁棒性。
conclusions: 1. 孔隙率对总压损失影响显著，且随马赫数变化；2. 所提优化方法能有效复现实际燃气轮机畸变模式。
limitations: 仅考虑总压畸变，未涉及温度或旋流畸变；优化方法可能依赖初始猜测。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接针对进气畸变模拟，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测高度相关，且涉及畸变屏设计方法。

title: Aeroelastic Characteristics of Horizontal Tail in Buffeting Separated Flow
abstract: The horizontal tail of a large aircraft, comparable in size to a medium-sized aircraft’s wing, poses significant aeroelastic risks. Under transonic conditions, the horizontal tail may reside within the separated wake flow induced by wing shock buffet. Subjected to unsteady aerodynamic loads, this interaction causes aeroelastic issues due to forced-separated flow. This study investigates the influence of wing buffet-separated flow on the horizontal tail’s aeroelastic behavior, employing a reduced-order model and computational fluid dynamics and computational structural dynamics (CFD/CSD) time-domain simulations. Results show that the interaction between wing buffet flow and tail shock waves reduces local flow stability. Moreover, nonuniform separation vortices around the tail induce large fluctuating pressure differences between upper and lower surfaces, coupling the tail’s plunge mode with the dominant fluid mode and expanding its aeroelastic instability range. Additionally, the broadband frequency characteristics of the wake flow coincide with the tail’s natural frequencies, exciting pitch-mode aerodynamic resonance. Altering the structural parameters of a horizontal tail immersed in wake flow also modifies its aeroelastic characteristic.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
United Aircraft (Russia)
AVIC the First Aircraft Institute
summary_zh: 研究跨声速条件下机翼抖振分离流对水平尾翼气动弹性的影响，采用降阶模型和CFD/CSD时域仿真。发现尾翼与抖振流相互作用降低局部流动稳定性，非均匀分离涡引起大幅脉动压差，耦合俯仰模态并扩大失稳范围；尾流宽带频率与尾翼固有频率重合，激发俯仰模态气动共振。
method: 数值仿真：降阶模型结合CFD/CSD时域模拟，分析跨声速抖振分离流中水平尾翼的气动弹性响应。
innovation: 揭示了机翼抖振分离流与尾翼激波相互作用对局部流动稳定性的影响，以及尾流宽带频率与尾翼模态耦合导致的气动共振机制。
conclusions: 1. 非均匀分离涡引起尾翼上下表面大幅脉动压差，耦合俯仰模态并扩大气动弹性失稳范围。2. 尾流宽带频率与尾翼固有频率重合，激发俯仰模态气动共振。
limitations: 未考虑结构非线性及三维效应，且仅针对特定跨声速工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及气动弹性与流固耦合，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Small Random Aerodynamic Mistuning and Its Effect on Compressor Rotor Forced Response
abstract: Small blade-to-blade geometric differences in compressor rotors are always present due to manufacturing tolerances, operational wear, etc. The small blade geometric variations affect both the structural response and aerodynamic response of the rotor, known as structural mistuning and aerodynamic mistuning, respectively. Extensive structural mistuning research has shown that small blade geometric variations can be effectively modeled by blade frequency deviations, which are the basis of the structural mistuning matrix in various reduced-order models. Aerodynamically, small blade geometric variations result in blade unsteady loading and aerodynamic coupling variations. A semi-analytical flat-plate cascade model was developed in this paper to quantify the aerodynamic mistuning matrix with random blade spacing variation. Monte Carlo simulations based on a three-stage axial research compressor were conducted to study the effect of small random blade spacing variation on blade forced response. Due to the high mass ratio, the effect of structural mistuning is much stronger than the effect of aerodynamic mistuning, and thus it dominates the rotor resonant frequencies. On the other hand, since aerodynamic damping is the primary damping source in a blisk-type rotor, aerodynamic mistuning alters the rotor blade resonant amplitudes by altering the aerodynamic damping. Blade spacing variations lead to blade-to-blade external forcing function variations, which also play an important role in altering the blade forced response curve.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University
summary_zh: 本文研究了压气机转子中由制造公差和磨损引起的小随机叶片间距变化对强迫响应的影响。开发了半解析平板叶栅模型量化气动失谐矩阵，并基于三级轴流研究压气机进行蒙特卡洛模拟。结果表明，结构失谐主导共振频率，而气动失谐通过改变气动阻尼影响共振幅值。
method: 半解析平板叶栅模型结合蒙特卡洛模拟，基于三级轴流压气机，考虑随机叶片间距变化。
innovation: 首次量化了随机叶片间距变化引起的气动失谐矩阵，并系统比较了结构失谐与气动失谐对强迫响应的不同影响。
conclusions: 1. 高质量比下结构失谐效应远强于气动失谐，主导共振频率。2. 气动失谐通过改变气动阻尼影响共振幅值，叶片间距变化还导致外激励函数变化。
limitations: 仅考虑叶片间距变化，未涉及其他几何偏差；平板叶栅模型简化了真实三维流动。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机叶片强迫响应和气动弹性，与用户研究方向相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Vortex Evolution and Turbulence Dissipation During Leakage Flow in the Scallop Bionic Seal of Supercritical CO2 Turbomachinery Unit
abstract: Abstract The supercritical carbon dioxide (SCO2) Brayton cycle system is considered one of the most representative energy conversion systems of the future. Current seal solutions used in the SCO2 turbomachinery have difficulties in suppressing leakage of SCO2 with variable thermophysical properties in the gap between the rotor and the stator. The scallop bionic seal (SBS) is an innovative sealing solution for the SCO2 turbomachinery. The bionic cavities of the SBS promote vortex development and turbulence dissipation in the SCO2 leakage flow, improving the SBS’s sealing performance. However, the transient turbulence dissipation of the leakage flow inside the SBS subjected to rotor shear makes the experimental result deviate from its design objective. This research developed a high-order flow solver to analyze the transient behaviors of leakage flow inside SBS. The mechanism of vortex development on leakage flow turbulence dissipation is elucidated, and a novel correlation between the variation frequency in turbulence dissipation and the rotor’s rotational frequency is discovered. The results indicate that the spatial development of vortices under the rotor’s shearing action is the primary factor affecting turbulent dissipation. The helicity of leakage flow suggests that the vortices undergo merging, splitting, and shedding processes. There is a correlation between the change frequency in the leakage flow turbulent dissipation and the rotor rotation frequency, resulting in the frequency of periodic changes in the leakage rate of SBS being one-half of the rotor rotation frequency. This study supports the application of the SBS operating in the SCO2 turbomachinery unit.
affiliations: Xi'an Jiaotong University
State Key Laboratory of Multiphase Flow in Power Engineering, Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an 710049, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对超临界CO2涡轮机械中转子-静子间隙泄漏流问题，提出扇贝仿生密封（SBS）方案。通过高阶流动求解器分析SBS内泄漏流的瞬态行为，揭示涡旋发展对湍流耗散的影响机制，发现湍流耗散变化频率与转子旋转频率相关，泄漏率周期性变化频率为转子频率的一半。
method: 采用高阶流动求解器进行数值模拟，分析转子剪切作用下SBS内泄漏流的瞬态行为及涡旋演化。
innovation: 首次提出扇贝仿生密封用于超临界CO2涡轮机械，并发现泄漏流湍流耗散变化频率与转子旋转频率的定量关系。
conclusions: 转子剪切作用下的涡旋空间发展是影响湍流耗散的主要因素；SBS泄漏率周期性变化频率为转子旋转频率的一半。
limitations: 仅针对超临界CO2工质，未考虑其他工况或密封几何参数的影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙泄漏流和转子剪切效应，但主要关注密封性能而非压气机稳定性。

title: Dynamic surge behavior induced by variable geometry turbine adjustment in a small turbojet engine
abstract: Aerodynamic instability in aero engines remains a critical issue, adversely affecting engine performance and structural integrity. While existing studies have primarily focused on component-level testing, there remains limited research on compressor instability under real engine operating conditions. Conventional surge induction methods, such as air injection or fuel-spiking, often introduce significant unsteady disturbances that interfere with surge processes. In this study, modifications were made to the turbine component of a small turbojet engine to enable variable stator functionality. By adjusting the variable-geometry stator, the engine was driven into surge through a quasi-steady process. High-frequency dynamic pressure probes captured the complete pressure history at the compressor inlet and outlet during instability development. The results indicate that mild surge occurs at most tested spool speeds, with stronger surges at certain speeds leading to simultaneous high-frequency instabilities such as rotating stall. This study also outlines the operational constraints of the Variable-Geometry Turbine (VGT) surge induction method across different spool speeds, clarifying its operational envelope for small turbojet engines.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Institute for Aero Engine, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
China General Nuclear Power Corporation (China)
Hawk Power Technology Co., LTD, Neijiang 641005, China
School of Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 本研究通过改装小型涡喷发动机涡轮为可变几何结构，以准稳态方式诱发喘振，利用高频动态压力传感器记录压气机进出口压力历史。结果表明多数转速下出现轻度喘振，特定转速下伴随旋转失速等高周不稳定性，并明确了可变几何涡轮喘振诱导方法的操作边界。
method: 实验研究，改装小型涡喷发动机涡轮为可变几何静子，通过调节静子角度准稳态诱发喘振，使用高频动态压力探头测量。
innovation: 采用可变几何涡轮调节实现准稳态喘振诱导，避免了传统注气或喷油方法引入的非定常干扰，更真实反映发动机工况下的失稳过程。
conclusions: 1. 多数测试转速下发生轻度喘振，特定转速下出现更强喘振并伴随旋转失速等高周不稳定性。2. 明确了可变几何涡轮喘振诱导方法在不同转速下的操作边界。
limitations: 仅针对小型涡喷发动机，未涉及大涵道比或高压比压气机，且未深入分析叶尖间隙等局部畸变影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及喘振和旋转失速等压气机稳定性问题，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测有间接关联，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Multiphysics modeling and harmonic input correlation analysis for active twist rotors: Load reduction with macrofiber piezoelectric composites
abstract: The current helicopters still endure high vibration due to the alternating aerodynamic loads, causing component fatigue and passenger discomfort. However, the capability of traditional passive control is limited by the narrow operating frequency bandwidth and large additional component weight. The active twist rotor technology based on macrofiber piezoelectric composites offers a potential solution for reducing rotor vibratory loads. To explore the mechanism of loads reduction via active twist and analyze the effects of related input parameters on the control capability, a novel comprehensive dynamics analysis model for multilayer anisotropic composite material blades integrated with active materials is developed. This model accounts for the coupling effect of force and electric fields through modifying the section force-strain constitutive equation. The control effects of different piezoelectric fiber ply orientation angles with ( N b – 1)P, N b P and ( N b +1)P inputs on N b P hub vibratory loads are first systematically quantified. The results show that the ( N b – 1)P voltage has the best control capability on the N b P hub rolling and pitching vibratory loads, achieving reductions exceeding 92.07%. Meanwhile, the N b P voltage has the best control capability on the N b P hub vertical and yawing vibratory loads, achieving reductions exceeding 95.34%. The reductions in the N b P hub vertical and yawing vibratory loads result from the decrease in the N b P blade lift and drag amplitudes. The reductions in the N b P hub rolling and pitching vibratory loads are primarily from the decrease in the ( N b – 1)P aerodynamic amplitudes. Nevertheless, the ( N b +1)P blade lift may increase or decrease, depending on the harmonic order of the control input. The hierarchical attenuation patterns in aerodynamics amplitude modifications under active twist inputs are analyzed in detail, and the control capabilities of the ( N b – 1)P, N b P and ( N b +1)P inputs on the N b P hub vibratory loads are quantitatively evaluated using the Spearman’s rank correlation coefficient for the first time.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
National Key Laboratory of Helicopter Aeromechanics, Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Nanjing 210016, China
summary_zh: 本文针对直升机旋翼振动问题，建立了集成压电纤维复合材料的多层各向异性叶片动力学模型，通过修正力-应变本构方程考虑力电耦合。系统量化了不同谐波输入对桨毂振动载荷的控制效果，发现(Nb-1)P电压对滚转和俯仰载荷减振超92%，NbP电压对垂直和偏航载荷减振超95%，并首次用Spearman秩相关系数评估控制能力。
method: 数值建模与谐波输入相关性分析；考虑多层各向异性复合材料与压电纤维的力电耦合，采用(Nb-1)P、NbP、(Nb+1)P三种谐波输入工况。
innovation: 首次系统量化不同谐波输入对桨毂多方向振动载荷的控制效果，并引入Spearman秩相关系数进行定量评估，揭示了气动幅值分层衰减规律。
conclusions: (Nb-1)P电压使NbP滚转和俯仰载荷降低超92.07%；NbP电压使NbP垂直和偏航载荷降低超95.34%。减振机制分别为降低(Nb-1)P气动幅值和NbP升力/阻力幅值。
limitations: 研究基于数值模型，未考虑实验验证；仅针对特定谐波输入，未涵盖所有工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及旋翼振动控制与气动弹性，但与压气机叶尖间隙畸变、稳定裕度预测等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Experimental Investigation on the Effects of Inlet Circumferential Distortion and Optimized Casing Treatment in a Transonic Compressor
abstract: Abstract Casing treatment has been widely adopted to enhance the operating range of compressors by extending the stall margin. In this article, a high-precision experimental investigation is conducted in a transonic compressor with inlet circumferential distortion. Unsteady pressure is measured in the casing wall using a cluster of time-resolved transducers with axial and circumferential spatial resolution. The experimental data show that the optimized casing treatment improves the stall margin with minimal efficiency penalty for all measured inflow conditions. A comprehensive unsteady static pressure analysis indicates that the instability mode can be altered by inlet distortion. Shock structures and unsteadiness are affected by the inlet distortion, particularly in the exit of the distorted region. Results of flow field structure analysis show that casing treatment can significantly modify the shock wave detachment, which is the primary stability enhancement mechanism of casing treatment. Furthermore, the implementation of casing treatment significantly enhances the disturbance tolerance of the compressor and effectively suppresses characteristic frequency bands induced by the unsteady fluctuation of tip leakage flow.
affiliations: Institute of Engineering Thermophysics

Digital Twin Research Center, Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences, National Key Laboratory of Science and Technology on Advanced Light-duty Gas-turbine, No. 11 Beisihuanxi Road, Beijing 100190, China
summary_zh: 本文通过高精度实验研究了进口周向畸变下跨声速压气机中优化机匣处理的效果。采用时变压力传感器阵列测量机匣壁面非定常压力，发现优化机匣处理在所有进口条件下均能显著提升失速裕度且效率损失极小。畸变改变了失稳模态，机匣处理通过改变激波脱体位置增强稳定性，并抑制叶尖泄漏流非定常波动特征频带。
method: 实验研究，在跨声速压气机中引入进口周向畸变，使用高时间分辨率压力传感器阵列测量机匣壁面非定常压力。
innovation: 首次在进口周向畸变条件下系统评估优化机匣处理对失速裕度的影响，并揭示畸变改变失稳模态及机匣处理通过改变激波脱体增强稳定性的机制。
conclusions: 1. 优化机匣处理在所有进口条件下均能显著提升失速裕度，且效率损失极小。2. 机匣处理通过改变激波脱体位置增强稳定性，并抑制叶尖泄漏流非定常波动特征频带。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机及周向畸变形式，未涵盖其他畸变类型或全工况范围。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变（进口周向畸变）对压气机稳定性的影响，并采用实验测量方法，与用户研究方向高度相关。

title: Numerical Evaluation of Morphing Busemann Inlet at Off-Design Angle of Attack
abstract: The performance of inward-turning scramjet inlets degrades at changes in angle of attack, limiting the potential maneuverability of vehicles that could use such inlets. The performance of a baseline, axisymmetric, inward-turning, truncated Busemann-style inlet designed for Mach 6 is characterized at off-design angles of attack using a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes methodology, demonstrating the propensity to unstart. A morphing strategy is proposed in which the same inlet is bent near the throat to face the oncoming freestream as the angle of attack changes. The inlet-isolator performance for the morphed geometry at off-design angles of attack is shown to have substantially improved relative to the baseline. Performance metrics include total pressure recovery, flow distortion, and stream thrust. Grid insensitive solutions are obtained at each angle of attack using a systematic grid adaptation strategy. Susceptibility to unstart due to backpressure is also characterized for the baseline and morphed inlets.
affiliations: Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University
RTX (United States)
Raytheon
summary_zh: 针对马赫6轴对称截短Busemann进气道，采用RANS方法评估攻角变化导致的不起动特性，提出喉道弯曲变形策略以改善非设计攻角性能，显著提升总压恢复、降低畸变并增大流推力。
method: 数值模拟（RANS），马赫6，攻角变化，系统网格自适应策略。
innovation: 提出进气道喉部弯曲变形策略，通过几何重构适应来流方向，改善非设计攻角性能。
conclusions: 变形进气道在非设计攻角下总压恢复、流畸变和流推力显著优于基线；背压不起动敏感性降低。
limitations: 仅针对轴对称截短Busemann进气道，未考虑三维效应及实际变形机构。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气对稳定性的影响，但研究对象为进气道而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或旋转不稳定性。

title: Loss Characteristics of Cantilevered Cascade With Moving Endwall Under Upstream Wake Influence
abstract: Abstract In multistage small-core compressors, the inflow conditions of cantilevered cascades exhibit considerable complexity. It is characterized by a larger ratio of tip clearance size to chord length and a larger ratio of wake width to pitch. These factors make it challenging to clarify the key influence of upstream wakes on large-clearance leakage flows within multistage environments. To take this challenge, this article incorporates realistic wake inflow and endwall rotation boundary conditions into the cascade simulations. Based on the wake observations of the multistage compressor (SJTU-LSRC), two sizes of cylinders were designed and positioned upstream of the controlled diffusion airfoil cascade to generate two distinct types of inflow wakes. One wake width is comparable to the multistage compressor wake width, and the other with an expanded width. By employing an unsteady numerical simulation method, the interaction between wake and cantilever cascade clearance leakage is decoupled and elucidated. The effects of different wakes on cascade losses and secondary flows were examined, including tip leakage flow evolution, mid-span flow mixing, and hub suction-side separation changes. Results show both wake widths stabilize clearance leakage flows. However, the wider wake induces significant mid-span mixing losses, increasing cascade entropy loss coefficients by 68% (large clearance) and 94% (small clearance) compared to the narrow wake. This study provides critical insights into small-core compressor flow mechanisms, aiding performance optimization and research advancement.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Aeronautics and Astronautics, , 800 Dongchuan Road,   ,
Shanghai Jiao Tong University
Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global Institute of Future Technology, , 800 Dongchuan Road,   ,
summary_zh: 本研究通过非定常数值模拟，探究了上游尾迹对悬臂叶栅叶尖泄漏流的影响。设计了两种宽度的尾迹发生器，模拟多级压气机环境。结果表明，尾迹可稳定泄漏流，但宽尾迹显著增加中跨掺混损失，使熵增系数增大68%（大间隙）和94%（小间隙）。
method: 采用非定常数值模拟，基于SJTU-LSRC多级压气机尾迹观测，设计两种圆柱尾迹发生器，模拟不同宽度尾迹与旋转端壁边界条件。
innovation: 首次在悬臂叶栅中同时考虑真实尾迹宽度和端壁旋转效应，解耦并阐明了尾迹与叶尖泄漏流的相互作用机制。
conclusions: 1. 两种宽度的尾迹均能稳定叶尖泄漏流。2. 宽尾迹导致中跨掺混损失显著增加，大间隙下熵增系数增大68%，小间隙下增大94%。
limitations: 仅针对特定叶型与尾迹宽度，未考虑多级环境中的其他非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙泄漏流与上游尾迹相互作用，与叶尖间隙畸变下的稳定性问题相关。

title: Effect of Inlet Distortion Reduced Frequency on Centrifugal Compressor Performance and Stability
abstract: Characterizing the circumferential angle of inlet total pressure distortion by which a compressor responds in both performance and stability changes is paramount for inlet–gas turbine integration. Past computational simulations for centrifugal compressors have shown that the acoustic propagation time of information through the rotor passage over the dwell time of the rotor in the distorted state dictates this response to distortion. This is known as the acoustic reduced frequency, and a critical value has been shown computationally for centrifugal compressors to be unity. This effort utilizes the Single Stage Centrifugal Compressor at Purdue University to validate this critical value and behavior experimentally utilizing once-per-rev total pressure distortion screens. The compressor was mapped at 80, 90, and 100% corrected speed, which corresponded to subsonic, transonic, and supersonic relative-frame inlet flow Mach numbers. The efficiency of the compressor was minimally affected at transonic and supersonic operation by distortions with reduced frequencies greater than one and then exponentially decayed as distortion extents were increased, causing the reduced frequency to drop below unity. The compressor surged at the same numerical value of work coefficient for all inlet distortion configurations. The surge margin was minimally affected by distortion extents with reduced frequencies above one.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验验证了进气畸变折合频率对离心压气机性能和稳定性的影响。在80%、90%和100%修正转速下，发现折合频率大于1时畸变对效率影响很小，低于1时效率指数衰减；喘振裕度在折合频率大于1时受影响很小。
method: 实验研究，在普渡大学单级离心压气机上使用每周一转总压畸变筛，测量80%、90%和100%修正转速下的性能。
innovation: 首次通过实验验证了离心压气机中声学折合频率临界值为1的数值预测，揭示了畸变折合频率对性能和稳定性的影响规律。
conclusions: 折合频率大于1时，畸变对效率影响很小；低于1时效率指数衰减。所有畸变配置下喘振发生在相同功系数值，折合频率大于1时喘振裕度受影响很小。
limitations: 仅针对单级离心压气机和每周一转畸变，未考虑多级或不同畸变模式。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及畸变进气对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: A Parametric Study on the Influence of Acoustic Treatments in Fan Flutter
abstract: Abstract Acoustic liners in turbo engines reduce community noise but can also impact fan flutter, even though it is at lower frequencies. Without liners, reflected acoustic waves from the intake highlight can induce flutter, reducing the operability close to the stall line, a situation known as flutter bite. Liners alter this behavior by damping the acoustic waves but also shifting their phase, affecting flutter stability. A parametric study using a simplified intake model with an acoustic liner is carried out in this article. Results show that noise liners have a significant impact in flutter stability. The length of the intake, which changes the propagation time of the acoustic waves, also has a relevant effect in fan flutter. Considering the geometry of the AneCom AeroTest (ACAT) fan, the influence of the impedance, position, and length of the acoustic liner is examined. Liners covering more of the intake stabilize cut-on waves but destabilize cut-off frequencies due to reflected decaying modes. Short liners covering a quarter of the intake significantly affect flutter, with those near the inlet expanding instability, while central liners increase stability. Liners near the fan stabilize high frequencies but leave low frequencies near cut-off unstable.
affiliations: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid
Universidad Politécnica de Madrid School of Aeronautics and Space, ,   ,
summary_zh: 本文通过简化进气道模型对声学衬垫对风扇颤振的影响进行参数化研究。发现衬垫通过阻尼和相移声波改变颤振稳定性，进气道长度影响显著。衬垫覆盖更多进气道稳定行波但使截止频率失稳，短衬垫靠近进口扩大不稳定，中央衬垫增加稳定性，靠近风扇的衬垫稳定高频但使低频不稳定。
method: 采用简化进气道模型与声学衬垫进行参数化数值研究，基于ACAT风扇几何，改变衬垫阻抗、位置和长度。
innovation: 系统量化了声学衬垫参数（阻抗、位置、长度）对风扇颤振稳定性的影响，揭示了衬垫对行波和截止波的不同作用机制。
conclusions: 1. 衬垫覆盖更多进气道稳定行波但使截止频率失稳。2. 短衬垫（覆盖1/4进气道）靠近进口扩大不稳定，中央衬垫增加稳定性。
limitations: 基于简化模型和单一风扇几何，未考虑真实发动机复杂边界条件及非线性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及风扇颤振稳定性，与气动弹性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Aerodynamic Performance Prognosis Of Operationally-Used Aero Engine Compressor Blading
abstract: Abstract The operational efficiency of aircraft engines is adversely affected over time due to degradation, manifesting as increased exhaust gas temperature (EGT) and thrust-specific fuel consumption (TSFC). Exceeding critical EGT limits necessitates an overhaul of the engine. During the maintenance of fan and compressor blades, adherence to specific limits outlined in the engine manual is crucial to ensure safe blade functionality. However, current practices lack established criteria for evaluating aerodynamic performance, particularly concerning which geometric parameters-such as leading and trailing edge thickness, chord length, tip clearance, as well as variations in lean and sweep-most significantly impact the performance. Consequently, the extent of engine performance degradation remains uncertain. This study aims to investigate the aerodynamic implications of geometric alterations in compressor blades following usage in a commonly deployed turbofan engine. Serviced blades, processed during maintenance, were digitized and parameterized. A design of experiments approach was employed to create a comprehensive array of synthetic compressor blades based on these parameter variations. Through computational fluid dynamics (CFD) analysis and integration into a fan and low-pressure compressor (LPC) simulation model, as well as a high-pressure compressor (HPC) model, metamodels of the compressor modules were developed. These surrogate models facilitate the assessment of how specific geometric changes impact the aerodynamic efficiency of the compressor, thereby enhancing our understanding of performance deterioration in operational aircraft engines.
affiliations: Technische Universität Braunschweig
Technische Universität Braunschweig, Institute of Jet Propulsion and Turbomachinery, Hermann-Blenk-Str. 37, 38108 Braunschweig, Lower Saxony, Germany
Repha (Germany)
MTU Maintenance Hannover GmbH, Münchner Str. 31, 30855 Langenhagen, Lower Saxony, Germany
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究针对运营中航空发动机压气机叶片因磨损导致的几何变化，通过数字化维修叶片并参数化，采用实验设计生成合成叶片，结合CFD分析和压气机模块代理模型，评估几何参数（如前缘厚度、叶尖间隙等）对气动效率的影响，以理解性能退化。
method: 数值方法：基于维修叶片数字化与参数化，采用实验设计生成合成叶片，通过CFD分析建立压气机模块代理模型。
innovation: 建立了基于实际维修叶片几何变化的代理模型，量化了多种几何参数对气动性能的影响，弥补了当前缺乏评估标准的不足。
conclusions: 叶片几何变化（如叶尖间隙、前缘厚度）显著影响压气机气动效率；代理模型可有效预测性能退化程度。
limitations: 研究基于特定涡扇发动机，未考虑非定常效应及叶片振动影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙对压气机性能的影响，与用户关注的叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度相关，但未直接分析畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Simulation and experimental study of altitude test facility variable speed compressor system based on RBF hybrid prediction modelling
abstract: Accurate prediction of variable-speed compressor performance is critical for Altitude Test Facilities (ATF) and aero-engines, yet it poses a significant challenge. To address this, a hybrid prediction model is proposed, which integrates a Radial Basis Function (RBF) neural network to extract key parameters ( H , F , π c0 ) from compressor performance curves. Within the speed range of 65–105 r/min, the RBF model demonstrates superior accuracy over both Back Propagation (BP) neural networks and conventional interpolation, achieving Mean Absolute Percentage Errors (MAPEs) of 1.72% for relative pressure ratio and 1.53% for actual efficiency. The model is validated through experimental studies and integrated into a variable-speed simulation. Simulation results show overall errors of less than 1% for pressure and mass flow rate compared to experimental data. Furthermore, application of this model to optimize the ATF gas supply system reduced startup time by 16.7% while preventing surge. These verification results confirm that the RBF-based hybrid model provides a reliable framework for performance prediction and simulation of variable-speed compressor systems, offering valuable support for system anti-surge control.
affiliations: Xi'an Jiaotong University
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Xi’an Jiaotong University, Xi’an, Shaanxi 710049, China
AECC Sichuan Gas Turbine Establishment, Mianyang 621703, China
summary_zh: 针对高空试验台变转速压气机性能预测难题，提出基于RBF神经网络的混合预测模型，提取性能曲线关键参数。在65-105 r/min转速范围内，RBF模型精度优于BP网络和插值法，相对压比MAPE为1.72%，效率MAPE为1.53%。实验验证后集成到变转速仿真中，压力和质量流量误差小于1%，并优化供气系统使启动时间缩短16.7%且防止喘振。
method: 数值与实验结合：采用RBF神经网络混合模型，基于压气机性能曲线提取参数，在65-105 r/min转速范围内进行仿真与实验验证。
innovation: 提出RBF混合预测模型，相比BP网络和传统插值法显著提升变转速压气机性能预测精度，并成功应用于系统防喘控制优化。
conclusions: RBF模型预测相对压比MAPE为1.72%，效率MAPE为1.53%；集成后仿真压力和质量流量误差小于1%，启动时间缩短16.7%且防止喘振。
limitations: 研究限于特定转速范围（65-105 r/min），未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或非定常流动稳定性。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机性能预测和喘振控制，但未聚焦叶尖畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Simulation of Lifting Bodies with Vortex Particles Through Active Enstrophy Control
abstract: The Vortex Particle Method (VPM) represents incompressible, unsteady, viscous flows by using independent particles carrying small concentrations of vorticity. This method is suitable for simulating vortex reconnection in the wake as well as flow mixing. It is capable of simulating complex flow fields at a moderate computational cost compared to CFD methods. The VPM can be used alongside a lifting line to estimate the loads and the wake shed by thin lifting bodies. The coupling procedure and the shedding of vortex structures are detailed. The coupled method is validated on a representative range of aeronautical applications of fixed and rotating lifting bodies of increasing complexity. It is well established that turbulent regimes in the wake can lead to numerical instabilities. A new method, based on the control of the enstrophy, is proposed to better represent turbulent flow regimes, thus improving the numerical stability of the VPM. The Diffusion Velocity Method is used to transport and diffuse vortices and represent wake decay. The proposed method is satisfactory in preserving the coherence of the vortex structures and is able to simulate turbulent cases such as rotor-on-rotor interactions or hovering helicopter rotors. The coupled method is able to accurately represent the loads on the lifting bodies and the evolution of their wake.

summary_zh: 本文采用涡粒子法（VPM）耦合升力线模型，模拟固定和旋转升力体的非定常粘性流动与尾迹演化。通过主动涡量控制（基于熵控制）改善湍流数值稳定性，成功模拟了旋翼-旋翼干扰和悬停直升机旋翼等复杂工况，准确预测了升力体载荷和尾迹演变。
method: 数值方法：涡粒子法（VPM）耦合升力线模型，采用扩散速度法输运涡量，通过主动熵控制增强湍流模拟稳定性。
innovation: 提出基于熵控制的主动涡量控制方法，改善VPM在湍流尾迹中的数值稳定性，并成功应用于旋翼-旋翼干扰等复杂旋转升力体场景。
conclusions: 1. 耦合VPM-升力线方法能准确预测升力体载荷和尾迹演化。2. 主动熵控制有效保持涡结构相干性，适用于旋翼-旋翼干扰等湍流工况。
limitations: 仅针对薄升力体，未涉及压气机叶尖间隙或畸变等内流稳定性问题。
relevance_reason: 虽涉及旋转升力体（如旋翼）和涡方法，但未直接针对压气机叶尖间隙畸变或稳定性建模，仅部分相关。

title: Effects of Viscous Unsteady Aerodynamics on Nonlinear Aeroelastic Model
abstract: A nonlinear aeroelastic model for a flexible panel is expanded to consider the effect of the viscous boundary layer using a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solver. This study presents the use of the dynamically linearized time-domain approach reduced-order model to compute the generalized aerodynamic force from a computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulation within the nonlinear aeroelastic solver. Results obtained using the RANS approach are compared with those using an inviscid CFD solver and also the full potential flow. The flutter onset critical condition is obtained based on the limit cycle oscillation amplitudes for a range of supersonic Mach numbers. Additionally, the effect of different viscous boundary-layer thicknesses is explored. Conclusions are made based on the application of this more complete aerodynamic theory, particularly for near-transonic Mach numbers.
affiliations: Georgia Institute of Technology
Duke University
summary_zh: 本研究扩展了柔性板的非线性气动弹性模型，采用RANS求解器考虑粘性边界层效应，通过动态线性化时域降阶模型从CFD计算广义气动力。比较了RANS、无粘CFD和全势流结果，基于极限环振荡幅值获得超音速马赫数下的颤振临界条件，并探索了不同粘性边界层厚度的影响，重点关注近跨音速区域。
method: 数值方法：采用RANS求解器与动态线性化时域降阶模型，计算广义气动力；工况参数：超音速马赫数范围，不同粘性边界层厚度。
innovation: 将粘性边界层效应引入非线性气动弹性模型，通过RANS与降阶模型结合，更精确地预测近跨音速颤振边界。
conclusions: 1. 粘性效应显著影响颤振临界条件，尤其在近跨音速区域；2. 不同边界层厚度导致极限环振荡幅值变化。
limitations: 仅针对柔性板结构，未涉及旋转机械叶片；未考虑三维效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振，但研究对象为柔性板而非压气机叶片，与压气机稳定性间接相关。

title: Predictions of Flow Distortions Inside a Serpentine Diffuser from Large-Eddy Simulations
abstract: This study examines the flow separation and the resulting pressure distortions at the exit plane of a serpentine diffuser operating at both subsonic and transonic conditions. Wall-modeled large-eddy simulations (WMLESs) using the charLES flow solver are performed at three exit-plane Mach numbers, [Formula: see text]. First, it is shown that the onset of flow separation inside a serpentine diffuser may experience strong, nonlocal history effects. A grid refinement study consisting of five grids (from 30 million to 3 billion cells) is conducted. The computations with the recently proposed dynamic tensor-coefficient Smagorinsky subgrid-scale and sensor-aided nonequilibrium wall models compare favorably with experimental measurements for the pressure recovery and azimuthal flow distortion at all Mach numbers. The predicted pressure recovery and azimuthal flow distortion are shown to be within 0.3 and 7%, respectively, of the experimental data. However, the simulations underpredict the maximum azimuthal distortion in comparison to the experiments for all conditions. Statistical comparisons of the dynamic azimuthal flow distortions suggest that the present LES reasonably captures the ring-averaged mean distortions and the statistical distributions of the distortion around the mean. Extreme events are underestimated by the present simulations, potentially highlighting that significantly longer integration times may be necessary.

summary_zh: 本研究采用壁模大涡模拟（WMLES）对亚声速和跨声速条件下蛇形扩压器内的流动分离及出口压力畸变进行预测。通过五套网格（300万至30亿单元）的细化研究，发现分离起始存在强非局部历史效应。预测的压力恢复和方位角畸变与实验偏差分别在0.3%和7%以内，但最大畸变被低估。
method: 数值模拟：采用charLES求解器的壁模大涡模拟（WMLES），结合动态张量系数Smagorinsky亚网格模型和传感器辅助非平衡壁模型，在三个出口马赫数下进行。
innovation: 首次在蛇形扩压器中应用动态张量系数Smagorinsky模型和传感器辅助非平衡壁模型，并系统评估了网格分辨率对畸变预测的影响。
conclusions: 1. 压力恢复和方位角畸变预测与实验偏差分别在0.3%和7%以内。2. 最大方位角畸变被低估，极端事件需要更长的积分时间。
limitations: 仅针对蛇形扩压器，未涉及旋转机械；极端畸变事件预测不足，可能需要更长时间统计。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气，与压气机进气畸变相关，但对象为扩压器而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或稳定性。

title: On the Mechanism of Unsteady Tip Flow Occurrence in a Transonic Fan
abstract: Abstract The tip clearance flow, closely related to stable margin and efficiency, influences the performance of the fan/compressor in aeroengines. The unsteady tip flow in a high-speed transonic fan rotor is studied by numerical methods. This phenomenon is considered to be related to the flow instability. This article studied the occurrence and the development of the unsteady tip flow. The unsteady flow structure and the dynamic mode of pressure fluctuation are also demonstrated. The Richardson number in a turbomachinery environment, Riturbo number, is novelly proposed to study the probability of Kelvin–Helmholtz instability inducing the unsteady tip flow. It is found that after the fluctuation occurs, as the flowrate decreases, the Riturbo number shows a downward trend of a power function. When the stability provided by the centrifugal force gradually decreases, the tangential inertia force plays a major role, and the internal instability of the shear layer is prone to occur under the large disturbance caused by the vortex wave interference.
