summary_zh: 本研究通过线性压气机叶栅实验，探究剪切层不稳定性是否引起旋转不稳定性。采用Coandă喷嘴在端壁上游注入空气形成剪切层，改变位置、速度和进气角，分析其对压力脉动的诱导、抑制或增强作用。实验发现无叶尖间隙时也存在类似旋转不稳定性的频谱特征，支持剪切层不稳定性假说。
method: 实验研究，采用线性压气机叶栅，雷诺数与真实转子相同，马赫数低于0.3。通过Coandă喷嘴注入空气形成剪切层，进行参数化研究，并测量出口平面时均流和瞬态机匣压力。
innovation: 首次在无叶尖间隙的线性叶栅中观察到类似旋转不稳定性的频谱，并通过主动注入剪切层验证其与旋转不稳定性的关联，为旋转不稳定性机理提供新证据。
conclusions: 1. 无叶尖间隙配置下仍出现类似旋转不稳定性的频谱，支持剪切层不稳定性假说。2. Coandă喷嘴注入可诱导、抑制或增强压力脉动，具体效果取决于参数组合。
limitations: 实验为低速线性叶栅，未考虑真实旋转效应和高速可压缩性影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 直接研究旋转不稳定性机理，与用户关注的叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Modeling and Observation of Micro-Vibration from Magnetically Suspended Flywheel Considering Base Motion
abstract: The dynamic characteristics of magnetically suspended flywheels (MSFs) during on-orbit operation are significantly influenced by the rigid-body motion of the hosting spacecraft. This study examines the impact of base motion on the microvibration disturbance characteristics of MSFs through both theoretical modeling and experimental validation. Focusing on a five-degree-of-freedom Ampère force MSF, a coupled dynamic-control model is developed that incorporates air-gap variations between the rotor and stator induced by base motion. A disturbance model for electrical runout, originating from rotor surface roughness, is derived based on the physical mechanism of electrical runout generation. This model is used to analyze the microvibration behavior of the MSF and the influence of base motion through simulation. Spectral analysis reveals that rotor unbalance is the primary source of synchronous-frequency disturbances, whereas electrical runout is a major contributor to harmonic components. Moreover, the amplitude of microvibration disturbances is shown to be sensitive to base motion. To further quantify the impact of base motion, a disturbance transfer model at the MSF installation interface is formulated using a modified dynamic mass method. The results demonstrate that disturbances influenced by base motion are strongly dependent on rotor mass. The theoretical findings are validated through ground-based microvibration testing, employing a test setup designed to emulate the “free–free” boundary conditions representative of the on-orbit dynamic conditions. The experimental results confirm the accuracy of the developed theoretical models and analytical conclusions.
affiliations: National University of Defense Technology
Sun Yat-Sen University
summary_zh: 本研究通过理论建模与实验验证，分析了基座运动对磁悬浮飞轮微振动扰动特性的影响。建立了考虑气隙变化的耦合动力学控制模型，揭示了转子不平衡和电跳变分别是同步和谐波扰动的主要来源，且扰动幅度对基座运动敏感。
method: 理论建模与实验验证相结合，采用五自由度安培力MSF模型，通过动态质量法建立扰动传递模型，并设计自由-自由边界条件的地面微振动测试。
innovation: 首次将基座运动与磁悬浮飞轮微振动耦合建模，并基于电跳变物理机制推导了扰动模型，揭示了基座运动对扰动传递的依赖关系。
conclusions: 转子不平衡是同步频率扰动主因，电跳变是谐波分量主因；基座运动影响的扰动强烈依赖于转子质量。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定五自由度MSF，未考虑其他类型飞轮或更复杂基座运动模式。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子振动控制，但与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Far-Field Sound-Source Behavior in an Idealized Tip Clearance Flow
abstract: The present study investigates the wall pressure fluctuations and the velocity field in a tip clearance flow formed by placing a stationary, cambered airfoil next to a wall with the aim to understand the far-field sound behavior. The tip clearance heights considered range between 14 and 30% of the incoming, undisturbed boundary-layer thickness; and the clearance height-based Reynolds numbers were between 2600 and 16,000. The results show that, besides the tip-leakage vortex, large-scale rib vortices that reside near the trailing edge are a major source of low-frequency unsteadiness that produces correlated pressure fluctuations across the tip and the wall surfaces, resulting in a strong low-frequency noise radiation from this region. A reduction in clearance height suppresses these vortices, leading to a reduction in both near- and far-field pressure fluctuations at low frequencies. The turbulence levels and wall pressure fluctuations further upstream in the midchord region of the clearance are weaker, and reducing the clearance height decreases the low-frequency pressure fluctuation levels but increases the levels in the mid- to high-frequency range. For the smallest clearance height in the present work, a significant flowfield unsteadiness near the leading edge that results in intense high-frequency near- and far-field pressure fluctuations is observed.
affiliations: UNSW Sydney
University of New South Wales
Defence Science and Technology Group

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验测量壁面压力脉动和速度场，探究了静止弯翼型与壁面间叶尖间隙流动的远场声源特性。发现除叶尖泄漏涡外，尾缘附近的大尺度肋状涡是低频非定常性和噪声的主要来源。减小间隙高度可抑制这些涡，降低低频压力脉动，但最小间隙下前缘附近出现强高频脉动。
method: 实验测量，采用静止弯翼型与壁面形成叶尖间隙，间隙高度为来流边界层厚度的14%-30%，基于间隙高度的雷诺数2600-16000。
innovation: 揭示了尾缘附近大尺度肋状涡作为低频噪声源的关键作用，并量化了间隙高度对近场和远场压力脉动频谱特性的影响。
conclusions: 1. 尾缘肋状涡是低频噪声的主要来源，减小间隙高度可抑制该涡并降低低频压力脉动。2. 最小间隙下前缘出现强高频脉动，导致高频噪声增强。
limitations: 仅针对静止翼型，未考虑旋转效应；间隙高度范围有限，未涵盖更小或更大间隙。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙流动与噪声，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变及稳定性间接相关，但未涉及旋转机械或稳定性裕度预测。

title: Numerical and Experimental Investigation of Inter-Stage Bleed in Axial Compressors of Industrial Gas Turbine
abstract: Abstract To provide a practical design basis for the compressor bleed system design, this paper uses numerical simulation and rig tests to evaluate the influence of bleed system design parameters on bleed performance. The research focuses on a multistage axial compressor of a real industrial gas turbine. Through numerical simulations, the complex three-dimensional (3D) flow in the bleed system is analyzed. It is found that at high bleed rates—specifically 15.2% during the startup process of the distributed energy gas turbine, which is designed for antisurge protection—the pressure loss is mainly in the bleed annular cavity and off-take duct, accounting for over 80% of the total loss. The bleed annular cavity design affects the jet in the cavity and flow loss in the off-take duct. There is an optimal axial position for the off-take duct inlet (OTDI) to minimize pressure loss. When the high-speed jet from the bleed slot (BST) outlet faces the off-take duct inlet directly, the circumferential static pressure nonuniformity reaches its maximum. At a high bleed rate of 15.2%, the static pressure nonuniformity at the throat increases by nearly 40% compared to the optimal axial position, revealing the sensitivity of the parametric design of bleed systems to the circumferential nonuniformity of the flow field. The bleed annular cavity impacts the circumferential uniformity of the mainstream flow field differently under various bleed system designs. A well-designed bleed system can prevent nonuniform interstage bleed from causing significant unit performance degradation; however, it still affects the unit's stall or surge characteristics, specifically altering the location where rotational stall occurs and the stall frequency in the mainstream flow field. This highlights the need to balance antisurge functionality with compressor spatial constraints during design, guiding optimized layouts that mitigate flow instability risks.

summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟和实验研究了工业燃气轮机多级轴流压气机级间引气系统设计参数对引气性能的影响。发现高引气率（15.2%）下压力损失主要发生在引气环形腔和引出管道（占80%以上），引出管道入口存在最佳轴向位置以最小化压力损失。引气系统设计影响主流流场的周向均匀性，并改变旋转失速位置和频率。
method: 采用数值模拟（三维流场分析）和实验（台架试验）相结合的方法，针对实际工业燃气轮机多级轴流压气机，在15.2%高引气率工况下进行研究。
innovation: 揭示了高引气率下引气系统参数对周向非均匀性和失速特性的影响，提出了平衡防喘功能与空间约束的优化布局指导。
conclusions: 1. 高引气率（15.2%）下，引气环形腔和引出管道的压力损失占总损失的80%以上。2. 引出管道入口轴向位置影响压力损失，当高速射流正对入口时，喉部静压周向非均匀性比最佳位置增加近40%。
limitations: 研究基于特定工业燃气轮机，未涵盖不同几何尺寸和工况的通用性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机失速/喘振机理和流动稳定性，与用户研究方向相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Impact of Endwall Clearances on Off-Design Performance of Boundary Layer Ingesting Variable Pitch Fans
abstract: Abstract Aircraft propulsion research in recent years, driven by challenging emission targets, has focused on hybrid-electric propulsion systems such as electrically powered boundary layer ingesting (BLI) aft-fans. Variable pitch BLI fans have performance benefits at low speed, low altitude conditions over conventional designs. However, blade variability necessitates additional nonuniform endwall clearances to avoid intersections during repitch, which act as drivers of secondary flows. This paper investigates, numerically using 3D single passage Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS), the impact of hub and tip gaps on the aerodynamic performance of electrically powered BLI fans with variable pitch at takeoff conditions. It validates how restaggering the rotor leads to better utilization of the electric motor capabilities and improves overall performance while decreasing the relative mass flow across the tip. Comparing the performance at the aerodynamic design point (ADP) between a 14 deg variable blade and a fixed blade with a constant gap height equaling the average of the former reveals a 10.7% higher tip leakage mass flow rate across the fixed blade tip. Correspondingly, the 14 deg variable blade has a 17.7% greater flow rate with respect to a nonvariable blade with the same nominal gap height. Two blade pitch variability ranges of 10 deg and 14 deg were considered, which corresponds to an increase in maximum tip gap at design stagger by 0.2% of the blade span. Evaluating speedlines for the takeoff operating point at a rotor pitch setting of 10 deg resulted in an additional stability margin (SM) of 6.8% for the less variable blade.

summary_zh: 本文采用三维单通道RANS数值方法，研究了边界层吸入变距风扇在起飞工况下轮毂和叶尖间隙对气动性能的影响。发现变距叶片通过重新调整桨距角可更好利用电机能力，降低叶尖相对流量，并在10度变距范围内获得6.8%的额外稳定裕度。
method: 三维单通道RANS数值模拟，研究起飞工况下变距风扇的轮毂和叶尖间隙影响，对比固定叶片与变距叶片（10°和14°变距范围）的性能。
innovation: 针对边界层吸入变距风扇，量化了变距导致的非均匀端壁间隙对二次流和稳定裕度的影响，揭示了变距叶片相比固定叶片在叶尖泄漏流量上的差异。
conclusions: 1. 14°变距叶片相比固定叶片（平均间隙）叶尖泄漏流量低10.7%；2. 10°变距叶片在起飞点提供6.8%的额外稳定裕度。
limitations: 仅考虑单通道RANS，未包含全周非定常效应及变距过程中的动态间隙变化。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对稳定裕度的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Fan Flutter at Mild Wind Conditions at Sea-Level-Static
abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the impact of ground vortex on the flutter stability of a fan blade during sea-level-static (SLS) operation under mild and zero crosswind conditions. Flutter rig tests or computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations are typically performed, assuming clean intakes without considering the ground plane. However, when an aircraft engine operates close to the ground in static or near-static conditions, a strong vortex forms at the ground plane and is ingested into the intake. With the rise of ultra-high bypass ratio engines, with shorter intakes and reduced ground clearances, it is crucial to determine whether and how distortions such as ground vortex influence the flutter stability of the fan blade. A three-dimensional unsteady CFD model is used to analyze the phenomenon. The findings in this work indicate that at sea-level-static conditions with a mild crosswind, the ground vortex modifies the intake acoustics slightly, which in turn influences the flutter stability of the fan blade, leading to a small reduction in the flutter margin. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first time the effects of ground vortex on fan blade flutter stability have been presented, offering valuable insights for aero-engine manufacturers and researchers in the field of aeroelasticity.

summary_zh: 本文研究了海平面静态条件下，地面涡对风扇叶片颤振稳定性的影响。通过三维非定常CFD模型分析发现，在微风条件下，地面涡轻微改变进气声学特性，导致颤振裕度小幅降低。这是首次揭示地面涡对风扇叶片颤振稳定性的影响。
method: 采用三维非定常CFD数值模拟，模拟海平面静态（SLS）工况，考虑微风和零侧风条件，分析地面涡对风扇叶片颤振的影响。
innovation: 首次研究地面涡对风扇叶片颤振稳定性的影响，填补了该领域空白，为航空发动机设计和气动弹性研究提供新见解。
conclusions: 1. 地面涡在微风条件下会轻微改变进气声学特性，导致颤振裕度小幅降低。2. 这是首次揭示地面涡对风扇叶片颤振稳定性的影响。
limitations: 仅针对海平面静态和微风条件，未考虑其他工况（如强侧风或高空条件）及地面涡的详细参数影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对颤振稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接使用三维激盘模型。

title: The Design of Aspirated Stators for Compressor Bleed
abstract: Abstract Gas turbine operation requires air to be extracted from the primary compressor flow path for a variety of purposes, including turbine cooling and off-design stage matching. This “bleed air” is typically extracted through the compressor casing using either: a continuous circumferential slot; or discrete holes, each with a diameter on the order of a blade pitch. In this article, the benefits of extracting air through an array of holes on the stator blade suction surface, each with a diameter on the order of 1% of the blade chord, are identified. Such blades are referred to as aspirated compressor blades. Using a combined experimental and computational approach, two findings are presented. First, the operating range of the aspirated compressor blade is widened through the control of corner separations. The aspiration reduces the streamline curvature of the surface limiting streamlines, inhibiting corner separation formation. This control is sensitive to air removal through aspiration holes close to the endwall where the separation is expected to occur, with increased air extraction in this region further extending the stator operating range. The second finding is that the loss of the integrated compressor passage and bleed system can be reduced by extracting air via a combined circumferential bleed slot and aspirated compressor blade approach. This article shows that using aspirated compressor blades can increase the operating range of a stator by 1.8 deg in experimental measurements, and, in simulations, increase the adiabatic efficiency of a three-stage representative industrial gas turbine compressor by 3 percentage points.

summary_zh: 本文研究了在压气机静子叶片吸力面布置小孔（直径约1%弦长）进行吸气（aspiration）的设计。实验和计算表明，该方法通过控制角区分离可拓宽静子工作范围1.8度，并能使三级工业燃气轮机压气机的绝热效率提高3个百分点。
method: 结合实验测量和数值模拟，研究吸气孔位置和吸气量对静子性能的影响，工况为亚声速压气机级。
innovation: 提出在静子叶片吸力面布置小孔阵列进行吸气，而非传统机匣处吸气，并证明其能有效控制角区分离并提高效率。
conclusions: 1. 吸气可拓宽静子工作范围1.8度（实验测量）。2. 吸气可使三级压气机绝热效率提高3个百分点（数值模拟）。
limitations: 研究仅限于亚声速工况，未考虑超声速或跨声速情况；且未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变进气的影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机稳定性（角区分离控制），但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题部分相关。

title: Investigation of Rotating Stall in Vaneless Diffuser of Single-Stage Centrifugal Blower Using Wall-Resolved Large Eddy Simulation
abstract: Abstract Centrifugal turbomachinery, including centrifugal blowers, the focus of this study, is utilized across a wide range of fields and applications, from industrial plants to home appliances. The market demands higher efficiency and a wider operating range. A sudden increase in loss generation impacts the slope of the performance curve and can cause intense fluctuations in pressure within a centrifugal blower, which typically defines the lower limit of the operating range for turbomachinery. To gain a comprehensive understanding and extend the blower's operating range, we applied wall-resolved Large Eddy Simulation (WR-LES) with 14.6 billion grids to a small-scale model of a single-stage centrifugal blower. This model blower was equipped with a vaneless diffuser and a scroll casing. Experimental measurements were also conducted on the model blower to validate the accuracy of the WR-LES. A particular emphasis was placed on clarifying the relationship among the onset of rotating stall, intense fluctuations in static pressure, loss generation, and separations of the meridional flow in the vaneless diffuser. The onset of rotating stall was accurately captured by the WR-LES, whereas under-resolved Large Eddy Simulation predicted it at a lower mass-flow ratio than the experiment or could not predict it at all. At reduced mass-flow ratios, repeated separations of the meridional flow from the hub and shroud sidewalls occur in the diffuser at a mass-flow ratio of 0.61, preceding the onset of rotating stall at 0.41. These separations are induced by a strong adverse pressure gradient in the radial direction rather than by rotating stall. Furthermore, these separations in the meridional flow are accompanied by the occurrence of intense static-pressure fluctuation as well as an increase in loss generation in the diffuser. As rotating stall develops in the vaneless diffuser at a further-reduced flowrate, loss generation intensifies at the mid-span plane, particularly near the diffuser inlet. This is driven by localized acceleration of the tangential velocity, leading to stall-cell formation. Rotating stall also localizes and amplifies the aforementioned separations of the meridional flow in the diffuser.

summary_zh: 采用壁面解析大涡模拟（WR-LES）对单级离心鼓风机无叶扩压器中的旋转失速进行了研究，网格数146亿。发现径向强逆压梯度导致子午流分离先于旋转失速发生，并伴随静压脉动和损失增加。旋转失速在更低流量下发展，加剧了损失和分离。
method: 壁面解析大涡模拟（WR-LES），网格146亿，辅以实验验证。工况：质量流量比0.61（分离起始）和0.41（旋转失速起始）。
innovation: 首次采用极高分辨率WR-LES精确捕捉无叶扩压器旋转失速起始，揭示了子午流分离与旋转失速的先后关系及机理。
conclusions: 1. 子午流分离在质量流量比0.61时出现，先于旋转失速（0.41）。2. 旋转失速加剧了扩压器入口附近的损失，由切向速度局部加速驱动。
limitations: 仅针对单级离心鼓风机，未考虑叶轮与扩压器耦合效应及不同几何参数的影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究旋转失速机理，与压气机稳定性相关，但对象为离心鼓风机无叶扩压器，非轴流压气机。

title: The Influence of Axial Throughflow Swirl on Buoyancy-Induced Flow in a Compressor Cavity
abstract: Abstract Next-generation aero-engine compressors will operate with overall pressure ratios exceeding 70:1. This will require shorter compressor blades, presenting a challenge to the designer when predicting tip clearance and efficiency. Buoyancy-induced flow within co-rotating compressor discs drives the heat transfer that determines rotor expansion and the resulting blade-tip clearance. This inherently unstable flow is influenced by the radial temperature distribution of the discs, rotational speed, as well as enthalpy and momentum exchange with an axial throughflow of cooled air at low radius. Due to the rotation of the engine compressor, this throughflow may become swirled, altering the temperature, mass exchange, and swirl within the rotating cavity. The University of Bath Compressor Cavity Rig has been adapted to introduce preswirl into the axial throughflow by passing it through rotating holes. The effects of inlet swirl have been characterized in terms of Rossby and Reynolds numbers. Measurements of disc temperature, shroud heat flux, and unsteady pressure in the rotating frame of reference are used to quantify the effects of ingestion (entrainment) of fluid into the cavity. The unsteady dynamics and rotation of the core relative to the disc have been measured in both the stationary and rotating frames of reference with consistent results. A single correlation between shroud Nusselt and Grashof numbers has been established, effectively capturing the impact of swirl, Rossby number, and free convection.

summary_zh: 研究下一代航空发动机压气机盘腔中轴向通流旋流对浮力驱动流动的影响。通过实验引入预旋，测量盘温、热通量和非定常压力，量化旋流对盘腔吸入和核心旋转的影响，并建立了努塞尔数与格拉晓夫数的单一关联式。
method: 实验研究，在巴斯大学压气机盘腔实验台上通过旋转孔引入预旋，改变罗斯比数和雷诺数，测量盘温、热通量和非定常压力。
innovation: 首次在盘腔实验中系统引入轴向通流预旋，并建立包含旋流影响的努塞尔数与格拉晓夫数关联式，有效捕捉旋流、罗斯比数和自由对流的影响。
conclusions: 1. 轴向通流旋流显著改变盘腔内的温度、质量交换和旋流分布。2. 建立了单一关联式Nu=f(Gr)，统一描述旋流、罗斯比数和自由对流对传热的影响。
limitations: 仅针对特定实验台和有限工况范围，未考虑真实发动机几何和高压比条件。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙相关的盘腔传热，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Synchronization of the Unsteady Pressure Field: An Explanation for Amplified Ingress
abstract: Abstract The efficiency of aero-engines is linked to increased turbine entry temperature and a secondary air system that protects vulnerable components under high thermal stresses and metal temperatures. Purge (or sealing) air from the compressor is used to limit the ingress of hot mainstream annulus gases into rotor–stator cavities in the high-pressure turbine. Accurately predicting ingress, and understanding conditions under which it is amplified, is a significant challenge for the engine designer. Experimental data gathered from a 1.5-stage turbine facility and a mathematical, physics-informed model are used to link the rotation of large-scale structures (instabilities) near the rim seal with amplified ingress. The ingress wave model identifies the swirl of cyclonic–anticyclonic vortex pairs (instabilities) in the cavity as the transport mechanism for ingress. The intensity of these unsteady rotating structures is maximized if the circumferential pressure field in the cavity is synchronized (hence superposition) to that in the annulus. Cross-correlation of unsteady pressure measurements in the cavity forward of the rotor revealed this synchronization was to the pressure field caused by downstream rotating blades. In the aft cavity, this synchronization was in the stationary frame of reference and associated with the downstream vanes. The effects of amplified ingress are shown to be significant and exist in turbine rigs featuring a wide range of blade and vane counts. In terms of new knowledge and originality, the synchronization to the pressure field provides the first explanation of this important physical mechanism. A criterion for the engine designer to avoid this phenomenon is proposed.

summary_zh: 该研究通过1.5级涡轮实验和数学模型，揭示了轮缘密封附近大尺度结构（不稳定性）的旋转与放大入侵的关联。入侵波模型识别出腔内气旋-反气旋涡对的旋转是入侵的输运机制，当腔内周向压力场与环形通道同步时，非稳态旋转结构强度最大。
method: 实验测量与数学物理模型相结合，在1.5级涡轮实验台上采集非稳态压力数据，通过互相关分析识别同步机制。
innovation: 首次提出压力场同步是放大入侵的物理机制，并给出避免该现象的准则，为涡轮设计提供了新依据。
conclusions: 1. 腔内非稳态旋转结构强度在压力场同步时最大；2. 前腔同步源于下游转子叶片，后腔同步源于下游静叶。
limitations: 研究基于特定1.5级涡轮实验台，未考虑真实发动机中的复杂几何与工况变化。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转不稳定性与压力场同步，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但主要针对涡轮入侵。

title: Process Flow for Integrally Bladed Rotor Mistuning Identification During Depot Inspections Using Geometric Mistuning Approaches
abstract: Abstract Integrally Bladed Rotors (IBRs) are subject to foreign object damage, wear and tear, and repair processes that may mistune the system through nonuniform geometric perturbations during usage. This mistuning can drastically change an IBR's dynamic characteristics that manifest as increased forced responses and, subsequently, fatigue and failure at unscheduled maintenance intervals. To ensure fleet safety, IBRs routinely go through bench-level testing during engine depot visits. A bench-level process is presented here for inspections to continue part safety while learning more about the dynamic characteristics for the fleet. This process starts with optically scanning an IBR to obtain the geometric mistuning features. Mesh metamorphosis algorithms then alter a seed mesh of the design-intent part geometries to the as-measured part. Sector frequency deviations can be computed directly from finite element models (FEMs) of the morphed mesh. Accuracy of these deviations can then be assessed through mistuning identification via geometric mistuning reduced-order models (ROMs) combined with bench-level traveling wave excitation (TWE). These geometric mistuning methods can incorporate the effects of geometric mistuning, but also capture frequency shifts occurring from sources not captured by an optical scanner, e.g., material mistuning. Models resulting from this process stay connected to physics-based FEMs, which is highly desirable for other downstream analyses beyond frequency deviation calculations, e.g., stress and strain calculations. The proposed process is demonstrated on an industrial IBR and illustrates the proposed flow with comparisons between mistuning from geometric and other sources.

summary_zh: 针对整体叶盘在服役中因几何非均匀扰动导致的失谐问题，提出一种基于光学扫描和网格变形技术的失谐识别流程。通过有限元模型计算扇区频率偏差，结合几何失谐降阶模型和行波激励实验验证精度。该方法能捕获几何及材料失谐效应，并保留物理有限元模型用于后续应力应变分析。在工业整体叶盘上验证了流程有效性。
method: 数值与实验结合：光学扫描获取几何失谐，网格变形生成有限元模型，降阶模型计算频率偏差，行波激励实验验证。
innovation: 提出一种结合光学扫描、网格变形和降阶模型的整体叶盘失谐识别流程，能同时捕获几何和材料失谐，并保持与物理有限元模型的连接。
conclusions: 1. 所提流程能有效识别整体叶盘的几何失谐特征。2. 几何失谐降阶模型可准确预测频率偏差，并捕获光学扫描无法反映的材料失谐效应。
limitations: 仅针对整体叶盘，未涉及叶片单独失谐；依赖光学扫描精度和网格变形算法。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子叶片振动预测和失谐识别，与转子振动控制相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Rim Seal Flow Analysis Through a Novel Technique in a Highly Instrumented Two Spool Rig
abstract: Abstract This study introduces the first application of a sparsity-promoting linear regression technique to analyze the flow behavior within the rim seal region between the rotor and stator disks in a highly instrumented engine-representative turbine setup. This approach allows decomposing pressure fluctuations in the rim seal into multiple rotating structures, providing a more precise and detailed interpretation of data collected by flush-mounted, fast-response pressure transducers (Kulite XCQ-062). Many sources of periodic fluctuations, such as the HP rotor, the LP rotor, and the rotor–rotor interaction, characterize the flow in such a complex environment as a two-spool rig. Therefore, the decomposition provided by the linear regression algorithm is beneficial in identifying further periodic structures, such as nonblade passing-related cavity flow modes. The calculated angular speed of the identified structures is qualitatively validated by comparing it with the measured swirl ratio in the cavity at the same radial height. The research was conducted at the Institute of Thermal Turbomachinery at Graz University of Technology, specifically in the Transonic Test Turbine Facility (TTTF). The TTTF is a state-of-the-art facility that replicates engine-relevant flow conditions. It consists of the last high-pressure turbine stage, the turbine intermediate duct, and the first low-pressure turbine (LPT) rotor. Purge flows were supplied to all cavities to simulate engine-like conditions. The fast-response pressure transducers were installed in the downstream hub cavity (DHC), located between the high-pressure stage and the intermediate turbine duct. The measurements were performed across different purge flow rates (PFR) and different stator-clocking positions, producing a comprehensive dataset. The analysis uncovered low-intensity, nonblade passing-related flow modes within the cavity, which could not have been easily identified using other methodologies.

summary_zh: 本研究首次将稀疏促进线性回归技术应用于双轴涡轮试验台的轮缘密封区域流动分析，通过分解压力波动识别出多个旋转结构，包括非叶片通过频率相关的腔体流动模态，并利用实测旋流比验证了角速度。
method: 实验研究，在跨声速涡轮试验台上使用快响应压力传感器测量，结合稀疏促进线性回归进行压力波动分解，变吹气流量和静叶周向位置。
innovation: 首次将稀疏促进线性回归用于轮缘密封流动分析，能够从复杂多源压力信号中分离出非叶片通过频率的腔体流动模态。
conclusions: 1. 轮缘密封区域存在低强度非叶片通过频率的流动模态；2. 通过线性回归识别的旋转结构角速度与实测旋流比定性吻合。
limitations: 仅针对特定涡轮试验台，未涉及压气机或叶尖间隙畸变等稳定性问题。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转流动不稳定性，但研究对象为涡轮轮缘密封，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变及稳定裕度预测无直接关联。

title: Effects of Blade Solidity and Aspect Ratio on a 0.5 Hub-to-Tip Ratio Tube-Axial Fan
abstract: Abstract Blade solidity and aspect ratio are the two geometrical parameters that bridge the preliminary sizing of the fan with the aerodynamic design of the blade. In a previous work, the present authors started investigating the topic with a comprehensive experimental campaign focused on 16 propeller fan design variants with a 0.2 hub-to-tip ratio, all designed for best efficiency operation at approximately 0.075 flow-rate coefficient and 0.008 pressure coefficient. As a further step of the research, this article investigates by experiments the influence of blade solidity and aspect ratio on the global aerodynamic performance of 0.5 hub-to-tip ratio tube-axial fan rotors designed for best efficiency operation at approximately the same flow-rate coefficient as the 0.2 hub-to-tip ratio fans studied in the previous research. The aim of the work is twofold: first, to extend the experimental data set of aerodynamic performance of comparable axial-flow industrial fan designs characterized by different blade solidity and aspect ratio; second, to investigate the role of the hub-to-tip ratio on the effects of the two design parameters. To this end, 18 additional fan design variants were designed and tested in accordance with the ISO-5801 standard and the collected data were compared to the data set made available by testing the original 16 design variants. The results confirm that the global aerodynamic performance of a fan design at best efficiency operation is primarily set by the hub-to-tip ratio. Solidity plays a role comparable to the hub-to-tip ratio only within the minimum-to-low solidity range, whereas the aspect ratio contributes to the definition of the fan efficiency—in designs with the high hub-to-tip ratio only—and the flow-rate coefficient at best efficiency operation—in designs with the low hub-to-tip ratio only.

summary_zh: 实验研究了叶片稠度和展弦比对0.5轮毂比管轴流风扇气动性能的影响，测试了18种设计变体，并与0.2轮毂比数据对比。发现轮毂比主导最佳效率性能，稠度在低稠度范围作用显著，展弦比仅在高轮毂比时影响效率，低轮毂比时影响流量系数。
method: 实验研究，依据ISO-5801标准测试18种风扇设计变体，对比0.2轮毂比数据，分析稠度和展弦比的影响。
innovation: 系统研究了轮毂比对稠度和展弦比效应的影响，扩展了轴流风扇气动性能实验数据集，揭示了不同轮毂比下设计参数作用的差异。
conclusions: 1. 轮毂比是决定最佳效率性能的首要参数。2. 稠度仅在低稠度范围作用显著；展弦比影响效率（高轮毂比）或流量系数（低轮毂比）。
limitations: 仅针对特定流量系数和压力系数设计点，未涉及非设计工况或失速特性。
relevance_reason: 研究风扇气动性能，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未涉及畸变或失速机理。

title: Experimental Investigation of Mass Flow Exchange Ratio and Core Swirl Ratio in a Novel Dual-Cavity Test Rig With Heated Rotating Compressor Cavities
abstract: Abstract The blade tip clearance within an aero-engine high-pressure (HP) compressor is an important factor influencing the efficiency of the engine. Consequently, it is a crucial parameter in the design of next-generation engines. The transient clearance of the blades depends directly on the radial expansion of the rotating compressor disks. In the shroud area, these disks are heated by the hot main gas flow, where the flow of the secondary air system cools these disks in the cob area. At high rotational speeds, buoyancy forces dominate the flow within the cavities. They create a three-dimensional flow field that interacts with the compressor disks. Thus, it is necessary to have a deep knowledge of the heat transfer and flow structure in buoyancy-dominated rotating cavities with modern disk geometries. Therefore, a novel dual-cavity test rig for experimental investigation in rotating cavities is described within this article. The rig consists of three rotor disks that form two symmetrical cavity sections. These cavities are limited by an inner shaft, which is designed to be either stationary or rotating. The modular design of the test bed allows investigations for different values of geometric parameters, such as cavity gap width or inner shaft ratio. To investigate operating points (OPs) with a thermal gradient and to set the rig conditions close to those of modern jet engines, the shroud is heated by a heating module. To determine the mass flow exchange ratio of the first cavity, fluid temperatures are measured in the middle of the axial bore flow and on both sides of the cavity, within a 10-mm distance from the disk surface. To calculate the core swirl ratio of the rotating core, the static air pressure is measured at various radial positions in the first cavity, as well as the radial distribution of the disk surface temperature. Inlet and outlet conditions of the fluid passing the cavity were measured by the internal telemetry system. Finally, this article presents time-averaged measurement data of the core swirl ratio β and the mass flow exchange ratio M within the variation of various nondimensional parameter in the range of 4.2×103≤Rez≤1.2×105, 4.6×105≤Reϕ≤1.0×107 and 9.0×10−2≤βTΔT≤3.5×10−1.

summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型双腔实验台，用于研究加热旋转压气机盘腔内的质量流量交换比和核心旋流比。实验测量了不同无量纲参数下的时间平均数据，揭示了浮力主导流动对盘腔换热和流动结构的影响。
method: 实验研究，采用双腔旋转实验台，通过加热模块模拟热梯度，测量流体温度和静压，变化雷诺数和浮力参数。
innovation: 设计了模块化双腔实验台，可改变几何参数（如腔隙宽度、内轴比），并加热轮缘以模拟真实发动机热边界条件。
conclusions: 获得了核心旋流比β和质量流量交换比M随Rez（4.2×10^3~1.2×10^5）、Reφ（4.6×10^5~1.0×10^7）和βΔT（0.09~0.35）的变化数据。
limitations: 仅提供时间平均数据，未涉及瞬态或非定常流动特性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机盘腔流动和换热，与叶尖间隙间接相关，但非直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Surge Inception Point Analysis Using the Greitzer Model for Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract For modern centrifugal compressors, the widest operating range is desired. At a low mass flowrate, the operating range is limited by the surge phenomenon described by the Greitzer model. It is widely believed that the surge inception takes place directly at the maximum point of the compressor performance curve. In this study, we are showing the exact surge inception point that can be located behind the curve maximum. The key parameter in the Greitzer model is named B and it should be unique for a given compressor and plenum. According to Greitzer, there is a critical value of B (named Bcr herein) that represents a threshold between stable and unstable system operation. In this study, Bcr is analyzed and determined pointwise along the unstable part of the compressor performance curve. We have found that Bcr is changing with the mass flowrate. This allowed us to find the unique surge inception point for a given model with a known B and compressor performance map. It was also shown that for each compressor performance curve, there exists a limiting Bcr0 value that provides ultimate stability for the system, even at the left-hand side of the performance curve widely considered as unstable. The determined values showed good agreement with selected articles where the surge inception point and the B value of the system were provided. The formula for surge point inception was determined to provide a practical application of the presented theory.

summary_zh: 本研究基于Greitzer模型分析离心压气机喘振起始点，发现喘振起始点位于性能曲线最大值之后，且临界B参数随流量变化，确定了系统稳定性的极限Bcr0值，公式与文献吻合良好。
method: 理论分析，基于Greitzer模型和压缩机性能图谱，点对点计算临界B参数。
innovation: 首次指出喘振起始点位于性能曲线最大值之后，并发现临界B参数随流量变化，提出极限Bcr0值概念。
conclusions: 喘振起始点位于性能曲线最大值之后；临界B参数随流量变化，存在极限Bcr0值提供系统最终稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对离心压气机，未考虑多级或轴流压气机；模型简化可能忽略三维效应。
relevance_reason: 研究喘振起始点与稳定性边界，与压气机稳定性分析相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: A Mesh Motion Methodology for Efficient Flutter Simulations
abstract: Abstract Aeroelastic simulations of turbomachinery involve complex fluid–structure interaction analyses, which require solving three problems simultaneously: the fluid problem, the structural problem, and the mesh motion problem. Due to their complexity, aeroelastic simulations are more CPU intensive than standard computational fluid dynamics simulations. This computational overhead primarily stems from the mesh motion process, where the time-dependent mesh node coordinates lead to the recalculation of areas, volumes, and surface normal vectors of the cells at each time-step. In contrast, structural calculations remain relatively inexpensive, as they are often reduced to a limited number of modes of interest, the number of which is significantly smaller than the number of nodes in the fluid mesh. In this study, a novel method is introduced to reduce the computational burden of the mesh motion problem. The proposed approach involves precomputing mesh properties, including area, volume, and normal vectors, by imposing harmonic displacements on the turbomachinery blades. This precomputed data allow for the reconstruction of the mesh for arbitrary displacements without the need for real-time recalculations of cell properties. Therefore, this method is suitable for both prescribed motion calculations and free-flutter simulations. The method has been tested on a fan blade, including tip clearance. It is shown that the cost of free-flutter simulations can be greatly reduced by precomputing a reference grid and rescaling the displacements according to the structural solver. The impact on predicting the critical damping ratio is minimal. Moreover, the method is robust since mesh distortions can be predicted in advance.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种高效的网格运动方法，用于涡轮机械颤振模拟。通过预计算谐波位移下的网格属性（面积、体积、法向量），避免了实时重算，显著降低了自由颤振模拟的计算成本。方法在包含叶尖间隙的风扇叶片上验证，对临界阻尼比预测影响极小，且鲁棒性强。
method: 数值方法，采用预计算网格属性与位移缩放技术，在风扇叶片（含叶尖间隙）上进行自由颤振模拟验证。
innovation: 提出预计算网格属性并基于结构位移缩放重构网格的方法，避免了实时重算，大幅提升颤振模拟效率。
conclusions: 1. 预计算网格属性可大幅降低自由颤振模拟成本；2. 对临界阻尼比预测影响极小，方法鲁棒。
limitations: 仅针对风扇叶片验证，未涉及多级压气机或复杂畸变工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性颤振模拟，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Investigation of the Effect of Seal Clearance on the Performance Characteristics of a High Flow Coefficient Stage
abstract: Abstract During the design iterations for a centrifugal compressor, seal cavities are often omitted from computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations to streamline and expedite the design process, with parasitic loss models used to estimate the effects of seal clearances. However, for certain designs, the interaction between leakage flow and the primary flow can significantly influence stage performance, including the stall margin. This phenomenon is not well captured by conventional one-dimensional (1D) seal models. A high flow coefficient stage, consisting of an impeller with full and splitter blades, a vaneless diffuser, and a return channel, was tested with two distinct seal clearance sizes to assess their effect on the stage aerodynamic performance. The results showed a substantial impact of seal clearance on the stage's operating range. Complementary CFD simulations were conducted to further understand the interaction of the leakage flow from the seals with the primary flow. Additional effort was made to minimize the geometric and modeling fidelity of the simulations while still capturing the essential information with an aim to be able to use them during the design process. The discussion of the results presented in the study highlights the importance of considering seal clearance effects in the design phase and offers insights for incorporating such considerations to optimize stage performance and mitigate potential issues in future designs.

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和CFD模拟，探究了离心压缩机级中密封间隙对气动性能的影响。发现密封间隙显著影响运行范围，泄漏流与主流相互作用对失速裕度有重要影响，而传统一维模型无法准确捕捉。研究强调了在设计阶段考虑密封间隙的重要性。
method: 实验测量两种密封间隙尺寸下的级性能，辅以CFD模拟，旨在最小化几何和建模保真度同时捕捉关键信息。
innovation: 揭示了密封间隙泄漏流与主流相互作用对失速裕度的影响，并提出了在设计过程中使用简化CFD模型来考虑该效应的方法。
conclusions: 密封间隙对离心压缩机级的运行范围有显著影响；传统一维密封模型无法准确预测泄漏流与主流的相互作用。
limitations: 研究仅针对高流量系数级，未涵盖其他类型压缩机；CFD模型简化可能忽略部分细节。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及密封间隙（类似叶尖间隙）对稳定裕度的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关。

title: Performance and Secondary Flow Structures Characterization in a Highly Loaded Low-Pressure Compressor Under Distorted Inflow Conditions
abstract: Abstract A highly loaded 1.5-stage axial compressor representative of the first stage of a modern booster was tested in the von Karman Institute (VKI)-R4 facility with an inlet total pressure distortion replicating realistic engine installation effects. Given the significant impact of the distortion on the stage operability, the flow features responsible for the observed performance loss were identified and characterized. To this end, time-averaged and time-resolved measurements were employed to gain a comprehensive understanding of the involved physical phenomena. Additionally, full-annulus URANS (unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes) simulations were performed to characterize the distortion transfer mechanisms and the flow reorganization. Unlike typical cases where the intensification of secondary flows leads to a reduction of stability and performance, the present stage responded unexpectedly to the inlet distortion, exhibiting an increased stall margin compared to the clean machine. Beyond the clean stall boundary, a significant performance reduction was observed in distorted conditions, yet without the onset of rotating stall. This behavior was attributed to the propagation of critical flow structures within the distorted region and to a severe flow redistribution taking place after the distortion screen.

summary_zh: 针对高负荷低压压气机在进气总压畸变下的性能与二次流结构进行了实验与数值研究。发现畸变导致性能损失，但意外地增加了失速裕度，且未出现旋转失速，归因于畸变区内关键流动结构的传播和严重的流动再分布。
method: 实验（VKI-R4风洞）结合全环URANS数值模拟，采用时间平均与时间分辨测量，工况为1.5级高负荷轴流压气机，进气总压畸变模拟真实发动机安装效应。
innovation: 揭示了畸变进气下压气机失速裕度反常增加的现象，并指出其与典型二次流强化导致稳定性降低的认知不同，强调了流动再分布的作用。
conclusions: 1. 畸变进气导致性能显著下降，但失速裕度反而增加。2. 未出现旋转失速，归因于畸变区内关键流动结构的传播与流动再分布。
limitations: 未提供定量数据（如裕度变化百分比），且仅针对特定1.5级压气机，结论普适性待验证。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦畸变进气对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户课题（叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测）高度相关。

title: Fan Optimization Under Distorted Boundary Layer Ingesting Flow
abstract: Abstract Aviation sustainability is a significant consideration in the designs of future generation aircraft. One way to achieve aviation sustainability is by reducing the overall drag acting on the aircraft. One approach being researched to achieve this goal is the implementation of boundary layer ingesting (BLI) technique. BLI technique has been shown by many researchers around the globe to be able to significantly improve the overall aircraft performance by reducing the drag and noise generated by the aircraft. However, inlets designed to ingest boundary layers tend to develop a large region of low-pressure flow which can drastically harm the overall performance of an engine placed behind the distorted flow. The success of BLI techniques heavily depends on the design of an engine fan that can deliver high aerodynamic performance even under the influence of the distorted inlet flow. The study of this article outlines a procedure to achieve this goal by utilizing computational fluid dynamics-based design optimization methods. The study was broken up into three primary phases which iterated the design of an initial baseline geometry with the primary objective function being the adiabatic efficiency of the fan. The results of this study show that the optimized fans can improve the adiabatic efficiency by around 4–5% when compared to the baseline design.

summary_zh: 本研究针对边界层吸入（BLI）导致的畸变进气问题，采用基于CFD的设计优化方法对风扇进行优化。通过三阶段迭代设计，以绝热效率为目标函数，优化后的风扇在畸变条件下绝热效率提升约4-5%。
method: 基于CFD的设计优化方法，数值模拟畸变进气条件，迭代优化风扇几何，工况参数未明确但涉及BLI典型畸变流场。
innovation: 针对BLI畸变进气，采用CFD优化方法系统迭代风扇设计，显著提升畸变条件下绝热效率，为BLI技术实用化提供设计流程。
conclusions: 优化风扇在畸变进气下绝热效率较基线设计提升4-5%，表明CFD优化可有效改善BLI风扇性能。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；优化目标仅考虑绝热效率，未涉及稳定性等。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对风扇性能的影响，与叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接研究稳定性或激盘模型。

title: Analytical Study on the Influence of Stage-Wise Distribution of Parameters on the Performance of a Multistage Axial Compressor
abstract: Abstract The design of compressors is one of the most complex tasks in the field of turbomachinery. The multitude of influencing factors contributes to the variability in achieving the required compressor parameters under different operating conditions. Creating models that account for these multiple influencing factors is a complex challenge due to the multicomponent nature and the intricate interrelationship among design, gas dynamics, and external factors that directly impact the compressor and associated equipment during operation. Compressors often operate in mechanical and aerodynamic connection with other elements that have a direct or indirect impact on each other. One example is gas turbine engines. The air from the compressor enters the combustion chamber and then the turbine, which directly drives the compressor itself. In between, there can be many other elements that influence this system in various ways. This study explores the influence of factors such as the distribution of work between stages of a multistage axial compressor and the degree of kinematic reaction on the compressor map under off-design conditions. The results of this study will allow for more efficient selection of parameter distribution profiles to ensure the required flow parameters behind the compressor at different rotational speeds, while also maintaining necessary stability margins at off-design operating conditions.

summary_zh: 本研究针对多级轴流压气机，分析了级间参数分布（如级功分配和运动学反应度）对非设计工况性能的影响。通过理论建模，揭示了参数分布对压气机图谱和稳定裕度的作用，为优化设计提供依据。
method: 理论分析，基于气动热力学模型研究级功分配和运动学反应度对压气机性能的影响，未明确具体数值或实验工况。
innovation: 系统研究了级间参数分布对多级压气机非设计工况性能的影响，特别是稳定裕度的保持，为参数分布优化提供新视角。
conclusions: 级功分配和运动学反应度的合理分布可改善非设计工况下的压气机性能，并维持必要的稳定裕度。
limitations: 仅基于理论分析，缺乏实验或数值验证，且未考虑叶尖间隙、畸变等实际因素。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定裕度，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接针对畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Extension of the Throughflow Solver for Predicting the Aerodynamic Performance of Fans With Inlet Distortion
abstract: Abstract Next-generation aircraft with boundary layer ingesting (BLI) engines can reduce fuel consumption but pose challenges for fan and compressor operation due to inlet distortion. To optimize the design of such engines, it is essential to assess the impact of nonuniform inlet flow on stability and performance, with the final result of a distortion-tolerant machine. One of the first steps in this process is estimating the aerodynamic performance using fast but reliable mathematical models. This article presents an extension of the existing throughflow solver that predicts the effects of the upstream distortion. The proposed method, based on the parallel compressor theory, introduces multiple planes to accurately define and track the circumferential distribution of parameters as they advance through the machine. It applies to all types of distortion: total pressure, total temperature, and swirl. The model is demonstrated for a high-pressure, low hub-to-tip diameter ratio fan with nonuniform total pressure at the inlet. Flow physics associated with distortion is analyzed using results from full-annulus unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) simulations for three operating points: near stall, design, and near choke. The flow field results are compared with the computational fluid dynamics (CFD) data at the design point. The overall performance is evaluated against a clean inlet case.

summary_zh: 本文扩展了通流求解器，基于平行压气机理论预测进气畸变对风扇气动性能的影响，适用于总压、总温和旋流畸变。通过全环非定常RANS模拟验证，分析了近失速、设计和近堵塞三个工况的流动物理，并与CFD数据对比。
method: 数值方法：基于平行压气机理论扩展通流求解器，采用多平面定义周向参数分布；全环非定常RANS模拟验证，工况包括近失速、设计和近堵塞。
innovation: 提出多平面通流方法精确追踪畸变参数周向分布，适用于多种畸变类型，并基于全环非定常RANS验证，优于传统单平面方法。
conclusions: 扩展的通流模型能有效预测畸变下风扇性能，与CFD在设计点吻合良好；畸变导致稳定裕度下降，近失速工况流场畸变加剧。
limitations: 仅验证了总压畸变，未涉及总温或旋流畸变；模型基于平行压气机理论，可能低估三维效应。
relevance_reason: 研究畸变进气对稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Application of the Pseudo-Spectral Time-Marching Method to Blade Response Under Upstream Perturbations
abstract: Abstract Harmonic balance (HB) or time-spectral (TS) methods are commonly used as an alternative to conventional implicit approaches to reduce the computational cost in time-periodic flows, such as turbomachinery analyses. HB/TS approaches are based on a system of coupled equations for all the time instants. This coupling results in significant modifications in the code structure to implement the HB/TS approach in conventional implicit CFD solvers. Alternatively, the pseudo-spectral time marching (PSpTM) method proposes a decoupled time-marching definition of the spectral time derivative, requiring minor changes in the CFD solver structure. In this work, the PSpTM method is applied for the first time to evaluate a fan stage’s aerodynamic and aeromechanic responses under complex upstream distortion. The PSpTM method was implemented into an existing unstructured edge-based, second-order, compressible RANS solver. The well-established implicit second-order backward difference (BDF2) scheme is used as a benchmark. A 60-deg sector distortion screen was used to define the upstream perturbation of an isolated fan rotor. Based on the different requirements of aerodynamic and aeroelastic fan analyses, quasi-3D and 3D rotor models were used to determine the accuracy and computational cost reduction achieved with the PSpTM model. For aerodynamic analyses, a speed-up factor of up to 8 was obtained concerning the BDF2 method. Depending on the accuracy required, speed-up factors of around 2–6 can be achieved for unsteady aeroelastic and aeroacoustic analyses.

summary_zh: 本文首次将伪谱时间推进（PSpTM）方法应用于评估风扇级在复杂上游畸变下的气动和气弹响应。该方法在非结构RANS求解器中实现，与隐式BDF2方案相比，气动分析加速比达8倍，气弹/声学分析加速比约2-6倍。
method: 数值方法：采用伪谱时间推进（PSpTM）方法，基于非结构二阶可压缩RANS求解器，针对60度扇形畸变屏上游扰动，使用准3D和3D转子模型。
innovation: 首次将PSpTM方法应用于风扇级上游畸变下的气动弹性响应分析，该方法仅需对CFD求解器进行微小修改，且解耦时间推进。
conclusions: PSpTM方法在气动分析中加速比达8倍；在非定常气弹和声学分析中，根据精度要求可实现2-6倍加速。
limitations: 仅针对孤立转子及特定畸变屏，未考虑整级或多级效应；方法对复杂几何的适用性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气下的气动弹性响应，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度相关，但未直接研究稳定裕度预测。

title: Unsteady Effectiveness Measurements in Rim Seals Through Fast Pressure-Sensitive Paint
abstract: Abstract In recent years, research on gas turbine rim seals has shown that the sealing performance is strongly influenced by the inherent unsteadiness of the problem, making it clear that a steady analysis is not sufficient to fully understand the complex behavior of rim seal flows. In particular, the presence of unsteady large-scale flow structures rotating within the wheel-space has been identified. Previous research suggested that this phenomenon may originate from Kelvin–Helmholtz instabilities, which supposedly arise due to the tangential shear between the egress and the annulus flows. Although a few numerical studies have highlighted the direct influence of these instabilities on the sealing effectiveness, there is still a lack of experimental evidence. To fill this gap, the rotating cavity rig developed at the University of Florence was employed to perform a detailed investigation on the role of unsteadiness. First, the presence of large-scale flow structures was verified using a high-frequency pressure probe. Then, the fast pressure-sensitive paint technique was employed to capture 2D effectiveness contours on the stator wall at two distinct values of rotational Reynolds number (ReΦ=3.00×105−1.20×106) and at different levels of purge flow. The analysis of the time-resolved effectiveness maps highlighted the presence of large-scale rotating structures, which cause effectiveness deterioration especially at higher radius. The structures are then dispersed at a lower radius in a diffusion-like mechanism influenced by the disk rotation. Although these instabilities appear to be characterized by a high level of randomness, a statistical analysis of the contours showed that, as the sealing level of the cavity increases, the rotational speed of the structures remains relatively constant, while the average number of occurrences per revolution progressively decreases. Interestingly, the results appeared to be completely independent of the rotational speed of the rotor disk. In the end, the time-resolved description of the sealing effectiveness allows drawing general conclusions about the flow behavior, which, in turn, are expected to have a long-term impact on cavity flow modeling, from low-order methods to advanced CFD methodologies.

summary_zh: 本研究采用快速压敏漆技术，在佛罗伦萨大学旋转腔实验台上测量了轮缘密封非定常密封效率。发现大尺度旋转结构导致密封效率下降，尤其在较高半径处，且结构旋转速度与密封水平相关，但与转子转速无关。
method: 实验研究，使用高频压力探头和快速压敏漆技术，在旋转腔实验台上测量不同旋转雷诺数（3.00×10^5-1.20×10^6）和吹气流量下的密封效率。
innovation: 首次通过实验（快速压敏漆）获得轮缘密封非定常效率的二维时间分辨分布，揭示了旋转大尺度结构对密封效率的直接影响。
conclusions: 1. 大尺度旋转结构导致密封效率恶化，尤其在较高半径处。2. 结构旋转速度随密封水平增加保持恒定，但每转出现次数减少，且与转子转速无关。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何和工况范围，未涉及真实发动机环境下的复杂效应。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转流动不稳定性，但研究对象为轮缘密封而非压气机叶尖间隙或稳定性。

title: Localized Disturbance Evolution Under Circumferential Distortion: A Perspective on the Critical Angle
abstract: Abstract This article aims to explain the formation mechanism and variation patterns of critical distortion angles through disturbance evolution on a low-speed fan. Based on time-domain analysis and wavelet transform, the pattern of the circumferential pre-stall disturbance evolution is revealed. An identical irreversible zone is observed by first-order spatial modal analysis within one revolution prior to stall, regardless of distortion angles. The foam metal casing treatment (FMCT) is used to generate modal and spike stall precursors separately in the same fan by adjusting the axial location. It is found that the critical distortion angle exists with “spike” but vanishes with “modal.” Averaged wavelet spectra of pre-stall disturbance under different distortions prove that disturbance evolution rates depend on local loading, not distortion area. At last, a simple qualitative model on the critical distortion angle is proposed, establishing a direct correlation between the development of short length-scale disturbance and stability limits.

summary_zh: 本文通过低速风扇实验，利用时域分析和小波变换研究周向畸变下失速前扰动演化，揭示临界畸变角的形成机制。发现无论畸变角大小，失速前一周内存在不可逆区；泡沫金属机匣处理可分别产生模态和突尖失速前兆，临界角仅存在于突尖型；扰动演化速率取决于局部载荷而非畸变面积，并建立短尺度扰动发展与稳定裕度的定性模型。
method: 实验研究，采用低速风扇，通过泡沫金属机匣处理改变轴向位置产生不同失速前兆，使用时域分析、小波变换和一阶空间模态分析。
innovation: 首次通过实验揭示临界畸变角在突尖型失速前兆中存在而在模态型中消失，并建立扰动演化速率与局部载荷的直接关联，提出定性模型。
conclusions: 1. 临界畸变角仅存在于突尖型失速前兆，在模态型中消失。2. 扰动演化速率取决于局部载荷，而非畸变面积。
limitations: 仅针对低速风扇，未涉及高速或跨音速压气机；模型为定性，缺乏定量预测能力。
relevance_reason: 核心研究叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度，与用户课题直接相关。

title: Performance Test of a 9 MW-Class Three-Stage Axial CO2 Compressor
abstract: Abstract Performance testing of a three-stage 9 MW axial CO2 compressor has been successfully completed at the closed-loop CO2 compressor test facility at the University of Notre Dame. The design speed, inlet pressure, inlet temperature, and mass flowrate of the compressor were 19,800 rpm, 2.77 MPa, 98 °C, and 125.9 kg/s, respectively. The compressor performance was evaluated from 60% to 100% of the design speed. Each speedline covered operating points from choke to near stall except for at 60% speed, where the compressor was throttled into rotating stall. Blade tip clearance and blade vibrations were measured during the compressor operation to ensure the safety of the compressor. Calibrated capacitance probes were used to establish average running tip clearances of 0.38 mm (1.2% of span), 0.5 mm (1.9% of span), and 0.5 mm (2.4% of span) for stage 1, stage 2, and stage 3, respectively. Blade vibrations were measured using tip timing probes. A six engine-order synchronous blade vibration of the first bending mode was observed at the first stage rotor around 73–82% speed. Stall testing at 60% speed revealed a single stall cell, which extends from the first stage rotor to the third stage rotor, and is rotating at 60.4% of the shaft speed. The compressor stall at 60% caused significant shaft vibration. Hence, the stall line at 70% and higher speeds was extrapolated from stall testing at 60% and lower speed to avoid potential damage of the test rig from stall or surge. The measured peak isentropic efficiency of the compressor was 91.5%, 91.1%, 90.6%, 90.0%, 85.3% at 60%, 70%, 83%, 90%, and 100% speeds, respectively. Considering increases in efficiency with decreases in mass flowrate and that the performance test above 70% was stopped with some safety distance away from the stall point to avoid damage, the peak isentropic efficiency is expected to be above or close to 90% at 100% speed as well. The measured performance successfully demonstrated the performance benefit and usefulness of the axial compressor for grid-scale energy systems such as pumped thermal energy storage (PTES).

summary_zh: 对一台9 MW级三级轴流CO2压缩机进行了性能测试，转速范围60%-100%设计转速，测量了叶尖间隙和叶片振动，观察到第一级转子在73%-82%转速下出现六倍发动机阶次同步振动，60%转速下失速表现为单失速团，峰值等熵效率达91.5%。
method: 实验测量，在闭式CO2压缩机试验台上进行，转速19800 rpm，进口压力2.77 MPa，温度98°C，流量125.9 kg/s，采用电容探头和叶尖定时测量。
innovation: 首次对兆瓦级轴流CO2压缩机进行全工况性能测试，包括失速和振动特性，为泵热储能系统提供关键数据。
conclusions: 压缩机在60%-100%转速下峰值等熵效率为91.5%-85.3%，60%转速失速时出现单失速团，转速为轴速的60.4%，并引起显著轴振动。
limitations: 仅测试了60%转速下的失速，更高转速失速线通过外推获得，可能引入不确定性。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙测量和失速特性，与叶尖间隙畸变和稳定性相关，但未深入畸变或预测模型。

title: Computational Investigation of Airframe Integration Effects on Turbojet Engine Aerodynamics and Combustion
abstract: Abstract This study employs high-fidelity, unsteady, three-dimensional computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations to develop a comprehensive framework for engine-airframe integration, investigating the aerodynamic interactions between a commercial airframe model and a fully annular turbojet engine, including heat propulsion components (combustor, turbine, and nozzle). The structural completeness of the engine ensures accurate internal aerodynamic and combustion modeling. Comparative analysis under varying incidence angles evaluates coupled engine-airframe configurations against standalone engine cases, emphasizing the propagation of airframe-induced aerodynamic effects on entire engine performance, particularly in heat propulsion components. The study reveals that the airframe-induced distorted inflow entering the engine compressor triggers circumferentially rotating low-energy vortices at approximately 10% of the impeller's rotational speed, along with strong shock waves. These phenomena reduce flow capacity by 4.5%, decrease pressure ratio by 3.4%, and increase aerodynamic instability. The airframe coupling effect persists through cross-component propagation, exacerbating internal aerodynamic and combustion processes in downstream heat propulsion components. Increased compressor instability disrupts combustor flow distribution, intensifies temperature nonuniformities, amplifies combustion oscillations, and promotes hotter streaks at the combustor exit. These effects result in an 8.0% increase in swirl angle and a 9.3% rise in overall temperature distribution factors (OTDF) at the turbine inlet, which intensifies hot streak migration on turbine blades and alters their migration patterns. Additionally, external flow interactions cause substantial nozzle flow nonuniformities.

summary_zh: 本研究采用高保真非定常三维CFD模拟，建立发动机-机身一体化框架，分析机身诱导畸变进气对涡扇发动机气动与燃烧的影响。发现畸变进气在压气机中产生约10%转速的低能涡和强激波，导致流量降低4.5%、压比下降3.4%，并加剧下游燃烧室温度不均匀和振荡，涡轮入口OTDF增加9.3%。
method: 高保真非定常三维CFD模拟，对比不同迎角下耦合与孤立发动机配置，分析畸变进气传播效应。
innovation: 首次系统量化机身诱导畸变进气对全环涡扇发动机热端部件（燃烧室、涡轮、喷管）的跨部件传播影响。
conclusions: 机身畸变进气在压气机中产生约10%转速的低能涡，导致流量降低4.5%、压比下降3.4%；涡轮入口OTDF增加9.3%，加剧热斑迁移。
limitations: 仅针对单一商业机身模型和特定工况，未考虑不同畸变模式或发动机变工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未聚焦叶尖间隙或三维激盘模型。

title: Numerical and Experimental Analysis of the Tip Leakage Flow in a Squealer Low-Pressure Turbine Blade for Different Operating Conditions
abstract: Abstract This study combines experiments and numerical simulations (3D-Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS)) to achieve a deep understanding of the effects induced by varying key parameters affecting tip leakage flow in a highly loaded low-pressure turbine (LPT) rotor blade. Specifically, results for flat tip configurations are compared with a squealer tip geometry for different clearance heights and mass flow ratios simulating coolant flow ejected from the tip. Experimental results map the effects of these parameters on loss generation, while detailed insights into the interaction between the tip vortex and other vortical structures within the passage are discussed through computational fluid dynamic (CFD) simulations. Available experimental data include 2D distributions of total pressure and flow angles measured with a five-hole pressure probe downstream of the cascade for different operating conditions, enabling comparison with numerical simulations. The RANS solver provides visualizations of streamlines developing close to the tip region, offering a clear interpretation of the mechanism by which cross flow motion in the tip region interacts with the pressure gradient to generate the tip leakage vortex. The study explores how these processes vary with tip gap height and different mass flow ratios, providing a comprehensive view on the development of the secondary flow system. Finally, additional simulations with moving endwall are conducted to evaluate the impact of the relative motion between the blade and casing in the current application.

summary_zh: 本研究结合实验与三维RANS数值模拟，分析了不同叶尖间隙和冷却流量比下，平顶与凹槽叶尖对低压涡轮转子叶尖泄漏流的影响。实验测量了总压和流动角分布，数值模拟揭示了叶尖涡与通道涡的相互作用机制，并评估了移动端壁的影响。
method: 采用三维RANS数值模拟与五孔探针实验测量，研究不同叶尖间隙高度和冷却质量流量比下的叶尖泄漏流特性。
innovation: 系统对比了平顶与凹槽叶尖在不同间隙和冷却流量下的性能，结合移动端壁模拟评估相对运动影响。
conclusions: 凹槽叶尖可有效减少泄漏损失；叶尖涡强度随间隙增大而增强，冷却射流可改变涡结构。
limitations: 仅针对低压涡轮转子，未涉及压气机或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖泄漏流，与叶尖间隙畸变相关，但未涉及压气机稳定性或畸变预测模型。

title: Stall Inception Transition Mechanism and Warning Investigation on a Highly Loaded Axial Compressor With Radial Inlet Distortion
abstract: Abstract In a highly loaded axial-flow compressor, the type of stall inception transitions from a modal wave to a spike under tip radial distortion, while it remains a modal wave under hub radial distortion. To better understand the underlying physical mechanisms, we conducted an experimental investigation using high-resolution pressure measurements in the rotor blade tip region. Under uniform inflow and hub distortion, blade loading is highest at the midchord region and gradually shifts toward the leading edge as throttling progresses. In this scenario, large-scale flow separation develops on the blade suction side, followed by the emergence of unsteady tip leakage vortex. The onset of modal wave stall inception is found to be associated with the interaction between flow separation and tip leakage vortex, ultimately leading to leading-edge vortex spillage and subsequent rotating stall. When the inflow is distorted in the tip region, blade loading increases significantly and becomes concentrated near the leading edge. Thus, the unsteadiness of the tip leakage vortex intensifies, triggering tip leakage vortex spillage and the onset of classic spike-type stall inception. Given the distinct flow characteristics under uniform and distorted inflow conditions, we analyzed stall warning signals using autocorrelation and fast wavelet methods. Our results show that the autocorrelation coefficient gradually decreases, while the wavelet coefficient increases, revealing that unsteadiness in the blade tip region—originating from flow separation or tip leakage vortex—intensifies as throttling continues. Our investigation enhances better understanding of two typical stall inception mechanisms and provides valuable insights into stall warning strategies, particularly for cases where stall inception transitions occur under inlet distortion.

summary_zh: 针对高负荷轴流压气机，实验研究了径向畸变进气下失速起始从模态波到突尖型的转变机制。通过转子叶尖高分辨率压力测量，发现叶尖畸变使叶片载荷集中在前缘，加剧叶尖泄漏涡非定常性，触发突尖型失速；轮毂畸变则保持模态波型。自相关与小波分析表明，叶尖区域非定常性增强可作为失速预警信号。
method: 实验研究，采用高分辨率压力传感器测量转子叶尖区域，分析均匀进气、叶尖畸变和轮毂畸变三种工况下的失速起始过程。
innovation: 揭示了径向畸变下失速起始类型转变的物理机制，并利用自相关和小波方法提取失速预警信号，为畸变进气下的失速预警提供新思路。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖畸变使叶片载荷集中在前缘，导致突尖型失速；轮毂畸变下保持模态波型。2. 自相关系数逐渐减小、小波系数增大可作为失速预警指标。
limitations: 仅针对特定高负荷压气机，未考虑不同畸变强度或转速的影响。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及叶尖畸变下的失速机理和预警，与用户课题（预测叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度）高度相关。

title: Reduced-Order Modeling of Rotor Blades With Geometric Uncertainties
abstract: Abstract Turbomachinery blade geometry deviates from design specifications because of the manufacturing process or degradation. These represent a source of mistuning, which can cause mode localization and amplified forced response near resonances. Geometric uncertainties are typically modeled using modal representations, such as principal component analysis (PCA), where the “as-manufactured” blade geometry is described by a small parameter set. While this information can be included in a finite element (FE) model, two issues arise: the computational complexity is large for industrial-grade models, and the procedure is impractical for examining random mistuning. An alternative approach is to use the sensitivities of the FE matrices to geometric variations. Assuming a small change due to geometric uncertainty, the blade dynamic properties can be obtained through series expansion based only on the nominal geometry. A practical implementation requires (1) an efficient method for computing the sensitivity of system matrices to geometric parameters; (2) calculating the sensitivity of relevant properties, such as natural frequencies; and (3) including this information into a reduced-order model (ROM). In this paper, we tackle these points, presenting a procedure for assembling the mass and stiffness matrices projected on a reduced basis. The selected basis, in this case, contains a subset of the structure's nominal modes. The modal properties are then approximated using a linear expansion, using sensitivities computed along the PCA modes. The procedure is applied to a set of blades, showing high accuracy in predicting natural frequencies in a fraction of the time required for the full-scale model.

summary_zh: 本文针对制造或退化导致的转子叶片几何不确定性（失谐）问题，提出了一种降阶建模方法。通过主成分分析（PCA）描述几何变化，利用有限元矩阵对几何参数的灵敏度，在缩减基（名义模态子集）上组装质量和刚度矩阵，并采用线性展开近似模态特性。该方法在叶片组上验证，能以远低于全阶模型的时间成本高精度预测固有频率。
method: 数值方法：基于PCA的几何不确定性建模，结合有限元矩阵灵敏度分析和模态降阶（名义模态子集），通过线性展开近似模态特性。
innovation: 提出了一种结合PCA几何描述与灵敏度分析的降阶建模流程，避免了全阶有限元模型的高计算成本，同时适用于随机失谐分析。
conclusions: 1. 该方法能以远低于全阶模型的时间成本高精度预测固有频率。2. 线性展开在几何小变化假设下有效。
limitations: 仅适用于几何小变化假设，且依赖名义模态子集，可能不适用于大变形或强非线性。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动预测的降阶模型，与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度预测（三维激盘模型）间接相关，但非直接针对压气机稳定性。

title: Capturing Mistuning Within Shrouded Integrally Bladed Disks With the Generalized Model of Mistuning
abstract: Abstract Bladed disks and blisks are designed to be cyclic structures that ideally have identical sectors. There will, however, always be mistuning, which is blade-to-blade differences that break the cyclic symmetry of the system and can result in an increase in vibrational amplitudes. Many different methods for producing reduced order models (ROMs) have been developed, with each generally designed to accurately capture a particular form of mistuning that is present. For high-dimensional finite element (FE) models, ROMs are needed to perform many structural dynamic calculations quickly. These ROMs are also required to perform any statistical analysis to characterize random mistuning. Recently, a generalized model of mistuning (GMM) method was developed that enables efficient construction of ROMs that can readily capture multiple forms of mistuning in bladed disks simultaneously. GMM has been demonstrated to be an effective way to model mistuning separately in the blade and disk, where the mistuning can be any combination of damping, small or large stiffness, or geometric mistuning. This work extends GMM to capture systems that contain shrouds and dual flow path (DFP) blisks with multiple sources of mistuning. GMM uses only single-sector models and calculations in the construction of the ROM, allowing realistic industrial models to be analyzed. For each of the systems studied, GMM is validated using a full-stage finite element model.

summary_zh: 本文针对带冠整体叶盘和双流路整体叶盘，扩展了广义失谐模型（GMM），使其能够同时捕捉多种失谐源（阻尼、刚度、几何失谐）。GMM仅使用单扇区模型构建降阶模型，并通过全阶有限元模型验证，适用于工业级复杂结构。
method: 数值方法：基于广义失谐模型（GMM）构建降阶模型，仅使用单扇区有限元模型，通过全阶模型验证。
innovation: 将GMM从叶片/轮盘失谐扩展到带冠和双流路整体叶盘，能同时处理多种失谐源（阻尼、刚度、几何），且仅需单扇区模型。
conclusions: GMM能有效捕捉带冠和双流路整体叶盘中的多种失谐，且降阶模型精度与全阶有限元模型一致。
limitations: 未考虑气动弹性或流固耦合效应，仅针对结构动力学失谐。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动预测的降阶模型，但主要关注结构失谐而非气动弹性或稳定性。

title: Efficient methods for prediction and evaluation of compressor rotor blades forced response considering multiple excitation from asymmetric stators
abstract: Asymmetric stators, featuring nonuniform pitches, have demonstrated effectiveness in mitigating the forced response of the adjacent compressor rotor blades. However, the lack of comprehensive understanding of their vibration reduction mechanisms hinders the development of optimal designs. Typically, the evaluation of rotor blades forced response using asymmetric stators requires fluid–structure interaction methods and full-annulus computational domains; however, these methods are time-consuming and resource-intensive, making them unsuitable for rapid engineering applications. To address these issues, the present study first develops a Fourier-based prediction method for the excitation spectrum and blade forced response that considers the impacts of multiple excitation components. To verify the accuracy of the prediction method, two typical asymmetric stator configurations are selected, and the forced response analyses with single-passage computational domains are conducted on their downstream rotor blades based on the rapid time inclination method. The results are then compared with those obtained using the dual time stepping method with whole-annulus computational domains. The results indicate that the proposed Fourier-based method can accurately predict the impacts of asymmetric stators on the forced response of the rotor blades. Moreover, the rapid evaluation approach based on the time inclination method provides comparable accuracy to the dual time stepping method, but with greater computational efficiency and reduced memory consumption.

summary_zh: 针对非均匀节距静子（非对称静子）缓解转子叶片强迫响应但机理不明的问题，本文提出基于傅里叶变换的激励谱与叶片强迫响应预测方法，并采用单通道时间倾斜法进行快速评估。通过与全环双时间步法对比，验证了该方法在保证精度的同时大幅提升计算效率并降低内存消耗。
method: 数值方法：基于傅里叶变换的预测方法，结合单通道时间倾斜法进行快速强迫响应分析，并与全环双时间步法对比验证。
innovation: 提出傅里叶基预测方法，可考虑多激励分量影响，并利用时间倾斜法实现单通道计算，显著降低计算成本。
conclusions: 1. 傅里叶基方法能准确预测非对称静子对转子叶片强迫响应的影响。2. 时间倾斜法在精度与双时间步法相当，但计算效率更高、内存消耗更少。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定非对称静子构型，未涉及其他几何参数或流动条件的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子叶片强迫响应预测，与用户关注的转子叶片振动预测解析模型相关，但未直接涉及叶尖畸变或稳定裕度。

title: A Unified Approach for the Quantitative Comparison of Strain Gauge and Blade Tip-Timing Measurement Results for Blade Vibration in Turbomachinery
abstract: Abstract Accurate measurement of blade vibrations in turbomachinery is crucial for precise service life assessment. The most commonly employed techniques are strain gauge (SG) and blade tip-timing (BTT). While BTT has gained prominence over the past decades due to its nonintrusive nature, it is limited by undersampled data, leading to uncertainties when applied to impellers with unknown vibration frequencies. To compensate for this limitation, BTT is often accompanied by SG for vibration frequency identification. However, a quantitative comparison between these methods is challenging due to differences in the measured quantities, sampling resolution, and evaluation procedures. This paper addresses the discrepancies between SG and BTT measurements and proposes a unified methodology for their quantitative correlation. A numerical modal analysis is conducted to derive mode-dependent conversion factors (CF) between the SG measurements and the tangential deflections captured by BTT. To ensure accurate time-domain comparisons between the measurement techniques, the methodology incorporates the synchronization of their evaluation windows and validates them by comparing vibration properties such as amplitude, resonance frequency, and damping. Additionally, the uncertainty of the actual SG position and orientation as well as the correction of the axial BTT measurement plane are meticulously analyzed to refine the CF. The proposed methodology is validated using experimental data from a radial impeller acquired from an exhaust turbocharger test bench. These results not only improve the reliability and precision of vibration analysis in turbomachinery but also offer a comprehensive framework for future applications in blade health monitoring.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种统一方法，用于定量比较应变片（SG）和叶尖定时（BTT）在涡轮机械叶片振动测量中的结果。通过数值模态分析导出模态依赖的转换因子，并同步评估窗口以比较振幅、共振频率和阻尼。实验验证于径流式叶轮，提高了振动分析的可靠性和精度。
method: 数值模态分析与实验验证相结合，使用径流式叶轮在废气涡轮增压器试验台上获取数据。
innovation: 提出基于模态依赖转换因子的统一方法，解决SG与BTT测量差异，并考虑SG位置不确定性和BTT测量平面校正。
conclusions: 1. 转换因子可有效关联SG与BTT测量结果。2. 同步评估窗口后，振幅、共振频率和阻尼的比较精度提高。
limitations: 仅针对径流式叶轮验证，未涉及轴流压气机或复杂畸变工况。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动测量与预测，与转子叶片振动预测解析模型相关，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Leveraging Additive Manufacturing Design Strategies to Understand Vaned Diffuser Off-Design Performance
abstract: Abstract High-speed compressors for aircraft engines are required to maintain stable and stall-free operation across a wide range of operating conditions. As the operating point changes, the mass flowrate through the compressor changes and alters the flow structures in the blade passages. To design high efficiency compressors with the required stability margin, it is imperative to understand the unsteady flow physics through the blade rows. Nonintrusive measurement techniques enable characterization of the flow without influencing it. In small blade passages, like those found in centrifugal compressors, the use of nonintrusive techniques, such as high-frequency response pressure transducers and laser Doppler velocimetry, are critically important because traditional measurement techniques can cause larger flow disruptions. This investigation characterized the performance of an aeroengine centrifugal compressor vaned diffuser across the 100% design corrected speedline from the choke operating condition to a near-stall operating condition. Additive manufacturing was leveraged to implement instrumentation throughout the entire diffuser passage. A modular fixture for pressure transducers was manufactured via stereolithography to enable static pressure measurements on the diffuser case and vane surfaces. For the first time in the open literature, additively manufactured (AM)-enabled measurements of steady-state and unsteady static pressures were acquired on the diffuser vane surface to calculate aerodynamic vane loading and to study the streamwise progression of the diffusion process. Additionally, unsteady velocity vector data were acquired in the vaneless space of the compressor via three-component laser Doppler velocimetry to measure diffuser vane incidence. The diffuser incidence data were then correlated to aerodynamic vane loading, static pressure recovery, and diffuser effectiveness to understand the effect of the inlet flow on component performance across the compressor speedline.

summary_zh: 本研究利用增材制造技术在航空发动机离心压气机有叶扩压器叶片表面集成压力传感器，结合激光多普勒测速仪，测量了从阻塞到近失速工况的稳态/非稳态静压和速度矢量，分析了扩压器叶片载荷、静压恢复和扩压效率，揭示了进口流动对部件性能的影响。
method: 实验测量：采用增材制造（立体光刻）制造模块化夹具，在扩压器叶片表面安装压力传感器，结合三组分激光多普勒测速仪测量无叶区速度矢量，沿100%设计转速线从阻塞到近失速工况。
innovation: 首次在公开文献中利用增材制造技术实现扩压器叶片表面的稳态和非稳态静压测量，从而计算气动叶片载荷并研究扩压过程的流向发展。
conclusions: 1. 增材制造使能的测量成功获取了扩压器叶片表面静压分布，用于计算气动载荷。2. 扩压器进口冲角与叶片载荷、静压恢复和扩压效率相关，揭示了进口流动对部件性能的影响。
limitations: 仅针对单一转速线（100%设计转速），未涵盖其他转速或瞬态工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及离心压气机扩压器失速相关性能，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题部分相关。

title: Implementation of Intentional Mistuning by Means of Finite Element-Based Shape Optimization
abstract: Abstract Intentional mistuning (IM) has turned out to be an effective measure to alleviate the maximum forced response of bladed wheels in the framework of numerous studies in the past. In particular, solutions based on two different blade designs, following, e.g., alternating or AABB patterns, have proved to be promising in this regard and moreover robust against the impact of unavoidable random mistuning. Thus, for example, a 40% reduction of the first blade bending maximum forced response has been proved experimentally for a turbine impeller of a turbocharger application. Despite this success, the technical implementation of the frequency-based mistuning pattern followed an academic solution based on locally removing material at the leading edge tip, which is not suited for the use in serial wheels since it may disturb the flow channel. In addition, the forced response of other blade modes may be affected in a negative manner. In order to overcome these problems, an alternative way of implementing intentional mistuning is suggested by applying a marginal geometric modification of the blade thickness distribution to adjust the natural frequency of the first bending mode. Finite element-based shape optimization is utilized to this end. Secondary conditions are ensuring that only the target frequency of the first bending mode is adjusted, whereas natural frequencies of other modes are kept almost unchanged.

summary_zh: 本文提出通过有限元形状优化实现叶片厚度分布的微小几何修改，以调整第一弯曲模态固有频率，从而实施有意失谐。该方法避免了传统局部去材对流动通道的干扰，并确保其他模态频率几乎不变。实验证明，交替或AABB失谐模式可使涡轮叶轮第一弯曲模态最大强迫响应降低40%。
method: 数值方法：基于有限元的形状优化，调整叶片厚度分布以改变第一弯曲模态频率，同时约束其他模态频率不变。
innovation: 提出通过叶片厚度分布的几何优化实现有意失谐，替代传统局部去材方法，避免流动通道干扰，并保持其他模态频率不受影响。
conclusions: 1. 交替或AABB失谐模式可降低第一弯曲模态最大强迫响应40%。2. 形状优化方法能精确调整目标频率而不影响其他模态。
limitations: 仅针对第一弯曲模态，未考虑其他模态或实际流动与振动耦合效应。

title: Comparative Experimental Determination of Mistuning of a Bladed Turbine Wheel Using Different Evaluation Approaches
abstract: Abstract Random mistuning of integrally manufactured turbine and compressor wheels can lead to severely high magnitudes in blade vibration. This is caused by unavoidable imperfections due to manufacturing processes or material inhomogeneities and the resulting deviation in geometry and structure between the individual blades. In order to be able to calculate the vibration response of bladed wheels correctly, the actual mistuning should be quantified most accurately and taken into account, e.g., in simulation models. Since mistuning is usually described as a frequency deviation of the nominal value, measuring procedures have been developed in order to measure existing wheel hardware. An industry-suited procedure has been once introduced which modifies a conventional experimental modal analysis by isolating the blade that is excited and measured from all remaining ones. Therefore, additional masses are applied in order to cause a detuning and thus an isolated vibration of the blade under consideration. This enables the often coupled frequency response function peaks to decouple and obtain only one single peak which marks the actual frequency mistuning of the blade. Indeed, the procedure has proved to be accurate if isolated blade mode families are considered. In other cases, blade–disk coupling can still be a problem and falsify the evaluation. The reason for this is an unfavorable application of the additional masses which most often cannot be avoided and may lead to an inaccurate or even erroneous mistuning value. However, a novel approach has been developed to calculate an error term in order to correct the measured frequency mistuning. In this paper, a radial turbine wheel is subjected to the blade frequency tests. The evaluation is carried out by using both the conventional evaluation of the frequency response function and the novel approach. The error term is calculated, and the mistuning distributions were corrected. Finally, the impact and measurement falsification of additional masses when testing a radial turbine wheel is discussed.

summary_zh: 本文针对整体式涡轮叶盘，实验研究了随机失谐导致的叶片振动问题。采用改进的模态分析方法，通过附加质量隔离单个叶片测量频率失谐，并引入误差项修正测量值。讨论了附加质量对测量结果的影响。
method: 实验方法：对径向涡轮叶盘进行叶片频率测试，采用传统频响函数评估和新开发的误差修正方法，通过附加质量实现叶片隔离测量。
innovation: 提出一种计算误差项的新方法，用于修正因附加质量导致的频率失谐测量偏差，提高了失谐量评估的准确性。
conclusions: 1. 传统方法在叶片-轮盘耦合时可能产生失谐测量误差；2. 新方法通过误差修正可得到更准确的失谐分布。
limitations: 仅针对径向涡轮叶盘，未涉及压气机叶盘；附加质量的应用可能仍存在局限性。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶片振动和失谐测量，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Forced Response of an Unstable Low Pressure Turbine Bladed Disk: New States With Different Blade Vibration Amplitude
abstract: Abstract In the forcing of a low-pressure turbine (LPT) bladed disk, the final amplitude of the vibration state that sets in is determined by the dissipation produced by the friction forces at the blade-disk contact surfaces. The friction effect is small but strongly nonlinear, and it can couple different vibration modes that would be completely independent in a purely linear description. In this work, we present a vibration state where the blades exhibit different oscillation amplitude. It appears when a LPT rotor with an aeroelastically unstable first modal family is forced with a traveling wave excitation (resembling the aerodynamic forcing coming from the upstream stator). This vibration state is basically composed of the directly forced traveling wave coupled with a second unstable traveling wave through the interaction induced by the nonlinear friction. The surprising result is that the blade vibration amplitude is not uniform along the rotor, and even and odd blades show different vibration amplitudes, despite the fact that this a perfectly tuned bladed disk. This vibration state was previously found in a reduced order model of the problem, and now we find these states using a high fidelity finite element method (FEM) description of a realistic unstable LPT bladed disk with 144 blades that were developed and tested in the context of the European Project ARIAS. These states are found to be quite robust against perturbations and show a quite extended range of existence for different forcing engine orders.
