summary_zh: 本研究针对低压涡轮叶盘在气动弹性不稳定和行波激励下的强迫响应，发现了一种新的振动状态，其中叶片振幅不均匀，奇偶叶片振幅不同。该状态由直接受迫行波与第二不稳定行波通过非线性摩擦耦合产生，采用高保真有限元法对144叶片真实叶盘进行模拟，状态鲁棒且存在范围广。
method: 高保真有限元法（FEM）模拟，针对144叶片低压涡轮叶盘，施加行波激励，考虑非线性摩擦接触。
innovation: 首次在高保真有限元模型中发现了完美调谐叶盘中叶片振幅非均匀的振动状态，揭示了非线性摩擦耦合不同行波导致的新现象。
conclusions: 1. 非线性摩擦耦合导致直接受迫行波与第二不稳定行波相互作用，产生叶片振幅不均匀状态。2. 该状态对扰动鲁棒，且在不同激励阶次下存在范围广泛。
limitations: 仅针对低压涡轮叶盘，未考虑其他类型叶盘或更复杂的气动弹性耦合。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性不稳定和强迫响应，与压气机稳定性相关，但研究对象为低压涡轮，非压气机。

title: On the Determination of Nodal Diameter Spectrum and Mistuning Quantification of Synchronous Blade Vibrations Through Blade-Tip-Timing Measurements
abstract: Abstract Synchronous vibrations can severely impact the service life of impellers. Previous studies have demonstrated that mistuning significantly influences the nodal diameter of these vibrations. Specifically, mistuned impellers exhibit forced vibration responses comprising multiple nodal diameters, leading to asymmetric vibration expression among the impeller sectors and substantial amplitude overshoots. Blade-tip-timing (BTT) is a promising technique for monitoring synchronous vibrations due to its nonintrusive nature and capability to monitor all blades simultaneously. This paper presents a novel method for calculating the nodal diameter spectrum (NDS) of synchronous blade vibrations through BTT measurements. The method utilizes the vibration properties, which are estimated via BTT through the Circumferential Fourier Fit (CFF) method, to reconstruct the blade vibrations. Since the vibration properties of the blades are not determined at the same time, the vibrations are synchronized to acquire the impeller operational deflection shape (ODS), which can be associated with the mistuned impeller modes at the resonance crossings. Subsequently, the NDS is determined by performing Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT) analysis on the impeller ODS. Simulated data are used to assess the effect of the vibration sample point on the DFT results and the impact of noise. Based on these results a strategy for the determination of the NDS in a revolution is derived. Next, the method is applied to experimental data acquired from a turbocharger test bench. To investigate the consistency of the proposed method, the results of multiple datasets of the same vibration are presented. In addition, the method is validated by comparing the experimental results with those acquired by forced response simulations (FRS). Finally, by employing the experimentally determined impeller ODS and the NDS, mistuning quantification factors are calculated.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种通过叶尖定时（BTT）测量计算同步叶片振动节径谱（NDS）的新方法。利用周向傅里叶拟合（CFF）估计振动特性，重构叶片振动并同步得到叶轮运行变形形状（ODS），进而通过离散傅里叶变换（DFT）确定NDS。采用模拟数据评估采样点和噪声影响，并在涡轮增压器试验台上进行实验验证，与强迫响应仿真（FRS）对比，最后基于ODS和NDS计算失谐量化因子。
method: 数值模拟与实验结合：使用BTT和CFF方法估计振动特性，通过DFT分析ODS得到NDS；实验在涡轮增压器试验台上进行，并与FRS对比验证。
innovation: 首次提出利用BTT测量直接计算同步叶片振动的节径谱（NDS），并基于ODS和NDS量化失谐，克服了传统方法无法同时获取所有叶片振动信息的局限。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法能有效从BTT数据中提取NDS，且受采样点和噪声影响可控。2. 实验与FRS结果一致，验证了方法的可靠性；失谐量化因子可表征叶片振动不对称性。
limitations: 方法依赖BTT测量精度和CFF假设，可能不适用于非同步振动或大幅值非线性振动。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动测量与失谐分析，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Stability Analysis of Flexible Rotor Supported by Active Hybrid Bearing With Fuzzy Logic–Based Control
abstract: Abstract The classic film hydrodynamic bearing is a passive device, and its design does not consider the adaptive capacity to change with operation conditions. The film journal bearing coupling with servovalve, fuzzy proportional-derivative controller, and sensor, called active hybrid bearing with fuzzy logic-based control (AHBF), can accept controllable orifice flow to produce active force for reducing the rotor vibration and adapting to different operation demands. The AHBF is modeled as a couple of four parts: controller, servovalve, orifice flow, and film. The orifice flow is modeled as a series of a servovalve, capillary restrictor, and gap restrictor, considering the throttling effect of the servovalve, orifice tube, and film gap. The spool motion of the servovalve is modeled as a second-order transfer function and controlled by the fuzzy proportional-derivative controller. The feedback signal is the center displacement of the journal. The governing equation of film pressure is a modified Reynolds equation containing the orifice flow, which is linearized by the Newton–Raphson method and calculated by the finite element method to get the static characteristic. The results indicate that the proportional coefficient significantly affects the bearing load capacity. When the dimensionless load is between 0 and 0.6, the max increment of the minimum film thickness can be 271%. The dynamic coefficients of the AHBF are calculated using the orbit analysis method. The perturbation method is usually practical for analyzing the bearing dynamic characteristics, but is unreliable in large eccentricity tracks. In addition, the orbit analysis method can provide more reliable results for dynamic characteristics when bearing models are challenging to linearize. The influence of operating parameters on the dynamic characteristics of the AHBF is studied. The results indicate that the stiffness and damping of the bearing can be increased by up to 403% and 74% under active control operation by selecting an appropriate range of control parameters. The unbalanced response of the rotor with the transient oil film force is calculated in passive and active control operations. Compared with passive operation, the amplitude at the bearing can be reduced by 67% in active control operation. In conclusion, the AHBF has better static and dynamic characteristics than hydrodynamic journal bearing. Besides, the rotor supported by the AHBF has lower vibration than passive operation.

summary_zh: 本文研究了一种基于模糊逻辑控制的主动混合轴承（AHBF），用于柔性转子的稳定性分析。通过耦合伺服阀、模糊PD控制器和油膜，建立了包含节流效应的模型，采用有限元法和轨道分析法求解。结果表明，主动控制可显著提升轴承刚度和阻尼（分别达403%和74%），并降低转子振动67%。
method: 数值方法：有限元法求解修正Reynolds方程，轨道分析法计算动态系数；工况参数包括无量纲载荷0~0.6、控制参数范围。
innovation: 提出主动混合轴承结合模糊逻辑控制，通过可控节流孔主动减振，克服了传统轴承适应性不足的局限。
conclusions: 主动控制下轴承刚度和阻尼最大可提升403%和74%；转子振幅可降低67%，优于被动操作。
limitations: 研究基于特定轴承模型和线性化假设，未考虑高速或极端工况下的非线性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子振动控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Advancing Turbomachinery Meanline Modeling and Optimization with Automatic Differentiation
abstract: Abstract Meanline modelling is vital in turbomachinery design process, enabling accurate and computationally efficient performance analysis and design optimization. In gradient-based optimization, accurate derivatives are crucial for finding optimal solutions as inaccurate gradients, especially in high-dimensional simulations, can compromise optimization reliability, causing convergence issues. Obtaining exact derivatives analytically is often infeasible due to complexity of meanline models and equations of state, while numerical differentiation techniques like finite difference methods introduce inaccuracies due to truncation and round-off errors. To address these challenges, this paper introduces the first application of automatic differentiation in turbomachinery meanline optimization. Exact gradients were computed by differentiating an existing meanline model using the JAX library, and the performance of various gradient-based optimization solvers was compared by evaluating convergence with exact derivatives from automatic differentiation versus approximate derivatives from finite differences. Results for turbines involving 1-, 2-, and 3-stage configurations indicate that using exact gradients obtained using automatic differentiation significantly improves computational efficiency by reducing model evaluations by 25–50 % with respect to finite difference approximations, depending on turbine configuration and finite difference step size. Additionally, the computational cost of gradient evaluations with automatic differentiation is significantly lower, as JAX optimizes code execution using Accelerated Linear Algebra. These findings demonstrate that the meanline model using automatic differentiation for gradient calculations leads to faster and more reliable convergence, paving the way for its use in complex flow problems like reversible and two-phase turbomachinery.

summary_zh: 本文首次将自动微分（AD）应用于涡轮机械平均线建模与优化，利用JAX库计算精确梯度，并与有限差分法对比。结果表明，AD在1-3级涡轮配置中可减少25-50%的模型评估次数，显著提升计算效率和收敛可靠性，为复杂流动问题（如可逆和两相涡轮机械）的优化奠定基础。
method: 数值方法：基于JAX库的自动微分技术，对现有平均线模型进行梯度计算，并与有限差分法对比，测试1-3级涡轮配置。
innovation: 首次将自动微分引入涡轮机械平均线优化，实现精确梯度计算，避免了有限差分的截断和舍入误差，显著提升优化效率和收敛可靠性。
conclusions: 1. 自动微分相比有限差分可减少25-50%的模型评估次数。2. 自动微分梯度计算成本更低，JAX的加速线性代数优化了代码执行。
limitations: 研究仅针对涡轮配置，未涉及压气机或复杂流动（如可逆、两相）工况，且未考虑实验验证。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦于涡轮机械平均线建模与优化方法，与压气机稳定性、叶尖间隙等核心方向间接相关，但方法可推广。

title: Conceptual Comparative Study of the Flutter Vibration Amplitude of Unstable Aeronautical Fans and Low-Pressure Turbines
abstract: Abstract Flutter design criteria in aeronautical fans and cantilever low-pressure turbines (LPTs) differ significantly. Modern LPT blades often exhibit aeroelastic instability across multiple nodal diameters but are designed to endure this instability by limiting the vibration amplitude through dry friction in the fir-tree attachment. In contrast, aeronautical fans are designed to be flutter-free, avoiding operational instability. This divergence is noteworthy given the typical minimum critical damping ratio (ξ) of LPTs is about ξ∼−1% whereas in aeronautical fans is ξ∼−0.1%, an order of magnitude lower. This paper addresses the understanding and rationale of such disparity in fan and LPT flutter design criteria and strategies. The vibration amplitude of unstable friction-saturated aeronautical fans is predicted using a previously established, calibrated, and simplified model for fluttering LPTs. The model is informed with the aerodynamic and structural blade characteristics, size, and operating conditions of the components. Despite their minimum critical damping ratio differing by a factor of about ten, the combined effects of changes in natural vibration frequency, blade size, material properties, and operation point are shown to be more significant. This study qualitatively compares the vibration amplitudes and alternate stresses of fan and LPT blades saturated by friction and their scaling with the engine size. Although aeronautical fans' critical damping ratio is much smaller than that of LPT rotor blades, fans cannot endure the resulting vibration levels, whereas high aspect ratio cantilever LPT blade can. This difference is due to key factors such as the larger size, distinct geometry, lighter materials, different mechanical design, and lower natural frequency of fan blades compared to LPT blades.

summary_zh: 本文对比研究航空风扇与低压涡轮叶片的颤振振幅差异。风扇临界阻尼比（~-0.1%）比LPT（~-1%）小一个量级，但风扇不能承受振动，而高展弦比LPT叶片可通过干摩擦限制振幅。关键因素包括叶片尺寸、几何、材料、频率和机械设计。
method: 采用先前建立的简化摩擦饱和模型，结合气动、结构特性及运行条件进行预测和定性比较。
innovation: 首次系统解释风扇与LPT颤振设计准则差异的物理原因，并定量比较振动振幅和交变应力。
conclusions: 1. 尽管风扇临界阻尼比（~-0.1%）比LPT（~-1%）小一个量级，但风扇不能承受振动，而LPT可承受。2. 差异源于风扇更大的尺寸、更轻的材料、更低的自然频率等。
limitations: 研究基于简化模型和定性比较，缺乏实验验证和详细三维效应分析。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题方向部分相关。

title: Compressor Blade Vibration Measurement Using Radio Frequency Amplitude and Frequency Modulation
abstract: Abstract Radio frequency (RF) sensors are a novel, noncontact, low-power measurement technology that offers potential for engine health monitoring. A series of experiments were conducted in a single-stage compressor to study the RF sensor response to blade vibrations. Dual-polarized 18 GHz waveguide antennas were placed over the rotor while synchronous and asynchronous vibrations were induced. A mathematical model based on amplitude and frequency modulation is proposed. The RF signal is amplitude-modulated by the blade passage and blade vibrations, and frequency modulated due to Doppler shift from blade passage. The model showed qualitative agreement with the RF data in the frequency domain. The RF data were preconditioned based on the mathematical model and used as the input into a simple, multilayer neural network for regression analysis. The results demonstrated that blade vibration deflection by nodal diameter can be predicted from RF measurements using a simple, artificial neural network based regression algorithm.

summary_zh: 本研究采用射频传感器非接触测量单级压气机叶片振动，通过18GHz双极化波导天线获取同步/异步振动信号，基于幅频调制模型解释信号特征，并利用神经网络回归预测节径振动位移。
method: 实验研究，在单级压气机中诱导同步/异步振动，使用18GHz双极化波导天线测量，结合幅频调制模型与神经网络回归分析。
innovation: 首次将射频传感器用于压气机叶片振动测量，提出幅频调制模型解释信号，并利用简单神经网络实现节径振动位移预测。
conclusions: 射频信号经幅频调制模型预处理后，神经网络可预测叶片节径振动位移；模型与实验频域数据定性吻合。
limitations: 仅单级压气机实验，未涉及多级或真实发动机工况；神经网络简单，可能需更复杂模型提升精度。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动测量，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Parallel Computation of the Nonlinear Forced Response of A Bladed Disk With Friction Contacts Using the FETI Method
abstract: Abstract The size of the finite element (FE) models used for turbomachinery applications is rapidly growing to consider the whole engine dynamics and the complex dynamic interactions between subassemblies, which are connected by means of removable friction contacts. In this context, the aim of this paper is the introduction of a parallel harmonic balance method (HBM) for the nonlinear forced response analysis of bladed disks with localized contact nonlinearities. The proposed technique is based on the finite element tearing and interconnecting (FETI) method, which requires the decomposition of the FE model into several domains coupled by interface forces that are mathematically modeled using the Lagrange multipliers method. This paper offers a comprehensive overview of the FETI method and its implementation for predicting the nonlinear forced response of a bladed disk assembly with frictional interfaces. It will be shown that the FETI method effectively addresses the limitations and assumptions of state-of-the-art approaches that solve the nonlinear equation of motion using a reduced-order fashion.

summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮机械中带摩擦接触的叶盘结构，提出了一种基于FETI方法的并行谐波平衡法（HBM），用于非线性强迫响应分析。该方法将有限元模型分解为多个子域，通过拉格朗日乘子耦合界面力，有效克服了传统降阶方法的局限性，实现了大规模非线性动力学的高效求解。
method: 数值方法：基于FETI域分解的并行谐波平衡法，用于带摩擦接触的叶盘非线性强迫响应分析。
innovation: 将FETI域分解与谐波平衡法结合，实现并行计算，克服了传统降阶方法在摩擦接触非线性问题中的局限性。
conclusions: FETI方法能有效处理摩擦接触非线性，预测叶盘强迫响应，且并行计算效率高。
limitations: 仅针对摩擦接触非线性，未涉及气动弹性或流固耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶盘强迫响应数值方法，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖畸变。

title: Assessment of a New 0.2 Hub-to-Tip Ratio Propeller Fan Design With Rigid-Body Blade Loading
abstract: Abstract This paper presents the numerical assessment of a new 0.2 hub-to-tip ratio propeller fan with specific speed equal to 8.2, by means of an original low-order computational fluid dynamics (CFD) modeling approach. The fan implements the rigid body blade loading distribution, and it was designed by the authors using the classical “Kahane-Wallis” method. The first aim of the work is to give a preliminary feedback on the possibility that the new fan improves the aerodynamic performance of a high-efficiency fan, which implements the constant-swirl blade loading. The second aim of the work is to verify the effectiveness of the “Kahane-Wallis” method for the design of very low hub-to-tip ratio fan rotors with rigid-body blade loading. The third aim is to present the new low-order CFD modeling approach that the authors conceived for a low-computational-cost preliminary estimate of the aerodynamic performance expected from ISO 5801 Type-A performance tests. The results demonstrated that the “Kahane-Wallis” method allows for rigid-body designs with very low hub-to-tip ratio and remarkably high pressure coefficients. However, such designs are unlikely to exceed the efficiency achieved by constant-swirl designs featuring lower pressure coefficients. Moreover, the successful application of the method is doubtful for designs with flow separation at the blade root or immediately downstream of the rotor. Finally, it is found that the new low-order CFD approach offers potentialities as a tool to support the preliminary fan design and deserves future investigations.

summary_zh: 本文通过低阶CFD方法评估了一种采用刚体叶片载荷分布、轮毂比0.2、比转速8.2的新型螺旋桨风扇设计。研究发现，Kahane-Wallis方法能设计出高压系数但效率低于常旋涡设计的转子，且该方法在叶片根部存在分离时应用效果存疑。
method: 采用低阶CFD建模方法，对轮毂比0.2、比转速8.2的风扇进行数值评估，并与常旋涡设计对比。
innovation: 提出一种低阶CFD方法用于初步评估风扇气动性能，降低计算成本；验证了Kahane-Wallis方法在极低轮毂比风扇设计中的适用性。
conclusions: 1. Kahane-Wallis方法可设计出高压系数的刚体叶片载荷转子，但效率低于常旋涡设计。2. 低阶CFD方法有潜力支持初步风扇设计。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；低阶模型精度有限，且未考虑叶尖间隙等实际因素。
relevance_reason: 涉及风扇气动设计，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究畸变或稳定性。

title: Experimental and Numerical Investigation of Deep Surge in a Centrifugal Compressor With Vaned Diffuser and Piping System
abstract: Abstract Deep surge is a violent flow instability that affects the flow field throughout the entire compression system, potentially leading to performance deterioration and mechanical failures in compressors. A deeper understanding of this system instability is crucial for advancing design theory and developing effective flow control strategies. In this article, both experimental and numerical investigations are conducted to uncover the flow mechanism of deep surge. Transient velocity and static pressure measurements are performed to capture the surge limit cycles and the developing characteristics of the diffuser rotating stall under various throttling conditions. A three-dimensional numerical model of the compression system is developed to predict the system instability of deep surge. The numerical results demonstrate very good quantitative agreement with the experimental data in terms of the system characteristics and the development of diffuser rotating stall. The predicted internal flow field is analyzed to reveal the three-dimensional flow structure, with particular emphasis on the development of diffuser rotating stall during the deep surge cycle. Both experimental and numerical results demonstrate that the stall cells appear and disappear as the transient operating point periodically shifts between the stall and nonstall regions within the operating range. Furthermore, flow reversal during the deep-surge cycle suppresses the circumferential propagation of the stall cells.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验和数值方法研究了带叶片扩压器和管路的离心压气机深度喘振的流动机制。实验测量了瞬态速度和静压，捕捉了喘振极限环和扩压器旋转失速的发展。三维数值模型准确预测了系统特性和失速发展，揭示了深度喘振循环中失速胞的出现与消失，以及回流抑制了失速胞的周向传播。
method: 实验测量（瞬态速度、静压）与三维数值模拟相结合，研究不同节流条件下的喘振极限环和扩压器旋转失速。
innovation: 首次通过实验与数值结合详细揭示了离心压气机深度喘振循环中扩压器旋转失速的三维流动结构，并发现回流对失速胞周向传播的抑制作用。
conclusions: 1. 深度喘振循环中，失速胞随瞬态工作点在失速与非失速区之间周期性出现和消失。2. 回流抑制了失速胞的周向传播。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定离心压气机及管路系统，结论的普适性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及喘振机理和旋转失速，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Improving Compressor Preliminary Design With Physically Decomposed Loss Models
abstract: Abstract Machine learning on large datasets allows physical structures that are present in data to be discovered. This provides an opportunity to develop a new generation of compressor preliminary design tools, which have a more physically accurate underlying structure. In this article, a new loss model for preliminary design has been developed, using a data-centric approach, with a more physically accurate loss decomposition. This new loss model is compared to existing preliminary design loss models using a large dataset of Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) computational fluid dynamics (CFD) solutions. It is shown that the new, physically decomposed, loss model provides more accurate loss predictions at the preliminary design stage, over a wider range of the design space. For instance, the new model is shown to be able to capture the effect on loss when 3D blade design is used, stage loading is changed and the trailing edge thickness relative to the maximum thickness is allowed to vary. The new model is shown to be accurate, over this design space, to within ±9% compared to the accuracy of the model of Wright and Miller, which is only accurate to within ±22%. Furthermore, the physical decomposition of the new model means the model can easily be applied to different datasets and enhance understanding of how design changes influence the sources of loss, giving designers better guidance at the preliminary stages of design.

summary_zh: 本文基于大数据和RANS CFD，开发了一种物理分解的损失模型用于压气机初步设计。新模型通过更准确的损失分解，在设计空间内将损失预测精度从±22%提升至±9%，并能捕捉三维叶片设计、级负荷变化等对损失的影响。
method: 采用数据驱动方法，基于大量RANS CFD解构建物理分解损失模型，并与Wright和Miller模型对比。
innovation: 提出物理分解的损失模型，将损失按物理来源分解，提高了初步设计阶段损失预测的精度和适用范围。
conclusions: 新模型在宽广设计空间内预测精度达±9%，优于传统模型的±22%；能捕捉三维叶片设计、级负荷和尾缘厚度变化对损失的影响。
limitations: 模型基于RANS CFD数据，可能未涵盖真实流动中的非定常效应和复杂分离。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机损失模型，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测间接相关，但未直接涉及畸变或稳定性。

title: An Improved Correlation for Turbine Endwall Loss
abstract: Abstract To develop high-performance turbomachinery, we need accurate preliminary design correlations to guide us toward optimal system and component configurations. Endwall (or secondary) loss has a significant impact on turbine efficiency, but it remains challenging to predict. Most existing correlations are based on well-conditioned linear cascade experiments, but these generally rely on limited databases and do not include the effect of turbine-realistic inlet conditions, which can increase loss significantly. This article develops a new correlation to help address these deficiencies. The new method is physics-based and tuned to a large database of linear cascade computations with varying inlet conditions. Endwall loss is decomposed into wetted area loss and secondary flow loss. The wetted area loss represents dissipation in the endwall boundary layers. The secondary flow loss correlates with the secondary vorticity predicted by classical theory and is strongly dependent on the thickness and shape of the incoming endwall boundary layer. Validation with literature cascade experiments shows that the new correlation reduces the average error by &gt;30% compared to the best existing method, which was fit to these data, and more accurately predicts sensitivity to design parameters. The new method predicts a realistic increase in loss when moving from cascade to turbine-like inlet conditions and thus helps to reconcile the historical mismatch between endwall losses in cascades and real turbines.

summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮端壁损失预测问题，提出了一种基于物理的改进关联式。该关联式将端壁损失分解为湿面积损失和二次流损失，并考虑了真实涡轮进口条件的影响。基于线性叶栅计算数据库进行调参，验证表明平均误差比现有最佳方法降低30%以上，能更准确预测设计参数敏感性，并弥合叶栅与真实涡轮间端壁损失的差异。
method: 数值方法：基于线性叶栅计算数据库，采用物理分解方法建立端壁损失关联式，并考虑进口边界层厚度和形状的影响。
innovation: 将端壁损失物理分解为湿面积损失和二次流损失，并引入真实涡轮进口条件（边界层厚度和形状）的影响，显著提高了预测精度。
conclusions: 1. 新关联式平均误差比现有最佳方法降低30%以上。2. 能准确预测从叶栅到涡轮进口条件下损失的增大，弥合历史差异。
limitations: 基于线性叶栅计算，未考虑真实涡轮中的旋转、叶尖间隙等三维效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涡轮端壁损失，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但方法（关联式）和物理机制（二次流）有一定参考价值。

title: Experimental Investigation of Rim-Seal Instabilities and Annulus-Flow Interactions in Two Transonic Turbine Stages
abstract: Abstract Rim cavities in gas turbines are critical to both thermodynamic efficiency and structural integrity throughout the engine’s lifecycle. As efforts to improve performance continue, understanding the unsteady flow phenomena at the interface between the purge cavity and main annulus flows becomes increasingly important. Such instabilities are strongly influenced by cavity geometry and operating conditions, underscoring the need for precise measurements under engine-representative conditions. This study investigates rim-seal instabilities in two high-speed axial turbine stages tested in the von Karman Institute’s short-duration rotating facility CT-3. The first configuration is a scaled-up high-pressure turbine (HPT) stage, while the second represents a low-pressure turbine (LPT) stage typical of geared turbofan engines. Fast-response pressure measurements are employed to in both test sections, each operated under similar annulus conditions (Ma 0.8) and at different purge flowrates. The characteristics of the coherent structures developed within the rim seal are carefully analyzed by utilizing spectral analysis techniques, including recently developed methodologies that exploit the properties of the cross-power spectral density and the analytic function of the Hilbert transform. In the HPT stage, shallow cavity modes appear to trigger instabilities, whereas the behavior of the LPT stage suggests Kelvin–Helmholtz-type shear-layer mechanisms. Further analysis at the outlet of the stage reveals rim-seal-induced fluctuations, which are isolated and quantified for both test articles. Minimal effects are detected in the HPT stage, whereas the LPT stage displays a higher sensitivity to the rim-seal instability.

summary_zh: 本研究在冯·卡门研究所CT-3短时旋转实验台上，对高压涡轮（HPT）和低压涡轮（LPT）两级跨声速涡轮的轮缘密封不稳定性及主流相互作用进行了实验研究。采用快响应压力测量和谱分析技术（包括互功率谱密度和希尔伯特变换），发现HPT级中浅腔模态触发不稳定性，而LPT级表现为开尔文-亥姆霍兹剪切层机制。LPT级对轮缘密封不稳定性更敏感。
method: 实验研究，在短时旋转实验台CT-3上进行，工况为Ma 0.8，不同吹气流量，采用快响应压力测量和谱分析技术。
innovation: 首次在发动机代表性条件下对比两级涡轮的轮缘密封不稳定性，并应用互功率谱密度和希尔伯特变换等先进谱分析方法。
conclusions: HPT级轮缘密封不稳定性由浅腔模态触发，LPT级由开尔文-亥姆霍兹剪切层机制主导；LPT级对不稳定性更敏感，而HPT级影响较小。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何和工况，未涵盖所有发动机运行条件。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及旋转流动不稳定性，但对象为涡轮轮缘密封，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测间接相关。

title: Experimental and Numerical Rotating Stall Investigation of a Multistage Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract Rotating stall of multistage centrifugal compressors has always been a topic of great interest for many reasons, but there is no extensive literature on the subject. In this scenario, time-accurate computational fluid dynamic (CFD) approaches can be useful to better understand this phenomenon and push our knowledge forward. In this paper, a 3D-unsteady CFD approach was applied to the simulation of the last three stages of an industrial centrifugal compressor machine to study the unsteady flow patterns induced by rotating stall when moving toward low mass flow. The computational framework is aimed at reproducing repeating-stage flow conditions for the stages consisting of a low-flow coefficient and low-Mach number impeller, a vaneless diffuser, and a return channel. The numerical setup was validated on a single-stage test case with similar design intent, for which unique experimental measurements were available to assess the performance of each component when operated in proximity of the left margin. The signals of dynamic pressure probes recorded at the inlet and outlet of the vaneless diffuser are compared to monitor subsynchronous harmonics related to the rotating stall phenomenon. Numerical and experimental results were found to be in good agreement in terms of integral performance parameters, rotating stall frequency, and amplitude of the unsteady pressure field. This confirms the possibility of exploiting the CFD for the prediction of the complex unsteady flow pattern occurring beyond the left margin of the operating curve.

summary_zh: 本文通过三维非定常CFD模拟工业多级离心压气机最后三级，研究近失速工况下的旋转失速非定常流动。数值结果与单级实验在性能参数、失速频率和压力脉动幅值上吻合良好，验证了CFD预测复杂失速流动的能力。
method: 采用三维非定常CFD模拟多级离心压气机最后三级，包括低流量系数、低马赫数叶轮、无叶扩压器和回流通道，并与单级实验对比验证。
innovation: 针对多级离心压气机旋转失速缺乏广泛文献的现状，首次应用三维非定常CFD模拟最后三级，并成功复现失速频率和压力脉动。
conclusions: 1. 数值与实验在整体性能、旋转失速频率和压力脉动幅值上吻合良好。2. 验证了CFD可用于预测运行曲线左边界外的复杂非定常流动。
limitations: 仅针对低流量系数、低马赫数设计，且实验验证限于单级，多级结果缺乏直接实验对比。
relevance_reason: 研究旋转失速，与用户关注的压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Experimental Investigation on the Dynamic Response of a Vaned Diffuser Compressor in Innovative Heat-Pump Systems
abstract: Abstract Nowadays, heat pumps are playing a key role in reducing carbon footprint of heating and cooling systems. In large-scale industrial applications, centrifugal compressors are often used under variable conditions and at low mass flowrate, where instabilities may occur. To investigate these aspects in refrigerant closed-loop systems, Carrier supplied the University of Genoa with a small-size chiller test rig. This rig is equipped with a vaned diffuser high-speed centrifugal compressor driven by a variable-speed motor, enabling experimental investigation in a wide operating range. This experimental activity investigates surge transients in centrifugal compressors by employing a comprehensive approach that integrates pressure measurements using high-frequency piezoresistive pressure transducers with dynamic vibro-acoustic response data. Different signal processing techniques in time and frequency domain were applied to investigate the different system response components, and to separate the overall signal into individual contributions to better identify the rise of anomalous fluid-dynamic conditions. A coherence analysis was also applied, and different types of system responses were considered, including the function computation between physically nonhomogeneous system responses such as inflow pressure and structural vibrational signals. Additionally, the acquired uniform-time-increment signals were resampled at constant increments of the compressor shaft angle to obtain angle-domain sampled data. This allowed for the computation of synchronously averaged response spectra both in linear and energy modes. Statistical techniques, such as skewness and kurtosis, were also utilized for the detection of signals with strong additional noise, where transient and nondeterministic contents may arise as the compressor approaches unstable conditions. The obtained results provide promising diagnostic and predictive paths to detect compressor instabilities in closed-loop heat pump systems.

summary_zh: 该实验研究针对带叶式扩压器的离心压缩机在热泵系统中的动态响应，通过高频压力传感器和振动声学响应测量，结合时频域信号处理、相干分析、角域重采样及统计方法，检测喘振瞬态和不稳定先兆，为闭环热泵系统压缩机失稳诊断提供预测路径。
method: 实验研究，采用高频压阻压力传感器和振动声学响应测量，结合时频域信号处理、相干分析、角域同步平均及偏度/峰度统计方法。
innovation: 综合压力与振动声学响应，采用角域重采样和同步平均技术，以及偏度/峰度统计检测噪声中的瞬态非确定性信号，用于喘振早期诊断。
conclusions: 1. 综合压力与振动信号可有效检测压缩机接近不稳定时的瞬态非确定性内容。2. 角域同步平均和统计方法为喘振诊断提供了新路径。
limitations: 仅针对特定小型制冷剂闭环试验台，未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变等参数影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及喘振失稳实验测量，与压气机稳定性相关，但未聚焦叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Evaluation of Quasi-Periodic Oscillations for the Dynamic Design of Dual Spool Jet Engines Utilizing a Solution of the Invariant Manifold
abstract: Abstract Dual spool jet engine dynamic design is nowadays based on approximations of time periodic solutions, which is of low computational cost. This paper utilizes a solution of the invariant manifold for the computation of quasi-periodic oscillations of dual spool jet engines which are sourced to the incommensurable ratio of rotating speeds of the two rotors, driven by flow parameters. An invariant manifold is a geometric structure in a dynamical system with the property that solutions which start on the manifold, and follow the evolution prescribed by the differential equation, remain on the manifold. A whole engine dynamic model is established, and local nonlinearities are included by enhanced models of five ball bearings (BBs), and a simplified model of one squeeze film damper (SFD), existing in a typical configuration of a civil aircraft engine. The quasi-periodic response limit cycles are evaluated for a virtual run-up of the engine applying numerical continuation. Stability assessment of the quasi-periodic limit cycles is performed by evaluating Lyapunov exponents. Four different versions of the rotor-bearing system are investigated, with respect to the number of nonlinear support elements (ball bearings and squeeze film damper). The results demonstrate the need for incorporating quasi-periodic solutions (QPS) in the dynamic design of machines of this type, with focus on (a) the instability issues which cannot be predicted by periodic solutions, (b) to the unbalance response amplitude which appears to differ when comparing periodic and quasi-periodic response, and (c) to the additional frequency content in the response of the nonlinear quasi-periodic system.

summary_zh: 本文利用不变流形求解双转子涡扇发动机的准周期振动，该振动源于两转子转速不可公度比。建立了包含五个球轴承和一个挤压油膜阻尼器的全机动力学模型，通过数值延拓评估准周期极限环，并利用Lyapunov指数进行稳定性分析。结果表明，准周期解对预测失稳、不平衡响应幅值和附加频率成分至关重要。
method: 数值方法：建立全机动力学模型，包含球轴承和挤压油膜阻尼器非线性，采用数值延拓计算准周期响应，Lyapunov指数评估稳定性。
innovation: 将不变流形方法应用于双转子发动机准周期振动计算，揭示了周期解无法预测的失稳问题和响应差异。
conclusions: 准周期解能预测周期解无法发现的失稳问题；准周期响应与周期响应的不平衡幅值存在差异。
limitations: 仅针对特定构型（五个球轴承和一个挤压油膜阻尼器），未考虑气动弹性等耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动和稳定性，但主要关注结构动力学而非气动热力学或压气机稳定性。

title: On the Mechanism for Rotating Cavitation Onset in a Four-Bladed Rocket Engine Turbopump Inducer
abstract: Abstract Cavitation instabilities in liquid rocket engines can lead to turbopump performance degradation and catastrophic damage to engine components, and there is still a gap in understanding the underlying mechanisms governing the cavitation dynamics. The present study characterizes the different cavitation regimes of a four-bladed inducer using unsteady pressure and optical measurements, specifically the transition from tip vortex cavitation to alternate blade cavitation (ABC) and rotating cavitation (RC), depending on cavitation number. Cavitation compliance and mass flow gain factor, two key parameters characterizing inducer dynamics and pumping system stability, are inferred from the measurements using a previously developed dynamic inducer model. The criterion for rotating cavitation onset, governed by the position of the blade tip vortex, is validated via optical measurements. A first-principles-based model for the trajectory angle of the tip vortex cavitation is established and yields good agreement with experimental results. The paper demonstrates that the criterion for rotating cavitation onset is independent of inducer geometry and sets the stage for more generalized inducer design guidelines to address cavitation instability.

summary_zh: 本研究通过非稳态压力和光学测量，表征了四叶片诱导轮从叶尖涡空化到交替叶片空化和旋转空化的转变，验证了旋转空化起始准则，并建立了基于第一性原理的叶尖涡空化轨迹角模型，为诱导轮设计提供了通用指导。
method: 实验测量为主，结合动态诱导轮模型推断空化柔量和质量流量增益因子，并建立理论模型。工况参数包括空化数和叶片数（四叶片）。
innovation: 首次从第一性原理建立叶尖涡空化轨迹角模型，并证明旋转空化起始准则与诱导轮几何无关，具有通用性。
conclusions: 旋转空化起始由叶尖涡位置决定，且该准则独立于诱导轮几何；所建轨迹角模型与实验吻合良好。
limitations: 仅针对四叶片诱导轮，未涉及其他叶片数或几何形状的验证。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究旋转空化不稳定性，与旋转流动不稳定性相关，但对象为诱导轮而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Challenges in Aerodynamic Performance of Micro Gas Turbines and Design Inefficiencies
abstract: Abstract Micro gas turbines (MGTs) hold significant potential for applications in distributed power generation, aviation, and military sectors due to their compact size and high power density. However, their performance is hindered by substantial aerodynamic challenges, including inherently low-Reynolds-number flows, large tip clearances, thick trailing edges, and low aspect ratios, all of which contribute to increased aerodynamic losses. To investigate these challenges, this study employs large-eddy simulation (LES) with Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes methodologies on a single-stage Wren100 turbine (capable of 100 N thrust and ∼20kW power), focusing on critical design aspects such as stator and rotor Reynolds number of around 30,000 to 60,000. The research begins with baseline LES analyses to capture unsteady flow structures, laminar separation, and tip leakage effects. Parametric redesigns of stator vane count, aspect ratio, trailing edge thickness, and rotor tip clearance are then proposed to address identified loss sources. Results demonstrate a thrust increase from 24.25 N to 29.95 N, and a rise in the rotor isentropic efficiency from 80.1% to 81.1% by optimizing stator parameters. Further reducing rotor tip clearance from 5% to 2.5% of blade height improves efficiency to 83.4% while sustaining the improved thrust levels. Although aerodynamic challenges remain, targeted geometry refinements can yield tangible performance gains, offering guidance for next-generation MGT development that balances efficiency with manufacturability. Future work will focus on experimental testing of these redesigned components, along with optimization methods that incorporate thermal and structural constraints to further refine the MGT performance.

summary_zh: 本研究采用大涡模拟（LES）和RANS方法，针对微型燃气轮机（MGT）的低雷诺数、大叶尖间隙等气动挑战，对Wren100单级涡轮进行基线分析和参数化优化。通过优化静子叶片数、展弦比、尾缘厚度和转子叶尖间隙，推力从24.25N提升至29.95N，转子等熵效率从80.1%提升至83.4%。
method: 数值模拟：大涡模拟（LES）与RANS方法，工况为单级Wren100涡轮，转子雷诺数约30,000-60,000。
innovation: 针对MGT低雷诺数流动特性，系统量化了叶尖间隙、尾缘厚度等几何参数对性能的影响，并提出了兼顾效率与可制造性的优化方案。
conclusions: 1. 优化静子参数使推力从24.25N增至29.95N，转子等熵效率从80.1%升至81.1%。2. 转子叶尖间隙从5%降至2.5%叶高，效率进一步提升至83.4%。
limitations: 仅针对单级涡轮，未考虑压气机级及热-结构约束，且缺乏实验验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙对性能的影响，与叶尖间隙畸变相关，但未涉及稳定性或激盘模型。

title: A Three-Dimensional Actuator Disk Model for Fan Response to Inlet Distortion: Part I - Formulation
abstract: Abstract This paper describes a semi-analytical approach to investigate the response of a fan stage of arbitrary hub-tip ratio subjected to inlet distortion. The flow is taken to be incompressible and inviscid and the length scale of the imposed distortion is assumed to be sufficiently large that the blade rows can be treated as actuator disks. Work addition by the rotor is taken to be radially nonuniform, in general. Under conditions representative of contemporary fans, the background flow is shown to be well represented by the radial equilibrium approximation. On the further assumption that the imposed distortion is a small perturbation about this background flow, semi-analytical forms are derived for the flow fields upstream and downstream of the fan stage. The upstream perturbations are comprised of decaying potential modes and convected vortical modes. The nonuniform downstream flow does not permit a straightforward decomposition of this type. Instead, the perturbations are found to be comprised of decaying modal-type disturbances and convected disturbances that grow algebraically downstream. By matching the upstream and downstream disturbances across the actuator disks using the conservation laws, the overall perturbation field can be determined. The numerical procedure for accomplishing this is very efficient, permitting the present method to be employed in trade studies during early design phases.
affiliations: 500 Gulfstream Road M/S R4P Savannah, GA 31408
summary_zh: 本文提出一种半解析三维激盘模型，用于研究任意轮毂比风扇级对进气畸变的响应。假设不可压无粘流动，畸变尺度足够大，叶片排可视为激盘。通过径向平衡近似和线性化扰动，推导出上下游流场半解析解，上游扰动由衰减势模态和涡模态组成，下游扰动包含代数增长模态。数值方法高效，适用于早期设计权衡研究。
method: 半解析理论模型，基于激盘假设、径向平衡近似和小扰动线性化，推导上下游扰动场的解析形式，并通过匹配条件数值求解。
innovation: 首次将三维激盘模型推广到任意轮毂比风扇级，并处理径向非均匀做功，揭示了下游扰动代数增长的新特性。
conclusions: 1. 背景流场可用径向平衡近似良好表示。2. 下游扰动包含代数增长的对流扰动，不同于上游的衰减模态。
limitations: 假设不可压无粘流动，忽略可压缩性和粘性效应，且畸变尺度需足够大。
relevance_reason: 该模型直接针对叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，与用户课题高度吻合。

title: A Three-Dimensional Actuator Disk Model for Fan Response to Inlet Distortion: Part II - Applications
abstract: Abstract A theory developed in a companion paper (Prasad, D. 2025, “A Three-Dimensional Actuator Disk Model for Fan Response to Inlet Distortion: Part I – Formulation,” ASME GT2025-151355) for the distortion response of a fan stage is applied to several configurations. The first of these is a conventional single-stage fan comprising a rotor and stator, subjected to a tip-dominated stagnation pressure distortion. The response is highly three-dimensional, featuring a strong radial cross-flow and a distortion transfer with considerably greater spatial complexity than the excitation. Upon varying the stage loading, it is found that, while the fan response near the tip is qualitatively similar to that obtained using parallel compressor theory, three-dimensional effects significantly alter the behavior in the inner span of the annulus. Variations in the shape of the radial work distributions have a minor effect on the response although the behavior in the outer span exhibits a dependence on the gradient of the work distribution. Conversely, the effect of introducing an Inlet Guide Vane is observed to be substantial, particularly on the distortion transfer. This feature is exploited to optimize various aspects of the fan response by employing circumferentially and radially nonuniform IGVs. Finally, the response of the fan to a swirl distortion comprised of counter-rotating vortices is examined. The upstream influence in this instance is observed to feature strong induced axial and radial velocities, while a strong stagnation pressure response is generated downstream.
affiliations: 500 Gulfstream Road M/S R4P Savannah, GA 31408
summary_zh: 本文应用三维激盘模型研究风扇对进气畸变的响应，包括常规单级风扇在叶尖总压畸变下的三维响应、级负荷影响、径向功分布形状的影响、进口导叶的优化作用，以及旋流畸变响应。发现三维效应显著改变内环行为，非均匀IGV可优化响应。
method: 理论分析，基于三维激盘模型（Part I理论），应用于多种构型，包括单级风扇、带IGV风扇，分析不同畸变类型和工况。
innovation: 将三维激盘模型应用于风扇畸变响应分析，揭示了三维径向流动和畸变传递的空间复杂性，并利用非均匀IGV优化响应。
conclusions: 1. 三维效应显著改变内环行为，而叶尖响应与平行压气机理论定性相似。2. 非均匀IGV可大幅影响畸变传递，用于优化响应。
limitations: 仅基于理论模型，缺乏实验验证；未考虑非定常效应和失速过程。
relevance_reason: 该论文直接研究叶尖畸变下的风扇响应，使用三维激盘模型，与用户课题高度相关。

title: The Impact of Transition and Turbulence Modeling on the SPLEEN High-Speed Low-Pressure Turbine Cascade
abstract: Abstract In high-speed low-pressure turbines (LPTs) for geared turbofan engine applications, transonic flow conditions combined with low Reynolds number operation depict a flow scenario where shock waves can interact with laminar or turbulent boundary layers, and the resulting flow topologies pose serious challenges for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) analyses. In this work, two different in-house developed Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solvers are applied to the study of a transonic low-pressure turbine cascade over a range of Mach and Reynolds numbers, with a focus on the performance of transition/turbulent closures. The selected test case consists of the SPLEEN (Secondary and Leakage Flow Effects in High-Speed Low-Pressure Turbines) C1 cascade, a state-of-the-art high-speed low-pressure turbine blade section that has been investigated in an extensive experimental campaign at the von Kármán Institute, in the framework of the SPLEEN European Research Programme. The considered transition-sensitive turbulence closures are representative of the most advanced techniques for RANS methods and range from correlation-based intermittency transport approaches to phenomenological model based on the laminar kinetic energy (LKE) concept and the k−v′2−ω framework. It is shown how realistic transition modeling is crucial for predicting blade loading distributions and then addresses design challenges for transonic LPT bladings. A discussion concerning the reproduction of wake loss profiles demonstrates how classical linear eddy viscosity closures can be adequate in the case of attached flow even in transonic flow conditions but fall short in predicting the intense wake mixing brought about by the thick turbulent boundary layers that are formed past laminar separation bubbles.

summary_zh: 本研究针对高速低压涡轮叶栅（SPLEEN C1），采用两种RANS求解器评估不同转捩/湍流模型在跨声速低雷诺数条件下的性能。结果表明，真实转捩建模对预测叶片载荷分布至关重要，而经典线性涡粘模型在附着流中表现良好，但无法准确预测由层流分离泡后厚湍流边界层引起的强烈尾迹混合。
method: 数值研究，采用两种RANS求解器，结合转捩敏感湍流模型（间歇性输运、层流动能、k-v'2-ω），在跨声速（Ma）和低雷诺数（Re）工况下分析SPLEEN C1叶栅。
innovation: 系统比较了多种先进转捩/湍流模型在高速低压涡轮跨声速流动中的表现，揭示了转捩建模对尾迹混合预测的关键影响。
conclusions: 1. 真实转捩建模对预测跨声速LPT叶片载荷分布至关重要。2. 经典线性涡粘模型在附着流中足够，但无法预测层流分离泡后厚湍流边界层引起的尾迹混合。
limitations: 仅针对单一叶栅（SPLEEN C1），未考虑旋转效应或全环流动。
relevance_reason: 涉及转捩和湍流建模，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Aerodynamic Effect of Shallow Circumferential Grooves in the Shroud of a Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract The standard aerodynamic design of a centrifugal compressor features an unshrouded impeller with a smooth shroud. However, the shape of the shroud significantly influences the final compressor parameters. Previous research has shown that even small geometric changes in the shroud, referred to as casing treatment, can substantially affect the operating characteristics of a rotating machine. This article presents a novel casing treatment for a centrifugal compressor, involving the creation of ten circumferential grooves with a semi-circular profile in a meridional section. The radius of these grooves is approximately equal to the tip clearance. Experimental results demonstrate that the presence of these grooves shifts the surge line toward lower flowrates, increases efficiency in a narrow region between the best efficiency point and the surge line and shifts the choke line toward lower flowrates. External sound pressure measurements indicate a reduction in amplitudes at sub-synchronous frequencies, suggesting a potential link between the compressor map's influence and the suppression of aerodynamic instabilities. Computational fluid dynamics analysis supports the experimental observations, revealing a significant influence of energy dissipation caused by the applied grooves. This study highlights the considerable impact of shroud geometry on centrifugal compressors with unshrouded impellers and offers valuable insights for further research into casing treatments.

summary_zh: 本文研究离心压气机机匣上浅周向槽（半圆形截面，半径约等于叶尖间隙）的气动效应。实验表明，十个周向槽将喘振线移向低流量，在最佳效率点与喘振线之间窄区域提高效率，并将阻塞线移向低流量。外部声压测量显示亚同步频率振幅降低，表明抑制了气动失稳。CFD分析支持实验，揭示了槽引起的能量耗散影响。
method: 实验与数值方法结合，在离心压气机机匣上加工十个半圆形周向槽，通过性能实验和外部声压测量，并辅以CFD分析。
innovation: 提出一种新型机匣处理——浅周向槽，其半径与叶尖间隙相当，并系统研究了其对离心压气机性能、稳定性和噪声的影响。
conclusions: 1. 周向槽将喘振线移向低流量，并在窄区域提高效率；2. 亚同步频率振幅降低，表明抑制了气动失稳。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何（十个半圆形槽）和单一压气机，未探讨槽参数优化及不同工况下的通用性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及机匣处理对稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接使用三维激盘模型。

title: A Test Facility for the Experimental Investigation of Labyrinth Seal Flutter and Early-Stage Validation of Prediction Techniques
abstract: Abstract The ARIAS project involved the development of novel seal flutter prediction approaches and their full validation against data generated with a state-of-the-art test facility to improve understanding of this phenomenon. The unique test rig was designed and built to provide detailed insight into the flow and structural dynamic behavior of a seal test article under free and forced flutter and was demonstrated to successfully produce seal flutter under controlled conditions. Simple 1D modeling approaches and full 3D computational fluid dynamics (CFD) models of the test geometry were developed to design the rig’s test articles and to predict the free-flutter and forced-response behavior of both a two- and four-fin labyrinth seal. The rig produces high-quality validation data that could be used to successfully validate the developed models, significantly increasing the confidence in seal flutter predictions, and the comparative facets and drawbacks of these prediction approaches.

summary_zh: 本研究通过ARIAS项目开发了新型迷宫密封颤振预测方法，并利用专用试验台进行验证。试验台成功在受控条件下产生密封颤振，提供了高质量验证数据。研究比较了一维和三维CFD模型在预测两齿和四齿迷宫密封自由颤振和强迫响应方面的优缺点，显著提高了预测信心。
method: 实验与数值结合：设计专用试验台进行自由和强迫颤振实验，同时开发一维和三维CFD模型进行预测，试验台参数包括两齿和四齿迷宫密封。
innovation: 首次针对迷宫密封颤振建立专用试验台，提供高质量验证数据，并系统比较一维与三维预测方法的优劣，填补了该领域实验验证的空白。
conclusions: 1. 试验台成功在受控条件下产生密封颤振，验证了预测模型的有效性。2. 一维和三维CFD模型均能预测颤振行为，但各有优缺点，三维模型精度更高。
limitations: 研究仅针对迷宫密封，未涉及其他密封类型；试验台可能无法完全模拟真实发动机工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及颤振和实验测量，与气动弹性相关，但聚焦于密封而非压气机叶片，与用户研究方向间接相关。

title: Design Optimization of Shock Control Bumps for Efficiency and Stability Enhancement of Transonic Axial Compressor
abstract: Abstract In the interior of supersonic/transonic axial compressor, implementing shock control bumps (SCBs) on the blade suction surface holds great promise for delaying shock waves and shrinking boundary-layer separation regions. However, conventional approaches to SCBs design optimization have shown limited effectiveness in simultaneously enhancing peak efficiency and expanding the operating range, because of the incomplete physical mechanisms underlying the separation suppression by SCBs and the lack of quantitative flow-field metrics for assessing operating stability. Building on the previous research into the stall flow mechanisms in the axial compressor, the present study introduces both shroud endwall blockage attenuation and suction surface separation suppression as key metrics for optimizing the operating stability of SCBs. On this basis, an efficient design optimization method for SCBs is proposed by integrating a classification-based surrogate-assisted evolutionary algorithm with an adaptive filling strategy. The developed optimization framework is applied to the SCBs design on a transonic compressor rotor, resulting in a 5.55% increase in the stall margin and a 1.71% improvement in the adiabatic efficiency. Separation flow topology analysis, based on the critical point theory, reveals that the enhanced efficiency and expanded stable operating range are primarily due to delayed shock-induced boundary-layer separation and the formation of a reattachment zone on the blade suction surface. These improvements are attributed to the transformation from an unstable saddle-point topology to a stable node-point topology, occurring in the mid-span region at the peak efficiency point and near the blade tip at the near-stall point.

summary_zh: 本研究针对跨声速轴流压气机叶片吸力面激波控制鼓包（SCB）进行设计优化，提出以端壁堵塞衰减和吸力面分离抑制为稳定性指标，结合分类代理辅助进化算法与自适应填充策略。优化后压气机失速裕度提升5.55%，绝热效率提高1.71%，分离流拓扑分析表明不稳定鞍点拓扑转变为稳定节点拓扑是主因。
method: 数值优化方法，采用分类代理辅助进化算法与自适应填充策略，应用于跨声速压气机转子SCB设计，工况为跨声速。
innovation: 引入端壁堵塞衰减和吸力面分离抑制作为稳定性量化指标，并采用分类代理辅助进化算法与自适应填充策略进行高效优化。
conclusions: SCB优化使失速裕度提升5.55%，绝热效率提高1.71%；分离流拓扑从鞍点转变为节点拓扑，延迟激波诱导分离并形成再附着区。
limitations: 仅针对单一转子SCB设计，未考虑多级或非均匀进气影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定性提升和失速裕度预测，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测部分相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Effect of Rotor/Stator Axial Loading Design on Compressor Performance and Flow Stability
abstract: Abstract Numerical investigations were conducted to study the influence of rotor/stator blade loading distributions (BLDs) on compressor aerodynamic performance. The fore-loaded rotor design slightly improved compressor efficiency at operating conditions above the design mass flow point. Both aft-loaded rotor and aft-loaded stator designs demonstrated performance enhancements at operating conditions below the design mass flow point, with the aft-loaded stator configuration showing more pronounced improvements. Separate analyses of rotor and stator characteristics revealed that differences in stage performance at high mass flowrates were primarily attributed to variations in rotor characteristics. At low mass flow conditions, the significant performance improvement of aft-loaded stator mainly originated from stator characteristics, while the modest enhancement of aft-loaded rotor principally resulted from rotor characteristics. Further analysis identified that the sharp performance degradation in stator characteristics was caused by large-scale flow separation on the stator suction surface. Unsteady computational results demonstrated that changes in rotor BLD affected the stator passage flow through wake interactions, while the aft-loaded stator reduced leading-edge loading and consequently weakened the interference effects between rotor wakes and stator leading-edge separation. A flow stability prediction model was employed to evaluate how different loading distributions impact compressor flow stability. The predictions indicated that aft-loaded rotor design significantly reduced stall inception mass flow and improved flow stability by decreasing rotor tip loading and weakening tip leakage flow intensity. Experimental tests were performed to validate the reliability of both numerical simulations and model predictions.

summary_zh: 通过数值和实验研究转子/静子叶片加载分布对压气机性能与稳定性的影响。前加载转子在设计点以上提高效率，后加载转子和静子在设计点以下改善性能，其中后加载静子效果更显著。后加载转子通过降低叶尖载荷和泄漏流强度显著减小失速起始流量，提升流动稳定性。
method: 数值模拟（稳态与非定常）结合实验验证，研究不同加载分布（前/后加载）对压气机性能的影响，并采用稳定性预测模型评估。
innovation: 系统对比了转子与静子加载分布对性能的独立贡献，揭示了后加载静子通过减弱转子尾迹与静子前缘分离的干扰来改善低流量性能的机理。
conclusions: 后加载转子显著降低失速起始质量流量，提升稳定性；后加载静子在低流量下性能改善主要源于静子特性，其机理是减弱尾迹-分离干扰。
limitations: 仅针对特定压气机级，未考虑叶尖间隙畸变等非均匀进气条件。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定性及叶尖载荷影响，与叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接研究畸变。

title: Integrated Bidirectional Thermofluid–Structural Interaction for Multi-Objective Optimization of Transonic Centrifugal Impellers
abstract: Abstract Centrifugal impellers are critical components in turbomachinery, where performance and reliability are challenged by complex multiphysics interactions under transonic conditions. Existing design methods often neglect thermo–structural interactions, resulting in compromised accuracy and safety. This study addresses these limitations by proposing a multiparameter optimization framework integrating bidirectional thermofluid–structural interaction (BTFSI) analysis to simultaneously enhance aerodynamic efficiency and structural integrity. A BTFSI numerical model was developed, incorporating blade heat transfer and deformation feedback, and applied to optimize five key parameters: blade material, thickness, count, tip clearance, and profile. Results demonstrate that optimized carbon fiber blades reduce maximum stress by 74% and deformation by 61.7% compared to traditional stainless steel, while achieving a 1.1% increase in polytropic efficiency and 0.76% higher pressure ratio. The framework resolves interdisciplinary contradictions between aerodynamic performance and structural safety, offering a validated methodology for transonic impeller design. This work advances high-speed turbomachinery optimization by balancing multiphysics interactions, providing critical insights for material selection and performance enhancement in energy-intensive applications.

summary_zh: 针对跨声速离心叶轮的多物理场耦合问题，提出集成双向热流固耦合（BTFSI）的多参数优化框架，同时提升气动效率和结构完整性。优化碳纤维叶片相比不锈钢，最大应力降低74%，变形减少61.7%，多变效率提高1.1%，压比提高0.76%。
method: 数值模拟，采用双向热流固耦合（BTFSI）模型，优化叶片材料、厚度、数量、叶尖间隙和型线五个参数。
innovation: 首次在跨声速离心叶轮优化中集成双向热流固耦合，同时考虑叶片传热和变形反馈，解决气动与结构性能的跨学科矛盾。
conclusions: 1. 碳纤维叶片相比不锈钢，最大应力降低74%，变形减少61.7%。2. 优化后多变效率提高1.1%，压比提高0.76%。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速离心叶轮，未考虑非定常流动或失速/喘振等稳定性问题。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙优化和流固耦合，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究畸变或失速机理。

title: Correction models of Reynolds number effects for through-flow method in axial compressors
abstract: Aerodynamic performances of axial compressors are significantly affected by variation of Reynolds number in aero-engines. In the design and analysis of compressors, previous correction methods for cascades and stages have difficulties in predicting comprehensively Reynolds number effects on airfoils, matching and characteristics curves. This study proposes Re -correction models for loss, deviation angle and endwall blockage based on classical theories and cascade tests, and loss and deviation models show good agreement in test data of NACA65 and C4 cascades. Through-flow method considering Reynolds number effects is developed by integrating the correction models into a verified Streamline Curvature (SLC) tool. A three-stage axial compressor is investigated through SLC and CFD methods from design Reynolds number ( Re d = 2×10 6 ) to low Re = 4×10 4 , and the numerical methods are validated with test data of characteristic curves and spanwise distributions at Re d . With Re reduction, SLC method with correction models well predicts variation in overall performances compared with CFD calculations and Wassell’s model. Streamwise and spanwise matching such as total pressure and loss distributions in SLC predictions are basically consistent with those in CFD results at near-stall points under design and low Reynolds numbers. SLC and CFD methods share similar detections of stall risks in the third stage (Stg3), and their analyses of diffusion processes deviate to some extent due to different predictions in separated endwall flow. The correction models can be adopted to consider Reynolds number effects in through-flow design and analysis of axial compressors.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Department of Energy and Power Engineering, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 针对航空发动机轴流压气机中雷诺数变化对气动性能的影响，基于经典理论和叶栅实验提出了损失、落后角和端壁堵塞的雷诺数修正模型，并集成到流线曲率通流方法中。通过三阶压气机从设计雷诺数2×10^6到低雷诺数4×10^4的验证，表明修正模型能较好预测总体性能和级间匹配，与CFD和Wassell模型结果一致。
method: 数值方法为主，结合经典理论和叶栅实验数据；采用流线曲率通流方法（SLC）和CFD，工况为设计雷诺数2×10^6至低雷诺数4×10^4。
innovation: 提出了同时修正损失、落后角和端壁堵塞的雷诺数效应模型，并集成到通流方法中，实现了对压气机总体性能和级间匹配的全面预测。
conclusions: 1. 提出的修正模型在NACA65和C4叶栅数据上验证良好；2. 在低雷诺数下，SLC方法预测的总体性能与CFD和Wassell模型一致，且能检测到第三级失速风险。
limitations: 模型基于经典理论和特定叶栅实验，可能不适用于复杂三维流动或极端工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定性和性能预测，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测有一定关联，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Impact of multiscale flow structures on mixing and losses in turbine blade tip region
abstract: Multiscale mixing of the turbine blade tip leakage and mainstream flows causes considerable aerodynamic loss. Understanding it is crucial to correctly estimating the mixing loss and thus improving the turbine’s performance. The multiscale mixing phenomenon in a typical high-pressure turbine rotor flow was studied in this work. The contributions of various scale flows to entropy production and mixing properties were identified. The corresponding physical mechanisms at different scales were explored. It is shown that the large-scale and time-averaged flow contributions to mixing are significant, accounting for approximately 37.1 % and 25 % of the total. Time-averaged and large-scale flows cause the majority of the fluid deformation of the material surface, while meso- and small-scale flows just generate finer deformations. It raises the area stretch coefficient and the virtual concentration gradient. Thus, mixing is enhanced. Furthermore, time-averaged and large-scale flows account for the majority of the losses in the upstream and downstream regions of the blade tip respectively, accounting for approximately 53.8 % and 33.5 % of the total. The sheet-like structures—rather than the tip leaking vortex—are the primary source of the loss. High-dissipation regions are produced by the sheet-like structures via the pressure Hessian term and the self-amplification terms.

summary_zh: 研究涡轮叶尖泄漏流与主流的跨尺度混合现象，分析不同尺度流动对熵产和混合特性的贡献。发现大尺度与时间平均流动贡献显著，片状结构是损失主要来源，而非叶尖泄漏涡。
method: 数值模拟，研究典型高压涡轮转子流动，采用多尺度分解方法分析不同尺度流动的贡献。
innovation: 揭示了片状结构而非泄漏涡是损失主源，并量化了不同尺度流动对混合和损失的贡献比例。
conclusions: 大尺度与时间平均流动贡献约62.1%的混合和损失；片状结构通过压力Hessian项和自放大项产生高耗散区。
limitations: 仅针对特定高压涡轮转子，未考虑变工况或叶尖几何变化的影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙流动和损失机理，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或畸变，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Validation of time–space collocation method for simulating asymmetric unsteady flows in eccentric compressors
abstract: Circumferentially non-uniform tip clearances induced by rotor eccentricity significantly affect the overall performance of axial compressors, particularly the stability margin. Currently, Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) plays a crucial role in the aerodynamic analysis of eccentric compressors. However, conventional full-annulus Unsteady Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes (URANS) simulations are prohibitively expensive for routine design and analysis purposes. To address this issue, the paper presents a novel Fourier-based method, called the Time-Space Collocation (TSC) method, for efficient simulations of eccentric compressors. This method coherently treats temporal and spatial harmonics, making it well-suited to tackle the rotor eccentricity problem, as the perturbation waves induced by eccentricity are time-periodic with respect to the rotor and space-periodic with respect to the stator. Three numerical cases, including NASA Rotor 67, original Stage 67, and Stage 67 with a reduced rotor-stator axial gap, were conducted to verify the effectiveness of the TSC method. The results indicate that, for the rotor eccentricity levels studied in this paper, the influence of weak rotor-stator interactions can be disregarded in the original Stage 67. In this situation, applying three harmonics can accurately capture both the performance variations and the non-uniformly distributed flowfields of eccentric compressors, while achieving a reduction in run time by two orders of magnitude compared to full-annulus URANS simulations. However, in Stage 67 with a reduced rotor-stator axial gap, the results that include rotor-stator interactions align much more closely with the URANS results. Nevertheless, the TSC simulations can still achieve speed-ups of several dozen times. Overall, the TSC method shows promising potential for application within the engineering community.

summary_zh: 针对转子偏心引起的周向非均匀叶尖间隙对压气机性能及稳定性的影响，提出了一种基于傅里叶变换的时空配置（TSC）方法，用于高效模拟偏心压气机中的非定常非对称流动。通过NASA Rotor 67和Stage 67算例验证，表明TSC方法在弱转子-静子相互作用下使用3个谐波即可准确捕捉性能变化，计算速度比全环URANS快两个数量级；在强相互作用下仍可加速数十倍。
method: 数值方法：基于傅里叶变换的时空配置（TSC）方法，处理时空谐波；以NASA Rotor 67和Stage 67为对象，研究不同转子-静子轴向间隙下的偏心流动。
innovation: 提出一种新颖的傅里叶基时空配置方法，统一处理时间和空间谐波，高效模拟偏心压气机中的非对称非定常流动，显著降低计算成本。
conclusions: 1. 弱转子-静子相互作用时，3个谐波即可准确捕捉偏心压气机性能变化，计算时间减少两个数量级。2. 强相互作用时，TSC结果与URANS吻合良好，加速数十倍。
limitations: 仅验证了特定偏心量水平，未考虑高偏心或复杂几何的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙畸变对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户课题直接相关。

title: Aeroelastic characteristics and vibration reduction method of NTBT rotor with TEF technology
abstract: A high-precision CFD/CSD (Computational Fluid Dynamics/Computational Structural Dynamics) coupling method is developed to study the aeroelastic behavior and design the vibration reduction strategy of NTBT (New Type Blade-Tip) rotor with TEF (Trailing Edge Flap) technology in forward flight. In the aspect of CSD method, the closed-form dynamical governing equation is modified using Hamilton’s principle to consider the influence of the movable TEF, in which the NTBT geometric nonlinearity is considered through coordinate transformation by virtue of finite element method. In the aspect of CFD method, a moving-embedded grid method for rotor blades is developed to account for the dynamic deflection of TEF, in which the grid deformation is achieved through algebraic transformations, and a high-precision unsteady CFD method with 5th-order TENO (Targeted Essentially Non-Oscillatory) scheme is introduced to effectively simulate the rotor flowfield. Considering the computational efficiency, the loosely-coupling strategy is introduced to build up the CFD/CSD method. The validity of the coupling method is verified by comparing the computed aerodynamic loads, frequency spectrum, and structural loads with the referential or the experimental results of the typical model rotors. Based on that, the frequency, phase, and amplitude-sweeping parametric analyses of TEF are conducted thoroughly to reveal the influence mechanisms on the aeroelastic characteristics of NTBT rotor. Furthermore, an optimal control strategy is proposed to suppress the vibration intensity of hub loads, showing that the active vibration reduction method can effectively suppress the rotor hub vibratory intensity by over 40% in typical forward flight conditions.

summary_zh: 本文开发了高精度CFD/CSD耦合方法，研究带后缘襟翼的新型叶尖转子在前飞中的气动弹性特性。通过参数分析揭示了襟翼频率、相位和振幅的影响机制，并提出主动减振策略，使典型前飞状态下桨毂振动强度降低40%以上。
method: 数值方法：高精度CFD/CSD耦合，采用五阶TENO格式和动网格技术；参数分析：频率、相位、振幅扫描；工况：前飞状态。
innovation: 针对新型叶尖转子，结合可动后缘襟翼，发展了考虑几何非线性的闭式动力学方程和移动嵌入网格方法，实现高精度气动弹性耦合分析。
conclusions: 1. 后缘襟翼参数（频率、相位、振幅）显著影响转子气动弹性特性。2. 主动控制策略可有效抑制桨毂振动强度，典型前飞条件下减振超40%。
limitations: 仅针对前飞工况，未考虑悬停或机动飞行；未涉及襟翼偏转对气动噪声的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及气动弹性与振动控制，与用户关注的转子振动控制方向相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Fouling Characteristics and Flow Mechanisms in a Transonic Compressor: Insights Using a Coupled Euler–Lagrange Method
abstract: Abstract Particle deposition poses a significant challenge in transonic compressors, particularly in environments characterized by high concentrations of airborne particles. Conventional particle tracking techniques primarily focus on the analysis of particle-induced fouling. However, these methods exhibit inherent limitations in accurately capturing the dynamics of particle interactions with secondary flow structures. To overcome this issue, this study employs a fully coupled Euler–Lagrange approach for a single rotor blade. This study analyzes the interaction between particles and secondary flows, along with their effects on compressor efficiency and losses, to assess the applicability of this method within compressors. The results demonstrate that as the particle diameter increases from 1 μm to 9 μm, particles enhance the interaction between the leakage tip vortex (LTV) and the induced vortex (IV), resulting in vortex fragmentation and the formation of detached vortices. This leads to a shift in the shockwave position, increasing blockage at the blade tip and exacerbating losses, which culminates in a maximum decrease of 2.59% in compressor efficiency. As the particle concentration increases from 0.1 ppm to 1 ppm, the interaction between particles and the LTV and IV weakens the strength of these vortices, while the shockwave position remains almost constant. However, the low-speed region behind the shock expands, resulting in a 2.33% decrease in compressor efficiency. Furthermore, increases in particle diameter and concentration lead to an 830% and 7% rise in the blade adhesion rate, respectively, highlighting that particle size is the primary factor contributing to deposition.

summary_zh: 采用全耦合欧拉-拉格朗日方法研究跨声速压气机转子叶片上的颗粒沉积特性。发现颗粒直径增大（1-9μm）增强叶尖泄漏涡与诱导涡相互作用，导致涡破碎、激波位置移动、堵塞增加，效率最大下降2.59%；浓度升高（0.1-1ppm）削弱涡强度，效率下降2.33%。颗粒尺寸是沉积主因。
method: 全耦合欧拉-拉格朗日数值方法，模拟单转子叶片，颗粒直径1-9μm，浓度0.1-1ppm。
innovation: 首次采用全耦合欧拉-拉格朗日方法分析颗粒与二次流（叶尖泄漏涡、诱导涡）的相互作用及其对压气机效率和损失的影响。
conclusions: 颗粒直径增大导致效率最大下降2.59%，浓度增大导致效率下降2.33%；颗粒尺寸是影响沉积率（增大830%）的主要因素。
limitations: 仅研究单转子叶片，未考虑多级效应及真实工况下颗粒物性变化。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙流动和数值方法，但与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度预测及三维激盘模型无直接关联。

title: Leakage and Rotordynamic Performance of a Semi-Y Labyrinth Seal Structure for Centrifugal Pump Based on Multifrequency Whirl Method
abstract: Abstract A semi-Y labyrinth seal (SYLS) is proposed to reduce leakage and enhance the stability of centrifugal pump. The calculation adopts a multifrequency circular whirling model with two-control user-defined functions (UDFs) and the numerical predictions align closely with experimental data for labyrinth seals. Furthermore, the influences of tilt angle, rotation speed, pressure difference, and internal clearance on the leakage performance, rotordynamic coefficients, and sealing stability are investigated. Compared to the traditional interlocking labyrinth seal (ILS) structure, the leakage of the counterflow semi-Y type labyrinth seal (CSYLS) and the downflow semi-Y type labyrinth seal (DSYLS) is reduced by approximately 19.2% and 29.8%, respectively. In addition, the effective damping of the CSYLS structure is approximately 50% greater than that of the conventional ILS structure.

summary_zh: 提出一种半Y型迷宫密封（SYLS）以减少离心泵泄漏并增强稳定性。采用多频圆形涡动模型和用户自定义函数（UDF）进行数值计算，结果与实验吻合。研究了倾斜角、转速、压差和间隙对泄漏、转子动力系数和密封稳定性的影响。与互锁迷宫密封（ILS）相比，逆流和顺流半Y型密封泄漏分别减少约19.2%和29.8%，逆流结构的有效阻尼提高约50%。
method: 数值模拟结合实验验证，采用多频圆形涡动模型和UDF，研究倾斜角、转速、压差和间隙等参数。
innovation: 提出半Y型迷宫密封结构，通过优化流道方向显著降低泄漏并提高有效阻尼，优于传统互锁迷宫密封。
conclusions: 逆流和顺流半Y型密封泄漏分别减少19.2%和29.8%；逆流结构有效阻尼比传统ILS提高约50%。
limitations: 仅针对离心泵，未考虑多相流或高温高压等复杂工况。
relevance_reason: 研究密封结构对转子稳定性的影响，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定性间接相关。

title: Measurement and Analysis of Unsteady Surface Pressure During Turbulence-Airfoil Interaction
abstract: The interaction of turbulence with an airfoil is a classical problem in aeroacoustics that is both scientifically and practically important. This paper is concerned with the measurement and understanding of how homogeneous, isotropic turbulence interacts with an airfoil and creates unsteady pressure on its surface. The paper presents new unsteady surface pressure measurements on a NACA 0012 airfoil placed in grid turbulence at multiple angles of attack (0−10 degrees). A new analysis framework and statistical modelling approach were used to study the pressure jump response. Root-mean-square pressure levels are much higher towards the leading edge, indicating that the turbulence interaction pressure response is contained to the first 15-25% of the chord over all angles of attack tested. The pressure jump power spectral density shows a broadband ‘hump’ at lower streamwise wavenumbers followed by additional spectral content attributed to boundary layer growth. The pressure jump spectra compare reasonably well with Amiet’s theory; however, there are some differences that are attributed to flow distortion effects. The framework parameters show that the unsteady pressure levels are reasonably balanced across the airfoil during turbulence interaction but there are significant changes in the coherence and phase between the suction and pressure sides. At zero angle of attack, it was found that the airfoil’s local pressure response broke down when the airfoil thickness was about a third of the streamwise convective wavelength. At angles of attack, the phase response was explained in terms of the distortion of eddies as they encounter the leading edge and are subsequently convected by the flow on each side of the airfoil. Coherence was shown to decay exponentially with both chordwise position and angle of attack, and models are proposed to consider these effects. It is hoped that these results can provide new insights into turbulence-airfoil interaction physics, be used to validate more sophisticated distortion models and eventually improve the prediction of airfoil leading edge noise.
affiliations: UNSW Sydney
University of New South Wales
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验测量了NACA0012翼型在网格湍流中不同攻角（0-10°）下的非定常表面压力，分析了湍流-翼型相互作用产生的压力响应。结果表明压力响应主要集中在前缘15-25%弦长，压力跳变谱与Amiet理论基本吻合，但存在流动畸变效应差异。
method: 实验测量：在风洞中放置网格产生均匀各向同性湍流，测量NACA0012翼型表面非定常压力，攻角0-10°。
innovation: 提出了新的分析框架和统计模型来研究压力跳变响应，揭示了相干性和相位随弦向位置和攻角的变化规律。
conclusions: 1. 湍流相互作用压力响应集中在前缘15-25%弦长；2. 零攻角下，当翼型厚度约为流向对流波长三分之一时，局部压力响应失效。
limitations: 仅针对NACA0012翼型和特定湍流条件，未考虑高攻角或复杂几何的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及湍流-翼型相互作用和压力波动，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定性间接相关，但非直接针对压气机。

title: Predicting Time-Averaged Unsteady Flows in Turbomachinery via Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Abstract Recent advancements in deep learning have led to its increased application in the field of fluid dynamics, offering a promising alternative to conventional numerical approaches. By using a data-driven methodology, deep learning can significantly reduce the computational cost of flow simulations. Despite continuously increasing computational resources, obtaining unsteady results using computational fluid dynamics (CFD) remains a time-consuming and expensive task for complex flows. In turbomachinery design, the flow is hence often modeled as steady by circumferentially averaging the flow between blade rows in a so-called mixing plane. While numerically efficient, the full interactions between the rotor and stator rows are no longer accurately predicted. Time-averaging an unsteady simulation, in contrast, preserves the rotor–stator interactions while still depicting the mean flow behavior. In this work, we present a graph neural network (GNN), which predicts the time-averaged unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) flow field in a 41/2-stage axial compressor based on its steady-state Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solution. Given that GNNs are able to operate directly on common numerical meshes, the model retains the spatial resolution necessary to accurately depict the complex flow behavior. The fidelity of the predicted flow field is therefore comparable with conventional flow simulations. Our model is able to predict the velocity, pressure, density, and temperature field as well as the turbulent kinetic energy and logarithm of the turbulence dissipation rate across all nine compressor rows. The resulting flow fields are, on average, about 79% more accurate than the initial RANS solution at virtually no additional computational cost. The dataset utilized for training this machine learning model is publicly available for further research and validation.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种图神经网络（GNN），基于稳态RANS解预测多级轴流压气机的时间平均URANS流场，包括速度、压力、密度、温度、湍动能和湍流耗散率。模型在几乎无额外计算成本下，预测精度比稳态RANS平均提高79%。数据集公开。
method: 数值方法：使用图神经网络（GNN）直接操作数值网格，基于稳态RANS预测时间平均URANS流场。工况为41/2级轴流压气机。
innovation: 首次将GNN应用于压气机时间平均非定常流场预测，直接利用网格拓扑，保留空间分辨率，实现高精度低成本的流场预测。
conclusions: 1. GNN预测的流场精度比稳态RANS平均提高79%。2. 模型能准确预测所有九排叶片的流场变量，计算成本几乎为零。
limitations: 仅针对特定41/2级压气机，未验证其他几何或工况；依赖稳态RANS输入，可能受其误差影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机流场预测的数值方法，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Reconstruction and Reduction of Realistic Manufacturing Error Field for Uncertainty Quantification of Transonic Axial Compressor Rotor
abstract: Abstract Turbo compressors are inevitably subject to geometric and operational uncertainties that could induce performance degradations. This vulnerability is particularly pronounced in transonic compressor rotors due to the presence of sharp shock waves, which are highly susceptible to uncertainties. While the importance of uncertainty quantification (UQ) of compressors during the design phase has received growing recognition, the existing methodologies still face a grand challenge in modeling the geometric uncertainties related to manufacturing error fields. To address this challenge, we first propose an accurate geometric reconstruction method of realistic manufacturing error fields, in which kernel density estimation and correlation constraint sampling are combined to reconstruct manufacturing error fields with arbitrary probability distributions and geometric correlations. Then, a bilayer and bidirection dimension reduction method is proposed to treat the reconstructed model for reduced input uncertainties. The proposed methods are verified and validated by multipoint UQ of the well-known axial compressor rotor, i.e., NASA Rotor 37, under multisource uncertainties from blade manufacturing error fields as well as the total pressure, total temperature, and turbulence intensity of the incoming flow. From the statistics of 126 high-quality blades, each with 600 measurement points, it is confirmed that a large portion obey arbitrary probabilistic distributions rather than Gaussian distributions, and strong spatial correlations exist across the blade manufacturing error field. Both characteristics can be accurately reconstructed through the combination of kernel density estimation and correlation constraint sampling methods. Moreover, the bilayer and bidirection dimension reduction method is capable of reducing the dimensionality of manufacturing error field to 2–17 for Rotor 37, depending on the working points and performance parameters. The UQ results of Rotor 37 indicate that the geometric and operational uncertainties are mainly responsible for the mean offset and scatter of rotor performance variations, respectively. The geometric uncertainties due to manufacturing errors exert a negative impact on rotor performance, especially at near-stall point, manifested by increased suction-surface separation flow losses due to the forward shift of the shock wave. The proposed method in this work is quite generic and can be used in UQ and robust aerodynamic design optimization of turbomachinery components.

summary_zh: 针对跨声速压气机转子制造误差场的不确定性量化，提出基于核密度估计和相关约束采样的几何重构方法，以及双层双向降维方法。以NASA Rotor 37为例，发现制造误差场多服从非高斯分布且存在强空间相关性，几何不确定性在近失速点对性能影响显著。
method: 数值方法：结合核密度估计与相关约束采样重构制造误差场，采用双层双向降维法处理不确定性输入，基于126个叶片600个测点统计。
innovation: 提出能重构任意概率分布和几何相关性的制造误差场方法，以及双层双向降维技术，克服了传统高斯假设的局限。
conclusions: 制造误差场多服从非高斯分布且强相关；几何不确定性主要导致性能均值偏移，在近失速点使激波前移、吸力面分离损失增大。
limitations: 仅针对单个转子（Rotor 37），未考虑多级效应及非定常流动影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机稳定性相关的几何不确定性影响，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Investigation of the Dynamic Characteristics of Brush Seals Using a Transient Fluid-Structure Interaction Method
abstract: Abstract Brush seals operate within harsh environments within rotating machinery. They are typically exposed to high pressures and temperatures, rotor–stator relative movements, and high shaft rotational speeds leading to highly swirling inlet flow. The compliant nature of the bristle elements makes them susceptible to flow-induced vibrations, particularly associated with high levels of inlet swirl velocity. This can lead to fatigue fracture of the bristles and may also impact seal leakage. This paper establishes a two-way fluid-structure interaction (FSI) method that combines a three-dimensional transient flow model of brush seals with an analytical mechanical model of bristle deflections. This method can quickly obtain the flow field characteristics and bristle deflection of brush seals with satisfactory accuracy. Based on this method, bristle deflections under typical aerodynamic loads in operation, up to 0.4 MPa differential pressure and 200 m/s inlet swirl velocity, were investigated to understand bristle response under steady-state and transient conditions. In the absence of inlet swirl, simulated bristle axial deflections and leakage were validated against experimental measurements using an in-house seal test rig. The results for axial deflection without inlet swirl show that the bristles undergo oscillation whose amplitude quickly diminishes over time, as expected, reaching an equilibrium for the compressed bristle pack. An increase in differential pressure results in increased bristle tip oscillation displacements and longer settling times, however in all cases the settling time is of the order of milliseconds. The bristle pack center region exhibits a stratification, under conditions of fluctuating pressure and due to the inertia of the bristles themselves. This may have implications for pack stability and sealing performance, particularly when an inlet swirl is also imposed. This study shows, for the first time, that under the influence of inlet swirl, and particularly at inlet swirl velocities of 200 m/s where bristle slip is known to occur for similar pack geometries, the upstream row of bristles exhibits a circumferential displacement oscillation due to interaction between the swirling flow and bristle structure. This occurs with a characteristic frequency of 441 Hz which is of the order of the bristle natural frequency. Results indicate that a consistent oscillation amplitude is established over the simulation timescales, suggesting a typical forced vibration response. The amplitude of the bristle axial oscillation in the first row is observed to decrease when inlet swirl is applied, but the axial oscillation is sustained, occurring at a similar frequency to the circumferential oscillations but with a slight phase shift. The results also indicate that there is a substantial leakage penalty which is associated with the oscillation of the bristle upstream row, to more than double that of the stable pack. Under these conditions, bristle fretting wear and fatigue failure may be a concern, which could have significant adverse consequences for seal performance and life. Initial results show that bristle circumferential displacements do not propagate into the downstream rows. However, in the case of fatigue failure and detachment of the upstream bristle row, a progressive failure mechanism might be possible.
