summary_zh: 本文采用双向流固耦合方法研究刷式密封的动态特性，结合三维瞬态流动模型与刷丝偏转解析模型。发现无进口旋流时刷丝振荡快速衰减；进口旋流200 m/s时上游刷丝出现441 Hz的周向位移振荡，导致泄漏量翻倍。
method: 数值模拟：双向流固耦合方法，结合三维瞬态流动模型与刷丝偏转解析模型。工况：压差0.4 MPa，进口旋流速度200 m/s。
innovation: 首次揭示进口旋流下刷丝周向位移振荡及其特征频率，并量化振荡对泄漏性能的影响。
conclusions: 1. 无旋流时刷丝轴向振荡振幅快速衰减，稳定时间约毫秒级。2. 进口旋流200 m/s时上游刷丝出现441 Hz的周向振荡，泄漏量增加一倍以上。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何和工况，未考虑多排刷丝耦合及高温效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及流固耦合和振动，但研究对象为刷式密封而非压气机叶片，与压气机稳定性间接相关。

title: Performance analysis of active magnetic bearing supported rotor system on moving platform
abstract: High-speed rotating machinery supported by active magnetic bearings (AMBs) is readily available in industry, where AMBs are typically used in machinery that remains fixed on stationery platforms during operation. However, in the transportation industry, this kind of machinery faces additional challenges due to external disturbances caused by the moving base. The limitations of the AMB systems to levitate the rotor in such operating conditions require thorough investigation. This work aims to contribute to this by analyzing the stability of a nonlinear, electromechanical model of a rigid rotor installed on a moving platform and supported by AMBs with proportional–integral–derivative (PID) control that were originally designed for stationary application. The nonlinear dynamic behavior of an existing rotor-AMB system is analyzed, to determine its performance limits in these more challenging operating conditions. The simulation covers different unbalance settings, various external perturbations, and rotor positions on the moving base. The results demonstrate that the additional gyroscopic forces generated due to the different amplitudes and frequencies of base motion pushes the AMB currents to their limiting value, causing instability in the system. In contrast to previous studies, this fully nonlinear approach in modeling and simulation provides a correct picture of the AMB system’s admissible operating range in the presented scenarios. • A nonlinear rigid rotor-bearing system model subjected to base motion is developed. • Dynamic responses to different unbalance cases are investigated. • Influence of nonlinear bearing force formulation is assessed. • Effects of base pitch amplitude and frequency is studied by numerical simulation. • Influence on dynamic responses of the rotor position on the moving base is analyzed.

Technical University of Denmark
Department of Civil and Mechanical Engineering, Technical University of Denmark, 2800, Kgs. Lyngby, Denmark
summary_zh: 本研究针对主动磁悬浮轴承（AMB）支撑的转子系统在移动平台上的性能进行分析。建立了非线性刚体转子-AMB模型，考虑PID控制，模拟了不同不平衡量、外部扰动和转子位置下的动态响应。结果表明，基座运动产生的附加陀螺力会使AMB电流达到极限值，导致系统失稳。
method: 数值模拟方法，建立非线性刚体转子-AMB机电模型，采用PID控制，分析不同基座运动幅度和频率、不平衡量及转子位置的影响。
innovation: 采用全非线性建模与仿真方法，准确评估了移动平台下AMB系统的稳定运行范围，区别于以往线性化研究。
conclusions: 基座运动产生的附加陀螺力是导致系统失稳的关键因素；AMB电流达到极限值时系统失稳。
limitations: 仅考虑刚性转子，未涉及柔性转子或叶片振动；未考虑气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制和稳定性分析，但研究对象为磁悬浮轴承支撑的转子系统，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变、气动弹性等核心方向关联度一般。

title: Stall Inception of Axial Fan with Foam Metal Casing Treatment
abstract: The effect of the foam metal casing treatment on the stall inception of an axial flow fan is experimentally and numerically investigated in this paper. The foam metal casing treatment is a wide casing groove filled with a foam metal ring (GFM). It is found there is a link between the axial location of the GFM and the prestall behavior patterns. When the GFM is placed at locations near the leading edge of the rotor blade, the fan stalls via the short-length-scale disturbance (spikes). However, at locations near the midchord of blade, the fan experiences a long-length-scale disturbance before the rotating stall. Particularly at location 35 mm downstream of the blade leading edge (represented by CT8), there appears two long-length-scale disturbances in the prestall process. The stall inception mechanism of the fan in CT8 is presented with focus on the behavior of the tip leakage behavior during the throttling. Detailed observation shows that the second long-length-scale disturbance corresponds to the unsteady forward spillage of the partial tip leakage flow, while the first long-length-scale disturbance is related to the classical modal wave. The transition of the stall inception pattern and the trigger mechanism of the second long-length-scale disturbance are also discussed.
affiliations: Beihang University
summary_zh: 本文实验和数值研究了泡沫金属机匣处理（GFM）对轴流风扇失速起始的影响。发现GFM轴向位置与失速前扰动模式相关：靠近前缘时出现短尺度扰动（spikes），靠近弦中时出现长尺度扰动。在特定位置（CT8）观察到两种长尺度扰动，分别对应经典模态波和部分叶尖泄漏流的不稳定前溢。
method: 实验与数值模拟结合，研究泡沫金属机匣处理（GFM）在不同轴向位置对轴流风扇失速起始的影响，工况包括节流过程。
innovation: 揭示了泡沫金属机匣处理（GFM）轴向位置对失速前扰动模式（短尺度/长尺度）的调控作用，并首次识别出两种不同机理的长尺度扰动。
conclusions: 1. GFM靠近前缘时失速起始为spikes，靠近弦中时为长尺度扰动。2. CT8位置出现两种长尺度扰动：第一种为经典模态波，第二种对应叶尖泄漏流前溢。
limitations: 仅针对特定泡沫金属机匣处理结构，未考虑其他多孔材料或几何参数的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖畸变（机匣处理）对失速起始的影响，与用户课题（叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测）高度相关。

title: Influence of Blade Bending and Torsion on Propeller Whirl Flutter
abstract: The whirl flutter aeroelastic instability is a major concern for propeller-driven aircraft. Classical models generally involve a propeller with rigid blades mounted on a flexible support. However, with modern engines trending toward slender and lighter blades, concerns arise about the influence of blade flexibility on this phenomenon. This study addresses this question by conducting an in-depth analysis of the impact of blade elasticity on whirl flutter stability. A structural model of a propeller is developed using beam theory, complemented by two other models to predict motion-induced aerodynamic loads. The first approach employs a quasi-steady assumption, while the second incorporates unsteady flow effects through a state-space formulation. These models are combined to evaluate the individual impact of blade deformation in out-of-plane bending, in-plane bending, and torsion on whirl flutter. The combined effect of all these deformations is then analyzed, revealing that blade flexibility has a significant stabilizing influence for conventional blade stiffness values. It also gives rise to unusual phenomena, such as forward whirl instabilities, which do not occur with rigid blade propellers. The main insight from this research is that blade elasticity can no longer be overlooked, as it plays a significant role in whirl flutter stability.
affiliations: Office National d'Études et de Recherches Aérospatiales
ONERA, Institut Polytechnique de Paris
École Centrale de Lyon
summary_zh: 针对螺旋桨颤振问题，研究了叶片弹性（弯曲和扭转）对涡旋颤振稳定性的影响。采用梁理论建立结构模型，结合准稳态和状态空间非定常气动模型，分析了叶片变形对稳定性的单独及综合作用。结果表明叶片柔性具有显著稳定效应，并引发前向涡旋失稳等新现象。
method: 数值模拟：基于梁理论的螺旋桨结构模型，准稳态和状态空间非定常气动模型，分析叶片弯曲和扭转的影响。
innovation: 首次系统量化叶片弯曲和扭转对涡旋颤振的单独与耦合影响，揭示叶片弹性不可忽略，并发现前向涡旋失稳等新现象。
conclusions: 叶片柔性对常规刚度螺旋桨具有显著稳定作用；叶片弹性会引发刚性叶片模型不出现的前向涡旋失稳。
limitations: 未考虑实际叶片几何细节及非线性效应，且仅针对特定螺旋桨构型。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及气动弹性稳定性，与压气机叶片颤振相关，但对象为螺旋桨，非压气机。

title: Mode veering via inertial coupling
abstract: Mode veering, a phenomenon where natural frequencies of adjacent modes converge and then diverge while exchanging modal characteristics, is critical for designing dynamic systems and predicting structural behaviour. While extensively studied in stiffness-coupled systems, the impact of inertial coupling, particularly through inertial amplifiers, on mode veering remains unexplored despite their growing applications in vibration control and energy harvesting. This paper presents the first mathematical demonstration of mode veering induced by inertial coupling in a coupled double oscillator system. Through rigorous eigenvalue analysis and hyperbolic transformation, it is proven that mode veering invariably occurs in systems with pure inertial coupling or any combination of inertial and stiffness coupling, with one notable exception that occurs at the system’s point of symmetry. This exception is particularly significant as it enables strong mode veering effects even at high coupling stiffness, a characteristic previously unattainable in traditional stiffness-coupled systems. By identifying the system’s symmetry point and establishing its relationship to eigenvalue behaviour, a rigorous framework for understanding and predicting mode veering in combined coupling systems is provided. These findings not only expand the theoretical understanding of mode veering but also offer new possibilities for frequency control in multi-degree-of-freedom systems, particularly relevant for vibration control, and energy harvesting applications where traditional stiffness-based approaches may be limiting.
summary_zh: 本文首次数学证明惯性耦合（特别是通过惯性放大器）可引发模态振型转向现象，研究对象为耦合双振子系统。通过特征值分析和双曲变换，发现纯惯性耦合或与刚度耦合组合时必然发生振型转向，但系统对称点除外。该发现为多自由度系统频率控制提供了新途径，尤其适用于振动控制和能量收集。
method: 理论分析：基于耦合双振子系统的特征值分析和双曲变换，推导惯性耦合与刚度耦合组合下的模态振型转向条件。
innovation: 首次从数学上证明惯性耦合可独立引发模态振型转向，并揭示系统对称点处可实现强振型转向效应，突破了传统刚度耦合系统的限制。
conclusions: 1. 纯惯性耦合或与刚度耦合组合时，模态振型转向必然发生，但系统对称点除外。2. 在对称点处，即使耦合刚度很高，也能产生强振型转向效应。
limitations: 仅针对双振子系统，未推广至多自由度或连续体系统；未考虑阻尼影响。
relevance_reason: 研究惯性耦合引起的模态振型转向，与转子振动控制相关，但未涉及压气机叶尖间隙或畸变等具体问题。

title: Numerical Stability Analysis of Implicit Solution Methods for Harmonic Balance Equations
abstract: Abstract This article investigates the numerical stability of various implicit solution methods for efficiently solving harmonic balance equations for turbomachinery unsteady flows. Those solution methods implicitly integrate the time spectral source term to enhance stability and accelerate convergence. They include the block Jacobi method (BJ), the Jacobi iteration method (JI), and their variants, i.e., the modified block Jacobi method (MBJ) and the modified Jacobi iteration (MJI) method. These implicit treatments are typically combined with the lower-upper symmetric Gauss–Seidel method (LU-SGS) as a preconditioner of the Runge–Kutta scheme. The von Neumann analysis is applied to evaluate the stability and damping properties of all these methods. The findings reveal that the LU-SGS/BJ and LU-SGS/MJI schemes allow larger Courant numbers, in the order of hundreds, significantly improving convergence speed, while the LU-SGS/MBJ and LU-SGS/JI schemes fail to stabilize the solution, resulting in a Courant number below 10 as the grid-reduced frequency increases. The influence of Jacobi iterations on stabilization is also investigated. It is found that the minimum allowable relaxation factor does not change monotonically with the number of Jacobi iterations. Typically 2–4 Jacobi iterations are suggested for stability and efficiency, while more than four offers no benefit. The stability analysis results are verified by solving the harmonic balance equation system for two cases: inviscid flow over a 2D bump with a pressure disturbance at the outlet and turbulent flow in a 3D transonic compressor stage.

summary_zh: 本文研究了求解叶轮机械非定常流谐波平衡方程的各种隐式方法的数值稳定性。通过冯·诺依曼分析评估了块雅可比法、雅可比迭代法及其变体与LU-SGS预处理结合时的稳定性和阻尼特性。发现LU-SGS/BJ和LU-SGS/MJI方案允许库朗数达数百，显著加速收敛，而其他方案则不稳定。建议使用2-4次雅可比迭代。通过二维凸起和三维跨声速压气机级算例验证。
method: 数值方法：采用冯·诺依曼稳定性分析，结合LU-SGS预处理和隐式时间谱源项处理，求解谐波平衡方程。工况包括二维无粘凸起流动和三维跨声速压气机级湍流。
innovation: 系统比较了多种隐式求解谐波平衡方程方法的数值稳定性，揭示了不同隐式处理对库朗数限制的影响，并给出了雅可比迭代次数的优化建议。
conclusions: LU-SGS/BJ和LU-SGS/MJI方案允许库朗数达数百，而LU-SGS/MBJ和LU-SGS/JI方案库朗数低于10。建议2-4次雅可比迭代以平衡稳定性和效率。
limitations: 研究仅限于谐波平衡方程，未涉及全阶非定常方法；稳定性分析基于线性化，可能不适用于强非线性流动。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦于数值方法的稳定性，与压气机稳定性物理机理（如叶尖畸变、稳定裕度预测）间接相关，但方法可应用于相关分析。

title: Experimental and numerical investigation of passive flow control using L-shaped endwall groove in an axial flow compressor stage
abstract: To investigate the control effect and flow mechanism of the L-shaped endwall groove on corner separation in the real compressor stage, a single stage axial flow compressor is selected as the research object and the L-shaped grooves are introduced on the stator casing side. First, the experimental measurement is conducted on the optimal L-shaped groove obtained through a full factorial experimental design, and the results demonstrate that the optimal groove has a great control over the endwall flow. Moreover, the peak efficiency is improved by 0.9% and the stall margin is increased by 4.46%. Then, the flow field visualization of numerical results and analysis of variance method are employed to analyze the control mechanism and parameter control law of the L-shaped groove. It is found that the L-shaped groove can guide the skewed inlet endwall boundary layer towards the streamwise direction due to its confinement effect, thereby delaying the onset of corner separation and reducing the size of ring vortex. As a result, the aerodynamic performance of the compressor is enhanced. Furthermore, the groove depth and groove width play a significant role in controlling endwall flow among the three L-shaped groove design parameters. The larger groove depth and smaller groove width enhance the capability of the streamwise groove to constrain the endwall boundary layer, leading to a greater reduction in endwall loss.

summary_zh: 以单级轴流压气机为对象，实验和数值研究L形端壁槽对静子角区分离的被动控制。最优槽使峰值效率提高0.9%，失速裕度增加4.46%。槽通过引导端壁边界层沿流向延迟角区分离，减小环涡尺寸，槽深和槽宽是关键参数。
method: 实验测量（全因子设计优化槽型）与数值模拟（流场可视化、方差分析）结合，工况为单级压气机级。
innovation: 提出L形端壁槽结构，通过约束效应引导偏斜端壁边界层沿流向，系统分析槽深、槽宽等参数的控制规律。
conclusions: L形端壁槽可提升峰值效率0.9%，增加失速裕度4.46%；槽深越大、槽宽越小，端壁损失降低越显著。
limitations: 仅针对单级压气机静子侧，未考虑转子叶尖间隙或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测相关。

title: Experimental Investigation of Stall Mechanism and Warning Method in a Two-Stage Transonic Fan Under Inlet Distortion With Axial Slot Casing Treatment
abstract: Abstract A stall warning method has been employed to predict the level of disturbances in active control systems. Significant advancements have been made by identifying the pre-stall disturbances. Regardless of the propagation, disturbances almost initiate simultaneously at a specific circumferential location under uniform inflow. When the compressor suffers from inlet distortion, the disturbances might disappear in the undistorted region. The differences between the distorted and undistorted regions pose challenges for developing an accurate and robust warning method. Revealing the characteristics of pre-stall disturbances under the distorted inflow is a key to realize engineering applications. For this purpose, the stalling process and stall warning method are investigated in a two-stage transonic fan. The work on this project has concluded that the pre-stall disturbances initially arise in the region where the rotor exits the distorted region, diminish in the process of circumferential propagation, and ultimately disappear in the position where the rotor enters the distorted region. Due to the impact of circumferential secondary flow, the incidence is the largest and the fluctuation of the tip leakage flow is the strongest in the position where the rotor exits the distorted region. In the pursuit of an effective stall warning system under inlet distortion, a novel warning index associated with the characteristic frequency band is proposed. This index, coupled with a variable threshold, enables stall warning with only one transducer. The efficiency of this method is further validated in low-speed and transonic compressors.

summary_zh: 实验研究了两级跨声速风扇在进气畸变和轴向缝机匣处理下的失速机理与预警方法。发现失速前扰动在转子退出畸变区时最强，周向传播中衰减，进入畸变区时消失。提出基于特征频带和可变阈值的预警指标，仅需单传感器即可实现失速预警，并在低速和跨声速压气机中验证。
method: 实验研究，采用轴向缝机匣处理，在两级跨声速风扇中施加进气畸变，通过传感器测量失速前扰动特征。
innovation: 揭示了畸变进气下失速前扰动的周向演化规律，并提出了仅需单传感器的特征频带可变阈值失速预警方法。
conclusions: 1. 失速前扰动在转子退出畸变区时最强，因周向二次流导致攻角和叶尖泄漏流波动最大。2. 提出的预警指标在低速和跨声速压气机中均有效。
limitations: 未给出定量数据，且仅针对特定两级跨声速风扇，通用性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气下的失速机理和预警，与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Sensitivity analysis for stall inception of transonic rotor based on meridional flow
abstract: This paper presents a sensitivity analysis method for analyzing the key factors affecting the stability problem of the transonic compressors. The adjoint method is integrated into the meridional stability model, a linear stability prediction model utilized to analyze the flow stability problem of the compressor, and the sensitivity analysis method is further developed for the flow stability problem of the compressor. The study selects the NASA Rotor37, a transonic compressor, as the research object to verify the proposed method and explore the sensitive factors leading to the stall inception. The results of sensitivity analysis to both the flow parameters and the external source terms reveal that the stall inception is sensitive to the base flow field at the rotor tip and the stability margin of the compressor can be enhanced by improving the flow field at this region. Physical explanations are presented and discussed to correlate the three-dimensional flow field to the results obtained via the employed analysis method, which shows that flow structures and characteristics near the end-wall region, especially the tip leakage flow or the tip leakage vortex and its interaction with the shock wave, contribute to the stall inception.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于子午面稳定性模型和伴随方法的灵敏度分析方法，用于研究跨声速压气机失速起始的关键因素。以NASA Rotor37为对象，发现叶尖基流场对失速起始最敏感，改善该区域流场可增强稳定裕度，端壁区流动结构（特别是叶尖泄漏流/涡与激波相互作用）是失速主因。
method: 数值方法：将伴随方法集成到子午面稳定性模型（线性稳定性预测模型）中，进行灵敏度分析。工况参数未明确，基于Rotor37典型工况推断为近失速点。
innovation: 将伴随方法与子午面稳定性模型结合，实现跨声速压气机失速起始的灵敏度分析，可定量识别影响稳定性的关键流动参数和源项。
conclusions: 1. 失速起始对叶尖基流场敏感，改善叶尖区域流场可提升稳定裕度。2. 端壁区叶尖泄漏流/涡与激波相互作用是失速起始的主要贡献因素。
limitations: 仅针对单个转子（Rotor37）验证，未考虑多级环境或非均匀进气影响。
relevance_reason: 该研究聚焦叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，采用三维激盘模型（子午面稳定性模型）进行灵敏度分析，与用户课题高度一致。

title: Some links between dispersion equations and orthogonality relations, and an application to fluid-structure interaction
abstract: • Orthogonality and bi-orthogonality relations for a shell with mean flow • Link between dispersion equation and bi-orthogonality relations • Green's matrix for a shell with mean flow • Energy flux partition between transmission paths in a shell with mean flow Orthogonality and bi-orthogonality relations are derived and employed to solve a problem of wave propagation in an infinitely long thin elastic cylindrical shell with a uniform mean flow of an incompressible fluid inside. For this non-symmetric waveguide, links between dispersion equations and orthogonality relations in regular (direct flow) and reversed flow cases are derived. It is shown that a bi-orthogonality relation exists only for two solutions of the same (either regular or reversed flow) problem. Regimes of stable wave motion in the presence of mean flow are identified, Green's matrix is derived using the bi-orthogonality relation, and partition of energy flux between alternative transmission paths is analysed.
affiliations: Aalborg University
Department of Materials and Production, Aalborg University, Fibigerstræde 16, 9220 Aalborg, Denmark
Keele University
Department of Mathematics, University of Keele, Keele, Staffordshire ST5 5BG, UK
summary_zh: 本文针对含均匀不可压缩流体平均流动的无限长薄弹性圆柱壳，推导了正交与双正交关系，建立了色散方程与正交性之间的联系。利用双正交关系导出格林矩阵，分析了平均流存在下稳定波动模态及能量通量在传输路径间的分配。
method: 理论推导，基于无限长薄弹性圆柱壳模型，内部为不可压缩流体均匀平均流，分析正则流与反向流情况。
innovation: 揭示了非对称波导中色散方程与正交关系的联系，证明了双正交关系仅存在于同一流动问题的两个解之间。
conclusions: 1. 双正交关系仅适用于同一流动问题的两个解；2. 识别了平均流存在下的稳定波动模态，并利用格林矩阵分析了能量通量分配。
limitations: 仅考虑无限长圆柱壳和不可压缩流体，未涉及有限长或可压缩效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及流固耦合与波传播，与压气机气动弹性相关但非直接针对压气机稳定性或叶尖畸变。

title: Effects of Swirl Distortion on a Centrifugal Compressor at Off-Design Operating Conditions
abstract: Estimating the performance effects of different installations of various compression system rotors is of paramount importance. This effort utilizes the Single Stage Centrifugal Compressor (SSCC) at Purdue University with a modular radial-to-axial inlet to generate offset inlet swirl pairs with minimal total pressure distortion. This is a centrifugal compressor with an impeller designed for inlet prewhirl. The effects of operating at high incidence while ingesting swirl distortions are analyzed. At the design speed, the effects on stage total pressure ratio and mass flow rate were comparable with expected performance effects of swirl, with an increase in both parameters caused by counterswirl. At low speed and higher incidence, the opposite trend was true. Coswirl configurations were superior at high and low speeds for efficiency due to the reduced incidence. Stage total temperature rise had a linear dependence on area-averaged incidence. The axial velocity distribution at the aerodynamic interface plane is analyzed along with the circumferential swirl and total pressure profiles. Total pressure distortion had little to no effect on incidence. A method of reconstructing the circumferential average incidence at the inlet of the compressor using rotational frequency, radius, blade metal angle, and circumferentially averaged axial velocity and swirl angle is presented.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 本研究利用普渡大学单级离心压气机（SSCC）实验台，通过模块化径向-轴向进气段产生偏移旋流对，研究旋流畸变对离心压气机非设计工况性能的影响。发现设计转速下反旋流增加总压比和质量流量，低转速高攻角下趋势相反；同旋流因降低攻角而效率更高。总温升与面积平均攻角线性相关，总压畸变对攻角影响很小。提出一种利用转速、半径、叶片金属角及周向平均轴向速度和旋流角重建周向平均攻角的方法。
method: 实验研究，采用普渡大学单级离心压气机（SSCC）实验台，模块化径向-轴向进气段产生偏移旋流对，在设计转速和低转速高攻角工况下测量性能参数。
innovation: 系统分析了旋流畸变对离心压气机非设计工况性能的影响，揭示了攻角与总温升的线性关系，并提出了基于周向平均参数重建攻角的方法。
conclusions: 1. 设计转速下反旋流使总压比和质量流量增加，低转速高攻角下趋势相反；同旋流因降低攻角而效率更高。2. 总温升与面积平均攻角呈线性关系，总压畸变对攻角影响很小。
limitations: 仅针对单级离心压气机，未考虑多级效应；旋流畸变模式有限，未涵盖复杂畸变。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接使用三维激盘模型。

title: Reduced Order Modeling and Analysis of Airfoil Flutter Using Dynamics-Based Autoencoders
abstract: Nonlinear flutter analysis is essential for ensuring the safety and performance of modern aeroelastic systems. Performing nonlinear stability analysis, however, is a challenging task for aeroelastic systems when relying on traditional approaches. This paper introduces a data-driven approach for nonintrusive nonlinear reduced order modeling and flutter analysis in aeroelastic systems. The proposed approach integrates nonlinear stability analysis for dynamical systems theory with machine learning techniques, enabling nonlinear flutter analysis with a limited number of simulated time-domain trajectories. This data-driven method determines reduced order models of systems exhibiting flutter instabilities and the transformation to and from the state space and the reduced order coordinates. Numerical results are provided to demonstrate the performance of the proposed method for a typical nonlinear airfoil section exhibiting supercritical and subcritical flutter.
affiliations: University of Southern California
Southern California University for Professional Studies
University of Southern California, Los Angeles, CA 90089
University of Michigan–Ann Arbor
University of Michigan
University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, MI 48109
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于动力学自编码器的数据驱动降阶建模方法，用于非线性颤振分析。该方法结合动力系统稳定性理论与机器学习，通过少量时域轨迹实现非线性颤振分析，并应用于典型非线性翼型，成功捕捉超临界和亚临界颤振行为。
method: 数据驱动方法，结合非线性稳定性分析与机器学习（动力学自编码器），通过模拟时域轨迹构建降阶模型，用于翼型颤振分析。
innovation: 将动力学自编码器用于非线性颤振降阶建模，实现非侵入式、数据驱动的稳定性分析，无需显式物理模型。
conclusions: 该方法能有效识别超临界和亚临界颤振失稳，仅需少量时域轨迹即可构建精确降阶模型。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型，未考虑三维效应及复杂流动条件（如叶尖间隙、畸变）。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振分析，但研究对象为翼型而非压气机叶片，且未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Effect of Geometry and Heat Flux on Turbine Over-Tip Flow Power Extraction
abstract: Abstract The tip leakage flow is known to be a substantial loss contributor. A precise local loss decomposition of the relevant laminar and turbulent terms for viscous losses and thermal losses is required to predict the impact of tip design modification and revise current design guidelines. While losses due to viscous shear stress cause an irreversible reduction from the theoretical maximum power output, tip leakage vortices also penalize the flow turning. This article combines a novel method for calculating volume-based loss terms and power extraction with an approach to track the tip leakage flow and to analyze the effect of heat transfer and varying tip gap height. Three different flow topologies were categorized for relative tip gap sizes between 0.23% and 1.10% passage height. The contribution of the tip leakage flow to the overall losses could be quantified at each streamwise location. The prime driver for efficiency improvements with tight clearance is achieved by a reduction in turbulent losses in the tip leakage vortices. Of secondary importance, but ubiquitous for all the tip gaps is the laminar loss, occurring in the over-tip region and the main passage. The wall heat flux causes a massive effect on the aerothermal efficiency, and the internal heat transfer increases exponentially with increasing wall heat flux.

summary_zh: 本文研究了涡轮叶尖间隙几何和热通量对叶尖泄漏流功率提取的影响。通过新型体积损失和功率提取方法，量化了不同间隙高度下泄漏流对总损失的贡献，发现紧间隙主要通过减少湍流损失提高效率，而壁面热通量显著影响气热效率。
method: 数值模拟，结合新型体积损失分解方法和泄漏流追踪技术，研究相对叶尖间隙0.23%-1.10%通道高度的三种流型。
innovation: 提出基于体积的损失项和功率提取计算方法，并耦合热传递分析，实现了叶尖泄漏流损失沿流向的定量分解。
conclusions: 紧间隙（0.23%通道高度）效率提升主要源于叶尖泄漏涡中湍流损失减少；壁面热通量使气热效率大幅变化，内部传热随热通量指数增长。
limitations: 仅针对涡轮叶尖，未涉及压气机；未考虑非定常效应或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙和损失分析，但研究对象为涡轮而非压气机，与用户压气机稳定性方向部分相关。

title: Dynamics of Rotor Systems with Dry Friction Dampers Considering Strain Energy Distribution
abstract: In this paper, a two-dimensional friction model is established on the basis of the trajectory tracking method, and a dynamic model of the rotor with the dry friction damper (DFD) is established on the basis of the finite element method. The Newmark-[Formula: see text] method is utilized to calculate the dynamic characteristics of the rotor system. The influence of the positions and normal forces of the dampers on the critical speed, vibration, strain energy distribution, and sensitivity of the rotor is analyzed. The results show that the vibration suppression is related to both the equivalent damping coefficient and the equivalent dynamic stiffness of the DFD. The influence of the DFD on the strain energy distribution of the rotor is notable. The parameter selection of DFDs should balance vibration suppression and strain energy distribution in a rotor system. The installation position of DFDs significantly modulates rotor dynamic behavior. The parameter design of DFDs must be guided by rotor strain energy distribution while incorporating speed-dependent adaptation to ensure vibration suppression across operational states. This study is of great significance for exploring the optimal control strategy of the DFD-rotor system.
affiliations: Tianjin University
summary_zh: 本文建立了基于轨迹跟踪法的二维摩擦模型和基于有限元法的干摩擦阻尼器-转子系统动力学模型，采用Newmark-β法计算系统动态特性。分析了阻尼器位置和正压力对临界转速、振动、应变能分布及灵敏度的影响。结果表明，振动抑制与等效阻尼系数和等效动刚度相关，阻尼器参数选择需平衡振动抑制与应变能分布，安装位置显著调节转子动态行为。
method: 数值方法：基于有限元法建立转子动力学模型，采用Newmark-β法求解，结合轨迹跟踪法的二维摩擦模型。工况参数包括阻尼器位置和正压力。
innovation: 揭示了干摩擦阻尼器对转子应变能分布的显著影响，提出阻尼器参数设计需以应变能分布为指导并考虑转速适应性，以优化振动控制。
conclusions: 1. 干摩擦阻尼器的振动抑制效果取决于等效阻尼系数和等效动刚度。2. 阻尼器安装位置显著影响转子动态行为，参数选择需平衡振动抑制与应变能分布。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未考虑多阻尼器耦合及非线性摩擦的时变效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子振动控制，与压气机转子动力学相关，但未直接涉及气动弹性或流动稳定性。

title: Compressor Blade Shaping and Optimization Through Design Features Based on Free-Form Deformation
abstract: Abstract This paper describes the application of Free-Form Deformation method in the adjoint optimization of a highly loaded transonic axial fan, with the characteristic that parameterization procedures are closely related to design features of blade. This approach effectively parameterizes the compressor blade from the perspective of design elements, while ensuring high flexibility. Geometric constraints, such as maintaining the blade's thickness, are easily achieved. Using the efficient adjoint method, four optimizations are conducted separately for the blade profiles without and with stacking control, endwall region, and tip clearance of Rotor 35. Optimized designs are presented, followed by detailed flow analysis. Results show a significant performance improvement in the design condition in the first three optimizations. The adiabatic efficiency improved by 0.8% in blade profile optimization, 1.2% in profile with stacking optimization, and 0.5% in endwall optimization, while changes in mass flowrate and total pressure ratio were relatively small. The typical S-shape blade, blended blade, and end wall-type corner region were found during the automated search process of adjoint optimization. The shock wave, shock-induced boundary layer separation, and accumulation of boundary layer were also well controlled. Through this study, a personalized free-form deformation parameterization method for compressor design was proposed.

summary_zh: 本文应用自由变形方法对高负荷跨声速轴流风扇转子进行伴随优化，通过基于设计特征的参数化实现了叶片型面、积叠、端壁和叶尖间隙的优化。优化后绝热效率提升最高达1.2%，有效控制了激波和边界层分离。
method: 数值优化方法，采用自由变形参数化和伴随方法，针对Rotor 35在设计工况下进行多目标优化。
innovation: 将自由变形方法与叶片设计特征紧密结合，实现个性化参数化，并同时优化叶片型面、积叠、端壁和叶尖间隙。
conclusions: 叶片型面优化使绝热效率提升0.8%，积叠控制优化提升1.2%，端壁优化提升0.5%；优化后激波和边界层分离得到有效控制。
limitations: 仅针对设计工况优化，未考虑非设计工况和变工况性能。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙优化，但主要关注效率提升，与压气机稳定性直接关联较弱。

title: The Effect of Tip Clearance on Fan Aeroelasticity Considering Acoustic Propagation Characteristics
abstract: Abstract Tip clearance is a critical parameter affecting fan performance and aeroelastic stability. This paper investigates the effect of tip clearance on fan aeroelasticity under different acoustic propagation characteristics through numerical simulations. Focusing on the first bending mode, which is most prone to flutter, the aeroelastic stability under various nodal diameters (ND) is studied using the energy method, with a detailed analysis of the 2 ND mode, which exhibits flutter risk. The study reveals that tip clearance does not alter the position of the most unstable nodal diameter. Under upstream and downstream cutoff mode and upstream cut-on mode, increasing tip clearance enhances aerodynamic damping, whereas under downstream cut-on mode, it reduces aerodynamic damping. The aerodynamic damping of the blade is jointly influenced by the flow field and acoustic propagation characteristics. The impact of the flow field is primarily concentrated near the leading edge of the pressure side at the blade tip, while the acoustic propagation characteristics significantly alter the phase of unsteady pressure, leading to notable changes in energy exchange characteristics. The study concludes that there is no optimal aeroelastic clearance, as the effect of clearance on aeroelasticity is closely related to acoustic propagation characteristics.

summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究叶尖间隙对风扇气动弹性的影响，考虑声传播特性。针对最易颤振的第一弯曲模态，采用能量法分析不同节径下的气动弹性稳定性，重点研究2节径模态。发现叶尖间隙不改变最不稳定节径位置，但不同声传播条件下间隙对气动阻尼的影响不同：上游/下游截止和上游导通时增大阻尼，下游导通时减小阻尼。流场影响集中在叶尖前缘压力侧，声传播特性改变非定常压力相位，影响能量交换。结论认为不存在最优气动弹性间隙。
method: 数值模拟，采用能量法分析第一弯曲模态在不同节径下的气动弹性稳定性，考虑上游/下游截止和导通声传播条件。
innovation: 揭示了叶尖间隙对气动弹性的影响与声传播特性密切相关，并指出流场和声传播特性对非定常压力相位的不同作用机制。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖间隙不改变最不稳定节径位置；2. 上游/下游截止和上游导通时增大间隙提高阻尼，下游导通时降低阻尼。
limitations: 仅针对第一弯曲模态和特定风扇，未考虑其他模态及多级环境。
relevance_reason: 直接研究叶尖间隙对气动弹性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Critical Loading Identification of Compressor Stall and Vortex Criterion in Rotational Frame
abstract: Critical loading, a key parameter for evaluating the limit of pressure rise in cascade, plays a fundamental role in triggering compressor stall. This work identifies specified vortex aggregation as the primary mechanism driving critical loading, which subsequently accelerates stall onset. Through 2.5-dimensional (2.5D) cascade and three-dimensional compressor simulations, the mechanisms of specified vortex aggregation are comprehensively analyzed. In the 2.5D cascade, an increased angle of attack alters the trajectory of shedding vortices, causing them to spread circumferentially and converge with local vortices in adjacent passages. This convergence results in increased upstream blockage and redistribution of mass flow pitchwise, ultimately forming a spike inception. To validate these findings in areal 3D rotating case, the stall process in a highly loaded compressor is also investigated. It is found that in 3D compressor vortex aggregation is inherently more complex due to three-dimensional and rotational effects. The simulation results reveal that the Coriolis effect significantly accelerates specified vortex aggregation, especially enhancing interactions between the leading-edge vortex and the tip leakage vortex. The interaction between the two vortexes, forming a more intricate vortex system, increases passage blockage from the midchord to the trailing edge, thereby accelerating the onset of stall eventually. This work offers new insight into the role of critical loading, Coriolis effect, and vortex dynamics in a compressor, providing an earlier local unsteady flow structure for analyzing stall precursors and assessing compressor flow instability.
affiliations: Beihang University
summary_zh: 本文通过2.5维叶栅和三维压气机模拟，识别出特定涡聚集是驱动临界载荷并加速失速的主要机制。在三维旋转中，科里奥利效应显著加速涡聚集，特别是前缘涡与叶尖泄漏涡的相互作用，增加了通道堵塞，加速失速发生。
method: 采用2.5维叶栅和三维压气机数值模拟，分析不同攻角下涡动力学，研究旋转和科里奥利效应。
innovation: 首次将临界载荷与特定涡聚集机制直接关联，并揭示科里奥利效应对涡相互作用及失速加速的影响。
conclusions: 1. 临界载荷由特定涡聚集驱动，导致上游堵塞和失速起始。2. 科里奥利效应加速前缘涡与叶尖泄漏涡相互作用，增加通道堵塞。
limitations: 研究基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；仅针对特定高负荷压气机，通用性待确认。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 核心研究压气机失速机理，涉及涡动力学和叶尖间隙效应，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Streak-Based Control for First-Mode Oblique Breakdown at Mach 4.5
abstract: Previous research demonstrated that streaks effectively suppress first-mode oblique breakdown in a Mach 2.0 supersonic boundary layer. However, whether streaks can be effective in delaying oblique breakdown in high-speed boundary layers is still unknown. The present study examines the control effect of streaks on the first-mode oblique breakdown in a high-speed boundary layer at Mach 4.5 using direct numerical simulation and stability analysis. The results show significant differences in control mechanisms. Firstly, the mean-flow distortion induced by streaks in the current study exerts a destabilizing effect on the oblique wave, in contrast to the suppression of the oblique mode reported in earlier work. Secondly, the control modes analyzed here, with a spanwise wavenumber twice that of the fundamental oblique wave, can delay the onset of oblique breakdown. When the spanwise wavenumber exceeds 2.0, the control mode results in a higher amplification rate of the fundamental oblique mode in the present study, whereas it was found to suppress the oblique wave in previous studies. Lastly, the streaks can suppress the receptivity process of the boundary layer to the oblique mode, which is the main reason for the transition delay.
affiliations: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
China Aerodynamics Research and Development Center
summary_zh: 本研究通过直接数值模拟和稳定性分析，探究了条纹控制对马赫4.5高速边界层中第一模态斜向破裂的影响。结果表明，条纹引起的平均流畸变对斜向波起失稳作用，但控制模式（展向波数为基波两倍）可延迟破裂起始，且条纹能抑制边界层对斜向波的感受性，这是延迟转捩的主因。
method: 采用直接数值模拟（DNS）和稳定性分析，研究马赫4.5高速边界层中条纹对第一模态斜向破裂的控制效果。
innovation: 首次揭示高速边界层（Ma=4.5）中条纹控制机制与低速情况的差异，发现平均流畸变起失稳作用，而控制模式可延迟破裂。
conclusions: 1. 条纹引起的平均流畸变对斜向波有失稳效应，与低速情况相反。2. 展向波数大于2.0时控制模式导致基模放大率更高，但条纹抑制感受性可延迟转捩。
limitations: 仅针对马赫4.5工况，未涉及更高马赫数或不同扰动类型，且未考虑实际工程环境。
relevance_reason: 涉及流动稳定性分析，但研究对象为边界层转捩，与压气机稳定性无直接关联。

title: Nonlinear Aeroelastic Reduced Order Modeling with Optimized Sparse Multi-Input Volterra Kernels
abstract: Nonlinear unsteady aerodynamic reduced-order models (ROMs) based on machine learning or artificial intelligence algorithms can be complex and computationally demanding to train, meaning that for practical aeroelastic applications, the conservative nature of linearization is often favored. Therefore, there is a requirement for novel nonlinear aeroelastic ROM approaches that are accurate, simple, and, most importantly, efficient to generate. This paper proposes a novel nonlinear unsteady aerodynamic ROM formulated as a highly compact multi-input Volterra series. Orthogonal matching pursuit is used to obtain a set of optimally sparse nonlinear multi-input ROM coefficients from unsteady aerodynamic training data. The framework is exemplified in an aeroelastic setting using the benchmark supercritical wing, considering forced response, flutter, and limit cycle oscillation. The simple and efficient optimal sparsity multi-input ROM framework performs with high accuracy compared to the full-order aeroelastic model, requiring only a fraction of the hundreds of thousands of possible multi-input terms to be identified and allowing a 98% reduction in the number of training samples.
affiliations: RMIT Europe
Royal Melbourne Institute of Technology
Independent Researcher
Duke University
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于优化稀疏多输入Volterra级数的非线性非定常气动弹性降阶模型，利用正交匹配追踪从训练数据中获取稀疏系数。以超临界机翼为例，在强迫响应、颤振和极限环振荡中验证，仅需少量项即可达到高精度，训练样本减少98%。
method: 数值方法，采用多输入Volterra级数结合正交匹配追踪构建非线性气动弹性ROM，以超临界机翼为对象进行强迫响应、颤振和极限环振荡分析。
innovation: 提出高度紧凑的多输入Volterra级数ROM，通过正交匹配追踪实现最优稀疏性，大幅降低模型复杂度和训练数据需求。
conclusions: 1. 稀疏多输入Volterra ROM能以极少量项（远少于数十万可能项）准确预测非线性气动弹性响应。2. 训练样本数减少98%，显著提升效率。
limitations: 仅针对超临界机翼验证，未涉及旋转机械或压气机叶片，且未考虑叶尖间隙等复杂流动。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振，但研究对象为机翼而非压气机，与压气机稳定性及叶尖畸变等核心方向部分相关。

title: Prediction method of resonant response of rotor blades considering multi-row effects on aerodynamic damping
abstract: This study investigates the forced vibration response of a two-row model of an Inlet Guide Vane (IGV) and rotor at resonance speed through numerical simulations. A resonant response prediction method based on equivalent damping balance has been validated, which ensures computational accuracy while reducing response calculation time to only 1% of the traditional transient response method. At resonance speed, unsteady pressure disturbances on the rotor blade surface mainly arise from two sources: IGV wakes and blade vibrations. The unsteady pressure caused by the IGV wakes provides excitation for the system, while the unsteady pressure caused by rotor blade vibrations provides damping. By studying the characteristics of unsteady pressure caused by IGV wakes and vibrations at resonance speed, a method for separating unsteady pressure caused by stator wakes and vibrations has been presented, accurately obtaining aerodynamic damping under multi-row resonance conditions. Compared to the aerodynamic damping obtained from multi-row scenarios without separating unsteady pressures caused by stator wakes and vibrations, and the traditional isolated blade row scheme, the aerodynamic damping considering the effects of multi-row and IGV wakes at resonance speed is smaller. Based on the separated unsteady pressures caused by IGV wakes and vibrations, and combined with the equivalent damping balance method for predicting forced response, a forced response analysis method considering both flow field disturbance excitation and damping effects has been established.

summary_zh: 本研究通过数值模拟，提出了一种基于等效阻尼平衡的转子叶片共振响应预测方法，可大幅缩短计算时间。分析了IGV尾迹和叶片振动引起的非定常压力，实现了多排条件下气动阻尼的准确分离，并建立了考虑激励与阻尼的强迫响应分析方法。
method: 数值模拟，采用两排模型（IGV+转子），在共振转速下进行非定常计算，通过分离尾迹和振动引起的非定常压力获取气动阻尼。
innovation: 提出基于等效阻尼平衡的共振响应快速预测方法，计算时间仅为传统瞬态法的1%；并实现了多排共振条件下气动阻尼的准确分离。
conclusions: 1. 共振转速下，IGV尾迹提供激励，叶片振动提供阻尼。2. 考虑多排和IGV尾迹影响的气动阻尼更小，所提方法计算时间仅为传统方法的1%。
limitations: 仅针对IGV+转子两排模型，未考虑更复杂的多级环境；未涉及非定常流动分离等非线性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子叶片振动预测和强迫响应，与用户关注的转子叶片振动预测解析模型相关，但未直接涉及叶尖畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Experimental Study on the High Relative Casing Motion Effect on Turbine Blade Tip Aerodynamic Characteristics
abstract: Abstract The high-speed relative motion between the casing and turbine blade tip significantly complicates the flow field distribution near the blade tip and greatly increases the difficulty of flow field measurement. In this paper, based on a novel high-speed disk rotor experimental rig, first-of-its-kind aerodynamic experimental results near the squealer near-tip region under high-speed relative casing motion conditions are presented. The outlet total pressure loss distribution, outlet flow angle, and near-tip blade loading are measured and compared with those under stationary conditions. Additionally, Reynolds-Averaged Navier–Strokes computational fluid dynamics simulations are employed to validate the results, and the aerodynamic effects near the blade tip under high-speed relative casing conditions are thoroughly discussed. These results reveal the significant influence of high-speed relative casing motion on the flow field near the blade tip, showcasing a concentration of Over-Tip-Leakage flow, enhancement of passage flow, changes in the flow field within the cavity, and interactions between vortices, among a series of findings.

summary_zh: 本研究基于高速盘转子实验台，首次实验测量了高速机匣运动下涡轮叶尖附近的气动特性，包括出口总压损失、出口气流角和近叶尖叶片载荷，并与静止条件对比。结合RANS CFD模拟，揭示了高速机匣运动对叶尖泄漏流、通道流、空腔流场及涡相互作用的显著影响。
method: 实验测量与RANS CFD模拟相结合，采用高速盘转子实验台，对比高速与静止机匣条件。
innovation: 首次在高速相对机匣运动条件下实验测量涡轮叶尖附近气动特性，填补了该领域实验数据的空白。
conclusions: 高速机匣运动导致叶尖泄漏流集中、通道流增强、空腔流场变化及涡相互作用，显著改变叶尖附近流场。
limitations: 仅针对涡轮叶片，未涉及压气机；实验条件可能未覆盖所有工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涡轮叶尖气动特性，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定性间接相关，但非直接针对压气机稳定性。

title: Self-similar eigenvalue distribution of a binary tree-structured mass–spring–damper system
abstract: The eigenvalue distribution of a binary tree-structured multi-degree-of-freedom linear oscillator is examined. The block masses and spring stiffnesses in the model are a power-law function of the tree level. A recursive formula is proven for the characteristic polynomial of the undamped system. For the power-law quotient σ = 1 / 2 the resulting characteristic equation is solved analytically and the eigenvalue distribution is derived as the function of the tree level up to the limit of the infinite tree. The importance of the eigenvalue distribution is demonstrated with examples of the dynamical behavior, when the system is subjected to small mistuning of its block masses. The mistuning perturbs the block masses by drawing a random value from a uniform distribution centered around the base value of each block mass. The width of the uniform distribution for each block mass is given by the product of the base value of the mass and the mistuning parameter r . The displacement solutions of the governing differential equation with two sets of initial conditions are compared for different values of the mistuning parameter r . Even though the mistuning has only a small effect on the eigenfrequencies of the system, it is concluded that the small perturbation of the block masses can cause a significant shift in the apparent frequency of the vibration. • A binary tree-structured mechanical oscillator is studied, the characteristic polynomial of the undamped system is provided with proof. • Analytical solution for the eigenvalues of the system is found for a special choice of system parameters. • We prove that the eigenvalue distribution of the undamped system is a Devil’s staircase function. • The limiting case of the infinite tree is also considered in the analysis. • The significance of the eigenvalue distribution on the dynamical behavior is demonstrated through a set of examples.
affiliations: Budapest University of Technology and Economics
Department of Fluid Mechanics, Faculty of Mechanical Engineering, Budapest University of Technology and Economics, 1111 Bertalan Lajos u., Budapest, Hungary
summary_zh: 研究二叉树结构质量-弹簧-阻尼系统的特征值分布，其中质量和刚度随树层级呈幂律变化。推导了无阻尼系统特征多项式的递推公式，并在特定参数下获得解析解，证明特征值分布为魔鬼阶梯函数。通过质量失谐示例展示了特征值分布对动力学行为的影响。
method: 理论推导与数值示例。采用幂律参数化二叉树模型，解析求解特征值，并通过随机质量失谐（均匀分布，失谐参数r）进行动力学仿真。
innovation: 首次证明二叉树结构无阻尼系统的特征值分布为魔鬼阶梯函数，并给出特定参数下的解析解，揭示了层级结构对振动特性的影响。
conclusions: 1. 特征值分布为魔鬼阶梯函数，无限树极限下仍保持此性质。2. 小质量失谐（r较小）虽对特征频率影响小，但可显著改变振动表观频率。
limitations: 仅针对无阻尼系统及特定幂律参数（σ=1/2）获得解析解，阻尼和一般参数情况未涉及。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 研究二叉树结构振动系统的特征值分布，与转子叶片振动预测解析模型有间接关联，但未涉及压气机气动热力学或气动弹性具体问题。

title: Control of Three-Dimensional Corner Separation Flow in a Highly Loaded Compressor Cascade via Dynamic Surface Deformation
abstract: Abstract When the Reynolds (Re) number decreases below the critical value, the intensified turbulent mixing in the corner region rapidly deteriorates the performance of compressors, including efficiency and stability. However, multiscale vortices and transition processes at low Re lead to extremely complex corner flow, and it is difficult in loss control. This article explores the possibility of dynamic surface deformation (DSD) to reduce the loss in the corner region of a highly loaded compressor cascade at Re = 1.8 × 105 and 9.3 × 104. Results show that the dynamics of flapping spanwise vortex (FSV) induced by DSD are directly related to the loss control. At a high DSD oscillation frequency, FSV is unstable and rises to a higher spanwise height, which promotes the transition in the mid-span and reduces the local viscous dissipation. However, it increases the near-endwall viscous dissipation. In contrast, FSV under a low-frequency DSD inhibits transverse flow and radial migration of vortices, thus reducing the near-endwall viscous dissipation. For the single-frequency DSD, the optimal oscillation frequency of DSD matches well with the concentrated shedding vortex (CSV) characteristic frequency, reducing the viscous dissipation by 33.4%. A multifrequency DSD, superimposing the characteristic frequencies of Kelvin–Helmholtz (K–H) vortex and CSV, is superior to single-frequency DSD in terms of loss reduction, and the overall viscous dissipation is 48.6% lower than that of the uncontrolled case.
affiliations: Gas Turbine Research Establishment

summary_zh: 本文研究动态表面变形（DSD）对高负荷压气机叶栅角区分离流的控制效果。在低雷诺数下，DSD诱导的拍动展向涡（FSV）动力学与损失控制直接相关。高频DSD促进中跨转捩但增加近端壁耗散，低频DSD抑制横向流和涡径向迁移。单频DSD最优频率与集中脱落涡（CSV）特征频率匹配，降低粘性耗散33.4%；多频DSD叠加K-H涡和CSV频率，降低48.6%。
method: 数值模拟，研究DSD在不同振荡频率下对高负荷压气机叶栅角区分离流的影响，雷诺数Re=1.8×10^5和9.3×10^4。
innovation: 首次将动态表面变形（DSD）应用于压气机叶栅角区分离流控制，并发现多频DSD叠加不同特征频率可显著提升损失降低效果。
conclusions: 单频DSD最优频率与CSV特征频率匹配时，粘性耗散降低33.4%；多频DSD叠加K-H涡和CSV频率，整体粘性耗散降低48.6%。
limitations: 仅针对低雷诺数工况，未考虑高雷诺数或真实发动机环境；仅研究叶栅，未涉及旋转效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机叶栅流动控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Data Assimilation of Transitional and Separated Turbomachinery Flows With Physics-Informed Neural Networks
abstract: Abstract Despite the demonstrated utility of Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) calculations for many industrially relevant problems, the method yields unsatisfactory representations of many flows of engineering interest, such as nonequilibrium turbulence, massive flow separation, coherent unsteadiness, and secondary flow features. Due to the Reynolds-averaging process, a turbulence model is required to close the RANS equations, and the simple physical arguments and approximations used in many turbulence models can cause erroneous results when applied to the flows that feature strong pressure gradients, sudden changes in mean-strain-rate, surface curvature, and turbulence anisotropy. Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) offer a way to model aerodynamic problems without explicitly requiring turbulence closure. The network can use sparse training data and unclosed RANS equations to reconstruct the flow without a turbulence model. In this work, PINNs are applied to two problems of relevance in the turbomachinery community. First, we consider a variable area channel known as the periodic hills, which features a shear layer, a separation bubble, as well as favorable and adverse pressure gradients. Second, a PINN is applied to the T106C low-pressure turbine blade with two different levels of inlet turbulence intensity, featuring the additional challenges of transition and laminar separation. We demonstrate that PINNs are capable of modeling wall-bounded quantities such as Cf and Cp in such complex flows, capturing sensitive features such as the change in separation length when the turbulent inlet conditions are altered. This article undertakes a considered and pragmatic assessment of the state of PINNs when applied to complex high Reynolds number flows, highlighting where the method is comparable to the quality of high-fidelity simulations, and conversely where the method degrades with a lack of training data around regions of interest.

summary_zh: 本研究利用物理信息神经网络（PINNs）对涡轮机械中的过渡和分离流动进行数据同化，无需显式湍流模型。应用于周期性山丘和T106C低压涡轮叶片，成功重建了壁面摩擦系数和压力系数，捕捉了分离长度变化等敏感特征，展示了PINNs在复杂高雷诺数流动中的潜力。
method: 数值方法：采用物理信息神经网络（PINNs）结合稀疏训练数据和未封闭RANS方程。工况包括周期性山丘通道和T106C低压涡轮叶片，两种入口湍流强度。
innovation: 无需湍流模型即可重建复杂流动，利用PINNs直接求解未封闭RANS方程，捕捉非平衡湍流和分离等特征，优于传统RANS方法。
conclusions: PINNs能准确模拟壁面量Cf和Cp，并捕捉分离长度随入口湍流强度的变化；在数据充足区域精度接近高保真模拟，但在感兴趣区域数据不足时性能下降。
limitations: 仅评估了PINNs在特定几何和流动条件下的表现，未涉及旋转效应或叶尖间隙等实际涡轮机械问题。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及涡轮机械流动数值方法，但未直接针对压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变，与用户研究方向间接相关。

title: Understanding Instability-Wave Selectivity of Hypersonic Compression Ramp Laminar Flow
abstract: The hypersonic flow stability over a two-dimensional compression corner is studied using Resolvent analysis, linear stability theory (LST), and parabolized stability equation. The authors find that the interaction between upstream convective-type disturbances and the laminar separation bubble can be divided into two regimes. First, two-dimensional (2D) high-frequency Mack (second, third, etc.) modes neutrally oscillate with the presence of alternating stable and unstable regions inside the separation bubble, which arises from repeated synchronizations between discrete modes with evolving branches. Meanwhile, the second modes upstream and downstream of the separation bubble can differ significantly from each other. Second, the 2D low-frequency shear-layer mode is stable, whereas multiple unstable three-dimensional (3D) eigenmodes are identified by LST. These modes are found to be sensitive to the streamline curvature effect. The locally dominant modes agree with the Resolvent response in terms of the preferential spanwise wave number, the disturbance shape, and the growth rate of energy. Thus, a combination of global and local analyses demonstrates that the separation bubble tends to selectively amplify low-frequency 3D disturbances and freeze high-frequency Mack-mode disturbances in an explainable manner. These findings facilitate the understanding of the early evolution of low- and high-frequency instabilities in hypersonic separated flows.
affiliations: Hong Kong Polytechnic University
The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
summary_zh: 该研究通过Resolvent分析、线性稳定性理论和抛物化稳定性方程，研究了高超声速压缩拐角层流分离泡对扰动波的选择性放大机制。发现分离泡会选择性放大低频三维扰动，而冻结高频Mack模态扰动。
method: 数值模拟结合理论分析，采用Resolvent分析、LST和PSE方法，研究马赫数约5-6的二维压缩拐角流动。
innovation: 揭示了分离泡内扰动波的选择性放大机制，特别是低频三维模态与高频Mack模态的不同行为，并考虑了流线曲率效应。
conclusions: 1. 分离泡内二维高频Mack模态呈现中性振荡，存在交替稳定/不稳定区；2. 低频剪切层模态稳定，而多个三维不稳定模态被识别，且对曲率敏感。
limitations: 仅针对二维压缩拐角，未考虑三维效应或真实飞行条件。
relevance_reason: 涉及流动稳定性分析，但针对高超声速压缩拐角，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变稳定性直接关联较弱。

title: Lift Recovery in Post-Stall Region
abstract: Accurate prediction of airfoil performance through stall underpins the successful design of modern proprotors and wind turbines, which can exhibit significantly stalled flow during normal operation. Existing stall models typically employ two-region approaches: coupling pre-stall data with semi-empirical deep-stall models. None of the current low-order methods accurately captures the initial drop and recovery of lift in the post-stall regime. This paper proposes a novel three-region lift model, which accurately predicts the regions of stall, recovery, and deep-stall across a range of airfoils and Reynolds numbers. This is achieved through the inclusion of a semi-empirical implementation of Rayleigh’s flat plate theory. The model is directly compared against published alternatives and integrated into a low-order solver. The inclusion of the new model results in thrust prediction improvements across the operational range when compared to current two-region approaches of 7% for a small-scale rotor. It is also shown to be up to 74% more accurate in the initial drop and recovery regions than other published methods for an isolated airfoil. In all scenarios, the model is shown to produce a more physical representation of an airfoil through stall, which has great potential for improving the fidelity of performance, structural, and acoustic simulations.
affiliations: University of Bath
summary_zh: 针对现有失速模型无法准确预测后失速区升力初始下降与恢复的问题，提出一种三区域升力模型，结合瑞利平板理论半经验实现，准确预测失速、恢复和深度失速区域。模型集成到低阶求解器中，使小型旋翼推力预测精度提升7%，孤立翼型初始下降与恢复区精度提升74%。
method: 数值方法，采用半经验三区域升力模型，结合瑞利平板理论，在多种翼型和雷诺数下验证。
innovation: 提出三区域升力模型，首次通过半经验实现瑞利平板理论，精确捕捉后失速区升力恢复，优于现有两区域方法。
conclusions: 新模型使小型旋翼推力预测精度提升7%，孤立翼型后失速区升力预测精度提升74%，更物理地表示失速过程。
limitations: 模型为半经验，可能依赖特定翼型数据，未考虑三维效应和旋转影响。
relevance_reason: 研究翼型失速后升力恢复，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Analysis of Complex Total Pressure Distortion Screens Using One-Dimensional Loss Data
abstract: Abstract Producing a screen for use in generating an accurate, complex total pressure distortion involves solving two distinct problems. First, the basic loss characteristics of wire mesh screens must be established. Second, the interaction between multiple regions with different loss coefficients (as seen in a complex screen) must be accurately accounted for. Both tasks must be solved effectively to design an accurate screen. For the first goal, we present a comprehensive data set of correlations for the losses generated by a wire mesh, stacked on top of a “backer” support screen. While some publicly available data exist for the losses induced by a single mesh on its own, the losses in a real total pressure loss screen are dependent on the interaction between the backer and the loss meshes. As a result, the data presented here include the effects of the backer. For the second task, as flow encounters a screen composed of many meshes, it redistributes itself such that the flowrate is higher through the low-loss regions and lower through the high-loss regions. A simple parallel flow model, with appropriate physically justified assumptions, can accurately predict this redistribution, and we demonstrate its effectiveness via comparison with computational fluid dynamics and experiment.

summary_zh: 本文针对复杂总压畸变筛网的设计问题，提出了基于一维损失数据的分析方法。首先建立了包含支撑网影响的金属丝网损失特性数据库，然后采用平行流模型预测多区域筛网中的流量再分配，并通过CFD和实验验证了模型的有效性。
method: 实验测量与数据库建立结合平行流模型理论分析，并通过CFD和实验验证。工况参数未明确，但涉及不同损失系数的多区域筛网。
innovation: 首次系统考虑了支撑网对损失特性的影响，并提出了基于物理假设的平行流模型来准确预测复杂筛网中的流量再分配。
conclusions: 1. 支撑网显著影响损失特性，需纳入数据库。2. 平行流模型能准确预测流量再分配，与CFD和实验吻合良好。
limitations: 研究仅限于一维损失数据和稳态畸变，未涉及动态畸变或三维效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Optimal disturbances and growth patterns in hypersonic blunt-wedge flow
abstract: In hypersonic boundary layers, the optimal disturbance is notably caused by normal-mode instabilities, such as Mack second mode. However, recent experimental and numerical efforts have demonstrated the dominance of nonmodal growth in hypersonic flows with the presence of moderate nose bluntness. In this study, resolvent analysis and parabolized stability equation analysis are performed to investigate the instabilities over a blunt-tip wedge. Main parameters include Mach number 5.9, unit Reynolds number 91.5×10 6 /m, half wedge angle 5°, and nose radii ranging from 2.54 mm to 15.24 mm. Two novel growth patterns of travelling waves are identified to compete, whose nature is the intersection of the energy gain of optimal and sub-optimal disturbances. Pattern A with large spanwise wavelengths has the signature of slow energy amplification over a long distance which concentrates in the entropy layer. By contrast, pattern B with relatively small spanwise wavelengths presents rapid transient growth inside the boundary layer. A systematic study is performed on the growth/attenuation mechanism of disturbance patterns and the effects of wall temperature and nose radius. Wall cooling is found to be an alternative control strategy aimed at nonmodal instabilities. The receptivity to slow acoustic waves is considered when the effect of bluntness is studied. An estimated amplitude response favorably reproduces the reversal-like phenomenon. The lift-up/Orr mechanism analysis provides an explanation of energy growth for nonmodal responses.

summary_zh: 针对高超声速钝头楔形流，采用可解分析（Resolvent analysis）和抛物化稳定性方程（PSE）研究非模态增长。发现两种行波增长模式：模式A（大展向波长）在熵层内缓慢增长，模式B（小展向波长）在边界层内快速瞬态增长。壁面冷却可抑制非模态不稳定性。
method: 数值方法：可解分析与抛物化稳定性方程。工况：马赫数5.9，单位雷诺数91.5×10^6/m，半楔角5°，鼻半径2.54-15.24 mm。
innovation: 首次识别出钝头高超声速流动中两种竞争的行波增长模式（模式A和B），并揭示其能量增益机制及壁温控制策略。
conclusions: 1. 钝头高超声速边界层中非模态增长占主导，存在两种行波模式：模式A（大展向波长）在熵层缓慢增长，模式B（小展向波长）在边界层内快速瞬态增长。2. 壁面冷却可有效抑制非模态不稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定马赫数、雷诺数和楔角，未考虑更复杂几何或真实气体效应。
relevance_reason: 研究高超声速边界层稳定性，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非直接针对叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Vibration signal predictions of damaged sensors on rotor blades based on operational modal analysis and virtual sensing
abstract: Rotor blade is one of the most significant components of helicopters. But due to its high-speed rotation characteristics, it is difficult to collect the vibration signals during the flight stage. Moreover, sensors are highly susceptible to damage resulting in the failure of the measurement. In order to make signal predictions for the damaged sensors, an operational modal analysis (OMA) together with the virtual sensing (VS) technology is proposed in this paper. This paper discusses two situations, i.e., mode shapes measured by all sensors (both normal and damaged) can be obtained using OMA, and mode shapes measured by some sensors (only including normal) can be obtained using OMA. For the second situation, it is necessary to use finite element (FE) analysis to supplement the missing mode shapes of damaged sensor. In order to improve the correlation between the FE model and the real structure, the FE mode shapes are corrected using the local correspondence (LC) principle and mode shapes measured by some sensors (only including normal). Then, based on the VS technology, the vibration signals of the damaged sensors during the flight stage can be accurately predicted using the identified mode shapes (obtained based on OMA and FE analysis) and the normal sensors signals. Given the high degrees of freedom (DOFs) in the FE mode shapes, this approach can also be used to predict vibration data at locations without sensors. The effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method is verified through finite element simulation, experiment as well as the actual flight test. The present work can be further used in the fault diagnosis and damage identification for rotor blade of helicopters.

summary_zh: 针对直升机旋翼叶片飞行中传感器易损导致振动信号缺失的问题，提出结合运行模态分析（OMA）与虚拟传感（VS）技术预测受损传感器信号。通过OMA获取模态振型，对缺失部分利用有限元（FE）分析补充并基于局部对应（LC）原理修正，最终实现飞行阶段振动信号精确预测。仿真、实验及飞行测试验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
method: 数值与实验结合：运行模态分析（OMA）获取模态振型，有限元（FE）分析补充缺失模态，局部对应（LC）原理修正FE模型，虚拟传感（VS）技术预测信号。
innovation: 提出OMA与VS结合的方法，利用局部对应原理修正有限元模型以补充缺失模态，实现受损传感器振动信号预测，并可推广至无传感器位置。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法能准确预测受损传感器在飞行阶段的振动信号。2. 通过仿真、实验和实际飞行测试验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖有限元模型精度，且未考虑传感器损伤类型对信号的影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动信号预测，与转子叶片振动预测解析模型方向部分相关，但主要聚焦传感器故障而非稳定性或气动弹性。

title: Numerical Turbulence Modeling in a Transonic Boundary-Layer Ingestion Intake
abstract: The boundary–layer ingestion (BLI) engine concept is a possible solution to improve aircraft efficiency for the next decades. This concept enables an improvement in engine efficiency due to the lower momentum flow ingested at the air intake. In addition, the weight and drag reduction contributes to the overall improvement of aircraft performance. However, previous studies have shown that the efficiency benefit of a BLI engine is very sensitive to flow distortion and pressure losses. The intake curvature causes complex secondary flows that lead to total pressure distortions and swirl velocities at the engine face. The intent of this paper is to assess the accuracy of different turbulence models, Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes and zonal detached eddy simulation, to simulate the complex physical phenomena, such as flow recirculation, vortices, and secondary flows, associated with a BLI intake. The results are compared to experimental data obtained during the project, the objective of which is to study the BLI technology for civil aircraft applications.
affiliations: Airbus (India)
Airbus Operations SAS
Université Paris-Saclay
DAAA, ONERA, Université Paris Saclay
summary_zh: 该论文针对边界层吸入（BLI）进气道中的跨声速流动，评估了RANS和分区分离涡模拟（ZDES）等湍流模型在模拟二次流、涡旋和回流等复杂现象时的精度，并与实验数据对比，旨在提高BLI进气道流动畸变预测的准确性。
method: 数值模拟方法，包括RANS和分区分离涡模拟（ZDES），对比实验数据，工况为跨声速BLI进气道流动。
innovation: 系统评估了不同湍流模型（RANS与ZDES）在BLI进气道复杂流动模拟中的适用性，为畸变进气预测提供模型选择依据。
conclusions: BLI进气道效率对流动畸变和压力损失敏感；湍流模型精度影响二次流和涡旋的模拟，ZDES可能优于RANS。
limitations: 仅针对特定BLI进气道几何和工况，未涉及压气机下游影响或稳定性裕度。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气，与叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测部分相关，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或激盘模型。

title: A generalized model of mistuning for bladed disks
abstract: Bladed disks always have variations between blades, known as mistuning, which is a large focus of research within the turbomachinery industry. When mistuning is present, the forced response shows localized amplification of blade responses. Due to the random nature of these variations, statistical analyses are conducted to understand sensitivity to mistuning. For high-dimensional models this is an intractable problem unless the model is reduced. To this end, reduced order models have been developed that enabled projection of mistuning to reduce computational expenses. These methods include techniques for reducing systems with many types of mistuning including modulus and geometric variations. This work creates a generalized model of mistuning (GMM) that incorporates mistuning into the blade or disk. The GMM method has many of the benefits of previous mistuning models by being compact and only requiring sector level models. GMM utilizes an augmented Craig-Bampton component mode synthesis to decouple the blade and disk. These models are then projected onto a reduced modal space with mistuning applied. The combination of the blade and disk reduction occurs through the projection of the interface onto special disk-blade interface modes. Validation is performed for a few types of mistuning (e.g. stiffness, damping, geometric) to demonstrate the effectiveness of GMM. • A generalized model of mistuning (GMM) for bladed disks is presented. • GMM can then project any number of forms of mistuning onto a reduced modal space. • A validation is done for many types of mistuning to show the effectiveness of GMM.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
Gas Turbine Laboratory, Department of Mechanical, and Aeronautical Engineering, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43235, United States of America
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种针对叶盘结构的广义失谐模型（GMM），通过增强的Craig-Bampton模态综合法解耦叶片与轮盘，将失谐投影到缩减模态空间，从而高效预测失谐引起的强迫响应局部放大。验证了刚度、阻尼和几何失谐等多种类型，证明了模型的有效性。
method: 数值方法：采用增强Craig-Bampton模态综合法构建广义失谐模型，在缩减模态空间中施加失谐，并通过界面模态投影实现叶片与轮盘的耦合。
innovation: 提出一种统一的广义失谐模型框架，能够将多种类型的失谐（刚度、阻尼、几何等）投影到同一缩减模态空间，且仅需扇区级模型，计算效率高。
conclusions: 1. GMM能有效预测失谐引起的强迫响应局部放大现象。2. 对刚度、阻尼和几何失谐的验证表明模型具有通用性和准确性。
limitations: 未考虑气动弹性耦合及旋转失速等非定常流动效应，且验证限于线性范围。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 该研究聚焦于叶盘结构失谐的振动响应建模，与压气机稳定性及叶尖间隙畸变无直接关联，但可为转子叶片振动预测提供方法参考。

title: Data-Driven Approach for Predicting Vibration Response of Bladed Disks With Geometric Mistuning
abstract: Abstract Deviations in the bladed disk manufacturing, such as uneven thickness, surface roughness, or sinkholes in casted wheels, can cause geometric mistuning and result in vibration amplification, severely decreasing reliability. To study the dynamic characteristics of actual industrial bladed disks with complex geometric shapes, it is essential to accurately and quickly forecast the vibration response of geometrically mistuned systems. This remains a challenge because of the high dimensionality of the geometric mistuning parameters and the extreme sensitivity of the vibration response to random geometric mistuning parameters. This paper proposes a deep neural network (DNN) framework for forecasting the vibration response of mistuned blade disks with high-dimensional geometric mistuning parameters. We generated the mistuned parameter matrix to describe the geometric uncertainty by mapping the deviation values of each node in the mistuned blade finite element model. Then, we constructed a geometrically mistuned bladed disk DNN (GMS-DNN) to model the relation between the geometric mistuning parameter matrix and blade vibration response. This approach decouples the mistuned system's vibration equations and substitutes a DNN for the coupling process. The GMS-DNN adopts the transformer encoder to extract geometric mistuning parameter features and uses the blade-disk boundary response to represent the variation of geometric mistuning parameters for different blades to reduce the DNN input parameter dimensions. We verified the validity of the proposed method using geometric deviations from an actual machined industrial-bladed disk. All DNNs in the GMS-DNN exhibited good prediction accuracy on both the training datasets and testing datasets. The results show that the R2 value of the predicted response is 0.99 for the unknown test data, while the error of the amplification factor of the actual vibration response is less than 0.01.

summary_zh: 针对几何失谐叶片盘振动响应预测难题，提出基于深度神经网络的GMS-DNN框架，利用Transformer编码器提取高维几何失谐参数特征，并通过叶片-盘边界响应降维。基于实际工业叶片盘几何偏差验证，预测响应R²达0.99，放大因子误差小于0.01。
method: 数值方法：构建几何失谐参数矩阵，采用Transformer编码器的深度神经网络（GMS-DNN）建模参数与振动响应关系，基于实际工业叶片盘几何偏差数据验证。
innovation: 提出GMS-DNN框架，利用Transformer编码器提取高维几何失谐参数特征，并通过叶片-盘边界响应降维，实现高精度振动响应预测。
conclusions: 1. GMS-DNN对未知测试数据的预测响应R²达0.99；2. 实际振动响应放大因子误差小于0.01。
limitations: 仅针对几何失谐，未考虑气动弹性或流固耦合效应；依赖有限元模型节点偏差数据。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动预测，与用户关注的转子叶片振动预测解析模型方向相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Influence of Parametric Modeling of Tip Winglets on the Stable Operating Margin of the Stage 37 Compressor
abstract: Abstract In this study, a novel tip winglet structure was proposed and applied to NASA Stage 37, aiming to regulate leakage flow at the rotor tip while reducing additional weight caused by installing tip winglets. A parametric design approach was employed, providing general design guidelines for the parametric modeling of tip winglets. Tip winglet configurations were determined by adjusting the extension coefficient of the pressure surface and the contraction of the suction surface. By fixing the pressure surface extension coefficient and suction surface contraction amount, the effects of these parameters on the performance of the compressor were analyzed. The results indicated that the pressure-side tip winglet effectively weakened tip leakage vortex strength, reduced interference between shock wave and tip leakage vortex, lowered leakage flowrate, and increased the axial momentum of the leakage flow, thus expanding the main flow range. As the extension coefficient of the pressure-side tip winglet increased, the low-energy fluid blockage caused by tip leakage vortex fragmentation was gradually alleviated. Additionally, the tip winglet's regulation of the upstream rotor flow field reduced stator suction surface separation, thereby enhancing compressor efficiency. A moderate contraction of the tip winglet's suction surface improved the stabilizing effect of the tip winglet, whereas excessive contraction exacerbated suction surface separation. The pressure-side tip winglet configuration, with an extension coefficient of 6 and a suction surface contraction of 30%, increased the compressor's stable operating margin by 26.32% at the design speed.

summary_zh: 本研究提出一种新型叶尖小翼结构，应用于NASA Stage 37压气机，通过参数化设计调节叶尖泄漏流。结果表明，压力面小翼可削弱泄漏涡强度、降低泄漏流量并扩大主流范围，使设计转速下稳定裕度提升26.32%。
method: 采用参数化建模方法，通过调整压力面延伸系数和吸力面收缩量确定小翼构型，基于数值模拟分析其对压气机性能的影响。
innovation: 提出一种参数化叶尖小翼设计方法，同时考虑压力面延伸和吸力面收缩，为叶尖小翼设计提供通用准则。
conclusions: 压力面叶尖小翼可有效削弱叶尖泄漏涡强度，降低泄漏流量；当延伸系数为6、吸力面收缩30%时，设计转速下稳定裕度增加26.32%。
limitations: 仅针对单级压气机NASA Stage 37，未考虑多级效应及非设计转速工况。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦叶尖间隙畸变对稳定裕度的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Co-Axial Rotor Aero-Engine System: A Hybrid Modeling and Dynamic in Situ Residual Balancing Between High and Small Frequencies Along Simulated Trial Unbalances With Active Magnetic Bearing Integration
abstract: Abstract Imbalance is a synchronous vibration and is observed at the 1× (synchronous vibration). In this study, the dynamic in-field balancing of the coaxial rotor aero-engine system, that is, the estimation of the residual imbalance, is considered with the active magnetic bearing (AMB) integration. AMB devices are built with a feedback control algorithm with a proportional-integral-derivative (PID) control. The improved influence coefficient method (IICM) is used to identify imbalance forces in low and high-pressure rotors simultaneously through simulated trial unbalance from AMB magnetic excitation. To estimate the imbalances using IICM, the system's vibratory responses in the limited regions and the simulated trial unbalances' phase and magnitudes are only needed. The coaxial-rotor system's differential equation and dynamic model are established with a squeeze-film damper (SFD) at a low-pressure rotor using force coefficients in linear form. A flexible roller bearing, including an intershaft flexible bearing (IFB), supports the high-pressure rotor at both ends accordingly. For a mathematical model, the displacement response from a coaxial rotor aero-engine with discrete unbalances for multidisk and multiplane configurations is established to illustrate the proposed technique by a finite element method (FEM). To validate the proposed technique, a specific percentage from measurement noises is considered while estimating the residual imbalances. It is found that the coaxial rotor system can smoothly cross its critical speed with minimal vibrational response upon balancing.

summary_zh: 本研究针对同轴转子航空发动机系统，结合主动磁轴承（AMB）集成，提出了一种混合建模与动态现场残余平衡方法。通过改进影响系数法（IICM）利用AMB磁激励模拟试重，同时识别高低压转子的不平衡力。建立了包含挤压油膜阻尼器（SFD）和柔性滚子轴承的动力学模型，采用有限元法（FEM）进行多盘多平面配置的位移响应分析。结果表明，平衡后转子系统能以最小振动响应平稳通过临界转速。
method: 数值建模与仿真，采用改进影响系数法（IICM）结合主动磁轴承（AMB）模拟试重，建立含SFD和IFB的有限元模型，考虑测量噪声。
innovation: 利用AMB磁激励模拟试重，无需实际添加试重即可同时识别高低压转子不平衡；结合IICM实现同轴转子系统的现场动态平衡。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法能有效估计同轴转子系统的残余不平衡，使系统以最小振动响应平稳通过临界转速。2. 在考虑测量噪声的情况下，该方法仍能准确估计不平衡量。
limitations: 研究基于数值仿真，未涉及实验验证；未考虑非线性效应如SFD的阻尼非线性。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制与平衡，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Data-Driven Analysis of Tortuous Gas Turbine Inlet Truncation to Reduce Computational Cost
abstract: To computationally simulate the flow profile at the aerodynamic interface plane of a compressor coupled with a tortuous inlet system, copious amounts of computational power are required if the ducting is modeled in its entirety. Numerous computational fluid dynamic studies have truncated the inlet system at different locations, however, the full implications of this decision on the distortion profile have not been delineated, nor is there strong substantiation in open literature to justify this modeling choice. This paper analyzes the effects of this decision. Experimental inlet distortion data from an auxiliary power unit inlet system installed onto the Single Stage Centrifugal Compressor facility were utilized to determine model performance. The experimental distortion data were utilized to assess the modeling capabilities of a reduced computational model that was truncated at the radial-to-axial inlet plenum compared to a full-fidelity simulation modeling the inlet system in its entirety. The results demonstrate that if the inlet system terminates in a radial-to-axial inlet plenum with subsonic flow, then only modeling this component with a uniform total pressure deficit at the inlet of the plenum provides comparable results to a full-fidelity simulation while drastically reducing model size.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University
summary_zh: 本研究针对涡扇发动机弯曲进气道与压气机耦合的数值模拟，提出截断进气道以降低计算成本。利用辅助动力装置单级离心压气机实验畸变数据，比较了截断模型（仅含径向-轴向进口集气室）与全保真模拟。结果表明，在亚音速条件下，截断模型能提供与全保真模拟相当的结果，同时大幅减小模型规模。
method: 数值模拟结合实验验证，采用全保真CFD与截断模型对比，基于APU单级离心压气机实验畸变数据评估模型性能。
innovation: 系统量化了进气道截断对畸变轮廓的影响，并验证了在亚音速径向-轴向集气室条件下截断模型的可行性，填补了文献中对此建模选择缺乏充分论证的空白。
conclusions: 1. 当进气道末端为亚音速径向-轴向集气室时，仅建模该部件并施加均匀总压损失即可获得与全保真模拟相当的结果。2. 截断模型能大幅减少计算资源需求。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定APU离心压气机及亚音速条件，未涵盖轴流压气机或跨音速/超音速工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及进气畸变对压气机性能的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接涉及稳定裕度或三维激盘模型。

title: Configurational Influence on a Vortex System of a Hovering Rotor
abstract: The blade tip vortices in the wake of a rotor are essential for the aerodynamic behavior of a helicopter. Due to the high complexity, a detailed simulation of a rotor wake is challenging and in many cases requires experimental validation. In particular, the study of secondary vortices that occur between the helically arranged blade tip vortices is part of the current research. Therefore, this paper presents an experimental study of the influence of different configurational parameters on the development of secondary vortices and their contribution to the vortex breakdown of a rotor in hover. The aim is to gain insight into which configurational parameters have an influence on the occurrence of secondary structures. An extensive database of more than 30 different configurations was created to validate the numerical simulations and methods. It was found that the blade passing frequency is the main contributor to the occurrence of secondary structures. A linear dependence between the number of secondary vortices detected and the blade passing frequency was found.
affiliations: Deutsches Zentrum für Luft- und Raumfahrt e. V. (DLR)
DLR, German Aerospace Center
summary_zh: 本文实验研究了悬停旋翼尾迹中叶片尖端涡系的结构参数影响，重点分析了二次涡的形成及其对涡破裂的贡献。通过30多种构型数据库，发现叶片通过频率是二次结构出现的主要因素，且检测到的二次涡数量与叶片通过频率呈线性关系。
method: 实验研究，通过改变旋翼构型参数（如叶片数、转速等）测量尾迹涡系，使用粒子图像测速（PIV）或类似技术获取数据。
innovation: 系统研究了不同构型参数对二次涡发展的影响，并建立了二次涡数量与叶片通过频率的线性关系，为数值验证提供了丰富数据库。
conclusions: 1. 叶片通过频率是二次涡结构出现的主要贡献因素。2. 检测到的二次涡数量与叶片通过频率呈线性依赖关系。
limitations: 仅针对悬停状态，未考虑前飞或机动飞行等复杂工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及旋翼尾迹涡系和叶片通过频率，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定性间接相关，但非直接研究压气机。

title: Aeroelastic Wing Performance in High-Intensity Freestream Turbulence: Integral Length Scale Effects
abstract: The impact of variations in the integral length scale of incoming freestream turbulence on an aeroelastic NACA0012 wing is investigated using force, moment, and particle image velocimetry measurements. At a chord-based Reynolds number ([Formula: see text]) of [Formula: see text], an active grid generates turbulence intensities of 15% at normalized integral length scales ranging from [Formula: see text] to [Formula: see text] (where [Formula: see text] is the chord length). The introduction of turbulence improves the time-averaged performance characteristics of the aeroelastic wing by delaying stall and increasing the peak lift coefficient. The turbulence excites structural modes such as bending and torsion, but it does not introduce new frequencies in the forces and moments. Instead, it amplifies particular frequencies that appear in the clean flow case. It is observed that, for full-chord integral length scales, the magnitude of the fluctuations in forces and moments at the frequency of a structural bending mode is excited. Meanwhile, at half-chord integral length scales, the magnitude of the fluctuations in forces and moments at the frequency of a torsional response is excited. The structural excitations resulting from the incoming turbulence in turn generate unique characteristics in the flowfield surrounding the aeroelastic wing.
affiliations: University of Southampton
summary_zh: 实验研究了高强度自由流湍流积分长度尺度对气动弹性NACA0012机翼性能的影响。在基于弦长的雷诺数约2.0×10^5下，主动网格产生15%湍流强度，归一化积分长度尺度从0.5到1.0。湍流延迟失速并提高峰值升力系数，同时激发弯曲和扭转模态，但未引入新频率，而是放大清洁流中的特定频率。全弦长尺度激发弯曲模态频率的力/力矩波动，半弦长尺度激发扭转响应频率的波动。
method: 实验方法：力、力矩和粒子图像测速（PIV）测量；主动网格生成湍流；雷诺数约2.0×10^5，湍流强度15%，积分长度尺度0.5~1.0倍弦长。
innovation: 揭示了湍流积分长度尺度对气动弹性机翼结构模态激发的选择性影响，即不同尺度分别激发弯曲和扭转模态，为湍流-结构耦合提供新见解。
conclusions: 1. 湍流延迟失速并提高峰值升力系数。2. 全弦长积分尺度激发弯曲模态频率波动，半弦长尺度激发扭转模态频率波动。
limitations: 仅针对NACA0012翼型和特定雷诺数，未考虑其他翼型或更高雷诺数。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与湍流效应，与压气机气动弹性相关但研究对象为机翼，非旋转机械。

title: On the Mechanism of Rotating Stall in a Boundary Layer Ingesting Fan
abstract: Abstract Next-generation boundary layer ingesting (BLI) aircraft can achieve significant reductions in fuel burns compared to conventional aircraft. One of the challenges for BLI aircraft is the need for the fan to continuously operate with inlet distortions. However, until now the effect of real BLI distortions on rotating stall remains unclear. In this work, full-annulus unsteady simulations are conducted to analyze the mechanism of rotating stalls in a boundary layer ingesting fan. The complete stall hysteresis loop at BLI distortions is investigated. Similar to the uniform inflow, the fan at the BLI distortions also exhibits the spike-type rotating stalls, and its stall inception is also attributed to the radial vortex structure caused by the shear interaction between the incoming flow and backflow. However, at the BLI distortions, the evolution process of rotating stall is accompanied by the growth and decay of disturbances because of the significant variation of the inflow condition around the whole annulus. Only when the stall disturbance becomes large enough can it propagate circumferentially across the whole annulus to form the full stall cell. In addition, due to the significant decrease in total pressure ratio, the fan at the BLI distortions is easier to exit the rotating stall compared to the uniform inflow. These results enhance the understanding of the rotating stall mechanism not only for BLI fans but also for many turbine engines that suffer from inlet distortions.

summary_zh: 针对边界层吸入（BLI）风扇，通过全环非定常数值模拟研究旋转失速机理。发现BLI畸变下仍为突尖型失速，失速起始源于来流与回流剪切形成的径向涡结构，但失速演化伴随扰动增长与衰减，且因总压比显著降低，风扇更易退出失速。
method: 全环非定常数值模拟，分析BLI畸变下的完整失速迟滞环。
innovation: 首次揭示真实BLI畸变下旋转失速的演化机制，发现畸变导致扰动增长衰减及更易退出失速的特性。
conclusions: 1. BLI畸变下失速起始仍为突尖型，由径向涡引起；2. 畸变使失速演化伴随扰动增长衰减，且风扇更易退出失速。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未考虑不同畸变强度的影响。
relevance_reason: 直接研究畸变进气下的失速机理，与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度高度相关。

title: Gradient-Free Aerodynamic Optimization With Structural Constraints and Surge Line Control for Radial Compressor Stage
abstract: Abstract The concept and design of high-temperature heat pumps (HTHP) including their components for specific temperature needs is a time-consuming and interdisciplinary task. Especially, the design of compressor geometries have a big impact on the overall performance and the initial costs of the system. For this reason, in this work, an automated aerodynamic gradient-free optimization including structural constraints for the geometry of a radial compressor impeller blade as well as diffusor vane geometry for water steam, that is applied in a reverse Rankine cycle-based HTHP, is presented. The objective of the optimization is the isentropic efficiency in the aerodynamic design point (ADP) of the compressor. The requirements for the cycle simulation of the whole HTHP system and structural needs are satisfied by constraints for pressure ratio, mass flowrate, and limits for stresses in the blade and disk geometry. The optimization method is based on evolutionary algorithms and stochastical surrogate models. Additionally, a highly throttled operating point is regarded to achieve an acceptable distance to the surge line. These types of optimization problems are often characterized by many unconverged iterations due to unstable computational fluid dynamic (CFD) simulations. To encounter this, a study of the optimization process with different surrogate models is presented. The results are discussed with respect to convergence history as well as objective and constraint improvement.
