Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency
Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency, Chofu, Tokyo 182-8522, Japan
summary_zh: 本研究数值模拟了Falkner–Skan–Cooke边界层中流向细长正弦粗糙元（SREs）对三维边界层横流转捩的层流化控制效果，并与离散粗糙元（DREs）对比。SREs通过产生并维持稳定的横流涡，有效扭曲平均横流剖面，降低不稳定性，其临界高度更高，层流化效果优于DREs，且可通过调整高度、角度和波长进一步增强。
method: 数值模拟，基于Falkner–Skan–Cooke边界层，对比正弦粗糙元（SREs）与离散粗糙元（DREs）在不同高度、角度和波长下的层流化效果。
innovation: 提出流向细长正弦粗糙元（SREs）作为层流控制装置，其设计避免流动触发，临界高度更高，且能更有效地产生稳定横流涡并扭曲平均剖面，层流化效果优于传统离散粗糙元。
conclusions: 1. SREs的临界高度远高于DREs，避免流动触发。2. SREs的层流化效果优于DREs，且可通过优化高度、角度和波长进一步增强。
limitations: 研究仅限于特定边界层模型（Falkner–Skan–Cooke），未考虑实际发动机压气机中的复杂几何与流动条件。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及边界层稳定性控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙、畸变等核心方向。

title: Time-Varying Aeroelastic Modeling and Analysis for a Morphing Wing
abstract: The paper presents a novel time-varying aeroelastic modeling approach for the morphing wing with the process of camber changing. The time-varying modeling methodology includes structural dynamics modeling, unsteady aerodynamic modeling, and interpolation for fluid–structure coupling. Firstly, the morphing wing is modularized and divided into fixed and variable parts by the floating frame of reference formulation. It is combined with the Craig–Bampton method to reduce order and eliminate nonindependent degrees of freedom. Then, the unsteady vortex-lattice method is used to calculate the transient, unsteady aerodynamic force for time evolution. Furthermore, the above time-varying structural dynamics modeling and a fluid–structure coupling interpolation are integrated to construct overall aeroelastic modeling, obtaining a set of differential-algebraic equations. Finally, these equations are numerically solved by the [Formula: see text] method. The proposed approach provides an innovative idea to deal with the incredible complexity of the aeroelastic effect as structural characteristics change over time. It can efficiently and accurately analyze the morphing wing’s transient response or flutter property. To verify and utilize the time-varying aeroelastic modeling approach, numerical calculations and comparative studies were carried out regarding the time-varying characteristics of the structural modes, aerodynamic calculations, and flutter prediction of the morphing wing.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, 210016 Nanjing, People’s Republic of China
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种针对变弯度变形机翼的时变气动弹性建模方法，结合浮动坐标系、Craig-Bampton降阶、非定常涡格法和流固耦合插值，构建了微分代数方程组并数值求解，用于分析瞬态响应和颤振特性。
method: 数值方法：采用浮动坐标系和Craig-Bampton法进行结构动力学降阶，非定常涡格法计算气动力，通过流固耦合插值构建时变气动弹性模型。
innovation: 提出了一种处理结构特性随时间变化的气动弹性建模新思路，能够高效分析变形机翼的瞬态响应和颤振。
conclusions: 该方法能准确预测变形机翼的结构模态时变特性、气动力计算和颤振边界。
limitations: 仅针对变弯度变形机翼，未涉及其他变形形式或复杂流动条件。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性建模和颤振分析，与压气机气动弹性相关，但研究对象为变形机翼，非压气机。

title: Reducing aerodynamic vibration of rigid rotors with retreating side active control avoidance
abstract: This paper proposes a new approach to eliminate aerodynamic lift oscillation, called the Dominant Sector Individual Blade Control (DS-IBC) method for rigid rotor helicopters. An Advancing Blade Concept (ABC) rotor model for aerodynamic analysis based on the free-wake method is applied. DS-IBC avoids applying active control on the rotor’s retreating side by employing and restricting active control inputs to a sector area of the rotor disc. Outside this sector, only primary collective and cyclic pitch control are used. Each blade takes turns entering the sector, creating a “relay” active control form to ensure continuous control inputs. The method also includes outer-trim and inner-trim iteration modules. Results show that DS-IBC can eliminate aerodynamic lift oscillation using much smaller control inputs than the sine-trim method. By focusing active control on the rotor’s advancing side, DS-IBC improves the effective lift-to-drag ratio and reduces the implementation difficulty of active rotor control for aerodynamic oscillation elimination, especially at a large lift-offset.
affiliations: Dalian University of Technology
School of Mechanics and Aerospace Engineering, Dalian University of Technology, Dalian 116024, China
summary_zh: 本文针对刚性旋翼直升机提出一种消除气动升力振荡的新方法——主导扇区单桨叶控制（DS-IBC）。该方法基于自由尾迹的ABC旋翼模型，将主动控制限制在旋翼盘的前行侧扇区，后行侧仅用常规周期变距，通过桨叶接力实现连续控制。结果表明DS-IBC能以更小控制输入消除升力振荡，提高有效升阻比，降低主动控制实施难度。
method: 数值模拟方法，基于自由尾迹的ABC旋翼气动模型，包含外环和内环配平迭代模块。
innovation: 提出DS-IBC方法，将主动控制限制在旋翼盘前行侧扇区，避免后行侧主动控制，通过桨叶接力实现连续控制，降低控制输入和实现难度。
conclusions: DS-IBC能以比正弦配平法更小的控制输入消除气动升力振荡；通过聚焦前行侧主动控制，提高了有效升阻比。
limitations: 仅针对刚性旋翼直升机，未考虑柔性叶片或非定常气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制，但研究对象为直升机旋翼，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测关联较弱。

title: Aerodynamic instability evolution of a multi-stage combined compressor
abstract: Unstable operating conditions such as surge could cause damage to both aerodynamic performance and structural integrity of a compression system. This paper addresses the critical issue of aerodynamic instability in compressor design, particularly focusing on an axial-centrifugal combined compressor, a widely used yet underexplored configuration. An experimental investigation was conducted on a three-stage axial and one-stage centrifugal compressor (3A1C), using two pipe systems and employing fast-responding transducers to capture the dynamic instability process from choke condition to deep surge. Results reveal that at the design speed, 3A1C enters deep surge directly, whereas at off-design speeds, it experiences rotating stall and mild surge across a wide mass flow range. Some special instability features in the combined compressor can be found in the steady state map and dynamic process. The characteristic curve of the first axial stage keeps a positive slope during the whole mass flow range at an off-design speed. The first stage could work stably on the stall characteristic curve because the centrifugal stage has stronger pressurization and plays a dominant role in global aerodynamic instability. Besides, rotating instability occurs at the first rotor tip and disappears as the back pressure increases, which is also rarely seen in a single-axial compressor. This is also related to the strong pressurization of the centrifugal stage. The findings of this paper will contribute to the understanding of aerodynamic instabilities in combined compressors.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
School of Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 本文实验研究了一台三级轴流加一级离心（3A1C）组合压气机的气动失稳演化过程。设计转速下直接进入深度喘振，非设计转速下经历旋转失速和轻度喘振。离心级强增压主导全局失稳，第一级转子叶尖出现旋转不稳定性并随背压升高消失。
method: 实验研究，采用快速响应传感器测量从阻塞到深度喘振的动态失稳过程，使用两种管道系统，在设计和非设计转速下进行。
innovation: 揭示了轴流-离心组合压气机特有的失稳特征，如第一级特性线正斜率、离心级主导失稳及转子叶尖旋转不稳定性的出现与消失。
conclusions: 设计转速下直接进入深度喘振；非设计转速下存在旋转失速和轻度喘振；离心级强增压使第一级可在失速特性线上稳定工作。
limitations: 仅针对一种3A1C构型，未考虑不同级数或变几何调节的影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖旋转不稳定性与失稳机理，与用户研究的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接使用三维激盘模型。

title: The Unsteady Shock-Boundary Layer Interaction in a Compressor Cascade—Part III: Mechanisms of Shock Oscillation
abstract: Abstract The shock-boundary layer interaction in transonic flows is known to cause strong unsteady flow effects that negatively affect the performance and operability of blade and cascade designs. Despite decades of research on the subject, little is still known about the physical mechanisms that drive the different oscillation frequencies observed with different designs. In the conclusion of this three-part series, the experimental and numerical data obtained with the Transonic Cascade TEAMAero are analyzed together in detail in order to test the main theories of continuous shock oscillation. This analysis exposes a main mechanism of shock oscillation, where pressure waves generated inside the passage of the cascade propagate upstream and interact strongly with the main shock when the latter is also in the passage. The interaction of these features causes a breakdown of the flow that is shown to propagate upstream, inevitably causing strong variations in the inflow angle and therefore on the operating conditions of the cascade. The high-frequency content of these pressure waves is also shown to be responsible for weaker high-frequency variations of the shock movement throughout the cycle. Parallels are also drawn with previous experimental campaigns in order to search for a global understanding of the different observations made. Although various parts of the described interaction are not fully understood yet, and the dataset of experimental measurements compiled is still rather small, a good basis is provided on which to further study the underlying mechanisms of unsteady flows in transonic cascades.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验与数值方法研究跨声速压气机叶栅中激波-边界层相互作用导致的非定常流动，揭示了激波振荡的主要机制：通道内压力波向上游传播并与激波相互作用，引起流动破裂和进气角变化，进而影响叶栅工况。高频压力波导致激波小幅高频振荡。
method: 结合实验测量与数值模拟（TEAMAero跨声速叶栅），分析激波振荡机制，未明确具体工况参数。
innovation: 系统揭示了激波振荡的主机制（通道压力波与激波相互作用），并区分了高频与低频振荡的成因，为理解不同设计中的振荡频率提供基础。
conclusions: 1. 通道内压力波向上游传播与激波相互作用是激波振荡的主因，导致进气角变化。2. 高频压力波引起激波小幅高频振荡。
limitations: 数据集较小，部分相互作用机制尚未完全理解，缺乏定量数据。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机叶栅非定常流动与稳定性相关机制，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: An Optimization Method for Stiffness and Damping Mistuning Identification From Blade Tip Timing Data
abstract: Abstract System identification of dynamic properties is of large interest in the turbomachinery industry to create more accurate computational models and more effective designs. Previous identification techniques are able to accurately capture the blade variability, known as mistuning, in the stiffness as well as the average damping of all the blades. Mistuning is vital to accurately identify and study because the symmetry of the system is broken and can lead to vibration localization and high amplitudes. In this work, a new method is proposed to not only capture the stiffness mistuning values but also the blade-to-blade variability in damping. These damping mistuning values have been shown to have a significant effect on the dynamics of bladed disk systems. Incorporation of the damping mistuning into the computational model can be done utilizing an augmented component mode mistuning (CMM) method with either structural or proportional damping. The mistuning values for this new identification method were compared to a well-established direct method and a previously studied optimization method. Blade responses were then found using a harmonic analysis and the newly identified mistuning values. These blade responses were then compared to experimental tip timing data from full scale rotating experiments. These comparisons show that the new model is able to better reproduce experimental data using computational models that incorporate both stiffness and damping mistuning values.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
Gas Turbine Laboratory, Department of Mechanical and Aeronautical Engineering, The Ohio State University , Columbus, OH 43235
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 提出一种从叶尖定时数据中识别叶片刚度和阻尼失谐的优化方法，通过增广组件模态失谐模型结合结构或比例阻尼，能更准确捕捉叶片间阻尼变化。实验对比表明，新模型能更好地复现全尺寸旋转实验的叶片响应。
method: 数值优化方法，结合增广组件模态失谐模型与谐响应分析，基于全尺寸旋转实验的叶尖定时数据验证。
innovation: 首次同时识别刚度和阻尼失谐，并引入阻尼失谐对叶片盘动力学的影响，提高了计算模型与实验数据的吻合度。
conclusions: 1. 阻尼失谐对叶片盘系统动力学有显著影响。2. 新模型能更准确地复现实验叶尖定时数据。
limitations: 仅针对失谐识别，未涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变等流动问题。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动识别，与转子叶片振动预测解析模型部分相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Optimal impedance of a lined plane surface with inviscid sheared grazing flow
abstract: The presence of sheared grazing flow changes the acoustic absorption of a lined surface. Since acoustic waves are refracted through the boundary layer between the lined surface and the mean flow, the reflection and absorption coefficients are modified by the presence of the boundary layer, and therefore so too is the optimal impedance of the surface. A common simplification is to assume a uniform flow and take into account the refraction in the impedance boundary condition. However, there is still debate in the academic community about what is the appropriate boundary condition. We investigate the optimal impedance of a lined plane surface with an inviscid sheared flow. Optimal impedances are found both using numerical solutions to the Pridmore-Brown equation, which is the exact solution for a sheared parallel flow, and using the convected Helmholtz equation, that assumes a uniform flow, together with different boundary conditions that attempt to model the boundary layer. Results suggest that, for frequencies and Mach number typically found in turbofan aero-engines, boundary layer effects are of great importance at particular angles of incidence. We find the first order asymptotic boundary condition of Brambley (2011) reproduces the same optimal impedance as the Pridmore-Brown equation in most cases. The impact of the velocity profile shape is also investigated, and results suggest the same optimal impedance is expected irrespective of the velocity profile provided the boundary layer displacement thickness is the same.

Universidade Federal de Santa Catarina
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Federal University of Santa Catarina, Florianópolis, 88040-900, SC, Brazil
Mathematics Institute, University of Warwick, Coventry, CV4 7AL, United Kingdom
WMG, University of Warwick, Coventry, CV4 7AL, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 研究带无粘剪切流的衬垫平面最优阻抗，通过求解Pridmore-Brown方程和带不同边界条件的对流Helmholtz方程，发现边界层效应在特定入射角下显著影响最优阻抗，且Brambley (2011)的一阶渐近边界条件能准确再现结果。
method: 数值求解Pridmore-Brown方程（精确剪切流）和对流Helmholtz方程（均匀流加边界层模型），分析频率和马赫数对最优阻抗的影响。
innovation: 系统比较了精确剪切流解与多种边界层近似模型，首次验证Brambley (2011)边界条件在航空发动机典型工况下的准确性。
conclusions: 边界层效应在特定入射角下对最优阻抗影响显著；最优阻抗与速度剖面形状无关，仅取决于边界层位移厚度。
limitations: 仅考虑无粘流和平面衬垫，未涉及三维几何或粘性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究声衬阻抗优化，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但方法可借鉴于叶尖间隙畸变中的声学建模。

title: Resolvent Analysis for Subsonic Compressor With Impedance Boundary Condition Casing Treatment
abstract: Abstract A resolvent analysis framework for the axial compressor is established, and the impedance optimization is achieved based on the resolvent analysis framework for the impedance boundary condition casing treatment. This framework is derived by treating the nonlinearity in the perturbation equations as an unknown forcing, the linear relationship between wall impedance and energy gains is obtained. The validity of this framework is confirmed through experiments on rotating inlet distortion, which captures the most susceptible frequency for the stall points of the compressor. The resolvent analysis framework further confirms that the first-order circumferential mode exhibits the highest energy in the given cases. Subsequently, the proposed impedance optimization method is tested under throttling operating conditions, especially focusing on the first-order circumferential mode. The introduction of a favorable impedance boundary condition notably reduces energy gain within the low-order circumferential mode and in the range of the rotor rotating frequency, particularly in near-stall operating conditions. The energy suppression mechanism of the impedance boundary condition casing treatment is investigated, demonstrating that the impedance boundary condition, with an optimal impedance value, significantly suppresses perturbations compared to the case with the solid wall boundary condition. Lastly, a design method for the impedance boundary condition casing treatment is discussed, offering a reliable theoretical design tool for enhancing the stall margin of axial compressors.

summary_zh: 针对亚声速轴流压气机，建立了基于阻抗边界条件机匣处理的解析分析框架，通过将非线性视为未知强迫力，推导出壁面阻抗与能量增益的线性关系。实验验证了框架对失速点最敏感频率的捕捉能力，发现一阶周向模态能量最高。优化阻抗边界条件可显著抑制低阶周向模态和转子旋转频率范围内的能量增益，尤其在近失速工况。
method: 理论推导（解析分析框架）结合实验验证，工况包括节流运行状态，重点关注一阶周向模态。
innovation: 首次将解析分析框架应用于阻抗边界条件机匣处理的优化设计，建立了壁面阻抗与能量增益的线性关系，为机匣处理提供理论设计工具。
conclusions: 1. 一阶周向模态在给定工况下能量最高；2. 最优阻抗边界条件相比固壁边界条件显著抑制扰动，尤其在近失速工况。
limitations: 仅针对亚声速压气机，未考虑超声速或跨声速工况；实验验证仅针对旋转进气畸变。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，且采用解析分析框架，与用户课题高度契合。

title: Flow Mechanism Study on the Effect of Controllable Speed Casing With Different Axial Starting Points on Transonic Compressor Rotor Stability
abstract: Abstract The controllable speed casing represents an exploring approach to casing technology, designed to enhance the adaptability of casing in compressors under variable working conditions. This paper developed a numerical study into the effects of the axial starting point of the rotatable ring in the controllable speed casing on stability enhancement and performance. Additionally, the study sought to unveil the action mechanism of the rotating casing on various flow elements within the tip passage. The findings indicated that the optimal axial starting point for achieving the most pronounced stability enhancement effect in each rotating speed of the rotatable ring was located at the tip leading edge. In terms of the flow mechanism, the rotation of the rotatable ring was found to enhance the throughflow of the mainstream and the tip vortex, while exacerbating the backflow of the tip leakage flow, which occurred at middle and rear of the tip clearance and had not evolved into tip vortex.
affiliations: Shanghai Dianji University
Shanghai Dianji University School of Mechanical Engineering, , 300 Shuihua Road, Pudong New Area, Shanghai 201306 , China

summary_zh: 本研究通过数值方法探究可控转速机匣中可旋转环的轴向起始位置对跨声速压气机转子稳定性的影响。发现最佳轴向起始点在叶尖前缘，旋转环可增强主流和叶尖涡的通流，但加剧叶尖泄漏流的回流。
method: 数值研究，采用三维CFD模拟，分析不同轴向起始位置和旋转速度下跨声速压气机转子的流动与稳定性。
innovation: 首次系统研究可控转速机匣中可旋转环轴向起始位置对稳定性的影响，揭示了旋转环对叶尖通道内不同流动单元的作用机制。
conclusions: 最佳轴向起始点为叶尖前缘；旋转环增强主流和叶尖涡通流，但加剧叶尖泄漏流回流，该回流发生在叶尖间隙中后部且未发展为叶尖涡。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未考虑非定常效应及多级环境。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦叶尖间隙畸变和机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: On the Performance of Variable-Geometry Ducted E-Fans
abstract: Abstract Electrically driven ducted fans (e-fans), either underwing-mounted or located at the aft-fuselage, can potentially improve the system overall efficiency in hybrid-electric propulsion architectures by increasing their thrust share over the thrust generated by the main engines. However, the low design pressure ratio of such e-fans make them prone to operability issues at off-design conditions, i.e., takeoff, where nozzle pressure ratio is close or below the critical value. This paper investigates the operational limitations of such e-fans, proving the necessity of variable geometry. A component zooming approach is deployed by integrating a streamline curvature method within an aero-engine performance tool to investigate the e-fan installed performance and operability. The concepts of variable pitch fan (VPF) and variable area nozzle (VAN) are systematically explored to quantify any performance benefits, while the unavoidable added-weight challenges due to variable geometry are taken into account. Although e-fans with low design pressure ratio (PR) are more susceptible to operability issues compared to higher PR e-fans, the former show improved overall efficiency levels, mainly dominated by propulsive efficiency. It is found that variable geometry not only tackles operability but it can improve the off-design overall efficiency of e-fans even more. VPF mostly affects the component efficiency by reshaping the e-fan performance maps, while VAN has a greater impact on propulsive efficiency by moving the operating points.

summary_zh: 本文研究了混合电推进系统中电动涵道风扇（e-fan）在非设计工况下的可操作性限制，证明变几何的必要性。采用流线曲率法集成到航空发动机性能工具中，系统探索了变桨距风扇（VPF）和变面积喷管（VAN）的性能收益，并考虑重量代价。发现低设计压比e-fan虽易出现可操作性问题，但整体效率更高，变几何可进一步改善非设计效率。
method: 数值方法：将流线曲率法集成到航空发动机性能工具中，进行组件级缩放分析。工况参数包括起飞等非设计点。
innovation: 系统量化了变桨距风扇和变面积喷管对低设计压比电动涵道风扇性能的影响，并考虑了变几何带来的重量代价。
conclusions: 1. 低设计压比e-fan整体效率更高，主要受推进效率主导。2. 变几何不仅解决可操作性问题，还能进一步提高非设计整体效率。
limitations: 未涉及叶尖间隙、畸变等压气机稳定性问题，且未考虑流固耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及风扇性能与变几何，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或叶尖畸变，与用户研究方向部分相关。

title: Impact of circumferential inlet distortion on different types of stall inceptions in a transonic compressor
abstract: The application of higher bypass ratios and lower pressure ratios significantly reduces specific fuel consumption with the development of turbofan engines. However, it also increases the risk of flow separation at the intake, leading to severe circumferential non-uniform inlet conditions. This study aimed to present an experimental investigation on instability evolutions of the compressor under circumferential non-uniform inlet conditions. Two stall inceptions regarding the different spatial scales and initial locations were selected to investigate this issue. The experiments were carried out on one tested rig, which the stall inceptions verified with the rotational speeds. At 65% design rotational speed (Ω), the stall inception was the spike, which was triggered by disturbances within serval pitches scale at the tip. Consequently, the spike-type stall inception was sensitive to circumferential distortion and led to a shrunk stall margin of the compressor. With the rotational speed increasing to 88%Ω, the stall inception switched to partial surge, which was induced by the flow blockage in the hub region around the full-annular. The results indicated that the partial surge was insusceptible to the circumferential distortion, which caused an extended stall margin with a lower stalled mass flow rate. In summary, the influence of distortion on the stability of the target compressor was found to be determined by the stall inception.

summary_zh: 实验研究了周向进气畸变对跨声速压气机失速起始类型的影响。在65%设计转速下，失速起始为叶尖突尖型，对畸变敏感，导致稳定裕度缩小；在88%设计转速下，失速起始转为部分喘振，由轮毂区堵塞引发，对畸变不敏感，稳定裕度反而扩大。
method: 实验研究，在单台压气机试验台上进行，测量65%和88%设计转速两种工况下的失速起始特征。
innovation: 揭示了周向畸变对不同空间尺度和起始位置的失速起始类型（突尖型与部分喘振）的差异化影响，发现畸变影响由失速起始类型决定。
conclusions: 1. 突尖型失速起始对周向畸变敏感，导致稳定裕度缩小；2. 部分喘振对畸变不敏感，反而使稳定裕度扩大（更低失速流量）。
limitations: 仅针对单台压气机、两种转速和特定畸变形式，未涵盖其他畸变类型或更高转速。
relevance_reason: 直接研究周向进气畸变对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Experimental Investigations on Aeroelastic Stability of Combined Plunge-Pitch Mode Shapes in a Linear Compressor Cascade
abstract: Abstract The effect of mode shape and reduced frequency on the flutter stability of a linear low-speed compressor cascade was investigated experimentally, employing the aerodynamic influence coefficient (AIC) approach. This paper describes in detail the methodology, experimental setup, and measurement techniques. The paper presents experimentally determined influence coefficients, and discusses the findings with regard to the aeroelastic design parameter “plunge-to-twist incidence ratio” (PTIR), which combines reduced frequency and torsion axis setback in an attempt a design variable reduction. The influence of the vibrating blade on itself was always stabilizing, while other blades, mainly the first pressure side neighbor, vibrating at forward-traveling, low nodal diameter inter-blade phase angles (IBPAs), can destabilize the reference blade. As PTIR is increased, the phase of the complex modal force coefficients (AICs) of all blades is decreased, increasing the stabilizing effect of the vibrating blade on itself and overall cascade stability. Within the considered parameter range, the impact of reduced frequency is eliminated to a large extent if the incidence ratio is kept constant, requiring the torsion axis setback to be adjusted accordingly. The findings show that the plunge-to-twist incidence ratio is a meaningful aeroelastic design parameter that can explain the global effect of mode shape on flutter stability and should be considered early in the aeromechanical blade design process to ensure flutter-free blading.

summary_zh: 实验研究了低速线性压气机叶栅中模态形状和折合频率对颤振稳定性的影响，采用气动影响系数法。发现振动叶片自身始终起稳定作用，而相邻叶片在特定相位角下可能失稳。引入“俯仰-扭转入射比”参数，可有效解释模态形状对颤振稳定性的全局影响。
method: 实验方法，采用气动影响系数法，在低速线性压气机叶栅中测量不同模态形状和折合频率下的气动影响系数。
innovation: 提出“俯仰-扭转入射比”作为气动弹性设计参数，综合折合频率和扭转轴偏移，减少设计变量，并验证其有效性。
conclusions: 1. 振动叶片自身始终稳定，而前向传播低节径相位角下的压力面相邻叶片可能失稳。2. 增大PTIR可降低所有叶片模态力系数相位，增强自稳定性和整体稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对低速线性叶栅，未考虑真实发动机中的三维效应和可压缩性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机叶栅颤振稳定性，与用户关注的压气机稳定性及气动弹性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Active Energy Management for Enhanced Engine Transient Operations
abstract: Combat aircraft often require the engine to accelerate as fast as possible in response to the demand of maneuvering. The engine acceleration rate, however, is limited by the compressor surge constraint, which prevents more fuel addition that, otherwise, could provide for higher net shaft torque, and thus, faster acceleration. This paper examines the idea of using the electric starter/generator (ES/G) system to provide additional net shaft torque during this critical phase of acceleration. The idea is examined by simulations using a quasi-one-dimensional dynamic compressor flow model coupled with a lumped combustor–turbine model. A notional single-spool turbojet with a low overall pressure ratio is modeled and simulated. Simulation results suggest that an ES/G, when used as an electric-assist motor during acceleration, can help the engine to accelerate roughly 11, 48, and 70% faster compared to the case without ES/G participation, by using electric power roughly equivalent to 0.1, 1, and 3% of full-speed fuel combustion power, respectively. Furthermore, the respective increase in the acceleration rate leads to an additional 19, 80, and 113% of propulsion impulse, respectively (i.e., thrust integrated over time), during the first 5 s following the acceleration command.

summary_zh: 针对战斗机加速受喘振约束的问题，提出利用电动起动机/发电机提供额外轴扭矩以提升加速性能。通过准一维动态压气机模型与集总燃烧室-涡轮模型仿真，发现使用约0.1%~3%满速燃油功率的电能，可使加速时间缩短11%~70%，并在加速后5秒内增加19%~113%的推进冲量。
method: 数值仿真：准一维动态压气机流动模型耦合集总燃烧室-涡轮模型，模拟单轴低总压比涡喷发动机加速过程。
innovation: 首次提出利用电动起动机/发电机在加速阶段提供额外轴扭矩，以缓解喘振约束，实现更快的加速响应。
conclusions: 1. 使用0.1%~3%满速燃油功率的电能，加速时间缩短11%~70%。2. 加速后5秒内推进冲量增加19%~113%。
limitations: 仅基于低总压比单轴涡喷发动机仿真，未考虑实际发动机复杂几何与三维效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机喘振约束，但主要关注主动能量管理而非叶尖畸变或激盘模型，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Aerodynamic Impact of Secondary Air Injection Flowrates on the Main Annulus Flow Field for a Transonic High-Pressure Turbine Stage
abstract: Abstract In this study, the influence of secondary air blowing on the main annulus flow field of a transonic high-pressure turbine (HPT) was investigated experimentally and numerically. The experimental setup was a single-stage, unshrouded turbine with a blading consistent with modern HPTs. The entire testing campaign was conducted in a full annular, rotating, continuous turbine test rig at the Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency (JAXA), which realized the most faithful matching unrivalled of both the primary and secondary stream similarity parameters to reality. An elaborate secondary air system implemented in the hardware enabled it to mimic all the dominant coolant/purge streams representative of advanced hot sections: the full coverage film-cooling on stator and rotor airfoils, disk wheelspace purge air blown forward and aft of the rotor, and coolant injection through the over-tip casing. Detailed three-dimensional flow field measurements for various secondary air flowrates were performed by traversing a pneumatic thermometric combination probe downstream of the rotor. A complete set of numerical simulations was run concurrently with the testing to determine how well they captured the flow physics, particularly the interaction of the ejected secondary streams with the primary flow. The JAXA in-house code, UPACS, and its best practice settings, based on past verification and validation efforts, were employed and not intentionally tuned to better fit the data. Given the study's primary goal, important features such as coolant holes, internal plenums, and wheelspace cavities that affect the interactions were all directly resolved in the calculation rather than simplified by the boundary conditions and/or source-term modeling. The rotor exit survey in the experiment suggested that the both disk forward hub purge and the blowing from the over-tip casing intensified the passage vortex in the cascade. In contrast, it was indicated that a positive effect also resulted from ejection from the tip casing, diminishing the tip leakage vortex. Additionally, the data suggested that coolant blown off the airfoil has an impact also on the near-endwall zone in particular and can boost (by vane coolant) or weaken (by blade coolant) the secondary flow.

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和数值方法，研究了跨声速高压涡轮级中二次空气喷射流量对主流道流场的影响。实验在JAXA全环旋转连续涡轮试验台上进行，模拟了先进热端部件的冷却/净化流。测量了转子出口三维流场，发现轮毂前缘吹气和叶顶机匣吹气增强了通道涡，而叶顶机匣吹气减弱了叶尖泄漏涡。
method: 实验与数值模拟结合。实验采用全环旋转连续涡轮试验台，测量转子出口三维流场；数值模拟使用JAXA的UPACS代码，直接解析冷却孔、内腔等细节。
innovation: 直接解析了冷却孔、内腔等复杂几何，而非简化边界条件；实现了主次流相似参数的真实匹配。
conclusions: 1. 轮毂前缘吹气和叶顶机匣吹气增强了通道涡。2. 叶顶机匣吹气减弱了叶尖泄漏涡。
limitations: 仅针对特定涡轮级，未考虑不同工况或几何变化的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涡轮二次空气系统，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但涉及叶尖间隙和二次流。

title: Vortex Lattice Method Investigation of Tip-Leakage Flow
abstract: Abstract The use of a vortex lattice method (VLM) is investigated on a tip-leakage flow single-blade configuration (NACA 0012) for a wide range of tip gaps. The aim is to estimate the circulation of the tip-leakage vortex (TLV) detaching from the blade. The evaluation of that circulation without adding viscous effects to the potential method is comparable with the experimental measurements for the largest gaps but requires a diffusive model for the smaller gaps. A new diffusive model is constructed and integrated to the VLM, yielding a very good match with the experiment on the circulation for the whole tip gap range. This result indicates that for thin blades, the development of the TLV can be described in two stages: (i) a potential formation and (ii) a viscous diffusion leading to a decay once the vortex is detached from the blade.

summary_zh: 采用涡格法（VLM）研究NACA 0012单叶片叶尖泄漏流，评估不同叶尖间隙下叶尖泄漏涡（TLV）的环量。对大间隙，无粘势流结果与实验吻合；对小间隙需引入扩散模型。结果表明薄叶片TLV发展分为势流形成和粘性扩散衰减两阶段。
method: 数值方法：涡格法（VLM）结合新构建的扩散模型，研究NACA 0012单叶片，叶尖间隙范围宽。
innovation: 在无粘VLM中集成扩散模型以准确预测小间隙下TLV环量，揭示TLV发展的两阶段机制。
conclusions: 1. 大间隙下无粘VLM可准确预测TLV环量；2. 小间隙下需扩散模型，两阶段模型（势流形成+粘性扩散）与实验吻合。
limitations: 仅针对薄叶片（NACA 0012）和单叶片配置，未考虑多排叶片或旋转效应。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙泄漏涡，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变相关，但未涉及稳定性裕度预测或三维激盘模型。

title: Numerical Analysis of a Novel Casing Treatment in an Axial Flow Fan
abstract: The present paper reports the use of a slotted casing treatment of trapezoidal shape to enhance the stall margin of an axial flow fan. The Taguchi method was used to optimize the rectangular slotted casing treatment based on that which the trapezoidal slots were designed. The unsteady numerical simulations were carried out using the shear-stress-transport turbulence model. The rotor with trapezoidal slots led to the stall margin improvement of 23.4% and mild pressure rise of 0.54%. Without the casing treatment, the tip leakage trajectory was directed from the suction surface of the blade toward the pressure surface of the adjacent blade. After incorporating the trapezoidal slots, the tip leakage trajectory was significantly shifted toward the suction surface of the same blade. This alteration in flow characteristics near the blade-tip region may be attributed to the exchange of momentum due to the simultaneous suction and blowing through the trapezoidal slots. It was also found that the trapezoidal slots improved the axial flow velocity and reduced the diffusion factor in the blade-tip region as compared to the baseline case.
affiliations: Manipal Academy of Higher Education
Manipal Institute of Technology, Manipal Academy of Higher Education
Manipal Institute of Technology, Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal 576 104, India
summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究了一种梯形槽式机匣处理在轴流风扇中的应用，采用Taguchi方法优化矩形槽，进而设计梯形槽。非定常计算使用SST湍流模型，结果表明梯形槽使失速裕度提升23.4%，压力上升0.54%，并改变了叶尖泄漏轨迹，改善了轴向速度和扩散因子。
method: 采用Taguchi方法优化矩形槽，基于此设计梯形槽；使用SST湍流模型进行非定常数值模拟。
innovation: 提出梯形槽式机匣处理，并利用Taguchi方法进行优化设计，相比传统矩形槽有更好的失速裕度改善效果。
conclusions: 梯形槽使失速裕度提升23.4%，压力上升0.54%；叶尖泄漏轨迹从指向相邻叶片压力面变为指向同一叶片吸力面。
limitations: 仅针对特定轴流风扇，未考虑不同转速或进气畸变等工况，且缺乏实验验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及机匣处理对失速裕度的影响，与压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: The Advection Boundary Law in absence of mean flow: Passivity, nonreciprocity and enhanced noise transmission attenuation
abstract: Sound attenuation along a waveguide is intensively studied for applications ranging from heating and air-conditioning ventilation systems, to aircraft turbofan engines. In particular, the new generation of Ultra-High-By-Pass-Ratio turbofan requires higher attenuation at low frequencies, in less space for liner treatment. This demands to go beyond the classical acoustic liner concepts and overcome their limitations. In this paper, we discuss an unconventional boundary operator, called Advection Boundary Law, which can be artificially synthesized by electroactive means, such as Electroacoustic Resonators. This boundary condition entails nonreciprocal propagation, meanwhile enhancing noise transmission attenuation with respect to purely locally-reacting boundaries, along one sense of propagation. Because of its artificial nature though, its acoustical passivity limits are yet to be defined. A thorough numerical study is provided to assess the performances of the Advection Boundary Law, in absence of mean flow. An experimental test-bench validates the numerical outcomes in terms of passivity limits, non-reciprocal propagation and enhanced isolation with respect to local impedance operators. Guidelines are outlined to properly implement the Advection Boundary Law for optimal noise transmission attenuation. Moreover, the tools and criteria provided here can also be employed for the design and characterization of other innovative liners.

summary_zh: 本文研究了一种名为Advection Boundary Law的非传统边界条件，用于无平均流波导中的噪声衰减。通过电声谐振器人工合成，该边界条件实现了非互易传播并增强了单向噪声衰减。数值和实验研究验证了其无源极限、非互易性和优于局部阻抗边界的隔离性能，为新型衬里设计提供了指导。
method: 数值模拟（有限元或模态分析）结合实验测试，研究无平均流条件下Advection Boundary Law的声学性能。
innovation: 提出并验证了一种人工合成的非互易边界条件，在无平均流下实现增强的单向噪声衰减，突破了传统局部反应衬里的限制。
conclusions: Advection Boundary Law在无平均流下表现出非互易传播，且噪声衰减优于局部阻抗边界；实验验证了其无源极限和增强隔离性能。
limitations: 研究仅限于无平均流条件，未考虑实际发动机中的流动效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及噪声衰减和边界条件，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但无直接联系。

title: Aero-propulsion analysis of distributed ducted-fan propulsion based on lifting-line driven body-force model
abstract: As the environmental problems become increasingly serious, distributed electrical propulsion systems with higher aerodynamic efficiency and lower pollution emission have received extensive attention in recent years. The distributed electrical propulsion usually employs the new aero-propulsion integrated configuration. A simulation strategy for internal and external flow coupling based on the combination of lifting line theory and body force method is proposed. The lifting line theory and body force method as source term are embedded into the Navier-Stokes formulation. The lift and drag characteristics of the aero-propulsion coupling configuration are simulated. The results indicate that the coupling configuration has the most obvious lift augmentation at 12° angle of attack, which can provide an 11.11% increase in lift for the airfoil. At 0° angle of attack, the pressure difference on the lip parts provides the thrust component, which results in a lower drag coefficient. Additionally, the failure impact of a ducted fan at the middle or edge on aerodynamics is investigated. For the two failure conditions, the lift of the coupling configuration is decreased significantly by 27.85% and 26.14% respectively, and the lip thrust is decreased by 70.74% and 56.48% respectively.

summary_zh: 针对分布式电推进系统的涵道风扇构型，提出基于升力线理论与体力法耦合的内外流模拟策略，将源项嵌入N-S方程。研究表明在12°攻角下升力提升11.11%，0°攻角下唇口压差提供推力。还分析了中部或边缘风扇失效对气动性能的影响。
method: 数值模拟方法，采用升力线理论与体力法耦合的源项模型嵌入N-S方程，研究攻角范围0°~12°及风扇失效工况。
innovation: 将升力线理论与体力法结合用于分布式涵道风扇推进系统的内外流耦合模拟，并评估了局部风扇失效对整体气动性能的影响。
conclusions: 12°攻角时升力提升11.11%；中部风扇失效导致升力下降27.85%，唇口推力下降70.74%。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型与特定失效位置，未考虑三维效应及非定常流动。
relevance_reason: 涉及体力模型与稳定性裕度间接相关，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或叶尖畸变。

title: Numerical Investigation of Flow Evolution in Centrifugal Compressors During Surge
abstract: Abstract Surge can lead to violent flow fluctuations in the compression system and damage to the blade structures. In this article, a fully three-dimensional numerical model of the centrifugal compressor surge is developed, and the accurate transient flow evolutions in different components during the surge are studied in detail. The results show that in the surge initiation, the pressure distortion caused by the asymmetric geometry of the volute at the diffuser outlet transfers along blade passages to the impeller inlet, which induces two types of stall cells with different rotating speeds and sizes developing independently in two isolated circumferential positions at the impeller inlet. With the surge development, the two types of stall cells come into contact and are mixed, which causes the asymmetric local reverse flow near the casing of the impeller leading edge. Subsequently, the reverse flow extends to the full annuls at the impeller inlet, and the compressor pressure ratio falls abruptly. At the same time, several expansion waves arise in the impeller and travel downstream along the volute and the outlet pipe. As reflected by the nozzle, these expansion waves travel back upstream into the impeller. The findings of this research have great implications for the asymmetric flow control methods, which develop novel asymmetric geometries to counteract the influence of the volute and extend the compressor stable operation range.

summary_zh: 本文通过全三维数值模型研究离心压气机喘振过程中的流动演化。发现喘振起始时，蜗壳不对称几何引起的压力畸变沿叶片通道传递至叶轮进口，诱发两种不同转速和尺寸的失速团独立发展；随后失速团混合导致叶轮进口局部回流，进而扩展至全环，压比骤降。同时叶轮内产生膨胀波，沿蜗壳和出口管向下游传播，经喷嘴反射后返回叶轮。
method: 全三维数值模拟，建立离心压气机喘振模型，分析不同部件在喘振过程中的瞬态流动演化。
innovation: 揭示了蜗壳不对称几何引起的压力畸变在喘振起始中诱发两种独立失速团的新机制，并阐明了膨胀波的产生与传播过程。
conclusions: 1. 蜗壳不对称几何导致两种不同转速和尺寸的失速团在叶轮进口独立发展，混合后引发局部回流并扩展至全环。2. 喘振过程中叶轮内产生膨胀波，沿蜗壳和出口管传播并被喷嘴反射回叶轮。
limitations: 仅针对特定离心压气机几何，未考虑不同蜗壳形状或工况的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气（蜗壳不对称）导致的失速/喘振机理，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Large Eddy Simulation of Laminar and Turbulent Shock/Boundary Layer Interactions in a Transonic Passage
abstract: Abstract Shock/boundary layer interactions (SBLI) are a fundamental fluid mechanics problem relevant in a wide range of applications including transonic rotors in turbomachinery. This paper uses wall-resolved large eddy simulation (LES) to examine the interaction of normal shocks with laminar and turbulent inflow boundary layers in transonic flow. The calculations were performed using GENESIS, a high-order, unstructured LES solver. The geometry created for this study is a transonic passage with a convergent-divergent nozzle that expands the flow to the desired Mach number upstream of the shock and then introduces constant radius curvature to simulate local airfoil camber. The Mach numbers in the divergent section of the transonic passage simulate single-stage commercial fan blades. The results predicted with the LES calculations show significant differences between laminar and turbulent SBLI in terms of shock structure, boundary layer separation and transition, and aerodynamic losses. For laminar flow into the shock, significant flow separation and low-frequency unsteadiness occur, while for turbulent flow into the shock, both the boundary layer loss and the low-frequency unsteadiness are reduced. The time period of the unsteadiness was hypothesized to align with the time it takes for turbulent structures to convect from the shock to the trailing edge and acoustic disturbances to travel back from the trailing edge to the shock, and this is supported by the LES results.

summary_zh: 采用高精度大涡模拟（LES）研究跨声速通道中激波/边界层相互作用（SBLI），对比层流与湍流来流条件。发现层流SBLI导致显著分离和低频非定常性，而湍流SBLI降低损失和非定常性。非定常周期与湍流结构对流及声波反馈时间一致。
method: 壁面解析大涡模拟（LES），使用高精度非结构求解器GENESIS，模拟跨声速收敛-扩张通道，马赫数模拟单级风扇叶片。
innovation: 首次采用壁面解析LES对比层流与湍流来流下的跨声速SBLI，揭示非定常性机制与对流-声反馈回路的关系。
conclusions: 1. 层流SBLI产生大分离和低频非定常性，湍流SBLI显著减小分离和损失。2. 非定常周期由湍流结构从激波到尾缘的对流时间和声波反馈时间决定。
limitations: 仅针对二维通道，未考虑旋转、叶尖间隙等实际压气机三维效应。
relevance_reason: 研究跨声速SBLI非定常性，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Impact of Lean-Burn Combustor Flow on Nozzle Guide Vane Performance
abstract: Abstract In this paper we investigate the impact of lean-burn-representative swirl and temperature distortion on the aerothermal performance of fully-cooled high-pressure nozzle guide vanes (NGVs) from a modern aero-engine. Experiments were carried out in the Engine Component AeroThermal (ECAT) facility at the University of Oxford. This is a fully-annular warm-flow engine parts facility, designed to operate at engine-representative conditions of Reynolds and Mach number. Inlet profiles of swirl, turbulence, and non-dimensional total temperature were generated using a non-reacting combustor simulator. The NGV outlet flow was experimentally characterized at three downstream planes in experiments with and without lean-burn-representative inlet conditions. Area-survey measurements included distributions of whirl angle, kinetic energy (KE) loss, and non-dimensional total temperature. Experimental data is compared to computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations. Fully-featured NGV geometry (including film cooling holes and internal passages) was used, to account for internal cooling flow redistribution resulting from altered external loading. We show that lean-burn inlet conditions result in significant surface flow redistribution, relatively high levels of residual swirl in the downstream flow, and a small increase of integrated KE loss.

summary_zh: 本文实验研究了贫燃燃烧室旋流和温度畸变对全冷高压导叶气动热性能的影响。在牛津大学环形部件试验台上，采用非反应燃烧室模拟器生成入口剖面，测量了出口流场并与CFD对比。结果表明，贫燃入口条件导致表面流动再分布、下游残余旋流增加及积分动能损失小幅上升。
method: 实验在环形全温部件试验台进行，采用非反应燃烧室模拟器生成旋流、湍流和总温剖面，测量出口三个平面的旋流角、动能损失和总温，并与CFD对比。
innovation: 在发动机真实几何（含气膜孔和内通道）条件下，系统研究了贫燃燃烧室旋流和温度畸变对全冷高压导叶气动热性能的影响。
conclusions: 1. 贫燃入口条件引起显著的表面流动再分布和下游残余旋流。2. 积分动能损失小幅增加。
limitations: 仅针对单一工况和特定几何，未考虑燃烧室化学反应及叶片振动影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气对导叶性能的影响，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Design Optimization of a Novel Flush Boundary Layer Diverter
abstract: Abstract A novel boundary layer diverter is designed and optimized for increasing the performance of a typical semi-submerged inlet ingesting large amounts of boundary layer flow. A conceptual diverter configuration based on the prior optimization study is first parametrized with seven design variables. A response surface model is constructed for the pressure recovery at the aerodynamic interface plane (AIP). The flow fields over the diverter and through the inlet duct are computed with SU2 and a baseline diverter is constructed from the response surface model for maximum pressure recovery. The baseline diverter is then placed in a free-form deformation box and shape optimized using the adjoint solver of SU2 with hundreds of design parameters. The optimum configuration provides 2.4% and 7.93% increase in the pressure recovery and the mass flow rate, respectively, together with a significant reduction in flow distortion. The novel diverter is then shape optimized together with the inlet duct. Together with all the performance parameters, the pressure recovery is improved by more than 3%. It is shown that the novel boundary layer diverter by being flush to the inlet surface induces a much smaller drag compared to the conventional diverters.

summary_zh: 针对半埋入式进气道吞入大量附面层的问题，设计并优化了一种新型齐平式附面层隔道。采用七参数响应面模型和伴随求解器进行形状优化，使总压恢复提高2.4%，流量增加7.93%，畸变显著降低，且阻力小于传统隔道。
method: 数值优化方法，基于SU2求解器进行RANS计算，结合响应面模型和伴随法形状优化。
innovation: 提出齐平式附面层隔道概念，通过伴随优化实现与进气道一体化设计，在提升性能的同时大幅降低阻力。
conclusions: 优化后总压恢复提高2.4%，流量增加7.93%，畸变显著降低；与进气道联合优化使总压恢复提升超3%。
limitations: 仅针对特定半埋入式进气道构型，未考虑非定常效应及实际飞行条件。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气优化，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙或稳定裕度。

title: Using Machine Learning Tools for Rotating Stall Warning in a Contra-Rotating Compressor
abstract: Abstract This paper takes a low-speed axial contra-rotating compressor as the experimental object, and the sensor array is used to collect the pressure sequences in stall conditions for different speed configurations. These pressure data sets are then preprocessed to train the neural networks. A self-learning stall threshold method based on kernel density estimation (KDE) is utilized to obtain the alarm thresholds. By utilizing the best-performing long short-term memory (LSTM) model to predict the stall initiation time for 15 speed configurations with different stall characteristics, the results show that the model can provide early warning before stall for 11 speed configurations. For the rest four speed configurations, the stall initiation time predicted by LSTM is unsatisfactory. To overcome the poor generalizability of LSTM, a convolutional neural network (CNN) combined with LSTM (CNN–LSTM) stall warning method is developed. The stall warning results indicate that the CNN–LSTM has a better capability in fitting the nonlinear pressure stall data and issues warnings before a stall occurs for all speed configurations. By comparing the pressure time series predicted by LSTM and CNN–LSTM, it is obvious that the CNN–LSTM is more sensitive to perturbations than before stall occurs.

summary_zh: 以低速轴流对转压气机为对象，利用传感器阵列采集不同转速配置下的失速压力序列，预处理后训练神经网络。基于核密度估计的自学习失速阈值方法获取报警阈值，LSTM模型对11种转速配置提供失速预警，CNN-LSTM模型对所有15种配置均能提前预警，且对扰动更敏感。
method: 实验方法，采集低速轴流对转压气机不同转速配置下的失速压力序列，采用LSTM和CNN-LSTM神经网络进行预测。
innovation: 提出CNN-LSTM组合模型用于旋转失速预警，相比单一LSTM模型具有更好的泛化能力和对扰动的敏感性。
conclusions: LSTM模型对11/15种转速配置提供失速预警；CNN-LSTM模型对所有15种配置均能提前预警，且对失速前扰动更敏感。
limitations: 仅针对低速对转压气机，未涉及高速或跨音速压气机；未考虑叶尖间隙畸变等复杂流动。
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转失速预警，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Experimental Research Into Aeroelastic Phenomena in Turbine Rotor Blades Inside ARIAS EU Project
abstract: Abstract This paper describes an aeroelastic experimental campaign on a low-pressure turbine-bladed rotor in a rotating wind tunnel that took place as a part of the Advanced Research Into Aeromechanical Solutions (ARIAS) EU project. The campaign can be considered a continuation of the free-flutter test that was performed as part of the FUTURE EU project, where the saturation of asynchronous vibrations due to dry friction was characterized. This new campaign studied new aspects of the physics behind saturated flutter, including the non-linear interaction between synchronous excitation and asynchronous vibration, the effectiveness of different mistuning patterns to suppress flutter, and the viability of under-platform dampers as a technology to control the amplitude of asynchronous vibrations. Furthermore, the campaign explored various operation conditions for the turbine rotor, including near-stall. In general, there was a good agreement between the theoretical predictions regarding all these different aspects of turbine flutter and the test results.

summary_zh: 本文介绍了ARIAS欧盟项目中低压涡轮转子叶片的气动弹性实验，在旋转风洞中研究了饱和颤振的非线性物理机制，包括同步激励与非同步振动的相互作用、失谐模式抑制颤振的效果以及平台下阻尼器控制异步振动幅值的可行性，并探索了近失速等工况，实验结果与理论预测吻合良好。
method: 实验研究，在旋转风洞中进行低压涡轮转子叶片气动弹性测试，涵盖多种工况（包括近失速）。
innovation: 揭示了饱和颤振中同步与非同步振动的非线性相互作用，系统评估了不同失谐模式和平台下阻尼器对颤振抑制的效果。
conclusions: 1. 干摩擦导致非同步振动饱和现象得到验证；2. 不同失谐模式和平台下阻尼器能有效抑制颤振，理论预测与实验吻合。
limitations: 仅针对低压涡轮转子，未涉及高压压气机或叶尖间隙畸变等复杂因素。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振，与用户研究方向（压气机稳定性、非同步振动）部分相关，但聚焦涡轮而非压气机。

title: Stall Warning and Adaptive Control Subjected to Rotating Inlet Distortion in Axial Flow Compressor
abstract: Abstract Adaptive stability control is experimentally implemented in a single-stage axial flow compressor subjected to rotating inlet distortion. Stall margin variations are examined as a function of the distorted area and rotational speed. A critical minimum value is identified when the distorted sector rotates at 0.5 times the rotor speed (P0.5RS), which remains independent of the size of the distorted area and induced frequency. Unsteady pressure measurements indicate that with the rotating inlet distortion at P0.5RS, the circumferentially propagating speed of the stall cell-induced downstream of the distorted region closely matches the rotational speed of the distorted sector, which causes the stall cell to undergo repeated cycles of generation, circumferential propagation, decay, and re-generation, ultimately leading to premature deep stall as the disturbance energy accumulates. In addition, tip air injection can suppress the repeated periodic disturbance energy accumulation, thereby delaying stall. Based on successful verification of the early stall warning under rotating inlet distortion through cross-correlation analysis, an adaptive stability control strategy is devised to sense the stall warning signal in real time and feed back the signal to control the injected valve once the alarm line is triggering. Even under the rotating distorted inflow at P0.5RS, the stall margin can be improved online by more than 10% while reducing the injected energy by 80% compared with that corresponding to steady injection. It provides insights for mitigating the adverse effects of rotating distortion on the compressor performance in multispool aero-engines.

summary_zh: 实验研究单级轴流压气机在旋转进气畸变下的失速预警与自适应控制。发现畸变扇区以0.5倍转子转速旋转时失速裕度最小，失速团经历生成-传播-衰减-再生循环。采用叶尖喷气抑制扰动能量积累，基于互相关分析实现早期失速预警，自适应控制策略在P0.5RS下提升失速裕度超10%，同时减少80%喷气能量。
method: 实验方法，单级轴流压气机，旋转进气畸变（畸变扇区转速为0.5倍转子转速），叶尖喷气，互相关分析。
innovation: 首次揭示旋转畸变下失速团循环再生机制，并基于互相关分析实现自适应稳定性控制，大幅降低喷气能量需求。
conclusions: 1. 畸变扇区以0.5倍转子转速旋转时失速裕度最小，失速团循环再生导致提前深度失速。2. 自适应控制可在线提升失速裕度超10%，喷气能量减少80%。
limitations: 单级压气机实验，未考虑多级效应及实际发动机工况。
relevance_reason: 核心研究旋转畸变下的失速裕度预测与控制，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Unsteady Interaction Between Purge Flow and Secondary Flow in High-Lift Low-Pressure Turbine
abstract: Abstract The coupling effect between the complex vortex system and the rim purge flow in the endwall region of a high-lift low-pressure turbine (LPT) will significantly influence the evolution of secondary flow and the corresponding losses. This article focused on the unsteady interaction mechanism between the rim purge flow and the secondary flow inside the high-lift LPT under the periodic wake passing. The large eddy simulation (LES) method was used to reveal the influence mechanism of rim purge flow, rotor–stator cavity interaction, and unsteady wakes on the secondary flow. Detailed experimental measurement was carried out for the flow field of high-lift LPT under the influences of static purge flow. The results showed that the rim purge flow significantly increased the overturning and underturning downstream of the endwall region, resulting in aggravating secondary loss. The rotating-rim increased the difference of the circumferential velocity between the mainstream and the purge flow, aggravating the Kelvin–Helmholtz (K–H) instability, inducing the K–H vortex structure with stronger energy amplitude, and further increasing the endwall flow loss. The incoming wakes weakened the energy amplitude of the K–H vortex at the rim purge outlet, and thinned the thickness of the low-energy fluid at the blade leading edge. In addition, the interaction between the wakes and the secondary vortices further suppressed the development of the secondary flow. Nevertheless, the incoming wakes caused additional mixing losses and made a negative impact on the overall aerodynamic performance of the high-lift LPT.

summary_zh: 本文采用大涡模拟（LES）和实验测量，研究了高升力低压涡轮中轮缘净化流与二次流的非定常相互作用。结果表明，净化流加剧了端壁区域的过转和欠转，增强了开尔文-亥姆霍兹不稳定性，增加了二次流损失；来流尾迹抑制了二次流发展但增加了掺混损失。
method: 大涡模拟（LES）数值方法结合静态净化流下的详细实验测量，研究周期性尾迹通过时轮缘净化流与二次流的非定常相互作用。
innovation: 揭示了轮缘净化流与旋转轮缘对K-H不稳定性的增强机制，以及来流尾迹对K-H涡能量幅度的削弱作用。
conclusions: 轮缘净化流显著增加端壁下游过转和欠转，加剧二次流损失；来流尾迹削弱K-H涡能量幅度，但增加掺混损失。
limitations: 仅针对高升力低压涡轮，未涉及压气机或叶尖间隙畸变等工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及二次流和端壁流动，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Aerodynamic Stability Enhancement of a SCO2 Centrifugal Compressor by Riblets of the Shroud
abstract: Abstract Aerodynamic stability enhancement is crucial for the stable operation of supercritical carbon dioxide (SCO2) centrifugal compressors. This paper investigates the mechanism of aerodynamic instability of shrouded SCO2 compressors and accordingly proposes a new method for stability enhancement via the casing treatment in terms of shroud riblets. First, the experimentally validated computational fluid dynamic (CFD) method is employed to investigate the flow mechanism of the compressor under near-surge condition. The significant backflow phenomena within the impeller were revealed. Further analysis indicated that the imbalance of the Coriolis force and pressure gradient in blade-to-blade direction pushed the low-momentum fluid toward the shroud suction side. Additionally, higher Reynolds number resulted in thinner SCO2 boundary layer at the inlet near end-wall, increasing passage vorticity and further intensifying the aggregation of low-energy fluid on the shroud suction side. Based on the flow mechanisms, the streamwise riblets on shroud were designed to impede the migration of low-energy fluid. The CFD results revealed that under low-flow condition, riblets inhibit the formation of inducer vortices and backflow, thereby enhancing impeller aerodynamic stability and reducing the surge mass-flowrate. Further research indicated that riblets obstruct the migration of low-energy fluid toward shroud suction side, reducing the accumulation of low-energy fluid and blockage, thereby increasing the flow area and aerodynamic stability. Moreover, additional riblets wake and friction losses contributed to the deterioration of compressor performance at middle/large mass-flowrate conditions. Specifically, riblets reduced the flow area between blades at near choke mass-flowrate, leading to more pronounced shock structures and compressor earlier choke.

Tsinghua University
School of Vehicle and Mobility, State Key Laboratory of Intelligent Green Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University , Beijing 100084, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对超临界二氧化碳离心压气机，通过实验验证的CFD方法揭示了近喘振工况下叶轮内回流及低能流体在机匣吸力侧聚集的失稳机理，并设计了机匣肋条以抑制低能流体迁移，从而增强气动稳定性，降低喘振流量。
method: 采用实验验证的CFD方法，研究近喘振工况（低流量）及中/大流量工况，分析流场及稳定性。
innovation: 首次提出在机匣上应用流向肋条作为处理手段，针对超临界二氧化碳离心压气机，通过抑制低能流体迁移来增强稳定性。
conclusions: 肋条抑制诱导涡和回流，降低喘振质量流量；但中/大流量下肋条尾迹和摩擦损失导致性能下降，近堵塞时肋条减小流道面积加剧激波结构。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未考虑肋条几何参数优化及长期运行效果。
relevance_reason: 涉及机匣处理增强稳定性，与叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测间接相关，但非直接针对叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Non-synchronous vibration of rotor blade in a six-stage transonic compressor
abstract: This paper presents an experimental study on the Non-Synchronous Vibration (NSV) in a six-stage transonic compressor. The first part of the paper describes the NSV phenomenon of Rotor 1, which occurs when both Stator 1(S1) and Stator 2(S2) or S1 only are closed. Detailed measurements and analysis are carried out for the former case through the unsteady wall pressure and the Blade Strain (BS). The spinning mode theory used in the rotor/stator interaction noise is employed to explain the relation between the circumferential wave number of the aerodynamic disturbance and the Nodal Diameter (ND) of the blade vibration. The variations of the vibration amplitudes of different blades and the Inter-Blade Phase Angles (IBPAs) at different moments suggest that the evolution of NSV is a highly nonuniform phenomenon along the circumferential direction. In addition, the difference between the wall-pressure spectra generated by the NSV and the classic flutter has been discussed. In the second part, the variations of aerodynamic loading due to the adjustment of the staggers of the Inlet Guide Vane (IGV), S1 and S2 have been investigated. It is found that closing S1 only can result in a great fluctuation to the performance of the front stages, which might be detrimental to the flow organization and increase the risk of NSV. In contrast, the effect of closing S2 only on the performance of the first two stages appears to be slighter relatively.
affiliations: Beihang University
Aeroengine Research Institute, Beihang University, Beijing 102206, China
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 102206, China
summary_zh: 本文实验研究六级跨音压气机转子1的非同步振动（NSV），发现当静叶S1和S2或仅S1关闭时出现NSV。通过壁面脉动压力和叶片应变测量，应用旋转模态理论解释气动扰动周向波数与叶片振动节径的关系。NSV沿周向高度非均匀，且与经典颤振的壁压谱不同。关闭S1显著影响前两级性能，增加NSV风险；仅关闭S2影响较小。
method: 实验研究，测量六级跨音压气机转子1的壁面脉动压力和叶片应变，分析不同静叶关闭组合下的NSV现象。
innovation: 首次在六级跨音压气机中详细实验研究NSV，揭示其周向非均匀演化特性，并区分NSV与经典颤振的壁压谱差异。
conclusions: 1. NSV沿周向高度非均匀，叶片振动幅值和叶间相位角随时间变化。2. 关闭S1导致前两级性能大幅波动，增加NSV风险；关闭S2影响较小。
limitations: 仅针对特定六级压气机，未涉及其他级数或几何参数的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦于压气机非同步振动，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测课题相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Unsteady Aerodynamic Forcing Due to Distortion in a Boundary Layer Ingesting Fan
abstract: Abstract Boundary Layer Ingestion (BLI) is a concept with the potential to reduce energy consumption needed for aircraft propulsion. For the fan this results in a need to work well in an environment of increased continuous distortion. The objective of this study is to increase the understanding of unsteady aerodynamic forces due to total pressure distortion in a BLI fan. This is done by using computational fluid dynamics to analyze a fan design intended for a BLI installation. Results include low subsonic to transonic operating speeds and distortion in a wide range of wave numbers. The forcing exhibits a significant dependency on the aeroacoustic cut-on/cut-off condition. This is in particular true at part speed where the normalized unsteady force rises sharply before dropping suddenly as the corrected speed or engine order increases. Unsteady pressure in the blade passage is observed to exhibit the same increase in level followed by a sudden drop once the cut-on limit is passed and undamped pressure waves propagating out from the blade row appear. The unsteady forces on the first three modes exhibit different sensitivities to the distortion wavelength but all are affected by the acoustic condition. By comparing results for the reference fan to a similar fan design with a higher blade count the cascade properties of the blade row are found to dominate the interaction. A result of this is that a higher blade count fan may be less affected by the distortion, and be less prone to propagate noise due to low engine order distortion.

summary_zh: 本研究通过CFD分析边界层吸入风扇中总压畸变引起的非定常气动力，涵盖低亚音速到跨音速工况及宽波数畸变。发现气动力显著依赖于声学截止/传播条件，尤其在部分转速下归一化非定常力随转速或阶次增加先升后降。叶片排的级联特性主导相互作用，高叶片数风扇受畸变影响较小。
method: 采用计算流体动力学（CFD）分析BLI风扇设计，涵盖低亚音速到跨音速工况及宽波数畸变范围。
innovation: 揭示了声学截止/传播条件对畸变诱导非定常气动力的关键影响，并发现高叶片数可降低畸变敏感性和噪声传播。
conclusions: 非定常力在声学截止点附近急剧变化；高叶片数风扇可减轻畸变影响并抑制低阶畸变噪声传播。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；仅考虑总压畸变，未涉及温度或涡量畸变。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦于畸变进气下的非定常气动力，与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度预测高度相关，且涉及三维激盘模型可借鉴的声学截止效应。

title: Numerical Study of Transonic Buffet on SC(2)-0518 and OAT15A with Vortex Generators
abstract: Predicting the transonic buffet and its onset is important for ascertaining the performance limits of an aircraft at its critical angle of attack. Additionally, a physical understanding of the buffet suppression technique is important for preventing shock wave oscillations. In this study, we conducted zonal detached-eddy simulations to numerically investigate the effects of vortex generators (VGs) on buffet suppression and to discuss the differing flow characteristics of the SC(2)-0518 and OAT15A supercritical airfoils when the chordwise position of the VGs is varied. The results for both airfoils equipped with VGs demonstrated significant suppression of large-scale lift oscillations across all calculation steps. VGs placed at 10% of the chord ([Formula: see text]) from the leading edge produced higher time-averaged lift coefficients for both airfoils, with the OAT15A airfoil showing a particularly notable 2.5% improvement in lift coefficient, leading to a 0.82% increase in [Formula: see text] ratio. The visualized results indicated that the interaction between the shock wave and VGs leads to variations in the separation point, depending on the VG chordwise position. This separation is affected by the aerodynamic characteristics of the airfoil shapes and the wake induced by the VGs, ultimately resulting in changes to the lift coefficient.

summary_zh: 采用分区脱体涡模拟方法，研究了涡流发生器对SC(2)-0518和OAT15A超临界翼型跨声速抖振的抑制效果。结果表明，涡流发生器能显著抑制大尺度升力振荡，且位于10%弦长位置时效果最佳，OAT15A翼型升力系数提升2.5%，升阻比增加0.82%。
method: 数值模拟（分区脱体涡模拟），研究涡流发生器在不同弦向位置（10%弦长等）对两种超临界翼型的影响。
innovation: 系统比较了涡流发生器在不同弦向位置对两种翼型抖振抑制效果的差异，揭示了激波与涡流发生器相互作用导致分离点变化的机理。
conclusions: 涡流发生器可有效抑制跨声速抖振；位于10%弦长时，OAT15A翼型升力系数提升2.5%，升阻比增加0.82%。
limitations: 仅针对两种特定翼型，未考虑三维机翼或实际飞行条件的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究跨声速抖振抑制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非直接针对压气机。

title: Stability analysis of multi-insert rotating boring bar with stiffness variation
abstract: Manufacturing faces challenges in boring processes, critical for hole enlargement and finishing, due to low stiffness leading to static deflection and regenerative chatter. Stiffness variation has emerged as a promising solution for effectively suppressing chatter, while multi-insert rotating boring bars offer a viable approach to addressing static deflection in long and slender boring bars, enabling better tolerance with a large operational length-to-diameter ratio. However, integrating technological innovations to suppress chatter and prevent static deflection complicates the problem from a modeling and stability analysis perspective, making it challenging to find a comprehensive solution in the existing literature. This study explores the stability of multi-insert rotating boring bars with stiffness variation, providing insights into selecting optimal stiffness variation parameters. It introduces a novel extension of the multi-dimensional cutting force model to rotating boring tools with multiple inserts, employing the zero-order harmonic solution to analyze the stability of boring processes with time-varying dynamics. Experimental validation demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed methodology, achieving 5 out of 6 matches in stability lobe diagrams for multi-insert rotating boring bars without stiffness variation. The model’s comprehensiveness is further demonstrated by comparing the results with those of existing studies in the literature for single-insert stationary boring bars. In the case without stiffness variation, the model successfully reproduces 4 out of 5 operating points, and with stiffness variation, it accurately predicts all 5 operating points. Sensitivity analyses guide the selection of optimal stiffness variation parameters for effective chatter suppression, favoring moderate frequencies and up to a 30% amplitude ratio.

summary_zh: 本研究针对多刀片旋转镗杆的稳定性问题，提出了一种结合刚度变化与多刀片切削力模型的稳定性分析方法。通过零阶谐波解分析时变动力学下的切削稳定性，实验验证了模型的有效性，并给出了最优刚度变化参数（频率适中、振幅比≤30%）。
method: 采用零阶谐波解对多刀片旋转镗杆的时变动力学进行稳定性分析，并通过实验验证稳定性叶瓣图。
innovation: 将多维切削力模型扩展到旋转多刀片刀具，并引入刚度变化以抑制颤振，提供了参数选择指南。
conclusions: 刚度变化可有效抑制颤振，最优参数为中等频率和≤30%振幅比；模型在无刚度变化时匹配5/6个稳定性点，有刚度变化时准确预测全部5个点。
limitations: 研究仅针对旋转镗杆，未涉及压气机叶片等旋转机械部件，且未考虑气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及旋转机械的稳定性与振动控制，但对象为镗杆而非压气机，与压气机稳定性方向部分相关。

title: Friction damping for turbomachinery: A comprehensive review of modelling, design strategies, and testing capabilities
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of recent advancements in modelling approaches, design strategies, and testing techniques applied to friction damping in turbomachinery. It critically evaluates experimental testing, design processes, and optimisation studies, along with the latest developments in numerical modelling techniques. The review begins with an overview of vibration mitigation methods and the historical development of friction dampers for bladed disk systems. Subsequent sections explore research efforts aimed at enhancing numerical and simulation modelling capabilities, encompassing contact friction models, reduced-order modelling methods, and numerical solvers suitable for real-world applications and industrial high-fidelity models. The paper also delves into available testing rigs for experimental validation and characterisation of various friction damper types, as well as the literature on uncertainty quantification in friction damping. It concludes by highlighting recent trends in novel concepts, modelling techniques, and testing technologies shaping the design of next-generation friction dampers.

summary_zh: 本文综述了涡轮机械摩擦阻尼的最新进展，涵盖建模方法、设计策略和测试技术。重点评估了实验测试、设计优化及数值建模（包括接触摩擦模型、降阶模型和求解器），并讨论了不确定性量化。最后指出了下一代摩擦阻尼器的新概念和趋势。
method: 综述性研究，基于文献调研，涵盖数值建模（接触摩擦模型、降阶模型）、实验测试（多种阻尼器试验台）和设计优化方法。
innovation: 系统整合了摩擦阻尼的建模、设计和测试全链条，特别强调了不确定性量化和工业高保真模型的应用。
conclusions: 1. 摩擦阻尼是涡轮机械叶片减振的有效手段，降阶模型可显著提高计算效率。2. 不确定性量化对阻尼器设计可靠性至关重要。
limitations: 未提供具体定量数据，且综述范围限于摩擦阻尼，未涉及其他阻尼机制。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动控制，但主要关注摩擦阻尼而非压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: An Open–Closed Flow Separation in a Compressor Radial Diffuser
abstract: Abstract Large eddy simulations (LES) results are used to track flow separation zones in a splittered vaned radial diffuser near the compressor best efficiency at high rotation speed. The topology analysis reveals some closed separations at the corner of the blade and hub or shroud surface. In addition, an open–closed flow separation at the main blade pressure side is observed for the first time. The surface separation has the shape of a sheet at the blade mid-span, and the associated separation line is delimited only at its downstream extremity by a trailing edge node. This flow separation process is robust to a small shift in operating condition, and the separation surface remains essentially unchanged. A large flowrate variation converts the open–closed separation into a more classic closed separation. The evolution in time of the separation surface is also observed, and the authors conclude to the unsteady existence of the open–closed separation.

summary_zh: 采用大涡模拟（LES）研究高速离心压气机带分流叶片的径向扩压器内流动分离，发现叶片与轮毂/机匣角区存在闭式分离，首次观察到主叶片压力面开-闭式分离，该分离呈片状且对工况偏移不敏感，大流量变化时转为闭式分离。
method: 数值方法（LES），工况为压缩机最高效率点附近高转速，并进行了流量偏移和变化。
innovation: 首次发现并详细描述了径向扩压器叶片压力面的开-闭式流动分离结构，并验证其对工况变化的鲁棒性。
conclusions: 开-闭式分离在叶片中跨呈片状，分离线仅下游端由尾缘节点界定；该分离对小幅工况偏移鲁棒，大幅流量变化时转变为闭式分离。
limitations: 仅基于LES结果，缺乏实验验证；仅针对单一几何和转速。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机流动分离与稳定性相关机理，但对象为径向扩压器而非轴流压气机，与用户叶尖畸变和激盘模型方向部分相关。

title: Application of Numerical Bifurcation Tracking Strategy to Blade-Tip/Casing Interactions in Aircraft Engines
abstract: Abstract Building on the regularized-Lanczos harmonic balance method (RL-HBM), a previously developed frequency method, this paper presents a numerical bifurcation tracking strategy dedicated to high-dimensional nonlinear mechanical systems. In order to demonstrate its applicability to industrial applications, it is here used to obtain original results in the context of blade-tip/casing interactions in aircraft engines. The emphasis is put specifically on the tracking of predicted limit point (LP) bifurcations as key parameters—such as the amplitude of the aerodynamic forcing applied on the blade, the friction coefficient or the operating clearances—vary. Overall, presented results underline that the employed frequency method is well-suited to tackle the numerical challenges inherent to such computations on high-dimensional systems. For the mechanical system of interest, the industrial fan blade National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) rotor 67, it is shown that the application of the presented strategy yields an efficient way to identify isolated branches of solutions, which may be of critical importance from a design standpoint.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
Département de génie mécanique, École Polytechnique de Montréal , Montréal, QC H3T 1J4, Canada
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文基于正则化Lanczos谐波平衡法（RL-HBM）提出一种数值分岔跟踪策略，用于高维非线性机械系统。以NASA Rotor 67风扇叶片为对象，研究叶尖/机匣相互作用，跟踪极限点分岔随气动力、摩擦系数和间隙的变化，有效识别孤立解分支，对设计具有重要意义。
method: 数值方法：采用RL-HBM频率法进行分岔跟踪，研究叶片气动力、摩擦系数和运行间隙等参数变化对极限点分岔的影响。
innovation: 将数值分岔跟踪策略应用于航空发动机叶尖/机匣相互作用的高维非线性系统，实现孤立解分支的高效识别。
conclusions: 1. 所提频率方法适用于高维系统数值挑战；2. 能有效识别孤立解分支，对设计至关重要。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇叶片（NASA Rotor 67），未考虑其他叶片或实际发动机工况。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙与机匣相互作用，涉及稳定性分析，与用户课题相关。

title: Prediction and Analysis of Transient Turbine Tip Clearance Using Long Short-Term Memory Neural Network
abstract: Abstract The transient turbine tip clearance (δ) throughout the engine process is crucial to modern high-performance aero engines. However, there is still a lack of efficient and accurate transient prediction models of tip clearances with active thermal control (ATC) system, especially for the tip clearances of the complex turbine structures with various parameters. This study develops a transient prediction model for the tradeoff between computational efficiency and accuracy, which includes an offline dataset generation process and an online δ prediction process. The offline dataset is first generated using an in-house finite element analysis code, which is validated against a transient tip clearance experiment, and data splicing and sensitivity analysis are applied to enrich the sample features and reduce the input parameters' dimensionality. Then, the long short-term memory neural network (LSTM) is employed to learn the transient tip clearances' timing information. The time consumption for the transient prediction model is significantly shorter than that for the tip clearance calculation method by three orders, and the maximum relative error is as low as 3.59%. In addition, the transient characteristics, including the overshoot value (σ) and the response time (ts), are investigated with different jet Reynolds numbers (Rec) and temperatures (Tfc) of ATC cooling flow. The ts decreases with larger Rec and smaller Tfc due to a more significant cooling effect. However, the σ increases with the increase of Rec and Tfc due to the different sensitivity of cooling parameters. This study provides a reference for the transient tip clearance prediction and the adjustments in the cooling strategies.

summary_zh: 本研究针对航空发动机涡轮叶尖间隙瞬态预测难题，提出基于长短期记忆神经网络（LSTM）的预测模型，结合有限元离线数据集生成与在线预测，计算效率提升三个数量级，最大相对误差3.59%。分析了主动热控制冷却射流雷诺数和温度对瞬态特性的影响。
method: 数值方法：采用有限元代码生成离线数据集，结合数据拼接与敏感性分析降维，利用LSTM学习时序信息。工况参数包括不同射流雷诺数和温度。
innovation: 首次将LSTM应用于涡轮叶尖间隙瞬态预测，实现高效高精度预测，并系统分析了主动热控制冷却参数对瞬态特性的影响。
conclusions: LSTM模型预测最大相对误差3.59%，计算时间比传统方法缩短三个数量级；响应时间随雷诺数增大和温度降低而减小，超调量随两者增大而增大。
limitations: 研究仅针对涡轮叶尖间隙，未涉及压气机；模型依赖离线数据集质量，可能未考虑实际发动机复杂工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙预测，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变相关，但对象为涡轮而非压气机，且未涉及稳定性分析。

title: An improved deviation model for transonic stages in axial compressors
abstract: Deviation model is an important model for through-flow analysis in axial compressors. Theoretical analysis in classical deviation models is developed under the assumption of one-dimensional flow, which is controlled by the continuity equation. To consider three-dimensional characteristics in transonic flow, this study proposes an improved theoretical analysis method combining force analysis of the blade-to-blade flow with conventional analysis of the continuity equation. Influences of shock structures on transverse force, streamwise velocity and streamline curvature in the blade-to-blade flow are analyzed, and support the analytical modelling of density flow ratio between inlet and outlet conditions. Thus, a novel deviation model for transonic stages in axial compressors is proposed in this paper. The empirical coefficients are corrected based on the experimental data of a linear cascade, and the prediction accuracy is validated with the experimental data of a three-stage transonic compressor. The novel model provides accurate predictions for meridional flow fields at the design point and performance curves at design speed, and shows obvious improvements on classical models by Carter and Çetin.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Department of Energy and Power Engineering, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
China United Gas Turbine Technology Co. Ltd., Beijing 102209, China
summary_zh: 针对跨声速轴流压气机级，提出一种改进的偏差角模型，结合叶片间流体力分析与连续性方程，考虑激波结构对横向力、流向速度和流线曲率的影响，基于线性叶栅实验数据修正经验系数，并通过三级跨声速压气机实验验证，在设计点和设计转速下性能预测精度优于Carter和Çetin经典模型。
method: 理论分析结合实验验证：基于力分析与连续性方程的三维理论建模，线性叶栅实验数据修正系数，三级跨声速压气机实验验证。
innovation: 将经典一维偏差角模型扩展至三维，通过引入激波结构对叶片间流动力的影响，建立密度流量比解析模型，显著提升跨声速级预测精度。
conclusions: 1. 新模型在设计点对子午流场和设计转速性能曲线的预测精度优于Carter和Çetin模型。2. 激波结构对横向力和流线曲率的影响是跨声速偏差角建模的关键。
limitations: 模型依赖线性叶栅实验数据修正，可能未涵盖真实压气机复杂几何与工况。
relevance_reason: 该研究涉及压气机通流建模与稳定性裕度预测，与叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测课题相关，但未直接针对畸变或激盘模型。

title: Investigation of control effects of end-wall self-adaptive jet on three-dimensional corner separation of a highly loaded compressor cascade
abstract: To overcome the limitations posed by three-dimensional corner separation, this paper proposes a novel flow control technology known as passive End-Wall (EW) self-adaptive jet. Two single EW slotted schemes (EWS1 and EWS2), alongside a combined (COM) scheme featuring double EW slots, were investigated. The results reveal that the EW slot, driven by pressure differentials between the pressure and suction sides, can generate an adaptive jet with escalating velocity as the operational load increases. This high-speed jet effectively re-excites the local low-energy fluid, thereby mitigating the corner separation. Notably, the EWS1 slot, positioned near the blade leading edge, exhibits relatively low jet velocities at negative incidence angles, causing jet separation and exacerbating the corner separation. Besides, the EWS2 slot is close to the blade trailing edge, resulting in massive low-energy fluid accumulating and separating before the slot outlet at positive incidence angles. In contrast, the COM scheme emerges as the most effective solution for comprehensive corner separation control. It can significantly reduce the total pressure loss and improve the static pressure coefficient for the ORI blade at 0°-4° incidence angles, while causing minimal negative impact on the aerodynamic performance at negative incidence angles. Therefore, the corner stall is delayed, and the available incidence angle range is broadened from −10°-−2° to −10°-4°.This holds substantial promise for advancing the aerodynamic performance, operational stability, and load capacity of future highly loaded compressors.

summary_zh: 针对高负荷压气机叶栅三维角区分离，提出被动端壁自适应射流控制技术。研究了两种单槽和一种双槽组合方案，发现组合方案在0°-4°攻角下显著降低总压损失、提高静压系数，将可用攻角范围从-10°~-2°拓宽至-10°~4°，延迟角区失速。
method: 数值模拟方法，研究端壁开槽被动射流控制，工况包括-10°至4°攻角范围，基于压力面与吸力面压差驱动射流。
innovation: 提出利用端壁槽道自适应射流被动控制角区分离，无需外部能量输入，且组合槽方案在宽攻角范围内有效。
conclusions: 组合槽方案在0°-4°攻角下总压损失显著降低，静压系数提高；可用攻角范围从-10°~-2°拓宽至-10°~4°。
limitations: 仅针对亚音速叶栅，未考虑旋转效应及真实压气机级间相互作用。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机叶栅角区分离控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定性预测模型。

title: Transonic Compressor Darmstadt Open Test Case: Experimental Investigation of Stator Secondary Flows and Hub Leakage
abstract: Abstract The future trend of clean sky aviation has led to a smaller core engine, resulting in highly loaded stages with increased relative tip gaps and leakage flows, which causes a reinforced influence of secondary flow phenomena. This article experimentally investigates the secondary flow effects in the 3D-optimized shrouded stator of the TUDa-GLR-OpenStage, representative of a transonic high-pressure compressor front stage, and its susceptibility to typical hub leakage flows. The impact of stator hub leakage on efficiency and total pressure ratio is investigated for several operating speeds, from subsonic to nominal transonic operating conditions. Steady five-hole probe and time-resolved virtual multi-hole probe measurements at different operating conditions at nominal speed are conducted to investigate the underlying loss mechanisms. The leakage mass flow is determined using the measured pressure difference within the fin seal. Steady results show that the optimized 3D stator effectively suppresses the hub corner separation compared to the predecessor 2D stator, but its performance is further limited by a near-tip separation. With the increased stator hub leakage (at a leakage-to-main flow ratio of about 0.4%), the compressor isentropic efficiency generally drops (by about −0.5%) at the full operating range due to an enhanced hub corner separation effect. However, the increased leakage also helps alleviate the tip-corner separation when operating near stall, leading to a smaller efficiency penalty under these conditions. Unsteady results reveal the sensitivity of transient compressor performance to the passing rotor wake, but limited interaction between this phenomenon and the increased leakage is observed. These findings provide insight into the stator hub leakage-related penalties on the compressor aerodynamics efficiency.

summary_zh: 本文实验研究了跨声速压气机静子二次流及轮毂泄漏的影响。采用三维优化静子有效抑制角区分离，但近叶尖分离限制性能。轮毂泄漏增加（泄漏比约0.4%）使全工况等熵效率下降约0.5%，但近失速时缓解叶尖角区分离，减小效率损失。非定常结果揭示了转子尾迹的影响。
method: 实验研究：稳态五孔探针和时间分辨虚拟多孔探针测量，在亚声速至额定跨声速工况下进行，泄漏流量通过鳍密封压差确定。
innovation: 首次在跨声速压气机中实验研究三维优化静子对轮毂泄漏的敏感性，并揭示泄漏对近失速工况的有利影响。
conclusions: 1. 轮毂泄漏增加（泄漏比0.4%）使全工况等熵效率下降约0.5%。2. 近失速时泄漏缓解叶尖角区分离，减小效率损失。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机前级静子，未考虑转子-静子相互作用对泄漏的详细影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙和泄漏流动，但主要关注静子二次流，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测间接相关。

title: The Role of Turbulence Transport in Mechanical Energy Budgets
abstract: Abstract In this article, we study the role of turbulence transport on loss prediction using high fidelity scale-resolving simulations. For this purpose, we use eight high-fidelity simulation datasets and compute flux of entropy and stagnation pressure transport equation budgets for all the cases. We find that under certain unsteady inflow conditions, the stagnation pressure coefficient is not a reliable loss metric even at low Mach number conditions. This is due to the turbulence transport terms. The impact of these terms, typically assumed to be negligible, made stagnation pressure loss coefficient underpredict loss from 0% to over 40% when compared to entropy loss coefficient for cases considered here. This effect was most pronounced for the cases with highly unsteady inflow conditions and at low Reynolds numbers.
