summary_zh: 本文通过八组高保真尺度解析模拟数据集，研究了湍流输运对机械能预算中损失预测的影响。发现非定常来流条件下，滞止压力系数作为损失指标不可靠，湍流输运项导致损失低估最高达40%以上。
method: 数值模拟，采用高保真尺度解析模拟（如LES或DNS），涵盖八组不同工况，包括非定常来流和低雷诺数条件。
innovation: 首次系统量化湍流输运项在机械能预算中的影响，揭示其在非定常来流下对损失预测的关键作用，挑战了传统忽略假设。
conclusions: 1. 非定常来流下滞止压力系数不可靠，湍流输运项导致损失低估0%至40%以上。2. 低雷诺数下效应最显著。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；工况范围有限，未涵盖高马赫数或旋转机械。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及湍流输运和损失预测，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接针对叶尖间隙或畸变。

title: Attenuation of Inlet Distortion Effects on Fans Using Asymmetric Inlet Guide Vanes
abstract: Abstract This research proposes and preliminarily analyzes a novel concept to passively reduce the negative impact of deep inlet distortion on the fan of an aero-engine. It consists of placing a row of non-axisymmetric inlet guide vanes (IGVs) just upstream of the fan rotor to induce a spatially varying swirl distribution. The swirl distribution is tailored so as to reduce flow incidence in the distorted flow region and increase it in the undistorted flow region to decrease the fluctuation in aerodynamic force on the fan blades under large inlet distortion that can lead to blade failure, as well as attenuate the negative effect of flow non-uniformity on fan/engine aerodynamic performance. A computational study is carried out on a high-speed (transonic) fan rotor (NASA Rotor 67) from a published distortion study using full-annulus unsteady 3D computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations. The asymmetric IGV is designed through a process of manual iterations and CFD simulations to take into account the change in flow redistribution with IGV geometry. The asymmetric IGV design, though not optimized, reduces the aerodynamic force variation amplitude by around two-thirds. Moreover, it allows the fan to recover over half of the loss in total pressure rise due to inlet distortion. The asymmetric IGV is also able to reduce the total pressure distortion at the fan rotor exit. Spanwise analysis indicates that the effectiveness of the asymmetric IGV can be improved on all three metrics if better 3D IGV shaping is performed.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
École Polytechnique de Montréal Department of Mechanical Engineering, , 2900 Boulevard Édouard-Montpetit, 2500 chemin de Polytechnique , Montreal, QC H3T 1J4, Canada
summary_zh: 提出非轴对称进口导叶（IGV）概念，通过诱导周向变化旋流来减弱深进气畸变对风扇的负面影响。基于NASA Rotor 67的全环非定常三维CFD模拟，手动迭代设计IGV。结果表明，非轴对称IGV使气动力波动幅度降低约三分之二，恢复总压升损失的一半以上，并减小出口总压畸变。
method: 全环非定常三维CFD数值模拟，研究对象为高速跨声速风扇转子NASA Rotor 67，采用手动迭代设计非轴对称IGV。
innovation: 提出非轴对称IGV被动控制概念，通过定制旋流分布来均衡畸变与非畸变区的气流攻角，从而减小叶片气动力波动和性能损失。
conclusions: 非轴对称IGV使气动力波动幅度降低约三分之二，恢复总压升损失的一半以上，并减小出口总压畸变。
limitations: IGV设计未优化，仅基于手动迭代；未考虑三维IGV型面改进的潜力。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及进气畸变对风扇的影响及被动控制方法，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: An Improved Body Force Model to Simulate Blade Loading Variation Under Various Operating Conditions in Transonic Axial Flow Compressor
abstract: Abstract In order to analyze the unsteady aerodynamic response of compressors with limited computational resources, the development of the body force (BF) model has been pursued for decades. This model can simulate the effects of the compressor blade on the flow by applying a three-dimensional (3D) force field. Indeed, the accuracy of the BF model simulation highly depends on the construction strategy of BF field. However, for a transonic compressor, the influence of shock waves on the spatial distribution of blade loading is significant, which makes the construction of an appropriate BF field challenging. To solve this issue, an accurate BF model is proposed to describe the effects of the blade on the flow with high spatial fidelity in transonic compressors. For verification, a typical transonic fan rotor, NASA-Rotor 67, is selected. The numerical results calculated by the new BF model are compared with those obtained by the Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solver. According to the results, the new model can accurately capture the distribution of blade loading in the transonic blade channel at various operating conditions, eventually leading to a good prediction of compressor performance and the radial distribution of flow parameters downstream of the rotor. Moreover, this study discusses the causes of modeling errors and presents the application of the model in inlet distortion simulation at the end.

summary_zh: 针对跨声速压气机中激波对叶片载荷空间分布影响显著的问题，提出一种改进的体力模型，通过高空间保真度描述叶片对流场的作用。以NASA-Rotor 67为验证对象，新模型能准确捕捉不同工况下跨声速叶栅的载荷分布，并良好预测性能及下游径向参数。
method: 数值方法，采用改进的体力模型模拟跨声速压气机叶片载荷，以NASA-Rotor 67为对象，与RANS结果对比验证。
innovation: 提出一种高空间保真度的体力模型，能够准确描述跨声速压气机中激波对叶片载荷空间分布的影响，优于传统体力模型。
conclusions: 新模型能准确捕捉跨声速叶栅在不同工况下的载荷分布，并良好预测压气机性能及下游径向参数。
limitations: 模型误差原因讨论有限，且仅针对单个转子验证，未涉及多级或畸变进气下的复杂效应。
relevance_reason: 该体力模型可用于叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，与用户课题直接相关。

title: A New Axial Compressor Test Facility for the Investigation of Aerodynamic Damping Featuring an Electromagnetic Excitation System
abstract: Abstract Aerodynamic damping simulations involving detailed computational fluid dynamics (CFD) models are nowadays an integral part of turbomachinery design processes, thanks to advancements made in simulation tools and in computer hardware over the last decades. However, the test cases available in the open literature suitable for the validation and continued development of simulation tools is rather limited. On this background, a new test facility is introduced that allows acquiring relevant and high-quality aerodynamic damping test data on axial compressor rotor test objects in a controlled manner. The test facility is built as a closed loop and thus enables operation at variable pressure levels ranging from near-vacuum to overpressure and with different operating media. Overall damping test data are acquired at controlled synchronous and nonsynchronous vibration conditions. While vibrations of the blades at controlled nonsynchronous vibration conditions can be introduced in the test facility by means of a proprietary electromagnetic excitation system that is acting below the hub line, vibrations at controlled synchronous conditions can be introduced from a set of magnets integrated into the casing. Great care has been spent to create a clean test case without any intruding parts or openings in the test section. In addition, an axial compressor blisk is presented, which acts as test object to show the capabilities of the test facility as well as to allow for detailed investigations of aerodynamic damping. While the first part of the article discusses the setup and the instrumentation of the test facility to excite and measure blade vibration in a nonintrusive way, flow-field measurements and the validation accompanying steady-state Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) simulations are shown in the second part. The third part of the article focuses on aerodynamic damping measurements for seven different modes at three different pressure levels in total. It can be shown that aerodynamic damping is by far the largest contributor to the overall damping.
affiliations: University of Stuttgart
University of Stuttgart ITSM Institute of Thermal Turbomachinery and Machinery Laboratory, , Stuttgart 70569 , Germany
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型轴流压气机试验台，用于研究气动阻尼。该试验台采用闭环设计，可在不同压力水平和介质下运行，通过电磁激振系统在轮毂下方引入非同步振动，并通过机匣内磁铁引入同步振动。以整体叶盘为对象，测量了七个模态在三个压力水平下的气动阻尼，发现气动阻尼是总阻尼的主要贡献者。
method: 实验研究，采用闭环试验台，电磁激振系统（轮毂下方）和机匣磁铁分别激励非同步和同步振动，结合稳态RANS模拟验证。
innovation: 开发了非侵入式电磁激振系统，可在轮毂下方激励叶片振动，且试验段无侵入部件，提供高质量气动阻尼验证数据。
conclusions: 气动阻尼是总阻尼的最大贡献者；在三个压力水平下测量了七个模态的气动阻尼，验证了试验台能力。
limitations: 仅针对单个整体叶盘转子，未考虑多级或机匣处理等复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及非同步振动和气动阻尼测量，与用户研究方向（非同步振动、气动弹性）相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Characterizing the Unsteady Flow Field in Low-Flow Turbine Operation
abstract: Abstract Current operational considerations require steam turbines to operate in a more flexible way, with more frequent and faster start-up and an increasing part-load operation. For very low mass flowrates, the interaction of highly separated flow with the high-speed rotor blades causes windage flow. This type of flow is characterized by increased temperature and highly unsteady flow, which forms vortex structures that rotate at a fraction of the rotor speed. If their magnitude is sufficiently high and the frequency is close to the blade eigenfrequency, non-synchronous vibration (NSV) can be induced. In this paper, low-flow turbine operation is investigated using a three-stage turbine rig that features an instrumentation concept focused on capturing aerodynamic and aeroelastic phenomena. Extensive steady probe, unsteady pressure, and tip-timing measurements are utilized. The experimental scope covers a wide range of operating points in terms of rotational speed and mass flowrates. Low-flow regimes are detected by a reversal in torque and increase in temperature. Unsteady measurements during transient operation identified large-scale vortical flow structures rotating along the circumference, so-called rotating instabilities (RIs). The onset, growth, and breakdown regimes of RI are characterized for different low-flow conditions. The quantitative characteristics of RI with regard to nodal diameter and rotational speed are derived by a cross-correlation of multiple unsteady sensors. The blade vibration measurements show a moderate structural response from unsteady aerodynamic excitation, indicating no significant NSV occurring in the present experimental setup. Later in the study, an acoustic excitation system has been applied to trigger a locked-in NSV without interrupting the coherent flow structures. From that, significant blade response has been observed, revealing a high degree of mistuning and damping of the rotor blading.

MTU Aero Engines (Germany)
MTU Aero Engines (Germany) Institute of Turbomachinery and Fluid Dynamics, , 30823 Garbsen , Germany
summary_zh: 本研究通过三阶段涡轮实验，利用稳态探针、非稳态压力和叶尖定时测量，研究了低流量工况下的非定常流场。发现旋转不稳定性（RI）在低流量条件下形成，并通过声激励系统触发了锁定非同步振动（NSV），揭示了叶片失谐和阻尼特性。
method: 实验研究，采用三阶段涡轮试验台，结合稳态探针、非稳态压力传感器和叶尖定时测量，覆盖不同转速和质量流量工况。
innovation: 通过声激励系统主动触发锁定NSV，在不干扰相干流结构的情况下研究叶片响应，并定量表征RI的节径和转速特性。
conclusions: 低流量下出现旋转不稳定性（RI），其频率为转子转速的分数；声激励可触发锁定NSV，叶片响应显示高失谐和阻尼。
limitations: 实验未观察到显著NSV，可能受限于特定几何或工况范围。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转不稳定性（RI）和非同步振动（NSV），与压气机稳定性及气动弹性相关，但研究对象为涡轮而非压气机。

title: Complicated flow in tip flow field of a compressor tandem cascade using delayed detached eddy simulation
abstract: The complex flow characteristics in the tip region of a tandem cascade with tip clearance have been calculated and analyzed using Delayed Detached Eddy Simulation (DDES). The coherent mechanism of the vortex structures near the blade tip was discussed, and the unsteady behaviors and features in the tip flow field were analyzed. Additionally, the interaction between the tip leakage flow and the gap jet was revealed. The results show that, compared to the datum cascade, the blade tip load of the rear blade increases while that of the front blade decreases. Unsteady fluctuations of the tandem cascade are mainly caused by the interaction between the tip leakage flow and gap jet, and by the mixing of the vortex structures, but there is no essential change in the spectrum feature of the tip leakage flow. Finally, a detailed analysis of the development of vortices in the tip region is conducted by the topological structures of the flow field. Combined with the three-dimensional vortex structures, the schematic diagram of the vortex system of the datum single-row cascade and tandem cascade is summarized.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
School of Power and Energy, Northwestern Polytechnical University, Xi’an 710129, China
Taihang Laboratory, Chengdu 610000, China
School of Power and Energy, Northwestern Polytechnical University, Xi'an 710129, China
summary_zh: 采用延迟分离涡模拟（DDES）研究了带叶尖间隙的串列叶栅叶尖区域复杂流动特性，揭示了叶尖泄漏涡与间隙射流的相互作用机制，分析了非定常行为及涡结构发展。结果表明，与基准叶栅相比，后叶叶尖载荷增加而前叶减小，非定常波动主要由泄漏流与射流相互作用及涡混合引起，但频谱特征无本质变化。
method: 数值模拟（DDES），研究对象为带叶尖间隙的串列叶栅，分析了叶尖间隙流场及涡结构。
innovation: 首次采用DDES方法详细分析串列叶栅叶尖区域的涡系结构及泄漏流与间隙射流的相互作用，并总结了涡系示意图。
conclusions: 1. 串列叶栅后叶叶尖载荷增加，前叶减小。2. 非定常波动主要由泄漏流与射流相互作用及涡混合引起，频谱特征不变。
limitations: 仅针对特定串列叶栅几何，未考虑不同间隙尺寸或工况的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙流动与泄漏涡，与压气机稳定性及叶尖畸变相关，但未直接涉及稳定裕度预测或三维激盘模型。

title: An improved high-fidelity adaptive model for integrated inlet-engine-nozzle based on mechanism-data fusion
abstract: Nowadays, there has been an increasing focus on integrated flight propulsion control and the inlet-exhaust design for the aero-propulsion system. Traditional component-level models are inadequate due to installed performance deviations and mismatches between the real engine and the model, failing to meet the accuracy requirements of supersonic conditions. This paper establishes a quasi-one-dimensional model for the inlet-exhaust system and conducts experimental calibration. Additionally, a mechanism-data fusion adaptive modeling scheme using an Extreme Learning Machine based on the Salp Swarm Algorithm (SSA-ELM) is proposed. The study reveals the inlet model's efficacy in reflecting installed performance, flow matching, and mitigating pressure distortion, while the nozzle model accurately predicts flow coefficients and thrust coefficients, and identifies various operational states. The model's output closely aligns with typical experimental parameters. By combining offline optimization and online adaptive correction, the mechanism-data fusion adaptive model substantially reduces output errors during regular flights and varying levels of degradation, and effectively handles gradual degradation within a single flight cycle. Notably, the mechanism-data fusion adaptive model holistically addresses total pressure errors within the inlet-exhaust system and normal shock location correction. This approach significantly curbs performance deviations in supersonic conditions. For example, at Ma = 2.0, the system error impressively drops from 34.17% to merely 6.54%, while errors for other flight conditions consistently stay below the 2.95% threshold. These findings underscore the clear superiority of the proposed method.
affiliations: Dalian University of Technology
Key Laboratory of Intelligent Control and Optimization for Industrial Equipment, Ministry of Education, Dalian University of Technology, Dalian 116024, China
School of Control Science and Engineering, Dalian University of Technology, Dalian 116024, China
summary_zh: 针对超音速条件下进气道-发动机-喷管集成系统，提出基于SSA-ELM的机理-数据融合自适应模型。通过准一维进排气模型和实验标定，结合离线优化与在线修正，显著降低总压误差，在Ma=2.0时系统误差从34.17%降至6.54%。
method: 数值建模与实验标定结合，采用准一维进排气模型和SSA-ELM自适应算法，工况涵盖Ma=2.0等超音速条件。
innovation: 提出机理-数据融合自适应建模方案，利用SSA-ELM在线修正，综合处理进排气系统总压误差和正激波位置校正。
conclusions: 1. 机理-数据融合模型在Ma=2.0时系统误差从34.17%降至6.54%；2. 其他飞行条件误差持续低于2.95%。
limitations: 仅针对超音速条件，未涉及压气机内部流动稳定性及叶尖间隙等细节。
relevance_reason: 涉及进气畸变和模型修正，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: On the Origin of “Rotating Instabilities”—Stability and Frequency Studies of Channel Flows
abstract: Abstract A group of unsteady flow phenomena in turbomachinery is often referred to as “rotating instabilities.” They occur at flow conditions with very asymmetric velocity profiles, as found downstream of blade rows in axial compressors with large rotor tip clearance in stable operating points close to compressor stall or off-design operating points in steam turbines. In the present work, it is shown that such instabilities do not depend on the blading but also occur in blading-free flow channels. The theoretical proof is carried out with the tools and computational programs of spatial stability theory and Reynolds number dependent jumps in the transverse wavelengths at characteristic perturbation frequencies of the present asymmetric turbulent channel flow are discovered. Experimental investigations in a straight flow channel confirm the calculated frequency field and other characteristics of the perturbations. In agreement to theoretical results, a very asymmetric velocity profile across the channel height was found to trigger disturbances within a limited range of frequencies and not bound to the existence of blading. The notion of rotating instability is misleading in the characterization of this disturbance.
affiliations: TU Dresden
Technische Universität Dresden Chair of Turbomachinery and Flight Propulsion, Institute of Fluid Mechanics, , Dresden D-01062 , Germany
summary_zh: 本文研究旋转不稳定性（RI）的起源，发现其并非依赖于叶片，而是在无叶片的流动通道中也能出现。通过空间稳定性理论和实验，证明非对称湍流通道流动在特定频率下会触发扰动，且扰动频率与横向波长存在雷诺数相关的跳跃。
method: 采用空间稳定性理论数值计算与直通道实验验证，研究非对称湍流通道流动的稳定性及扰动频率特性。
innovation: 首次证明旋转不稳定性不依赖于叶片，可在无叶片通道中由非对称速度剖面触发，挑战了传统认知。
conclusions: 1. 旋转不稳定性可在无叶片通道中发生，由非对称速度剖面触发。2. 扰动频率与横向波长存在雷诺数相关的跳跃。
limitations: 仅针对简单直通道流动，未考虑真实压气机叶片排及旋转效应。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 直接研究旋转不稳定性（RI）的起源，与用户关注的压气机稳定性及叶尖间隙畸变相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙具体影响。

title: Deep reinforcement learning based active surge control for aeroengine compressors
abstract: This study proposes an active surge control method based on deep reinforcement learning to ensure the stability of compressors when adhering to the pressure rise command across the wide operating range of an aeroengine. Initially, the study establishes the compressor dynamic model with uncertainties, disturbances, and Close-Coupled Valve (CCV) actuator delay. Building upon this foundation, a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) is defined to facilitate active surge control. To address the issue of unobservability, a nonlinear state observer is designed using a finite-time high-order sliding mode. Furthermore, an Improved Soft Actor-Critic (ISAC) algorithm is developed, incorporating prioritized experience replay and adaptive temperature parameter techniques, to strike a balance between exploration and convergence during training. In addition, reasonable observation variables, error-segmented reward functions, and random initialization of model parameters are employed to enhance the robustness and generalization capability. Finally, to assess the effectiveness of the proposed method, numerical simulations are conducted, and it is compared with the fuzzy adaptive backstepping method and Second-Order Sliding Mode Control (SOSMC) method. The simulation results demonstrate that the deep reinforcement learning based controller outperforms other methods in both tracking accuracy and robustness. Consequently, the proposed active surge controller can effectively ensure stable operation of compressors in the high-pressure-ratio and high-efficiency region.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
College of Energy and Power Engineering, Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Nanjing 210016, China
Fuzhou University
School of Mechanical Engineering and Automation, Fuzhou University, Fuzhou 350108, China
summary_zh: 本研究提出基于深度强化学习的航空发动机压气机主动喘振控制方法，建立含不确定性、扰动和CCV执行器延迟的动态模型，定义部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，设计有限时间高阶滑模状态观测器，并开发改进的SAC算法。数值仿真表明，该方法在跟踪精度和鲁棒性上优于模糊自适应反步法和二阶滑模控制，可确保压气机在高压比高效区稳定运行。
method: 数值仿真方法，基于压气机动态模型（含不确定性和CCV延迟），采用深度强化学习（ISAC算法）和有限时间高阶滑模观测器。
innovation: 将深度强化学习（改进SAC算法）应用于压气机主动喘振控制，结合优先经验回放和自适应温度参数，并设计误差分段奖励函数和随机初始化以增强鲁棒性。
conclusions: 1. 基于深度强化学习的主动喘振控制器在跟踪精度和鲁棒性上优于模糊自适应反步法和二阶滑模控制。2. 该方法能有效确保压气机在高压比高效区稳定运行。
limitations: 仅通过数值仿真验证，未考虑实际发动机实验中的复杂因素，如传感器噪声和硬件限制。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定性控制，但未直接聚焦叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题方向部分相关。

title: Vibration Characteristics Investigation of Hard-Coated Mistuned Blisk With Multipackets by Lumped Parameter Model
abstract: Abstract To improve the performance and reduce the vibration of the mistuned blisk, a novel approach combining hard-coating and multipackets is presented. First, the dynamical models of the blisk without hard-coating and multipackets, the hard-coated mistuned blisk without multipackets, and the hard-coated mistuned blisk with multipackets are established based on the lumped parameter model (LPM). Then, the solved results are compared with those previous literature to validate the feasibility and correctness of the proposed models. Furthermore, the characteristics of the natural frequencies and the vibration responses for the mistuned blisk is investigated by proposed LPMs. Finally, the effect of the hard-coating and multipackets on the vibration characteristics for the mistuned blisk are discussed. The obtained results manifest that the vibration response of the mistuned blisk can be further suppressed when the hard-coating and the multipackets are considered simultaneously compared with only the hard-coating or multipackets considered, which provides useful guidance on the vibration reduction for the mistuned blisk.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种结合硬涂层和多包段的失谐叶盘振动抑制方法。基于集中参数模型建立了三种动力学模型，验证了模型正确性。研究了硬涂层和多包段对失谐叶盘固有频率和振动响应的影响。结果表明，同时采用硬涂层和多包段能进一步抑制振动响应，为失谐叶盘减振提供了指导。
method: 采用集中参数模型（LPM）进行数值建模，对比文献验证模型，分析硬涂层和多包段参数对振动特性的影响。
innovation: 首次将硬涂层与多包段结合应用于失谐叶盘振动抑制，并建立相应的集中参数动力学模型。
conclusions: 1. 同时考虑硬涂层和多包段比单独使用能更有效抑制失谐叶盘的振动响应。2. 硬涂层和多包段对固有频率和振动响应有显著影响。
limitations: 研究基于集中参数模型，未考虑实际叶片三维几何和流固耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子叶片振动抑制，但未涉及压气机气动稳定性或叶尖间隙等核心方向。

title: A novel rotor dynamic balancing method based on blade tip clearance measurement without the once per revolution sensor
abstract: The existence of the aeroengine casing, limited monitoring points, and multi-fault characteristics make obtaining the rotor’s vibration transmission characteristics challenging, resulting in difficulties accurately identifying the rotor unbalance. This paper utilizes a high-frequency composite sensor to monitor the engine’s blade tip clearance (BTC) and extracts unbalanced information from BTC signals for rotor dynamic balancing, while avoiding the need for the once per revolution (OPR) sensor. First, the vibration characteristics of the rotor-blade system under multi-fault conditions are investigated. Then, based on BTC measurement, a none OPR method and an unbalance identification method are proposed, in which the radial vibration of the blade tip in the BTC signals at different speeds is extracted and operated in the time domain to obtain the rotor unbalanced vibration, the signal is reconstructed, and cross-correlation analysis is used to accurately identify the magnitude and phase of the unbalanced signal. Finally, a rotor test bench is utilized for experimental verification. The results reveal that the dynamic balancing method based on the BTC signal can more precisely identify the rotor unbalance than the traditional rotor dynamic balancing method. The application of this technique will effectively improve engine health management and fault prediction.
affiliations: Beijing University of Chemical Technology
Key Lab of Engine Health Monitoring-Control and Networking of Ministry of Education, Beijing University of Chemical Technology, Beijing 100029, China
State Key Laboratory of High-end Compressor and System Technology, Beijing University of Chemical Technology, Beijing 100029, China
summary_zh: 提出一种基于叶尖间隙测量且无需每转传感器的新型转子动平衡方法。通过高频复合传感器提取BTC信号中的不平衡信息，利用时域处理和互相关分析识别不平衡幅值和相位。实验验证表明该方法比传统方法更精确，有助于发动机健康管理。
method: 实验方法，利用高频复合传感器测量叶尖间隙，通过时域信号处理和互相关分析识别转子不平衡。
innovation: 无需每转传感器，仅基于叶尖间隙信号实现动平衡，避免了传统方法对OPR传感器的依赖。
conclusions: 基于BTC信号的动平衡方法能更精确识别转子不平衡；该技术可有效改善发动机健康管理和故障预测。
limitations: 仅针对转子不平衡故障，未考虑其他多故障耦合情况；实验台架与实际发动机环境存在差异。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙测量和转子振动控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Inlet Guide Vane Stagger Effects on Multistage Compressor Performance and Stall Inception
abstract: The effects of variable inlet guide vanes on compressors have been evaluated throughout the turbomachinery industry for decades. These vanes improve both the performance and stability of a machine—the extent to which is highly dependent on the individual machine and the conditions of operation. Evaluating their effects on compressor stall inception via experimental investigations can inform model development and validation since commonly used RANS and URANS tools face limitations in accurately predicting and modeling stall events. The current literature on variable inlet guide vane restaggering, however, is dominated by numerical investigations. This study offers a unique experimental investigation into restaggering effects on compressor stall behavior by evaluating experimental results from different variable inlet guide vane stagger angles in a high-pressure axial compressor. Previous investigations have shown that variable inlet guide vane restaggering may change the stall inception mechanism of axial flow compressors. This investigation found a distinct change in the stage matching of the machine without altering the stall inception mechanism, further demonstrating the need for experimental investigations to inform the specific effects that restaggering inlet guide vanes offers comparable compressors.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验探究了可调进口导叶（IGV）在不同安装角下对高压轴流压气机性能和失速起始的影响。发现IGV重新安装角改变了级间匹配，但未改变失速起始机制，强调了实验研究对模型验证的重要性。
method: 实验研究，通过改变高压轴流压气机进口导叶安装角，测量不同角度下的性能和失速行为。
innovation: 提供了独特的实验数据，揭示了IGV重新安装角对失速起始机制的影响，弥补了现有数值研究的不足。
conclusions: 1. IGV重新安装角改变了级间匹配，但未改变失速起始机制。2. 实验研究对于理解IGV对压气机稳定性的具体影响至关重要。
limitations: 仅针对特定高压压气机，未涵盖不同压气机类型或宽工况范围。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及失速起始机制和稳定性，与压气机稳定性分析相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Experimental Investigation on the Aerodynamic Instability Process of a High-Speed Axial-Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract Aerodynamic instability plays an important role in compressor design and may cause performance degradation and fatigue damage. In this paper, an experimental study on the evolution of aerodynamic instability is carried out on a compressor that combines the performance benefits of an axial stage and centrifugal stage. The spatiotemporal characteristics of unsteady wall pressure were obtained using fast-responding pressure transducers over a range of operating conditions. The results show that the axial stage works on the positive slope of the performance characteristic curve from choke to stall at low-speed operating conditions, and mainly features rotating instability. Rotating stall is also observed in the impeller (IMP) and diffuser passages. At medium-speed operating conditions, the centrifugal stage suffers a high-frequency mild surge, alternating with rotating stall. With the increase in back pressure, the mild surge diminishes, and rotating stall persists. This behavior is similar to a two-regime-surge, which has been reported for centrifugal compressors. At high-speed operating conditions, the compressor directly reaches surge without other instabilities. Further analysis of the spatial pattern of the rotating stall revealed the existence of a high-pressure region near the volute tongue, resulting in obvious pressure distortion along the circumferential direction at the volute inlet. This induced the amplitude difference of stall cells in corresponding diffuser passages. The disturbance caused by stall cells propagates upstream through the blade passage, and the largest pressure disturbance induced by the stall cell propagation appears in a circumferential position 45 deg downstream of the volute tongue at the impeller inlet and the axial stage inlet.

Xi'an Jiaotong University
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Xi'an Jiaotong University , Xi'an 710049, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 对一台高速轴流-离心组合压气机进行实验研究，通过快速响应压力传感器测量非稳态壁面压力，分析不同转速下气动失稳的演化过程。结果表明：低速时轴流级以旋转不稳定性为主；中速时离心级出现高频轻度喘振与旋转失速交替；高速时直接进入喘振。失速团在蜗舌下游45°处引起最大压力扰动。
method: 实验研究，使用快速响应压力传感器测量非稳态壁面压力，涵盖低速、中速、高速工况。
innovation: 揭示了轴流-离心组合压气机在不同转速下失稳模式的转变，特别是中速时类似双模态喘振的行为。
conclusions: 1. 低速时轴流级主要呈现旋转不稳定性；中速时离心级出现高频轻度喘振与旋转失速交替。2. 失速团引起的压力扰动在蜗舌下游45°处最大。
limitations: 仅针对特定组合压气机，未涉及叶尖间隙或机匣处理等参数影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及旋转不稳定性与失速/喘振机理，与压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Numerical Characterization of Prestall Disturbances in a Compressor Stage
abstract: Abstract Compared to the subject of rotating stall, less attention has been given to prestall flow disturbances in turbomachinery. This is mostly due to the fact that these phenomena, often referred to as Rotating Instabilities, do not necessarily or distinctly occur in every compressor and usually last for a long period without posing serious threats to stable operation. The present study aims at numerically characterizing prestall disturbances in detail in a compressor stage in which they have been experimentally observed. Full-annulus computational fluid dynamics (CFD) computations employing a hybrid scale-resolving turbulence model are performed and compared against unsteady experimental data. Assessment of specific prestall disturbance metrics, including power spectral density, coherence, and circumferential mode distribution at the rotor clearance, shows that the numerical model is successful in reproducing the unsteady phenomena close to stall inception. Moreover, dynamic mode decomposition is employed to directly link each peak of the unique prestall disturbance spectral signature to spatial structures with a different circumferential order. This procedure is done for both 1D circumferential modes, based on flush-mounted pressure probes, and for 2D surfaces exposing the tip clearance dynamics. The high-resolution numerical model, supplemented with vortex identification criteria and data-driven decompositions, enhances the understanding of prestall disturbances and their associated coherent flow structures.
affiliations: Technische Universität Berlin
Technische Universität Berlin Chair for Aero Engines, , Berlin 10587 , Germany
summary_zh: 本研究通过全环CFD数值模拟，采用混合尺度解析湍流模型，详细表征了压气机级中的失速前扰动（旋转不稳定性）。通过与实验数据对比，验证了模型在再现近失速非定常现象方面的有效性。利用动态模态分解将频谱峰值与不同周向阶数的空间结构关联，揭示了叶尖间隙动力学和相干流动结构。
method: 全环CFD数值模拟，采用混合尺度解析湍流模型，与实验数据对比验证。工况参数未明确，但基于失速前状态。
innovation: 结合动态模态分解与涡识别准则，从一维周向模态和二维叶尖表面两个维度解析失速前扰动，直接关联频谱峰值与空间结构。
conclusions: 1. 数值模型成功再现了实验观察到的失速前扰动特征，包括功率谱密度、相干性和周向模态分布。2. 动态模态分解揭示了不同周向阶数的相干结构对应不同的频谱峰值。
limitations: 仅针对单个压气机级，且未涉及失速后行为或不同工况的影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 核心研究旋转不稳定性（RI）和叶尖间隙动力学，与用户研究方向高度一致。

title: Machining dynamics and chatters in micro-milling: A critical review on the state-of-the-art and future perspectives
abstract: Micro-milling technology is widely applied in micro manufacturing, particularly for the fabrication of miniature and micro components. However, the chatters and machining dynamics related issues in micro-milling are often the main challenges restricting its machining quality and productivity. Many research works have rendered that the machining dynamics and chatters in micro-milling are more complex compared with the conventional macro-milling process, likely because of the size effect and rigidity of the micro-milling system including the tooling, workpiece, process variables, materials involved, and the high-speed milling machines, and further their collective dynamic effects. Therefore, in this paper, the state of the art focusing on micro-milling chatters and dynamics related issues over the past years are comprehensively and critically reviewed to provide some insights for potential researchers and practitioners. Firstly, typical applications and the problems caused by the machining dynamics and chatters in micro-milling have been put forward in this paper. Then, the research on the underlying micro-cutting mechanics and dynamics, stability analysis, chatters detection, and chatter suppression are summarized critically. Furthermore, the underlying scientific and technological challenges are discussed particularly against typical precision engineering applications. Finally, the possible future directions and trends in research and development of micro-milling have been discussed.
affiliations: Harbin Institute of Technology
School of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering, Harbin Institute of Technology, Harbin 150001, China
Brunel University of London
Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, Brunel University London, Uxbridge UB8 3PH, UK
summary_zh: 本文综述了微铣削加工中的动力学与颤振问题，指出其比宏观铣削更复杂，受尺寸效应和系统刚度影响。总结了微切削机理、稳定性分析、颤振检测与抑制的研究现状，并讨论了未来发展方向。
method: 综述性研究，基于文献分析，涵盖实验和理论方法，涉及高速铣削、微刀具、工件材料等工况。
innovation: 系统性地对比微铣削与宏观铣削的动力学差异，强调尺寸效应和系统刚度的综合影响，为微铣削颤振研究提供全面视角。
conclusions: 1. 微铣削颤振受尺寸效应和系统刚度显著影响，比宏观铣削更复杂。2. 稳定性分析和颤振检测是提高加工质量的关键。
limitations: 未提供具体定量数据，缺乏对特定材料或工艺参数的深入实验验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及稳定性分析和颤振，但研究对象为微铣削而非压气机，与用户研究方向间接相关。

title: Steady-State Transonic Flowfield Prediction via Deep-Learning Framework
abstract: This paper focuses on the development of a deep-learning framework for predicting distributed quantities around aircraft flying in the transonic regime. These quantities play a crucial role in determining aerodynamic loads and conducting aeroelastic analysis. Angle of attack and Mach number are chosen as the two independent parameters for the reduced-order models. A comparative assessment is conducted between the proposed deep-learning framework and the proper orthogonal decomposition approach to identify the strengths and weaknesses of each method. The accuracy of the data-driven machine-learning method in modeling steady-state transonic aerodynamics is assessed against three benchmark cases of three-dimensional test cases: Benchmark Super Critical Wing and ONERA M6 wings, and the wing–body Common Research Model configuration. Despite the challenges of the analyzed scenarios, promising results are obtained for each test case, showing the effectiveness of the model implemented. Furthermore, the paper demonstrates the application of the method for aeroelastic analysis and uncertainty quantification. This quantifies the robustness and versatility of the implemented model.

summary_zh: 本文开发了一种深度学习框架，用于预测跨声速飞行器周围的分布式气动量，这些量对气动载荷和气动弹性分析至关重要。以攻角和马赫数为独立参数，与POD方法对比，在三个三维基准算例上验证了精度，并展示了在气动弹性分析和不确定性量化中的应用。
method: 数值方法，采用深度学习框架（如神经网络）和POD方法，工况参数包括攻角和马赫数，基于CFD数据训练。
innovation: 将深度学习框架应用于跨声速分布式气动量预测，并与POD方法系统比较，同时扩展到气动弹性分析和不确定性量化。
conclusions: 深度学习框架能有效预测跨声速流场，在三个三维算例上均获得有希望的结果；该方法在气动弹性分析和不确定性量化中表现出鲁棒性和多功能性。
limitations: 仅针对稳态跨声速流场，未涉及非定常效应或复杂几何（如旋转部件）。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性分析，但研究对象为飞机机翼而非压气机，与压气机稳定性核心方向部分相关。

title: Purge–Mainstream Interactions in a Turbine Stage With Rotor Endwall Contouring
abstract: Abstract Purge flows are prevalent in modern gas turbine design, allowing for increased turbine entry temperatures. The purge flow passes through a rim seal and interacts with the mainstream flow, modifying the blade secondary flow structures and reducing stage efficiency. These structures may be controlled using end wall contouring (EWC), though experimental demonstration of their benefit is seldom reported in the literature. The optically accessible turbine at the University of Bath was designed to directly measure and visualize the flow field within the blade passage for a rotor with EWC. The single-stage turbine enables phase-locked flow field measurements with volumetric particle image velocimetry (PIV). Purge flow was supplied to investigate a range of operating conditions in which the secondary flow structures were modified. The modular turbine rotor allowed for expedient change of a bladed ring, or bling, featuring non-axisymmetric EWC. The identified secondary flow structures were the pressure-side leg of the horse shoe vortex (PS-HSV) and an egress vortex (EV) of concurrent rotational direction. An increase in purge flowrate monotonically shifted the EV toward the suction-side (SS) of the adjacent blade. The migration of the PS-HSV toward the SS caused the two aforementioned vortices to merge. The EWC rotor design included a leading-edge (LE) feature to alter the PS-HSV and a trough to guide the EV low spanwise in the passage and maintain displacement from the adjacent suction-side. The EWC rotor was found to be effective at altering the formation and positioning of the secondary flow structures at a range of purge flow conditions.

summary_zh: 本文实验研究了带有转子端壁造型的涡轮级中吹扫流与主流的相互作用。通过光学可访问涡轮和体PIV测量，揭示了吹扫流对二次流结构的影响，并验证了端壁造型在改变涡系形成和位置方面的有效性。
method: 实验研究，采用光学可访问单级涡轮和体PIV测量，改变吹扫流率，对比有无端壁造型的转子。
innovation: 首次通过实验证明非轴对称端壁造型在吹扫流条件下对二次流结构的控制效果，并揭示了涡合并机制。
conclusions: 吹扫流率增加使出口涡向相邻叶片吸力侧移动，并与压力侧马蹄涡合并；端壁造型能有效改变二次流结构的位置和形成。
limitations: 仅针对单级涡轮和特定端壁造型，未涉及多级或不同吹扫比下的性能影响。
relevance_reason: 涉及二次流和端壁造型，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: UHBR Open-Test Case Fan ECL5/CATANA: Non-Linear Analysis of Non-Synchronous Blade Vibration at Part-Speed Conditions
abstract: Abstract The onset of non-synchronous vibrations has been predicted for a composite open-test-case UHBR fan geometry by time-linearized simulations at part-speed conditions. In the current study, time-accurate simulations with harmonic blade oscillations have been conducted to investigate the non-linear behavior. Results for different operating conditions show the evolution of aeroelastic stability. The lock-in of convected aerodynamic disturbances with structural vibration is analyzed for different vibration amplitudes and frequencies. The simulations show the development of multiple wave numbers, mode scattering, and a non-linear dependency on vibration amplitude. The results indicate the possibility of limit-cycle prediction and the necessity of strongly coupled methods for the assessment of non-synchronous vibration.

summary_zh: 针对UHBR复合材料风扇ECL5/CATANA，采用时间精确模拟研究非同步振动。分析了不同工况下气弹稳定性演变，揭示了涡旋扰动与结构振动的锁频现象，以及多波数、模态散射和非线性振幅依赖特性，表明极限环预测的可能性。
method: 数值模拟：时间精确模拟（时域）结合谐波叶片振荡，分析部分转速工况下的非同步振动非线性行为。
innovation: 首次对UHBR复合材料风扇进行非线性非同步振动分析，揭示了多波数、模态散射及振幅非线性依赖，强调强耦合方法的必要性。
conclusions: 非同步振动存在非线性振幅依赖，可预测极限环；需采用强耦合方法准确评估非同步振动。
limitations: 仅针对部分转速工况，未涵盖全转速范围；未考虑叶尖间隙畸变等实际因素。
relevance_reason: 研究非同步振动与气弹稳定性，与用户关注的压气机稳定性及非同步振动方向高度相关。

title: Analyzing Unsteady Turbomachinery Flow Simulations With Mixing Entropy
abstract: Abstract The prediction of unsteady aerodynamic loads is a central problem during the design of turbomachinery. Over the last 20 years, harmonic balance methods have been shown to be highly efficient for this task. A CPU-cost optimal setup of a harmonic balance simulation, however, requires knowledge of relevant harmonics. In the case of a single blade row with a periodic disturbance this question amounts to the classical problem of harmonic convergence, a problem which is solely due to the nonlinearity of the unsteady flow physics. In contrast, for multi-stage configurations, the choice of harmonics is further complicated by the fact that the interactions of disturbances with blade rows may give rise to a vast spectrum of harmonics that possibly have important modal content, e.g., Tyler–Sofrin modes. The aim of this paper is to show that the mixing entropy attributed to circumferential modes of a given harmonic can serve as a disturbance metric on the basis of which a criterion could be derived whether a certain harmonic should be included or not. The idea is based on the observation that the entropy due to the temporal and circumferential mixing of the flow at a blade row interface may be decomposed, up to third-order terms, into independent contributions from different frequencies and mode orders. For a given harmonic balance (and steady) flow result, the mixing entropy attributed to modes that are simply mixed out, rather than resolved in the neighboring row, is shown to be a natural indicator of a potential inaccuracy. We present important features of the mixing entropy for unsteady disturbances, in particular a close relationship to sound power for acoustic modes. The problem of mode selection in a 1.5-stage compressor configuration serves as a practical example to illustrate our findings.
affiliations: Deutsches Zentrum für Luft- und Raumfahrt e. V. (DLR)
German Aerospace Center (DLR) Institute of Propulsion Technology, , Linder Höhe, Cologne 51147 , Germany
summary_zh: 本文提出利用混合熵作为扰动度量，指导谐波平衡法在多级叶轮机械非定常模拟中的谐波选择。通过将界面混合熵分解为不同频率和模态阶数的独立贡献，识别被混合掉而非解析的模态，从而评估模拟精度。在1.5级压气机中验证了该方法，并揭示了混合熵与声功率的密切关系。
method: 数值方法：谐波平衡法；分析混合熵分解至三阶项；应用于1.5级压气机配置。
innovation: 首次提出将混合熵作为谐波选择准则，利用其可分解性量化未解析模态的潜在误差，并与声功率关联。
conclusions: 1. 混合熵可分解为不同频率和模态阶数的独立贡献，用于识别应包含的谐波。2. 混合熵与声功率密切相关，可作为声学模态的指示器。
limitations: 仅验证于1.5级压气机，未涉及更高阶非线性或复杂畸变工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及非定常流动和谐波选择，与压气机稳定性分析相关，但未直接聚焦叶尖畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Multidisciplinary Design Methodology for Micro-Gas-Turbines—Part II: System Analysis and Optimization
abstract: Abstract Owing to their high specific energy capabilities, ultramicrogas turbines (UMGT) are a high-potential technology to provide portable electric power supply for applications with demand of less than 1 kW. UMGT conceptual design is challenged by small-scale effects augmenting interdisciplinary dependencies leading to highly coupled, nonlinear component interactions. This work provides a novel approach to conceptual UMGT design by combining reduced order component and system modeling with constrained multi-objective optimization. Hereby, Part I presents integrated design and performance modeling of compressor, turbine, combustor, and generator. In Part II, the heat engine and generator modules are merged into a system framework by establishing conceptual UMGT rotor geometry and engine design. Following bearing selection and lifetime assessment, experimentally validated reduced order models are developed for heat transfer and rotordynamic analysis. Using the elaborated framework, a constrained multi-objective system optimization of a 300 W engine is performed based on ten design parameters and comparing SiAlON and Inconel 718 as potential rotor materials available for additive manufacturing. Hereby, bearing lifetime, system efficiency, and specific power are maximized while meeting rotordynamic, structural, and thermal requirements. Evaluating the results, interdisciplinary effects are highlighted, and two optimum engine configurations are suggested.

Technion, Israel Institute of Technology, Technion City , Lady Davis 740, Haifa 320003, Israel
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对超微型燃气轮机（UMGT）概念设计受小尺度效应导致强耦合非线性问题，提出结合降阶模型与约束多目标优化的设计方法。建立了压气机、涡轮、燃烧室和发电机的集成模型，并开发了传热与转子动力学实验验证模型。以300W发动机为例，优化了十个设计参数，对比了SiAlON和Inconel 718两种转子材料，最大化轴承寿命、系统效率和比功率，同时满足转子动力学、结构和热要求。
method: 数值优化与实验验证结合，采用降阶模型和约束多目标优化，工况为300W级UMGT，设计参数十个。
innovation: 提出UMGT概念设计新方法，集成降阶组件模型与系统优化，并考虑小尺度效应下的强耦合非线性。
conclusions: 1. 优化得到两种最优发动机配置，平衡了轴承寿命、效率和比功率。2. SiAlON和Inconel 718作为转子材料各有优劣，需根据设计目标选择。
limitations: 仅针对300W级UMGT，未涉及更大功率或不同应用场景的验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子动力学和优化，但未直接聚焦压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变等核心方向。

title: Identification of the Aeromechanical Parameters of a Compressor Rotor from Blade Tip Timing Data
abstract: Abstract This article presents a maximum likelihood approach to identifying the mistuning, aerodynamic forcing functions, and aerodynamic influence coefficients of compressor rotor blades from noisy experimental measurements of blade deflection. The maximum likelihood estimation approach leads naturally to a nonlinear least squares optimization problem that can be solved using numerical optimization techniques such as quasi-Newton methods. An eigenmode decomposition approach is presented that permits the optimization objective function and gradient to be efficiently calculated so that the optimization is computationally feasible, even for experiments involving very large data sets. Simulation results show that the method has the potential to accurately identify the mistuning and aerodynamic nodal diameter forcing functions, but obtaining accurate results for influence coefficients may not be possible if there is significant disk flexibility. We demonstrate the method using both simulated and experimental blade vibration data from rotor 2 of the Purdue University three-stage axial compressor research facility collected using a light probe tip timing system as the rotor is slowly accelerated or decelerated through a Campbell diagram crossing.

Massachusetts Institute of Technology
Massachusetts Institute of Technology Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics, , Cambridge, MA 02139
summary_zh: 本文提出一种最大似然估计方法，利用叶尖定时测量的叶片振动数据识别压气机转子叶片的失谐、气动激励函数和气动影响系数。通过特征模态分解实现高效优化，适用于大型数据集。模拟和实验验证了该方法在识别失谐和气动节点直径激励函数方面的准确性，但磁盘柔性会影响影响系数的识别精度。
method: 采用最大似然估计结合非线性最小二乘优化，通过特征模态分解高效计算目标函数和梯度；实验数据来自普渡大学三级轴流压气机转子2的叶尖定时系统。
innovation: 提出一种基于最大似然估计的叶尖定时数据反分析方法，能够同时识别失谐、气动激励函数和影响系数，并通过特征模态分解实现大规模数据的高效计算。
conclusions: 该方法能准确识别失谐和气动节点直径激励函数；磁盘柔性显著降低气动影响系数的识别精度。
limitations: 仅针对单转子实验，未考虑多级耦合效应；磁盘柔性对影响系数识别的影响未深入量化。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖定时测量和叶片振动参数识别，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Operational Strategies of Two-Spool Micro Gas Turbine With Alternative Fuels: A Performance Assessment
abstract: Abstract Micro gas turbines (mGT) have not yet succeeded in conquering the small-scale combined heat and power (CHP) market. One reason is that their electrical efficiency is not high enough to maintain a cost-effective operation. A two-shaft intercooled mGT has the potential to meet the current market demand. This technology maintains a high electrical efficiency even at part-load and coupled with its fuel-flexible combustion chamber, it is an ideal candidate for CHP concepts in a renewable future. In this paper, performance analysis on two-spool mGT is carried out with various fuel blends. Attention is given to the low-pressure and high-pressure compressors and the variation of surge margin by adding hydrogen and syngas. Two control strategies for the mGT are adopted. In the first scenario, the two shafts have equal rotational speeds while in the second, the speeds are controlled independently. As the engine is operated at equal speeds, the maximum performance with 100 vol. % of syngas is observed at 85% of the nominal load while 100 vol. % of hydrogen shows maximum efficiency at a load of 63.7%. At electric power lower than 60% and for high amounts of syngas in natural gas, the low-pressure compressor (LPC) operates closely to surge line. In the second scenario, the efficiency increases as the load decreases and the LPC runs in an efficient and safe operating region. Additionally, the amount of nitrogen in syngas affects the part-load performance of the two-spool mGT.

summary_zh: 本文研究双轴微型燃气轮机在使用替代燃料（氢气、合成气）时的性能，重点关注低压和高压压气机的喘振裕度变化。采用两种控制策略：等转速和独立转速控制。发现等转速下合成气在85%负荷时性能最佳，氢气在63.7%负荷时效率最高；独立转速控制可提高低负荷效率并保持压气机安全运行。
method: 数值性能分析，基于两种控制策略（等转速和独立转速），研究不同燃料混合比（氢气、合成气）对双轴微型燃气轮机压气机喘振裕度的影响。
innovation: 针对双轴微型燃气轮机，系统评估了替代燃料（氢气、合成气）对低压和高压压气机喘振裕度的影响，并比较了两种转速控制策略的优劣。
conclusions: 1. 等转速下，100%合成气在85%负荷时性能最佳，100%氢气在63.7%负荷时效率最高。2. 独立转速控制可提高低负荷效率，并使低压压气机运行在高效安全区域。
limitations: 仅基于性能分析，未涉及压气机内部流动稳定性机理或实验验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机喘振裕度，但主要关注性能评估而非流动稳定性机理或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Body-force modeling considering induced upstream effects for a transonic compressor with total temperature distortion
abstract: To numerically study the impact of total temperature distortion on a transonic compressor with reduced computational costs, a Body-Force Model (BFM) is developed. Firstly, the interactions between the distorted flow and the compressor are analyzed using full-annulus Unsteady Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes (URANS) results and the orbit method. It is found that the induced swirl distortion and the mass flux nonuniformity are intensified in the compressor upstream flow field. A correction factor is thus added to the BFM to account for the effect of the induced swirl, which is crucial for the accurate representation of distortion transfer in the intake. Then, steady simulations with large-amplitude 180° circumferential total temperature distortion are performed using the developed BFM. It is shown that the distorted compressor map simulated with the BFM matches well with URANS results. The circumferential phase shift of total temperature and the generation of the additional total pressure distortion across the rotor are in line with the time-averaged URANS flow field. The compressor upstream effects on the distorted inflow can also be exactly captured. All above-mentioned results demonstrate the BFM developed in this paper can effectively capture the distorted flow features inside the compressor, and significantly reduce the computational costs by five orders of magnitude compared with URANS.

summary_zh: 针对总温畸变对跨声速压气机的影响，开发了考虑诱导上游效应的体力模型（BFM）。通过全环非定常RANS和轨道法分析畸变与压气机相互作用，发现诱导旋流畸变和质量流量不均匀性增强，添加修正因子后BFM能准确捕捉畸变传递，计算成本降低五个数量级。
method: 数值方法：基于全环URANS结果和轨道法分析，开发稳态BFM，采用180°周向总温畸变工况。
innovation: 在BFM中引入修正因子以考虑诱导旋流效应，准确模拟畸变传递和上游影响，大幅降低计算成本。
conclusions: BFM模拟的畸变压气机特性图与URANS吻合良好，计算成本降低五个数量级；能准确捕捉总温周向相移和转子附加总压畸变。
limitations: 仅针对总温畸变，未考虑总压畸变或组合畸变；稳态BFM可能无法完全捕捉非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接涉及畸变进气下的压气机稳定性建模，与用户课题（叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测及三维激盘模型）高度相关。

title: Evaluation of Extreme Value Predictions for Unsteady Flow Distortion of Aero-Engine Intakes
abstract: Abstract Unsteady flow distortion is of interest for the development of air-breathing propulsion systems. Stochastic fluctuations can generate incompatibilities between intakes and aero-engines. Observing the extreme flow distortion events during experimental testing is not guaranteed and statistical models such as extreme value theory (EVT) can be used to estimate the occurrence and magnitude of the fluctuations. However, the current industry standard does not provide guidance on how to apply these methods to obtain useful predictions. This work proposes a systematic process to assess the required number of observations for obtaining statistical convergence of the EVT predictions. This is achieved through shuffling of the data samples and relies on the availability of a sufficiently large initial dataset. This can be adopted by gas turbine engineers to evaluate the data recording requirements and to potentially reduce costs associated with experimental programs.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Centre for Propulsion and Thermal Power Engineering, Cranfield University , Cranfield, Bedfordshire MK43 0AL, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究航空发动机进气道非定常流畸变的极端事件预测。采用极值理论（EVT）统计模型，通过数据样本洗牌方法评估所需观测次数以获得统计收敛，旨在降低实验成本。
method: 基于极值理论的统计方法，通过数据洗牌评估样本量需求，依赖初始大样本数据集。
innovation: 提出系统化流程评估EVT预测的统计收敛所需观测次数，为工业应用提供指导。
conclusions: 1. 通过数据洗牌可评估EVT预测的统计收敛性。2. 该方法有助于确定实验数据记录要求，降低实验成本。
limitations: 依赖足够大的初始数据集，未考虑实际发动机工况变化。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气，但未直接研究压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙等核心方向。

title: Advancing Mistuning Identification and Dynamic Modeling of Blisks Through Blade Detuning Tests
abstract: Blisks extensively used in advanced aeroengines are vulnerable to vibration problems due to the high sensitivity of the blisk’s forced response to blade mistuning. This paper proposes an emerging mistuning identification technique based on blade detuning tests (BDTID) for predictive dynamic modeling of blisks. The conventional frequency-mistuning modeling approaches relying on blade mistuning identification by reduced-order model techniques and modal test data of the full blisk are also adopted to construct different mistuned models of a blisk test piece for comparison purposes. A complete assessment of these blisk models is achieved through the forced response tests in a stationary traveling wave excitation test rig. The BDTID consists of blade-detuning tests followed by a correction procedure. The detuning tests enable us to approximately evaluate the “blade-alone” frequencies through blade-by-blade impact testing in combination with a mass detuning mechanism. The correction procedure is able to evaluate the detuning test quality by the quantification of the residual interblade coupling due to mass detuning. More importantly, a robustness investigation demonstrates that this procedure is able to capture the “true” blade mistuning even in cases of poor blade detuning test quality. The resultant mistuned blisk model exhibits high accuracy in the modal correlation and forced response validation results. Compared with conventional methods, BDTID takes advantage of easy implementation with less experimental effort and has proven robust performance. It is therefore recommended for blade mistuning identification and predictive blisk dynamic modeling in a wide variety of scenarios.

summary_zh: 针对整体叶盘（blisk）因叶片失谐导致的振动问题，提出基于叶片失谐测试（BDTID）的失谐识别技术。通过逐叶片冲击测试与质量失谐机制近似评估“叶片单独”频率，并采用校正程序量化残余叶间耦合。实验验证表明，该方法在模态相关性和强迫响应预测上精度高，且比传统方法更易实施、鲁棒性强。
method: 实验方法：在静止行波激励试验台上进行叶片失谐测试和强迫响应测试；通过质量失谐机制和校正程序识别失谐。
innovation: 提出基于叶片失谐测试的失谐识别技术，无需完整叶盘模态测试，通过校正程序消除质量失谐影响，实现高精度且鲁棒的失谐建模。
conclusions: 1. BDTID能准确识别“真实”叶片失谐，即使测试质量较差。2. 失谐叶盘模型在模态相关性和强迫响应验证中精度高。
limitations: 仅针对静止试验台，未考虑旋转效应和实际工况下的气动弹性耦合。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶片振动建模与强迫响应，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Numerical analysis of wind effects on aerodynamic characteristics of a ducted fan
abstract: Ducted fans have been extensively used in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) for a variety of missions because of high efficiency, high safety and low noise. Wind, as a kind of typical meteorological condition, brings significant aerodynamic interference to the ducted fan, which seriously threatens flight stability and safety. In this work, the numerical simulation with the Unsteady Reynolds Averaged Navier-Stokes (URANS) method and the sliding mesh technique is performed to evaluate the steady wind effect. The results show that the wind will lead to serious unsteady effects in the flow field, and the thrust fluctuates at the blade passing frequency of 200 Hz. As the wind speed increases, the rotor thrust increases, the duct thrust decreases, and the total thrust changes little. Flow instability may occur when the wind speed exceeds 8 m/s. As the angle of low-speed wind increases, the rotor thrust changes little, the duct thrust increases, and the total thrust increases. In addition, we figure out that cases with the same crosswind ratio are similar in results, and increasing the rotating speed or fan radius is beneficial to performance improvement in wind. The findings are essential to the ducted fan design and UAV flight control design for stable and safe operations in wind conditions.

summary_zh: 采用URANS方法和滑移网格技术数值模拟了风对涵道风扇气动特性的影响。结果表明风导致流场非定常效应，推力在叶片通过频率200Hz处波动；风速超过8m/s时可能出现流动不稳定；增加转速或风扇半径有利于改善风中的性能。
method: 数值模拟，采用URANS方法和滑移网格技术，研究不同风速和风向角下的涵道风扇气动特性。
innovation: 系统分析了风速和风向角对涵道风扇转子推力、涵道推力及总推力的影响，并发现相同侧风比下结果相似。
conclusions: 风速增加使转子推力增大、涵道推力减小，总推力变化不大；低风速下风向角增大使涵道推力增大、总推力增大。
limitations: 仅考虑稳态风效应，未涉及湍流或阵风等非稳态风况。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气（风干扰）和稳定性分析（流动不稳定），但未聚焦叶尖间隙或压气机稳定性建模。

title: Decentralized modular semi-active controller for suppression of vibrations and energy harvesting
abstract: The study investigates the problem of decentralized semi-active control of free vibration. The control scheme is designed for implementation in a modular controller architecture, where a collection of subcontrollers is employed, with each subcontroller being associated with a subsystem that represents a component of the vibrating structure. Each subcontroller uses state feedback from adjacent subsystem sensors to perform vibration suppression and energy harvesting using a switching control law. Furthermore, the assumption is made that neighbouring subcontrollers exchange information collaboratively to estimate the effects of coupling forces, achieving control efficiency comparable to that of a centralized approach. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated on a modular suspension platform equipped with semi-active dampers and electromagnetic energy harvesters. The approach is evaluated under various free vibration scenarios, encompassing faulty measurement conditions, and is compared to passive and heuristic state-feedback control strategies. The results confirm that the proposed method attains a superior control performance, independent of the degree of decentralization in the adopted controller architecture, rendering it a viable solution for addressing large-scale semi-active control problems.
affiliations: Institute of Fundamental Technological Research
Polish Academy of Sciences
Institute of Fundamental Technological Research, Polish Academy of Sciences, Pawińskiego 5B, 02-106 Warsaw, Poland
summary_zh: 本文研究了一种用于自由振动抑制和能量收集的分散式模块化半主动控制方案。该方案采用多个子控制器，每个子控制器与振动结构的子系统关联，利用相邻子系统传感器的状态反馈，通过切换控制律实现振动抑制和能量收集。子控制器间协作估计耦合效应，达到与集中式控制相当的效率。在配备半主动阻尼器和电磁能量收集器的模块化悬浮平台上验证了有效性，并与被动和启发式状态反馈策略比较，结果表明该方法控制性能优越，不受分散程度影响，适用于大规模半主动控制问题。
method: 数值仿真与实验验证相结合，采用模块化悬浮平台，配备半主动阻尼器和电磁能量收集器，在自由振动场景下评估，包括故障测量条件。
innovation: 提出一种分散式模块化半主动控制器架构，子控制器间协作估计耦合效应，实现与集中式控制相当的效率，且性能不受分散程度影响。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法在振动抑制和能量收集方面优于被动和启发式状态反馈策略。2. 控制性能与控制器架构的分散程度无关，适用于大规模系统。
limitations: 仅针对自由振动场景，未涉及强迫振动或更复杂激励；实验平台规模有限，未验证在大型结构上的可扩展性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及振动控制，与转子振动控制相关，但未涉及压气机或叶尖间隙等航空发动机具体问题。

title: Optimized Casing Treatment to Improve Stall Margin Under Circumferential Pressure Distortion in a High-Speed Axial Flow Fan
abstract: Abstract An optimized axial slot casing treatment (OPCT) was designed that experimentally improves the stall margin by 7.31% with an efficiency gain of 1.94% at a design speed of 100% in a high-speed axial flow fan. Subsequently, the OPCT was tested under the distorted inflow with a 9% composite distortion index; it can still improve the stall margin by 6.19% with an efficiency gain of 1.63% at the 100% design speed. The unsteady measurement results indicate that the location of the shock wave obviously moves forward toward the leading edge of the blade tip as the rotor blade rotates out of the distorted region and induces the stall in advance. When the OPCT is applied, the strength of the interaction between the shock wave and tip leakage flow can be suppressed, and the location of the shock wave at the distorted region is pushed backward. Thus, the trigger of the stall inception generated in the downstream of the distortion region is postponed. Meanwhile, a new phenomenon was discovered that the OPCT does not alter the instability mode of the fan, and the fan eventually surges, which is consistent with the B parameter value of 2.942. However, under the distorted inflow, the B parameter can be reduced from 2.942 to 0.863, thereby the instability mode of the fan is changed from surge to stall. It can guide the instability prediction when the boundary condition (distortion or casing treatment) of the fan is changed.

summary_zh: 针对高速轴流风扇，设计了优化轴向槽机匣处理（OPCT），在均匀进气下使失速裕度提升7.31%、效率提高1.94%；在9%复合畸变指数进气下仍提升失速裕度6.19%、效率提高1.63%。实验发现畸变导致激波前移诱发失速，OPCT抑制激波-叶尖泄漏流相互作用并推迟失速触发。OPCT不改变均匀进气下的喘振模式（B参数2.942），但畸变下B参数降至0.863，使失稳模式从喘振变为失速。
method: 实验研究，在100%设计转速下测试均匀和畸变进气条件，采用非定常测量分析激波位置和失速触发机制。
innovation: 首次在畸变进气下验证优化机匣处理对失速裕度和效率的改善效果，并发现机匣处理可改变失稳模式（喘振→失速），为失稳预测提供新依据。
conclusions: 1. OPCT在均匀和畸变进气下分别提升失速裕度7.31%和6.19%，同时提高效率。2. 畸变下B参数从2.942降至0.863，失稳模式从喘振变为失速。
limitations: 仅针对单一风扇和特定畸变指数，未考虑不同转速或畸变形式的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙畸变和机匣处理对稳定裕度的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Transitional Delayed Detached-Eddy Simulation for a Compressor Cascade: A Critical Assessment
abstract: The accurate prediction of transitional flows is crucial for the industrial turbomachinery design process. While a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes approach inherently brings conceptual weaknesses, large-eddy simulation will still be too expensive in the near future to affordably analyze complex turbomachinery configurations. We introduce a transitional delayed detached-eddy simulation (DDES) model, namely, DDES-[Formula: see text], and analyze the numerical results of the compressor cascade V103. A comparison with the fully turbulent DDES approach emphasizes the benefit of coupling DDES with a transition model. Issues with undesired decay of modeled turbulent kinetic energy in the freestream are improved when running DDES-[Formula: see text] in combination with the synthetic turbulence generator method. The best results for DDES-[Formula: see text] are obtained when changing the inviscid flux solver blending from dynamic to constant mode. We show that DDES-[Formula: see text] is capable of predicting the transitional flow through a linear compressor cascade, but we also critically discuss the general concept and results.

summary_zh: 本文针对压气机叶栅V103，提出了一种过渡延迟分离涡模拟（DDES-γ）模型，并与全湍流DDES对比。结果表明，DDES-γ结合合成湍流发生器可改善自由流湍动能衰减问题，采用恒定无粘通量格式效果最佳，能准确预测过渡流动。
method: 数值模拟：过渡延迟分离涡模拟（DDES-γ）与全湍流DDES对比，采用合成湍流发生器，分析压气机叶栅V103。
innovation: 将过渡模型与DDES耦合，提出DDES-γ模型，并针对自由流湍动能衰减问题引入合成湍流发生器，优化了数值格式。
conclusions: DDES-γ能准确预测压气机叶栅过渡流动；采用恒定无粘通量格式比动态格式效果更好。
limitations: 仅针对线性叶栅，未考虑真实旋转效应和复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机叶栅流动数值方法，与叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测间接相关。

title: Effect of fore/aft-loaded rotor on compressor stability under inlet circumferential distortion
abstract: A modified small perturbation stability prediction model for axial compressors with circumferential inlet distortions is established and applied to investigate the effect of fore/aft-loaded rotor on compressor stability under circumferentially distorted inlet conditions. The inlet total pressure distribution downstream of the distortion screen is measured in experiments and employed for simulations which are implemented via time-space spectral method. The stall inception prediction results via the stability model indicate that the compressor with aft-loaded rotor not only performs better in terms of stability under uniform inlet, but also maintains a larger stability margin under circumferentially distorted inlet. The experiments for compressors with fore-loaded and aft-loaded rotor are respectively carried out. The results validate the reliability of numerical simulations and the predicted conclusion that the aft-loaded rotor is beneficial for compressor stability. Besides, the ability of the developed theoretical model for compressor stability prediction under circumferential distortions is confirmed. In addition, dynamic pressure signals at rotor tip measured in experiments illustrate that the circumferential distortion has little effect on the compressor stall pattern.

summary_zh: 本研究建立了适用于周向进气畸变的轴流压气机小扰动稳定性预测模型，采用时空谱方法模拟，并通过实验验证。发现后加载转子在均匀和畸变进气下均具有更大稳定裕度，且畸变对失速模式影响较小。
method: 理论建模（小扰动稳定性模型）结合数值模拟（时空谱方法）与实验测量（畸变网、转子叶尖动态压力）。
innovation: 将前后加载转子对比引入畸变进气稳定性研究，并发展了适用于周向畸变的稳定性预测模型。
conclusions: 后加载转子在均匀进气下稳定裕度更优，且在周向畸变下仍保持更大稳定裕度；周向畸变对失速模式影响小。
limitations: 仅针对周向畸变，未考虑径向畸变或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 研究内容直接涉及叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，与用户课题高度吻合。

title: A numerical simulation strategy for a compressor’s underlying axisymmetric characteristic and its application in body force model
abstract: Accurate prediction of the aerodynamic response of a compressor under inlet distortion is crucial for next-generation civil aircraft, such as Boundary Layer Ingestion (BLI) silent aircraft. Therefore, research on the Body Force (BF) model plays a significant role in achieving this objective. However, distorted inlet airflow can lead to varying operating conditions across different spatial locations of the compressor, which may cause some regions to operate outside the stability boundary. Consequently, the accuracy of BF model simulations might be compromised. To address this issue, this paper proposes a numerical simulation strategy for acquiring the steady axisymmetric three-dimensional flow field of a compressor operating at low mass flow rates, which is known as the Underlying Axisymmetric Pressure Rise Characteristic (UAPRC). The proposed simulation accounts for two different rotor speeds of a transonic compressor and identifies initial positions in the flow field where deterioration occurs based on prior experimental investigations. Moreover, simulation results are incorporated into the BF model to replicate hub instability observed in experiments. Obtained results demonstrate that this strategy provides valid predictions of the UAPRC of the compressor, thereby addressing the limitations associated with the BF model.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种数值模拟策略，用于获取压气机在低质量流量下的稳态轴对称三维流场，即底层轴对称压力上升特性（UAPRC）。该策略考虑了跨声速压气机的两种转子转速，并基于实验确定流场恶化的初始位置。将模拟结果融入体力模型后，成功复现了实验中观察到的轮毂失稳，从而克服了体力模型在畸变进气下预测精度不足的局限。
method: 数值模拟策略，结合实验验证；针对跨声速压气机，考虑两种转子转速，基于实验确定恶化初始位置。
innovation: 提出获取底层轴对称压力上升特性（UAPRC）的数值模拟策略，并将其融入体力模型，解决了畸变进气下体力模型在近失速工况的预测失效问题。
conclusions: 1. 该策略能有效预测压气机的UAPRC。2. 融入UAPRC的体力模型可复现实验中轮毂失稳现象，提升了畸变进气下稳定裕度预测的准确性。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机和两种转速，未考虑叶尖间隙、机匣处理等几何细节的影响。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接针对畸变进气下压气机稳定裕度预测，采用体力模型，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测高度契合。

title: Numerical Analysis of Unsteady Phenomena in a Contra-Rotating Stage Based on the Reduction of Local Entropy Production
abstract: Abstract The primary purpose of this study is the reduction of local entropy production in a contra-rotating stage. As such, the unsteady flow phenomena and the impact of radial load distribution on these phenomena and local entropy production need to be clarified. In this study, the stress-blended eddy simulation (SBES) turbulence model is utilized to capture the vortices in the flow separation zone, and the γ-Reθ transition model is employed to predict the transition phenomenon within the boundary layer. Entropy production rate models suitable for different turbulence models are constructed separately to calculate local entropy production. Vortex visualization is achieved according to the λci criterion, and the relative vorticity change rate is used to analyze the components of the tip clearance vortices. The transition phenomenon is analyzed from the perspectives of both the Euler and the Lagrange descriptions. The primary findings can be summarized as follows: the transition begins earlier and progresses more rapidly in the rear rotor. Wake propagation, occurring at double the frequency, entropy production rate within the boundary layer changes in synchrony with the wall shear stress at the same frequency. Additionally, an investigation of the tip clearance vortices concludes that the main structure of the tip clearance vortices coincides with the flow pattern of the high entropy production rate region, and the flow structure related to the high divergence area is essential for considering subsequent optimization with the aim of reducing the entropy production rate.
affiliations: China University of Mining and Technology
School of Mechanical Electronic and Information Engineering, China University of Mining and Technology-Beijing, Ding No. 11 Xueyuan Road, Haidian District , Beijing 100083, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究针对对转压气机级，采用SBES湍流模型和γ-Reθ转捩模型进行数值模拟，分析非定常流动现象及径向载荷分布对局部熵产的影响。发现后转子转捩更早更快，尾迹传播频率加倍，叶尖间隙涡结构与高熵产区一致。
method: 数值模拟，采用SBES湍流模型和γ-Reθ转捩模型，基于λci准则和相对涡量变化率分析，工况参数未明确。
innovation: 结合熵产率模型与涡结构分析，从欧拉和拉格朗日视角研究转捩，揭示叶尖间隙涡与熵产的关联。
conclusions: 后转子转捩起始更早且发展更快；尾迹传播频率为叶片通过频率的两倍；叶尖间隙涡主结构与高熵产区重合。
limitations: 仅针对对转压气机级，未考虑变工况或几何参数影响，缺乏实验验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙涡和熵产分析，与叶尖间隙畸变相关，但未直接研究稳定裕度预测。

title: Theoretical contribution to the design of controllable segmented gas foil bearings
abstract: The use of Gas Foil Bearings (GFBs) can facilitate an environmentally friendly and oil-free alternative for high-speed rotating light machinery. The applicability is, however, drastically limited by their low load-bearing capability and inherently low damping. One possible way to mitigate these limitations is through hybridisation and active feedback control. This paper exemplifies the possibilities of using passive Hybrid Gas Foil Bearings (HGFBs) with radial gas injection to increase the load-bearing capacity and the stability of a rotor-bearing system. With hybridisation comes also the possibility of active feedback control, to this extent, the paper presents a step-by-step methodology for designing feedback control for an active HGFB. The non-linear set of differential equations comprising the system, pressure states, foil deflections, rotor movements, and actuator position, are solved simultaneously with control feedback. The hybrid system is presented for a yet-to-be-built version of an existing industrial-scale GFB test rig augmented with an existing injection system. The industrial-scale test rig mimics an 120 kW compressor weighing 21.17 kg used for water treatment. The presented results comprise pressure distributions, film height, foil deformation, Campbell diagrams, eccentricity diagrams, and waterfall plots. The augmentation with radial injection is seen to greatly improve the system’s capabilities, i.e., a significant enlargement of operational speed range from 30 kRPM to 40 kRPM (33 %), and start-ups without dry friction between the rotor and top foil, and an increase in load capacity described through rotor position.
affiliations: Technical University of Denmark
Department of Civil and Mechanical Engineering, Technical University of Denmark, 2800, Kgs. Lyngby, Denmark
summary_zh: 本文针对气体箔片轴承低承载和低阻尼问题，提出被动混合气体箔片轴承（HGFB）结合径向气体注入，并设计主动反馈控制方法。通过求解非线性微分方程组，分析了压力分布、膜厚、箔变形等，实验表明转速范围从30 kRPM提升至40 kRPM（33%），消除了启动干摩擦，提高了承载能力。
method: 数值模拟与实验结合，求解包含压力、箔变形、转子运动和作动器位置的非线性方程组，工况参数包括转速30-40 kRPM、转子质量21.17 kg。
innovation: 提出被动混合气体箔片轴承与主动反馈控制相结合的设计方法，通过径向气体注入显著提升转速范围和承载能力，并消除启动干摩擦。
conclusions: 径向气体注入使转速范围从30 kRPM扩展至40 kRPM（提升33%），并消除了启动时的干摩擦，提高了系统稳定性。
limitations: 研究基于特定工业规模试验台，未考虑实际运行中的热效应和长期磨损。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制，但与压气机叶尖间隙畸变、稳定性预测等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Transonic Aerodynamic–Structural Coupling Characteristics Predicted by Nonlinear Data-Driven Modeling Approach
abstract: Accurate prediction of nonlinear aerodynamics is essential for the transonic aeroelastic analysis of flight vehicles. Though reduced-order aerodynamic models are cheap and reasonable tools, it is still a tough problem to accurately evaluate the unsteady pressure distributions on the surface of an elastic structure. This paper presents a nonlinear data-driven modeling approach based on the high-fidelity simulations in the following three steps. The first step is to compute the dominant modes of unsteady pressure distributions through the proper orthogonal decomposition. The pressure snapshots used for the feature extraction are sampled under a multilevel sine-sweep excitation. The second step is to obtain the low-dimensional temporal dynamics of the coefficients of these modes via polynomial nonlinear state-space identification. The linear estimation implemented by employing the dynamic mode decomposition with control algorithm serves as the initialization of the nonlinear optimization. The third step is to reconstruct the unsteady pressure distributions under arbitrary structural excitation from the temporal coefficients. The paper validates the approach via two numerical examples of the transonic aerodynamic–structural coupling problem. One is an NACA0012 airfoil, and the other is an AGARD 445.6 wing. The examples show that the proposed approach exhibits both accurate and robust performance in the prediction of unsteady pressure distributions, aerodynamic forces, and aeroelastic responses. In particular, the approach well predicts the physical features at the fluid–structure coupling interface, previously neglected in the system identification of aerodynamic systems. Therefore, the approach serves as a promising tool for data-driven aeroelastic analysis.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, 210016 Nanjing, People’s Republic of China
Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, 210016 Nanjing, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 针对跨声速气动弹性分析中非线性气动力精确预测的难题，提出一种基于高保真仿真的非线性数据驱动建模方法。该方法结合本征正交分解提取压力主导模态，利用多项式非线性状态空间辨识获得低维时间动力学，并通过动态模态分解初始化非线性优化。在NACA0012翼型和AGARD 445.6机翼算例中验证，该方法能准确预测非定常压力分布、气动力和气动弹性响应，尤其能捕捉流固耦合界面的物理特征。
method: 数值方法：基于高保真仿真，采用本征正交分解、多项式非线性状态空间辨识和动态模态分解控制算法，在跨声速条件下对NACA0012翼型和AGARD 445.6机翼进行验证。
innovation: 提出一种非线性数据驱动建模方法，通过多级正弦扫频激励采样压力快照，并利用动态模态分解初始化非线性优化，提高了非定常压力分布预测的精度和鲁棒性。
conclusions: 该方法能准确预测非定常压力分布、气动力和气动弹性响应；特别能捕捉流固耦合界面的物理特征，而传统系统辨识方法常忽略这些特征。
limitations: 仅验证了二维翼型和三维机翼算例，未涉及旋转机械或叶尖间隙等复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与流固耦合，但研究对象为机翼而非压气机，与压气机稳定性直接关联较弱。

title: Parametric Vibration and Combined Resonance of a Bending-Torsional Coupled Turbine Blade With a Preset Angle
abstract: Abstract The parametric vibration and combined resonance of a turbine blade with a preset angle subjected to the combined effect of parametric and forced excitation were investigated. The blade was modeled as a rotating beam considering the effects of centrifugal, gyroscopic, and bending-torsion coupling. The instability region of the corresponding linear system with parametric excitation was analyzed using Floquet theory, and the effect of blade parameters on this region was discussed. Notably, the parametric vibration of the torsional degree-of-freedom (DOF) caused by parametric excitation of the bending degree-of-freedom has been found. The results show that the size and position of the parameter resonance region are affected by the blade aspect ratio and preset angle, respectively. Furthermore, the multiscale method was employed to solve the blade equation under the combined action of parametric and forced excitation to study the combined resonance caused by forced excitation and gyroscopic items. The effect of blade parameters and excitation characteristics on regions of combined resonance were investigated. The phenomenon of heteroclinic bifurcation was observed due to changes in the excitation frequency, and the harmonic components that accompanied the bifurcation changed. Specifically, a multiperiod response dominated by the excitation frequency and subharmonic components shifted to a single-period response dominated by subharmonic components. This study provides a theoretical explanation for the nonsynchronous resonance of blades and the subharmonic signals in blade vibration and guides blade parameter design, especially for wind turbines.
affiliations: Hefei University of Technology
School of Automotive and Transportation Engineering, Hefei University of Technology , Hefei, Anhui 230000, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 研究了预设角涡轮叶片在参数激励和强迫激励联合作用下的参数振动与组合共振。将叶片建模为旋转梁，考虑离心、陀螺和弯扭耦合效应。利用Floquet理论分析线性系统失稳区域，发现弯曲自由度参数激励引起扭转自由度参数振动。采用多尺度法求解组合共振，观察到异宿分岔现象，为叶片非同步振动和次谐波信号提供理论解释。
method: 理论分析：旋转梁模型，Floquet理论，多尺度法。工况参数：叶片展弦比、预设角、激励频率。
innovation: 发现弯曲参数激励可诱发扭转参数振动；揭示了陀螺项与强迫激励共同作用下的组合共振及异宿分岔现象。
conclusions: 叶片展弦比影响参数共振区域大小，预设角影响其位置；激励频率变化可导致异宿分岔，使多周期响应转变为单周期次谐波响应。
limitations: 仅考虑线性系统失稳区域，未涉及非线性阻尼或气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动和参数共振，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Mid-Span Stall Inception in Low-Pressure-Ratio Transonic Fans
abstract: Abstract In this paper, steady and unsteady computational fluid dynamics (CFD) have been used to investigate stall inception for a modern low-pressure-ratio transonic fan. The computational results are validated against measurement data from a high-speed test facility. CFD validation was approached as a blind test case. The results show good agreement between the experiments and computations. Stall is triggered by the growth of a suction surface separation behind the shock around the mid-span of the rotor blade. As the fan is throttled, the separation grows, leading to increased blockage in the blade passages. At the point of instability, the separation grows further, locally increasing incidence and leading to the formation of a stall cell. It is shown that changes to the tip leakage flow leave the stall inception mechanism unaffected. A computational case with a suction surface slip patch between 25% and 75% span shows that the reduction in blockage around the mid-span increases the stall margin by 25%. This demonstrates that for cases with mid-span initiated stalls, it is important to consider the flow away from the tip as well as the flow in the tip region. A redesigned fan is used to illustrate that design changes around the mid-span can be effective in improving flow range. The redesigned fan increases the stall margin by 6.7% while maintaining the design point efficiency within 0.1%.

summary_zh: 针对低压比跨声速风扇，通过稳态与非稳态CFD研究失速起始机理。发现失速由转子叶片中跨区激波后吸力面分离触发，分离增长导致堵塞，最终形成失速胞。叶尖泄漏流不影响该机制。通过中跨吸力面滑移补丁可增加25%失速裕度，重新设计风扇提升6.7%失速裕度且效率几乎不变。
method: 采用稳态与非稳态CFD数值模拟，与高速实验台测量数据盲测验证，研究不同节流状态下的流动。
innovation: 首次明确低压比跨声速风扇中跨起始失速机理，并证明叶尖泄漏流不影响该机制，强调中跨区域流动控制的重要性。
conclusions: 1. 失速由中跨激波后吸力面分离触发，而非叶尖泄漏流。2. 中跨吸力面滑移补丁可增加25%失速裕度，重新设计风扇提升6.7%失速裕度且效率损失小于0.1%。
limitations: 仅针对单一低压比跨声速风扇，未考虑进气畸变等实际工况。
relevance_reason: 研究失速起始机理，与用户关注的稳定裕度预测相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Compressor Water Extraction
abstract: Abstract The effect of putting a bleed slot behind the rotor or stator of a modern representative intermediate pressure compressor stage has been investigated using a purpose-built test rig. The first part of the paper goes over the construction and operation of a rig, which for the first time allows for accurate measurement of water extraction and rapid testing of a variety of bleed slot geometries. Using this test rig, it was found that the use of a bleed slot behind the rotor increases water extraction by up to 40 percentage points compared to placing it behind the stator. The overall extraction efficiency for the rotor exit was above 70% for all bleed rates considered from 0% to 30% and is relatively constant. Whilst rotor exit bleed might be advantageous for water extraction, further improvements in extraction efficiency are required for future engines with low fan speed and low blade solidity. The final part of the paper looks at the effect of a bleed lip protrusion to improve water extraction, as this can be retrofitted in engines. An extra 5 percentage points can be achieved by doing this without a penalty operability. This has been explained using 3D computational fluid dynamics by examining the flow separation topology.

summary_zh: 本研究通过专用试验台，研究了在现代中压压气机级转子或静子后设置引气槽对水提取的影响。发现转子后引气比静子后引气水提取率提高最多40个百分点，且提取效率超过70%。通过3D CFD解释了引气唇缘凸起可额外提高5个百分点而不影响可操作性。
method: 实验测量与3D CFD数值模拟相结合，研究了不同引气槽几何和引气率（0%-30%）对水提取效率的影响。
innovation: 首次实现了对水提取的精确测量和多种引气槽几何的快速测试，并发现转子后引气显著优于静子后引气。
conclusions: 1. 转子后引气比静子后引气水提取率提高最多40个百分点。2. 所有引气率下转子出口提取效率均高于70%。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定中压压气机级，未考虑低风扇转速和低叶片稠度等未来发动机工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机引气流动，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: Numerical Investigation of Classic Flutter Mechanism Under Circumferentially Non-Uniform Inlet Condition
abstract: Abstract Over recent years, the aeroelastic problem of fan blades has become significantly serious due to the demand for high performance of aero-engines. To explore the aeroelastic issue of flutter, fan instability is represented by the aerodynamic damping. When the inlet condition is uniform, aerodynamic damping is mainly caused by the temporal factor, and the classic flutter usually does not occur due to the usage of mistuning. However, with the existence of circumferentially non-uniform components in the distorted inflow, aerodynamic damping is also affected by the spatial factor, which may alter the occurrence mechanism of classic flutter. To investigate this issue, the full-annulus 3D (three-dimensional) unsteady calculation is conducted on a transonic fan NASA Rotor 67 with a typical circumferential distortion inflow. As demonstrated by the energy method for the rotor blades at each nodal diameter, the coefficients of aerodynamic damping contain an interval value rather than a fixed datum. Some of the blades have positive damping, and others are negative. The positive and negative aerodynamic damping is determined by the relative position between the rotor blade and the distorted region in the circumferential direction. Furthermore, a fast calculation method based on the fundamental principle regarding flow periodicity is developed to obtain the aerodynamic damping at different nodal diameters under non-uniform inlet conditions.
