summary_zh: 本文通过谐波平衡法评估高压压气机后级静叶在跨声速条件下的气动阻尼，发现时域线性化方法在多数节径下无法准确预测阻尼，而谐波平衡法能捕捉激波/边界层相互作用对颤振阻尼的影响。
method: 数值方法：时域线性化RANS与谐波平衡法对比，辅以全环URANS时域积分，评估跨声速激波/边界层相互作用下的气动阻尼。
innovation: 揭示了激波/边界层相互作用锁定颤振模态并显著影响阻尼的机制，并证明谐波平衡法可复现该相互作用。
conclusions: 1. 时域线性化方法在多数节径下无法准确预测阻尼；2. 激波/边界层相互作用在特定节径范围内锁定颤振运动，显著影响阻尼。
limitations: 仅针对单个静叶排和特定工况，未考虑多排耦合或非定常来流畸变。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机气动弹性阻尼预测，与用户关注的稳定裕度间接相关，但未直接涉及叶尖畸变或激盘模型。

title: Numerical Predictions of Mean Performance and Dynamic Behavior of a 10 MWe SCO2 Compressor With Test Data Validation
abstract: Abstract High-fidelity aerodynamic analysis has been demonstrated for mean performance and unsteady dynamics in a sCO2 compressor designed by Hanwha Power Systems Americas for a 10 MWe Concentrating Solar Power plant. Simulations were performed with crunchcfd® software tool that was matured to accurately model near critical real fluid effects in sCO2. Pretest predictions for mean performance were validated with test data collected later. Performance predictions were accurate and captured sensitivity of the efficiency to inlet temperature of CO2 as well as steep drop-off at high flow rates due to condensation in the inlet throat. Detailed analysis was performed to understand the source of these performance losses at near critical conditions. Unsteady dynamic effects in the compressor at off-design conditions were also identified and quantified. In particular, a system wide “condensation surge” condition was detected at high flow coefficients that results in large amplitude pulsations with accompanying mass flow fluctuations at low frequencies and has potential to cause damage in closed-loop systems.
affiliations: Combustion Research and Flow Technology (United States)
CRAFT Tech , Pipersville, PA 18947
Houston Design & Development Center, Hanwha Power Systems Americas , Houston, TX 77079
Southwest Research Institute
Rotating Machinery Dynamics Section, Southwest Research Institute , San Antonio, TX 78238
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对10 MWe超临界CO2压缩机，采用高保真数值模拟预测平均性能与动态特性，并通过实验数据验证。研究发现近临界条件下入口喉部冷凝导致效率陡降，并识别出高流量系数下的“冷凝喘振”现象，引发低频大幅脉动。
method: 数值模拟（crunchcfd软件），模拟近临界真实流体效应，并与实验数据对比验证。工况参数包括10 MWe级、超临界CO2、变入口温度。
innovation: 首次对sCO2压缩机进行高保真非定常分析，准确预测近临界冷凝导致的性能损失，并识别出系统级“冷凝喘振”动态不稳定性。
conclusions: 1. 数值预测准确捕捉了效率对入口温度的敏感性及高流量下因冷凝导致的效率陡降。2. 发现“冷凝喘振”现象，产生低频大幅脉动，可能损坏闭环系统。
limitations: 仅针对特定10 MWe级sCO2压缩机，未涉及叶尖间隙或机匣处理等几何细节。
relevance_reason: 涉及压缩机稳定性（喘振）和数值方法，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或激盘模型，与用户课题部分相关。

title: Nonlinear Dynamics of Turbine Generator Shaft Trains: Evaluation of Bifurcation Sets Applying Numerical Continuation
abstract: Abstract The nonlinear dynamics of turbine generator shaft trains for power generation are investigated in this paper. Realistic models of rotors, pedestals, and nonlinear bearings of partial arc and lemon bore configuration are implemented to compose a nonlinear set of differential equations for autonomous (balanced) and nonautonomous (unbalanced—per ISO) cases. The solution branches of the dynamic system are evaluated with the pseudo-arc length continuation programed by the authors, and the respective limit cycles are evaluated by an orthogonal collocation method and investigated on their stability properties and quality of motion for the respective key design parameters for the rotor dynamic design of such systems, namely, bearing profile and respective pad length, preload and offset, pedestal stiffness and elevation (misalignment), and rotor slenderness. Model order reduction is applied to the finite element rotor model and the reduced system is validated in terms of unbalanced response and stability characteristics. The main conclusion of the current investigation is that the system has the potential to develop instabilities at rotating speeds lower than the threshold speed of instability (evaluated by the linear approach) for specific unbalance magnitude and design properties. Unbalance response (with stable and unstable branches) is evaluated in severely reduced time compared to this applying time integration methods, enabling nonlinear rotor dynamic design of such systems as a standard procedure, and revealing the complete potential of motions (not only local).
affiliations: National Technical University of Athens
School of Mechanical Engineering, National Technical University of Athens , Athens, Hellas 15780, Greece
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究汽轮发电机轴系的非线性动力学，采用真实转子、轴承和基座模型，通过数值延拓和正交配点法评估分岔集和极限环，发现系统在低于线性失稳阈值的转速下可能因特定不平衡量而失稳，实现了快速非线性转子动力学设计。
method: 数值方法：采用伪弧长延拓和正交配点法求解非线性微分方程，结合有限元模型降阶，分析平衡和不平衡工况。
innovation: 将数值延拓法应用于汽轮发电机轴系非线性动力学，揭示低于线性失稳阈值的失稳可能性，实现快速非线性设计。
conclusions: 系统在低于线性失稳阈值的转速下可能因特定不平衡量而失稳；不平衡响应（含稳定和不稳定分支）可在极短时间内评估。
limitations: 仅针对特定轴承构型和设计参数，未考虑叶片或气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子动力学和稳定性，但研究对象为汽轮发电机而非航空压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或气动弹性。

title: Mechanism of Axial Compressor Tip Clearance Noise Based on Taylor–Couette Flow Rotating Instability
abstract: Abstract Prediction of the tip clearance noise (TCN) of axial compressors is essential to accurately determine the noise level of the compressor, because it is left unattenuated during propagation. The existing studies on numerical methods are inadequate for accurate determination of the TCN owing to the limited understanding of the physical phenomenon. The most convincing explanation is that the TCN is generated because of the instability in shear waves in the tip clearance region. In this study, the rotating instability theory was developed further by modeling the physical phenomenon of the instability as a Taylor–Couette (T–C) flow. The TCN sources were obtained using T–C flow modeling, and duct noise analysis was performed to obtain the TCN at various locations and frequencies. The TCN predictions were compared with the existing experimental results and noise results obtained using FW–H. Results showed that the T–C flow modeling is sufficiently accurate for predicting the frequencies, wavenumber distributions, and SPL of the tip clearance noise of axial compressors.
affiliations: Seoul National University
Seoul National University Department of Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, , Gwanak-gu, Seoul 08826 , South Korea
Chonnam National University
Chonnam National University Department of Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, , Yeosu-si, Jeollanam-do 59626 , South Korea
summary_zh: 本研究基于Taylor-Couette流动模型发展旋转不稳定性理论，用于预测轴流压气机叶尖间隙噪声。通过建模获得噪声源，进行管道噪声分析，预测频率、波数分布和声压级，并与实验及FW-H结果对比，验证了模型准确性。
method: 理论建模与数值分析：采用Taylor-Couette流动模型模拟叶尖间隙剪切波不稳定性，结合管道噪声分析预测噪声特性。
innovation: 将旋转不稳定性现象建模为Taylor-Couette流动，首次从该角度解释叶尖间隙噪声产生机理，提高了预测精度。
conclusions: Taylor-Couette流动模型能准确预测轴流压气机叶尖间隙噪声的频率、波数分布和声压级，与实验吻合良好。
limitations: 模型可能未考虑实际压气机复杂几何和流动条件，如非均匀进气或叶片振动影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙和旋转不稳定性，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测部分相关。

title: Frequency Lock-In Phenomenon of Vortex Induced Vibration of a Rotating Blade Considering Bending-Torsion Coupling Effect
abstract: Abstract A rotating thin blade with bend-torsional coupling subjected to vortex induced vibration (VIV) is considered in this paper. It is necessary to study the motion coupled bending torsion due to the discordant centroid and shear center and the effect of centrifugal force at high-speed. The blade with a single axisymmetric section is regarded as a beam instead of an oscillator. The motion equation coupled bending-torsion of the blade is established by using the Euler–Lagrange equations, and the effect of centrifugal force is also employed. Vortex shedding is described by a nonlinear oscillator satisfying Van Der Pol (VDP) equation. Ritz–Galerkin method is employed to simplify the equations of the blade, and the interaction between the bending and torsion modes of blade and wake modes is discussed. The motion equation is simplified based on the contribution of the blade flutter mode. Furthermore, the single-mode approximation is used to investigate the effects of mass ratio, damping, and coupling coefficient on the locking phenomenon. It is also analyzed that the variation of flutter amplitude and locking region of the rotating blade considering bending-torsion coupling.
affiliations: Hefei University of Technology
Hefei University of Technology School of Automotive, and Transportation Engineering, , Hefei, Anhui 230000 , China
summary_zh: 本文研究旋转薄叶片在涡激振动下的频率锁定现象，考虑弯扭耦合效应。采用欧拉-拉格朗日方程建立弯扭耦合运动方程，引入离心力影响，用范德波尔方程描述涡脱落。通过Ritz-Galerkin方法简化，分析质量比、阻尼和耦合系数对锁定现象的影响。
method: 理论建模与数值分析：基于欧拉-拉格朗日方程和范德波尔方程，采用Ritz-Galerkin方法简化，单模态近似分析参数影响。
innovation: 在旋转叶片涡激振动中同时考虑弯扭耦合和离心力效应，并系统分析质量比、阻尼和耦合系数对频率锁定区域和振幅的影响。
conclusions: 弯扭耦合显著影响旋转叶片的涡激振动锁定现象；质量比、阻尼和耦合系数可调控锁定区域和振幅。
limitations: 仅考虑单轴对称截面梁模型，未涉及三维效应或非均匀来流。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动和流固耦合，但研究对象为涡激振动而非压气机内部流动稳定性，与用户研究方向间接相关。

title: Compressor Surge Precursors for a Turbocharger Coupled to a Pressure Vessel
abstract: Abstract Dynamic compressors operating region is mainly constrained by fluid-dynamic instabilities occurring at low mass flow rate conditions, such as surge and rotating stall. This work presents a vibro-acoustic experimental investigation on a centrifugal compressor of an automotive turbocharger aimed to identify and confirm some surge precursor values in correspondence of its inception conditions. The experimental campaign was carried out on a turbocharger equipped by a vaneless diffuser compressor exploited for the pressurization of an innovative solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) emulator. The investigated turbocharger is coupled with a pressure vessel for a former emulation activity on a pressurized SOFC. In such kind of plants, the joint effect of large volume size downstream the compressor makes more complex the dynamic behavior of the whole system during transients, thus significantly increasing surge onset risk. The main goal is to define a suitable quantitative indicator to detect in advance surge inception by relying only on system vibro-acoustic response. Several transient from a compressor stable condition to surge instability onset were performed by progressively closing specific valves in the air line. When moving close to surge , vibro-acoustic signals were acquired at a high sampling rate to investigate blade passage phenomena which might interact with rotating stall inception. Meanwhile, pressures, temperatures and mass flow rates measured at a lower sampling rate to correlate compressor vibro-acoustic and performance behavior. Cyclostationary analysis was performed on vibro-acoustic acquired signals to provide innovative diagnostic and predictive solutions (precursors) for early surge detection.
authors: Carlo Alberto Niccolini Marmont Du Haut Champ
affiliations: University of Genoa
University of Genoa, DIME, Thermochemical Power group (TPG), Genova, Italy
DIME, Thermochemical Power group (TPG), University of Genoa, Genova 16145, Italy
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究对汽车涡轮增压器离心压气机进行振动声学实验，旨在识别喘振前兆。实验在连接压力容器的无叶扩压器压气机上进行，通过逐步关闭阀门诱发喘振，采集高频振动声学信号和低频性能参数，采用循环平稳分析提取早期喘振检测的前兆指标。
method: 实验研究，在涡轮增压器离心压气机（无叶扩压器）上，通过逐步关闭阀门进行瞬态喘振诱发实验，采集高频振动声学信号和低频压力、温度、流量数据。
innovation: 利用循环平稳分析处理振动声学信号，提出基于系统振动声学响应的定量指标作为喘振前兆，用于早期检测，尤其适用于大容积下游系统。
conclusions: 1. 振动声学信号可有效识别喘振前兆；2. 循环平稳分析能提供早期喘振检测的定量指标。
limitations: 仅针对特定涡轮增压器与压力容器耦合系统，未涉及旋转失速等其他失稳机理。
relevance_reason: 研究喘振前兆与稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题方向部分相关。

title: Stability Analysis of an Industrial Blade Accounting for a Blade-Tip/Casing Nonlinear Interface
abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the local stability analysis of periodic solutions corresponding to the nonlinear vibration response of an industrial compressor blade, NASA rotor 37, on which are applied different types of nonlinearities. These solutions are obtained using a harmonic balance method-based approach presented in a previous paper. It accounts for unilateral contact and dry friction of the rotating blade against a rigid casing through a regularized penalty law. A Lanczos filtering technique is also employed to mitigate spurious oscillations related to the Gibbs phenomenon thus enhancing the robustness of the solver. In addition, a component mode synthesis technique is used to reduce the dimension of the numerical model. Stability assessment of the computed solutions relies on Floquet theory. It is performed through the computation of the monodromy matrix as well as Hill's method. Both methodologies are applied and thoroughly compared as the severity of the nonlinearity is gradually increased from a cubic spring to three-dimensional contact conditions on a deformed casing. While the presented results underline the applicability of both stability assessment methodologies for all types of nonlinearities, they also put forward the much higher computational effort required when computing the monodromy matrix. Indeed, it is shown that Hill's method yields converged results for significantly lower values of both the number of retained harmonics and the considered number of time steps thus making it a far more efficient method when dealing with industrial models. It is also underlined that the presented results are in excellent agreement with reference solution points obtained with time domain solution methods. Specific implementation tweaks that were found to be of critical importance in order to efficiently assess the stability of computed solutions are also detailed in order to provide a comprehensive view of the challenges inherent to such numerical developments.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
Département de génie mécanique, Polytechnique Montréal , Montréal, QC H3T 1J4, Canada
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究工业压气机叶片（NASA转子37）在叶尖/机匣非线性接触下的周期解稳定性。采用谐波平衡法、Lanczos滤波和模态综合法，结合Floquet理论和Hill法评估稳定性。结果表明Hill法计算效率远高于单值矩阵法，且与时域解吻合良好。
method: 数值方法：谐波平衡法、Lanczos滤波、模态综合法、Floquet理论（单值矩阵和Hill法）。工况：考虑单边接触和干摩擦的非线性界面。
innovation: 系统比较了单值矩阵法和Hill法在工业叶片非线性接触稳定性分析中的计算效率，并提出了关键实现技巧以提高效率。
conclusions: 1. Hill法在保留较少谐波和时间步时即可收敛，计算效率远高于单值矩阵法。2. 结果与时域参考解高度一致。
limitations: 仅针对特定叶片（NASA转子37）和刚性机匣，未考虑实际机匣变形或气动弹性耦合。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙非线性接触和稳定性分析，与叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接研究畸变进气。

title: Stratified and Buoyancy-Induced Flow in Closed Compressor Rotors
abstract: Abstract The radial growth of compressor discs is strongly influenced by conjugate heat transfer between conduction in the co-rotating discs and buoyancy-driven convection in the rotating fluid core between the discs. An accurate prediction of metal temperatures of these discs is an important issue in thermo-mechanical design, where blade-tip clearances must be controlled carefully to ensure safety and efficiency under all operating conditions. This paper presents an experimental study of the fluid dynamics and heat transfer in a closed rotating cavity, comparing results with theoretical models and introducing a new compressibility parameter χ. At large values of χ, where compressibility effects are significant, the air temperature approaches that of the shroud; such conditions suppress buoyancy effects and the flow in the rotating cavity becomes stratified, with convection replaced by conduction inside the fluid core. There are important practical consequences of stratification with significant differences in temperature distributions and stresses inside compressor discs. The influence of χ is also shown on the radial temperature distributions for the discs and on the shroud heat transfer correlations, which are compared qualitatively with previously published data collected where the effects of compressibility are relatively small. The experiments reveal that there is a critical value of χ where the convective heat flux to the shroud is zero. The radial distribution of disc temperature was that expected from pure conduction in a cylinder. A new heat transfer correlation based on measured shroud heat flux and the theoretical core temperature is presented. The unsteady flow characteristics in the cavity were also investigated, identifying coherent rotating structures across a range of experimental conditions. These cyclonic/anti-cyclonic vortex pairs generate the nondimensional circumferential pressure difference necessary for the radial outflow (of cold fluid) and inflow (of hot fluid) through the rotating core. The experiments show that the magnitude of these pressure variations can be correlated against Grashof number and at high values of χ the structures do not exist. The combined experimental and theoretical results will be of practical interest to engine designers and for the validation of computational models.
affiliations: University of Bath
University of Bath Department of Mechanical Engineering, , Bath BA2 7AY , UK
summary_zh: 本文实验研究了封闭压气机转子盘腔内的分层与浮力驱动流动，提出了可压缩性参数χ。发现高χ下压缩效应显著，空气温度接近机匣，浮力被抑制，流动分层，对流被传导取代。实验揭示了χ的临界值使对流热通量为零，并识别出旋转涡对结构。
method: 实验研究，测量封闭旋转盘腔内的流体动力学和传热，与理论模型对比，引入可压缩性参数χ。
innovation: 提出新的可压缩性参数χ，揭示其对分层和传热的影响，发现临界χ值使对流热通量为零，并识别出旋转涡对结构。
conclusions: 高χ下压缩效应抑制浮力，流动分层，对流被传导取代；存在临界χ使对流热通量为零，盘温分布呈纯传导特征。
limitations: 实验限于封闭转子盘腔，未涉及真实压气机叶片通道及叶尖间隙效应。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及转子盘腔流动和叶尖间隙控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: A Fluid–Structure Interaction Tool Using a Van der Pol-Based Reduced-Order Model for Buffet and Nonsynchronous Vibrations
abstract: Abstract This paper builds upon a two-degree-of-freedom Van der Pol oscillator-based reduced-order model for studying the mechanisms around nonsynchronous vibrations (NSV) in turbomachinery. One degree tracks the fluid motion utilizing a combination of a traditional Van der Pol oscillator and a Duffing oscillator; the other degree of freedom is a mass on a spring and a damper, in this case, a cylinder. Thus, this model can be considered one of fluid–structure interaction. The cubic stiffening from the Duffing oscillator proved to improve the match to experimental data. Using this model to study the time history of the fluid and the structure oscillation, additional parameters are extracted to understand the underlying mechanisms of frequency lock-in and limit cycle oscillation. First, the phase shift between the vortex shedding and the structural motion is calculated when it locks-in and then unlocks. Second, the work done per cycle is analyzed from the contributions of the mass, spring, and damping forces to determine the dominant contributor when locking-in versus unlocking. Third, the phase portrait is plotted on a Poincaré map to further study the locked-in versus unlocked responses. This model is then validated against not only experimental data but also computational simulation results and previous reduced-order models. The finalized model can now serve as a preliminary design tool for turbomachinery applications. For more realistic and accurate modeling, the third degree of freedom in the form of an airfoil pitching motion will be added in a separate paper as well.
affiliations: Duke University
Duke University Thomas Lord Department of Mechanical Engineering, Pratt School of Engineering, , Durham, NC 27703-6366
Duke University Thomas Lord Department of Mechanical Engineering, Pratt School of Engineering, , Durham, NC 27708
summary_zh: 本文基于二自由度Van der Pol振子降阶模型研究涡轮机械非同步振动（NSV）的流固耦合机制。模型结合Van der Pol和Duffing振子追踪流体运动，弹簧-质量-阻尼系统代表结构（圆柱）。通过分析锁频与极限环振荡的相位差、每周期功及庞加莱映射，揭示了锁频/解锁机理。Duffing立方刚度改善了与实验数据的匹配。模型经实验和数值验证，可作为初步设计工具。
method: 数值降阶模型（Van der Pol + Duffing振子），结合实验数据验证，分析锁频/解锁的相位、功和相图。
innovation: 将Duffing立方刚度引入Van der Pol振子模型以改进实验匹配，并系统提取锁频/解锁的相位差、功贡献等参数。
conclusions: 1. Duffing立方刚度显著提升模型与实验数据的匹配度。2. 锁频时流体与结构运动相位差稳定，解锁时变化；功分析表明阻尼力主导锁频。
limitations: 模型为二维圆柱简化，未考虑叶片俯仰运动，实际压气机几何更复杂。
relevance_reason: 研究NSV机理，与压气机非同步振动相关，但模型简化且未涉及叶尖间隙畸变。

title: A Data-Driven Tip Flow Loss Prediction Method for a Transonic Fan Under Boundary Layer Ingesting Inflow Distortion
abstract: Abstract In a boundary layer ingesting (BLI) propulsion system, the fan blades need to operate continuously under large-scale inflow distortion. The distortion will lead to serious aerodynamic losses in the fan, degrading the fan performance and the overall aerodynamic benefits of the aircraft. Therefore, in the preliminary design of a BLI propulsion system, it is necessary to evaluate the influence of the fuselage boundary layer under different flight conditions on the fan aerodynamic performance. However, a gap exists in the current computational methods for BLI fan performance evaluations. The full-annulus unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) simulations can provide reliable predictions but are computationally expensive for design iterations. The low-order computational methods are cost-efficient but rely on the loss models for accurate prediction. The conventional empirical or physics-based loss models show notable limitations under complex distortion-induced off-design working conditions in a BLI fan, especially in the rotor tip region, compromising the reliability of the low-order computational methods. To balance the accuracy and cost of loss prediction, the paper proposes a data-driven tip flow loss prediction framework for a BLI fan. It employs a neural network to build a surrogate model to predict the tip flow loss at complex non-uniform aerodynamic conditions. Physical understandings of the flow features in the BLI fan are integrated into the data-driven modeling process, to further reduce the computational cost and improve the method’s applicability. The data-driven prediction method shows good accuracy in predicting the overall values and radial distributions of fan rotor tip flow loss under various BLI inflow distortion conditions. Not only does it have higher accuracy than the conventional physics-based loss models but also needs much less computational time than the full-annulus time-accurate simulations. The present work has demonstrated a significant potential of data-driven approaches in complex aerodynamic loss modeling and will contribute to future BLI fan design.

summary_zh: 针对边界层吸入（BLI）风扇在进气畸变下的叶尖流动损失预测问题，提出一种数据驱动框架，利用神经网络构建代理模型，融合物理理解以降低计算成本。该方法在预测叶尖损失整体值和径向分布上优于传统物理模型，且计算时间远少于全环非定常模拟。
method: 采用神经网络构建代理模型，基于全环非定常RANS模拟数据训练，融合物理特征，预测BLI风扇转子叶尖流动损失。
innovation: 将物理理解融入数据驱动建模，平衡精度与成本，在复杂畸变条件下叶尖损失预测精度高于传统经验/物理模型。
conclusions: 1. 数据驱动方法在多种BLI进气畸变条件下准确预测叶尖损失整体值和径向分布。2. 计算时间远少于全环非定常模拟，精度高于传统物理模型。
limitations: 仅针对特定BLI风扇和畸变条件，未考虑其他几何或工况，泛化性待验证。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖畸变下的损失预测，与用户关注的叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Azimuthal Instabilities of an Annular Combustor With Different Swirling Injectors
abstract: Abstract Experiments are carried out on the laboratory-scale MICCA-Spray annular combustor to examine the effects of swirlers on combustion instabilities. This system comprises 16 spray-swirl injectors and gives rise to instabilities coupled by azimuthal modes. Five types of swirlers producing clockwise rotation and varying in swirl numbers and pressure drops are considered. These swirlers can be broadly categorized into two groups: lower-swirl and higher-swirl groups, based on their swirl numbers. An arrangement where clockwise and counterclockwise swirlers alternate is also studied. Experiments are performed systematically with liquid heptane at five levels of thermal power and six equivalence ratios. Results reveal that none of the swirlers in the lower-swirl category exhibit instability in the operating region considered, whereas the higher-swirl units feature strong azimuthal instabilities that trace an overall limit cycle envelope with a few short and random bursts. Among the higher-swirl group, a higher pressure drop swirler is associated with a broader instability map. This shows that the transition to instability mainly depends on the swirl number through its effect on the flame structure and that the pressure drop adds to further variations in amplitude and frequency of oscillation. The spin ratio time series indicate that the modes are of mixed type and that their distribution depends on the operating condition. On specifically comparing the spin ratio distribution between a full set of clockwise rotating (CR) swirlers and a configuration where clockwise and counterclockwise rotating swirlers (CCR) are alternatively placed, it is found that there is no definite statistical preference for spin ratio linked to the effect of bulk swirl. In some cases, however, the CCR configuration promotes a broader distribution of spin ratios centered around the standing mode (sr = 0) while the CR setup favors azimuthal modes spinning in the counterclockwise direction. An attempt is made to interpret the occurrence of instabilities by making use of flame describing functions (FDFs) measured in a single-injector combustor. It is found that the FDFs corresponding to the two swirler categories (lower-swirl and higher-swirl) are relatively distinct. The observed behavior is tentatively interpreted using an instability analysis in which the injector and upstream plenum are represented by an impedance that shifts the band of instability. The unstable behavior is then linked to the relative position of the FDF phase with respect to the instability band in the frequency range corresponding to the expected azimuthal mode frequency. The phase and gain of the FDF notably depend on the swirl number, and it is possible to distinguish, for the present configuration, a category of low swirl number injectors inducing stable operation and another category of high swirl number units leading to oscillations.

summary_zh: 在MICCA-Spray环形燃烧室上实验研究了旋流器对燃烧不稳定性的影响。16个喷雾旋流喷射器产生方位角模态耦合的不稳定性。对比了低旋流和高旋流两组旋流器，发现高旋流组出现强方位角不稳定性，且压降影响振荡幅频。通过火焰描述函数和阻抗分析解释了不稳定行为。
method: 实验研究，在环形燃烧室上使用16个旋流喷射器，改变旋流数和压降，测量火焰描述函数，结合阻抗分析。
innovation: 系统对比了不同旋流数和压降对环形燃烧室方位角不稳定性的影响，并利用单喷射器FDF和阻抗模型解释多喷射器系统中的不稳定行为。
conclusions: 低旋流旋流器在操作区域内无不稳定性，高旋流旋流器产生强方位角不稳定性，且压降越高不稳定图越宽。旋流数通过影响火焰结构决定稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定燃烧室和燃料（液态庚烷），未考虑其他燃料或几何尺寸的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究燃烧不稳定性，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但涉及旋转不稳定性模态，有一定参考价值。

title: InstabilitiesEverywhere!Hard Problems in Aero-Engines
abstract: Abstract Many of the challenges that limited aero-engine operation in the 1950s, 1960s, 1970s, and 1980s were static in nature: hot components exceeding temperature margins, stresses in the high-speed rotating structure approaching safety limits, and turbomachinery aerodynamic efficiencies missing performance goals. Modeling tools have greatly improved since and have helped enhance jet engine design, largely due to better computers and improved simulations of the fluid flow and supporting structure. The situation is thus different today, where important problems encountered past the design and development phases are dynamic in nature. These can jeopardize engine certification and lead to major delays and increased program costs. A real challenge is the characterization of damping and the related dynamic behavior of rotating and stationary components and assemblies, and of the fluid–structure interactions and coupling. The theme of this lecture is instability in the broadest sense. A number of problems of technological interest in aero-engines are discussed with a focus on dynamical system modeling and identification of the underlying mechanisms. Future perspectives on outstanding seminal problems and grand challenges are also given.
affiliations: Massachusetts Institute of Technology
American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Massachusetts Institute of Technology Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics, , Cambridge, MA 02138
summary_zh: 本文综述了航空发动机中动态不稳定性问题，包括阻尼特性、旋转与静止部件的动态行为、流固耦合等。通过动力学系统建模识别机理，指出未来挑战在于预测和控制这些不稳定性。
method: 综述性理论分析，基于动力学系统建模和机理识别，未涉及具体数值或实验工况。
innovation: 将航空发动机中的多种动态不稳定性问题统一在动力学系统框架下分析，强调阻尼和流固耦合的关键作用。
conclusions: 1. 现代航空发动机的主要挑战已从静态问题转向动态不稳定性。2. 阻尼特性和流固耦合是影响动态行为的关键因素。
limitations: 未提供具体定量数据或案例验证，缺乏对特定不稳定性机制的深入分析。
relevance_reason: 涉及稳定性、气动弹性等核心方向，但未聚焦叶尖间隙或畸变等具体问题。

title: A high-safety active/passive hybrid control approach for compressor surge based on nonlinear model predictive control
abstract: Surge active control can expand the stable operating range of the compressor. However, the difficulty of flow measurement, dynamic uncertainty disturbance, actuator delay characteristics, hard constraints of control variable, and system security measures have not been fully considered in the existing active control system, which significantly hinders its engineering application. Therefore, a nonlinear model predictive surge active control method is first presented based on flow estimator designed by using a continuous-time Kalman filter for dealing with the hard constraint of control variable and the impact of actuator delay of compression system with dynamic uncertainty. Then, a high-safety active/surge passive hybrid control strategy is designed, dominated by the surge active control and supplemented by the surge passive control, to ensure the compression system’s safe and stable operation. Lastly, the simulation results suggest that the flow estimator accurately estimates the compressor flow. When considering the delay impact of the actuators and sensors and measurement noise on the system, the proposed method exhibits stronger robustness than the existing methods. The active/surge passive hybrid control strategy can successfully ensure the compression system's safe and stable operation. This paper is of high practical significance for the engineering application of future compressor surge active control technologies.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Jiangsu Province Key Laboratory of Aerospace Power System, College of Energy and Power Engineering, Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Nanjing 210016, China
summary_zh: 针对喘振主动控制中流量测量困难、动态不确定性、执行器延迟及控制变量硬约束等问题，提出基于非线性模型预测控制与连续时间卡尔曼滤波流量估计器的主动控制方法，并设计主动/被动混合控制策略。仿真表明该方法鲁棒性强，能确保压缩系统安全稳定运行。
method: 数值仿真方法，采用非线性模型预测控制与连续时间卡尔曼滤波流量估计器，考虑执行器/传感器延迟和测量噪声。
innovation: 首次将非线性模型预测控制与卡尔曼滤波流量估计结合，处理控制变量硬约束和执行器延迟，并设计主动/被动混合控制策略提升安全性。
conclusions: 1. 流量估计器能准确估计压缩机流量。2. 考虑延迟和噪声时，所提方法鲁棒性优于现有方法，混合控制策略可确保系统安全稳定。
limitations: 仅基于仿真验证，未考虑实际压缩机复杂几何和流动细节，工程应用需进一步实验验证。
relevance_reason: 研究喘振主动控制，与压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Assessment of Two Harmonic Balance Method-Based Numerical Strategies for Blade-Tip/Casing Interactions: Application to NASA Rotor 67
abstract: Abstract The study presented in this paper focuses on the analysis of rubbing interactions—including unilateral contact and dry friction—between a rotating fan blade and a rigid casing by frequency domain methods. Two previously published Harmonic Balance Method-based methodologies are assessed: (1) an approach relying on augmented Lagrangians and (2) a second method using a regularized penalty law combined with a Lanczos σ-approximation filter. As a reference point for this comparison, a time-domain numerical strategy relying on a Lagrange multiplier-based contact treatment is considered. All computations are run with the NASA rotor 67 fan blade, an open industrial blade geometry. As it undergoes structural contacts, this blade features an intricate dynamics response, thus making it a challenging case study for nonlinear iterative solvers. The contact scenario is chosen to be an ovalization of the casing with no external forcing. This scenario induces highly nonlinear responses of the blade and complex phenomena such as isolated frequency response curves. The results presented underline a very good agreement of the different strategies with the reference time marching approach. An in-depth comparison is made with an emphasis on nonlinear frequency response curves (NFRC) and time signals. Finally, a physical analysis of the encountered isolas is presented through an in-depth investigation of the main modal contributions for each computed solution. In the end, this paper provides new qualitative elements allowing for a better understanding of rubbing interactions that may not be efficiently obtained with time marching procedures.

summary_zh: 本文评估了两种基于谐波平衡法的频域数值策略，用于分析旋转风扇叶片与刚性机匣之间的摩擦接触（包括单边接触和干摩擦）。以NASA转子67叶片为对象，在机匣椭圆化无外激励的接触场景下，比较了增广拉格朗日法和正则化罚函数法结合Lanczos滤波器的性能。结果表明，两种策略与时域参考方法吻合良好，能有效捕捉非线性频率响应曲线和孤立分支，并揭示了主要模态贡献。
method: 数值方法：两种谐波平衡法（增广拉格朗日法和正则化罚函数+Lanczos滤波器），参考时域拉格朗日乘子法。工况：NASA转子67叶片，刚性机匣椭圆化变形，无外激励。
innovation: 系统评估了两种频域接触处理方法在叶片-机匣摩擦问题中的适用性，并首次揭示了孤立频率响应曲线的模态贡献机制。
conclusions: 1. 两种谐波平衡法均能准确预测非线性频率响应，与时域结果高度一致。2. 孤立分支的出现与特定模态的强非线性耦合有关。
limitations: 仅考虑刚性机匣和单一椭圆化变形模式，未涉及气动弹性耦合或真实机匣柔性。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶片-机匣接触动力学，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接针对叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Nonlinear Damper-Blade Coupling Calculations Reduced to Essentials
abstract: Abstract To improve the numerical efficiency of the nonlinear calculations required for the dynamic response of damped turbine blades, the authors recently introduced the platform centered reduction (PCR) method which represents the platform as a rigid body subject to a single moment representing the effect of forces from adjacent dampers. The concept of a” basic cycle” is now introduced to simplify—without introducing additional approximations—the functional relationship between the moment on the platform due to the frictional forces and its angle of rotation, both of which are calculated around an axis parallel to the main axis of neck bending. It is shown that, for the first bending mode of vibration, this function completely characterizes the damper-platform assembly, such that for rotation values greater than the” base cycle,” the values of the real and imaginary components of the damper-platform flexural stiffness are obtained a priori, without having to repeat the contact cycle calculations at each amplitude change. The advantage of this approach for numerical calculations and the convenience of having a model focused on the essential aspects of the engineering problem of best coupling between damper and blade are demonstrated. Also, considering the improvements introduced, the” designer's diagram,” already proposed by these authors, is revised. The advantage lies in representing the essential, yet adequate approximation in the relationship between the maximum alternating bending stress due to vibration and the values of the excitation force on the airfoil, values each associated with a corresponding “oscillation amplitude/resonance frequency” pair.
affiliations: Polytechnic University of Turin
Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, Politecnico di Torino , Torino 10129, Italy
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文针对阻尼叶片非线性动态响应计算效率问题，提出了平台中心缩减（PCR）方法和“基本循环”概念，简化了摩擦阻尼器与叶片耦合的接触循环计算。研究表明，对于第一弯曲模态，该函数完全表征阻尼器-平台组件，可先验获得阻尼器-平台弯曲刚度的实部和虚部，无需重复计算。同时修订了“设计者图”，以优化阻尼器与叶片的最佳耦合。
method: 数值方法，采用平台中心缩减（PCR）方法和“基本循环”概念，简化摩擦阻尼器与叶片耦合的非线性接触计算，针对第一弯曲模态进行分析。
innovation: 引入“基本循环”概念，无需重复接触循环计算即可先验获得阻尼器-平台弯曲刚度；修订“设计者图”，提供更高效的阻尼器-叶片耦合设计工具。
conclusions: 1. 对于第一弯曲模态，阻尼器-平台组件的功能关系完全表征其特性，旋转值大于基本循环后刚度分量可先验获得。2. 修订后的设计者图能更有效地表示振动交变弯曲应力与激振力之间的关系。
limitations: 研究主要针对第一弯曲模态，未涉及高阶模态或更复杂的叶片振动形式。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶片振动和阻尼器耦合，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但主要针对涡轮叶片而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙或稳定性。

title: Fan Stability Enhancement With Partial Casing Treatments
abstract: Abstract Casing treatments are used to extend the stability margin of fans or compressors. These typically have an axisymmetric arrangement, but for a fan exposed to non-axisymmetric distortion, a casing treatment applied to a fraction of the annulus is of interest to target a particular distortion feature. In this paper, a partial casing treatment has been designed with axial-skewed slots, and an experimental investigation has been carried out to determine the effects of the treatment extent and position. Three inlet conditions were tested for each extent of casing treatment: clean, radial tip-low distortion, and half-annulus tip-low distortion. For axisymmetric inlet conditions, the stall margin and efficiency penalty increased approximately linearly with casing treatment extent. However, for half-annulus tip-low distortion, there was a strong dependence between the position of the casing treatment relative to the distorted sector and the stall margin improvement. If the casing treatment is positioned where the rotor enters the distorted sector, unsteady disturbances in the rotor tip flow are minimized. However, if the rotor meets the casing treatment later in the distorted sector, the disturbances are able to grow, leading to earlier stall inception. Overall, this shows that partial casing treatments can target a distorted flow to give a disproportionately positive impact compared to a full annulus casing treatment. For example, it was found that a 72 deg casing treatment extent could be positioned to achieve over 50% of the full annulus casing treatment stall margin improvement with only 20% of the efficiency penalty.
affiliations: University of Cambridge
Sainsbury Laboratory
University of Cambridge Whittle Laboratory, , 1 JJ Thomson Avenue, Cambridge CB3 0DY , UK
summary_zh: 本文实验研究了部分机匣处理（轴向偏斜槽）对风扇稳定性的影响，针对清洁、径向叶尖低压和半环叶尖低压三种进气条件，分析了处理范围和位置的作用。结果表明，对于非轴对称畸变，部分机匣处理可针对性改善失速裕度，例如72°处理范围可实现全环处理50%以上的裕度提升，而效率损失仅20%。
method: 实验研究，采用轴向偏斜槽部分机匣处理，测试三种进气条件（清洁、径向叶尖低压、半环叶尖低压），改变处理范围和位置。
innovation: 首次系统研究部分机匣处理在非轴对称畸变进气下的效果，发现处理位置相对于畸变扇区的依赖性，并证明部分处理可带来不成比例的裕度收益。
conclusions: 1. 对于半环叶尖低压畸变，机匣处理位置显著影响失速裕度，转子进入畸变区时处理效果最佳。2. 72°处理范围可达到全环处理50%以上的裕度提升，效率损失仅20%。
limitations: 仅针对特定畸变类型（叶尖低压）和单一槽型（轴向偏斜槽），未涵盖其他畸变或处理形式。
relevance_reason: 直接涉及叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Effects of Sideslip Direction on a Rear Fuselage Boundary Layer Ingesting Fan
abstract: Abstract Boundary layer ingestion (BLI) offers potential reductions in fuel burn and emissions. The propulsive fuselage concept features an aft fan that ingests the 360 deg fuselage boundary layer. A critical condition for this configuration occurs when a sideslip angle arises between the aircraft longitudinal axis and the freestream velocity. The sideslip flow in combination with the airframe generates inlet distortion that depends on the sideslip direction. In particular, the sideslip increases flow into the windward side of the intake and reduces the flow on the opposite side, leading to either co-swirl or counter-swirl at the fan face. This article investigates the effect of sideslip direction on the aerodynamics of an aft BLI fan. Experimental measurements have been taken in a low-speed fan rig with representative total pressure and swirl distortion. These tests have been complemented by full-annulus unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes simulations to understand the impact of sideslip on the rotor and outlet guide vane flow fields. The results show that positive sideslip (sideslip that produces counter-swirl) increases the fan work and incidence, but the additional losses are relatively small. However, negative sideslip results in lower loading, negative incidence, and greater losses. The stage loading was 28% higher and the stage efficiency was 1.65% higher for positive versus negative sideslip. The positive sideslip case was also found to lose some operating range, equivalent to 2% of nozzle area. Overall, the fan design tolerates the sideslip distortion well and demonstrates the importance of the coupling of both swirl and total pressure distortion with the fan aerodynamics.
affiliations: Sainsbury Laboratory
University of Cambridge
University of Cambridge Whittle Laboratory, , 1 JJ Thomson Avenue, Cambridge CB3 0DY , UK
summary_zh: 研究侧滑方向对后机身边界层吸入风扇的影响。通过低速风扇实验和全环非定常RANS模拟，发现正侧滑（产生反向旋流）增加风扇功和攻角但损失较小，负侧滑导致更低负荷和更大损失。正侧滑相比负侧滑级负荷高28%，效率高1.65%，但损失部分工作范围。
method: 低速风扇实验测量总压和旋流畸变，结合全环非定常RANS模拟分析侧滑对转子和出口导叶流场的影响。
innovation: 揭示了侧滑方向引起的旋流畸变与总压畸变耦合对风扇气动性能的差异化影响，特别是正负侧滑的对比。
conclusions: 正侧滑（反向旋流）使级负荷提高28%，效率提高1.65%，但工作范围减小约2%喷嘴面积；负侧滑导致更低负荷和更大损失。
limitations: 仅研究单一风扇设计，未考虑不同侧滑角大小或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 研究畸变进气对风扇性能的影响，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或失速预测。

title: Blisk With Small Geometry Mistuning and Blend Repair: As-Measured Finite Element Model and Experimental Verification
abstract: Abstract This paper presents an “As-Measured Model” (AMM) of a blended blisk, built upon the measurement of the true geometry of the blisk by the three-dimensional optical scanning technology. This high-fidelity model aims to account for the variances of blade frequencies and mode shapes within the real blisk in the presence of both the blend repair and inherent geometry mistuning due to manufacturing, etc. An improved mesh updating strategy is proposed to adapt a seed blisk finite element model (FEM) to the measured geometry. The resultant AMM is therefore able to accurately represent the measured blade-to-blade geometry variances. The classical blade detuning test (BDT) in combination with a novel “correction” procedure is employed to experimentally evaluate the “blade-alone” frequency mistuning pattern in the real blisk. Experimental verification of the AMM demonstrates that it is able to not only capture the blade-alone frequency and mode shape variations due to both the blend and intrinsic blade geometry variances, but also to reproduce the global dynamics of the blended blisk with acceptable accuracy.

summary_zh: 本文针对带有小几何失谐和混合修复的整体叶盘，基于三维光学扫描构建了“实测模型”（AMM），通过改进的网格更新策略适配测量几何，并采用叶片失谐测试与校正程序实验验证。AMM能准确捕捉叶片频率和振型变化，并复现整体动力学。
method: 数值建模与实验验证：三维光学扫描获取真实几何，改进网格更新策略构建AMM；实验采用叶片失谐测试（BDT）与校正程序。
innovation: 提出基于实测几何的高保真AMM，结合改进网格更新策略，能同时考虑混合修复和制造失谐，并通过实验校正程序验证。
conclusions: AMM能准确捕捉叶片频率和振型变化（包括混合和固有几何差异），并复现整体叶盘动力学，精度可接受。
limitations: 仅针对单一整体叶盘，未考虑气动载荷或旋转效应，且实验验证限于静态。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动建模与实验，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但未涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙等核心方向。

title: Computational and Experimental Assessment of a MW-Scale Supercritical CO2 Compressor Operating in Multiple Near-Critical Conditions
abstract: Abstract This work illustrates the results of a wide experimental campaign in the frame of the EU-funded project sCO2-Flex, which focused on the investigation of a MW-scale sCO2 compressor operating in plant-representative conditions. The experimental tests were carried out for four temperature levels between 304.15 K and 309.15 K at a fixed pressure of 79.79 bar, hence covering an extended thermodynamic region close to the critical point. The experimental results are thoroughly discussed with the support of steady computational fluid-dynamics simulations, assuming homogeneous flows and thermodynamic equilibrium for the two-phase flow description. Changing the upstream total state, two peculiar variabilities in the compressor pressure ratio and choking flow rate are experimentally and computationally observed. While the former is mainly related to the single-phase flow thermodynamics, the latter originates from the onset of two-phase flows. As the simulations predict the experimental choking with a maximum error of 3%, the corresponding two-phase speed of sound is analyzed to infer the underlying equilibria between phases. It is found that, for the tested conditions, two-phase flows quickly achieve thermodynamic equilibrium, and non-equilibrium or metastable effects arguably play a marginal role in the process.

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和稳态CFD模拟，评估了兆瓦级超临界CO2压缩机在近临界工况（304.15-309.15 K，79.79 bar）下的性能。发现压比变化主要源于单相热力学，而壅塞流量变化由两相流引起，模拟预测壅塞误差小于3%，且两相流快速达到热力学平衡。
method: 实验与稳态CFD模拟结合，采用均匀流和热力学平衡假设描述两相流，工况覆盖四个温度水平（304.15-309.15 K）和固定压力79.79 bar。
innovation: 首次在兆瓦级sCO2压缩机上系统研究近临界区多温度点的压比和壅塞特性，并定量验证两相流快速平衡假设。
conclusions: 1. 压比变化主要由单相热力学决定，壅塞流量变化由两相流引起。2. 模拟预测壅塞流量误差小于3%，两相流快速达到热力学平衡，非平衡效应可忽略。
limitations: 仅针对固定压力79.79 bar和四个温度点，未覆盖更宽工况范围；假设均匀流和热力学平衡，未考虑非平衡效应细节。
relevance_reason: 涉及压缩机稳定性和流动分析，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或压气机稳定性建模，与用户课题部分相关。

title: Reduced Order Modeling of Forced Response in a Multistage Compressor Under Mistuning and Aerocoupling
abstract: Abstract Vibration amplitudes and fatigue life in multistage turbomachinery are commonly estimated by an investigation of the individual stages. Research is currently extending the scope to include structural and aeroelastic interstage coupling. Both effects have been shown to significantly influence blade vibrations. For safe operation of modern blisk blading with its lower structural damping due to the elimination of frictional contacts at the blade roots, an accurate prediction of the vibration behavior with mistuning is necessary to avoid high cycle fatigue failures. In this paper, a cyclic Craig-Bampton reduction method with a priori interface reduction for multistage rotors is extended to handle aeroelastic effects. This reduced order model efficiently predicts forced response in multistage applications. Aeroelastic multistage simulations are carried out using the harmonic balance method to account for the stage interactions and yield damping and stiffness coefficients, as well as excitation forces. Small structural mistuning is projected onto the tuned system modes of the rotor. The approach is applied to a 2.5-stage compressor configuration. Monte Carlo simulations show the sensitivity of vibration amplitudes to the aeroelastic coupling for mistuning. The aeroelastic interstage coupling is found to originate mainly from acoustic mode propagation between the stages. The fatigue of rotor blades is significantly affected by multistage interactions since vibration amplitudes increase due to the superposition of the responses of multiple modes. This leads to the conclusion that aeroelastic multistage effects need to be incorporated in future design procedures to allow for an accurate prediction of fatigue life.

summary_zh: 本文针对多级压气机失谐与气动耦合下的强迫响应，提出一种扩展的循环Craig-Bampton降阶模型，结合谐波平衡法进行气动弹性多级模拟。蒙特卡洛仿真表明，气动弹性级间耦合主要源于声模态传播，多级相互作用显著影响叶片振动幅值和疲劳寿命。
method: 数值方法：循环Craig-Bampton降阶模型结合谐波平衡法，应用于2.5级压气机，考虑小结构失谐。
innovation: 将循环Craig-Bampton降阶法扩展至多级转子气动弹性效应，实现高效预测失谐下多级强迫响应。
conclusions: 1. 气动弹性级间耦合主要源于声模态传播；2. 多级相互作用使振动幅值增大，显著影响叶片疲劳寿命。
limitations: 仅针对2.5级压气机，未考虑叶尖间隙畸变等非均匀性。
relevance_reason: 涉及多级压气机气动弹性与强迫响应，与用户研究方向（压气机稳定性、气动弹性）相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变。

title: Extending Highly Loaded Axial Fan Operability Range Through Novel Blade Design
abstract: Abstract The tip clearance size has historically been considered to be the main factor affecting stability range in axial fan and compressors. This paper reveals that the stall characteristics are defined by the axial momentum flux of the tip leakage flow and that tip clearance is primarily a strong driver for this metric. A bespoke methodology for carefully tailoring the axial momentum via three-dimensional design is presented, which enables a higher degree of control over the stability range for cases where the tip clearance responds to other considerations and cannot be defined for this purpose. The effect of the axial momentum on efficiency is also addressed and the trade-off between operability range and design point performance is derived. The results show that the conditions for optimal stability differ from those for optimal efficiency and that control over the axial momentum enables tuning the design for a desired exchange. Numerical simulations have been employed to drive the analysis through a high-fidelity computational model whose behavior is supported by rich set of experimental data. Contrary to current belief, results further indicate that an accurate characterization of stall, including onset mechanism, can be achieved through steady-state simulations, minimizing the need for expensive time-accurate computations during the design phase.

summary_zh: 本文通过三维叶片设计定制叶尖泄漏流的轴向动量，以扩展高负荷轴流风机的稳定运行范围。研究发现失速特性由轴向动量通量决定，而非传统认为的叶尖间隙尺寸。采用稳态数值模拟结合实验数据验证，揭示了最佳稳定性与最佳效率条件不同，可通过轴向动量控制实现所需权衡。
method: 采用高保真稳态数值模拟，辅以丰富的实验数据验证，通过三维叶片设计定制轴向动量通量。
innovation: 提出通过三维设计定制轴向动量通量来控制稳定范围，挑战了叶尖间隙是主要影响因素的普遍观点，并证明稳态模拟可准确表征失速。
conclusions: 1. 失速特性由叶尖泄漏流的轴向动量通量决定，而非叶尖间隙尺寸。2. 最佳稳定性与最佳效率条件不同，可通过轴向动量控制实现所需权衡。
limitations: 研究基于特定轴流风机设计，可能不适用于其他类型压气机或极端工况。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接关注叶尖间隙畸变对稳定性的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: A Turbo-Oriented Data-Driven Modification to the Spalart–Allmaras Turbulence Model
abstract: Abstract The Spalart–Allmaras (SA) turbulence model is one of the most popular models applied to compressors, but it often over-predicts blockage size and hence under-predicts the stall margin. In this paper, a novel modification to the SA model is proposed to improve the prediction of compressor near-stall flows. The modification is based on the dimensionless vortical pressure gradient, which identifies blockage cells featured by 3D swirling, adverse pressure gradient, and low-momentum flows. It unblocks the compressor passage by enhancing the eddy viscosity in the identified blockage cells; whereas in canonical 2D flows the modification is automatically switched off. The model coefficients are calibrated via Bayesian inference, which considers the uncertainties involved in experiments and computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations of turbomachinery. The rotor exit radial profile data of NASA Rotor 67 at peak-efficiency and near-stall points are used for calibration. The calibrated model is tested extensively in four compressors covering both tip blockage and corner separation as well as both industrial and laboratory Reynolds number and Mach number. For the NASA Rotor 67 and the TUDa-GLR-OpenStage, the proposed model predicts more accurate stall margins at all operating speeds due to the tip unblocking effect. For the BUAA Stage B rotor, the proposed model predicts the tip blockage size and thus the stall margin more accurately. For the LMFA NACA65 cascade, the proposed model with the quadratic constitutive relation (QCR) achieves significant improvement in predicting the exit profiles due to the unblocking effect on the corner separation. The proposed model, termed as SA-PGω in this work, is a promising engineering tool for future Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) simulations of compressor near-stall flows.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Imperial College London Department of Mechanical Engineering, , London SW7 2AZ , UK
summary_zh: 针对SA湍流模型在压气机近失速流动中高估堵塞、低估失速裕度的问题，提出基于无量纲涡压梯度的修正模型SA-PGω，通过增强堵塞区涡粘性改善预测。采用贝叶斯推断校准系数，在四个压气机算例中验证，显著提升了失速裕度和出口剖面预测精度。
method: 数值方法：基于RANS的SA湍流模型修正，采用贝叶斯推断校准系数，在NASA Rotor 67等四个压气机上进行验证，涵盖不同转速、雷诺数和马赫数。
innovation: 提出基于无量纲涡压梯度的修正项，自动识别三维堵塞区并增强涡粘性，同时保持二维流动不变；采用贝叶斯推断考虑实验和CFD不确定性进行系数校准。
conclusions: 1. SA-PGω模型在NASA Rotor 67和TUDa-GLR-OpenStage上预测了更准确的失速裕度，归因于叶尖解堵效应。2. 在LMFA NACA65叶栅中结合QCR显著改善了出口剖面预测。
limitations: 仅针对RANS框架，未涉及高保真度方法如LES或DNS；校准数据仅来自单个转子，泛化性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦于压气机近失速流动预测，与用户关注的稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Unsteady Analysis of Aeroengine Intake Distortion Mechanisms: Vortex Dynamics in Crosswind Conditions
abstract: Abstract The formation of a ground vortex and its ingestion into an aero-engine intake under crosswind conditions play a significant role in the aerodynamic excitation of the fan. Using steady and unsteady numerical simulations, an analysis of the dynamics of several distortion features is presented. For a simplified intake at high crosswind velocities, there is a substantial movement of the ingested ground vortex at the aerodynamic interface plane (AIP). The ingested ground vortex follows a specific trajectory while varying both in size and strength. The transition from a periodic to an aperiodic regime of the intake distortion at the AIP occurs as the crosswind velocity is increased. Circumferential mode decomposition shows that the largest amplitude of the distortion occurs at the first circumferential mode, and the amplitudes of the higher modes decrease monotonically. Furthermore, the amplitude of the spatial harmonics is time-dependent, which may be an influential feature at the time of assessing fan forced response.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Vibration UTC, Imperial College London , London SW7 2AZ, UK
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Aero-mechanical Department, Rolls Royce PLC , Derby DE24 8BJ, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 该研究通过稳态与非稳态数值模拟，分析了侧风条件下航空发动机进气道地面涡的形成与吸入机制。研究发现，地面涡在气动界面平面（AIP）上沿特定轨迹运动，其尺寸和强度随时间变化；随着侧风速度增加，畸变从周期变为非周期。周向模态分解显示畸变主要集中于一阶模态，高阶模态幅值递减，且空间谐波幅值随时间变化，影响风扇强迫响应评估。
method: 采用稳态与非稳态数值模拟，分析高侧风速度下简化进气道的地面涡动力学，包括AIP处畸变特征和周向模态分解。
innovation: 揭示了侧风条件下地面涡在AIP处的非定常运动轨迹及畸变从周期到非周期的转变，并量化了畸变模态的时间依赖性。
conclusions: 1. 地面涡在AIP处沿特定轨迹运动，尺寸和强度变化；2. 畸变主要集中于一阶周向模态，高阶模态幅值单调递减，且幅值随时间变化。
limitations: 研究基于简化进气道模型，未考虑真实发动机几何和风扇耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及进气畸变及其对风扇强迫响应的影响，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Numerical Modeling and Design Challenges of Boundary Layer Ingesting Fans
abstract: Abstract Studies show that boundary layer ingesting (BLI) propulsion can provide significant fuel burn reduction relative to pylon-mounted turbofan engines. However, this type of propulsion can lead to serious difficulties and engineering challenges. Numerical analyses of the fan with a uniform flow at the inlet and that exposed to the distorted flow were performed. These required the use of a full-annulus unsteady time-marching computational fluid dynamics (CFD) model, which was validated with experimental data obtained at a test rig. The first negative effect of the distorted inlet velocity profile is a variable incidence angle of the rotor. Both the calculations and the experiment show the nonuniform axial and tangential velocity profiles in front of the rotor. As a result, significant changes in the angle of attack of the blades and corresponding unsteady rotor loads are observed. The research was performed for different operating conditions to obtain performance curves and assess the BLI influence. This demonstrated the second problem arising from the operation of the fan with the distorted flow at the inlet, which is a reduction of the stall margin (48% reduction in the experiment). The whole stage was optimized for the axisymmetric flow to ensure a required value of stall margin and the highest possible efficiency at the design point. The experimental efficiency of the rig at the design point with the distorted inlet was 2.05% lower than the undistorted one. The CFD model shows a 1.25% reduction. Similar reductions were obtained for other operating points.
affiliations: Instytut Lotnictwa

Łukasiewicz Research Network, Institute of Aviation , Aleja Krakowska 110/114, Warsaw 02-256 , Poland
University of Cincinnati
University of Cincinnati , P O. Box 210070, Cincinnati, OH 45221
summary_zh: 研究边界层吸入（BLI）推进对风扇性能的影响，采用全环非定常CFD模型和实验验证。发现畸变进气导致转子攻角变化、非定常载荷及失速裕度下降48%，设计点效率降低2.05%。
method: 全环非定常时间推进CFD模型，结合实验台架数据验证，对比均匀与畸变进气工况。
innovation: 系统量化BLI对风扇失速裕度和效率的负面影响，揭示畸变进气下转子攻角变化与非定常载荷的关联。
conclusions: 畸变进气使失速裕度降低48%（实验），设计点效率下降2.05%（实验）或1.25%（CFD）。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇级，未考虑机匣处理或主动控制等缓解措施。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦畸变进气对稳定裕度的影响，与用户课题（叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测）高度相关。

title: Modeling and Cycle Parameter Matching of a High-Speed Variable Cycle Turbofan-Ramjet Engine
abstract: Abstract Variable cycle turbofan-ramjet (VCTR) engine is a promising propulsion system candidate for future Mach 4+ vehicles. Compared with conventional turbine engines, the VCTR engine has a higher thrust-to-weight ratio, a smaller diameter and a more compact structure. A component-based simulation model is developed to explore the operating characteristics of a high-speed VCTR concept. Modeling methods of variable-geometry components are characterized in this paper, and then, the way to build the VCTR model solver is described. The VCTR engine simulation model is validated by the numerical and experimental results of double bypass (DB) variable cycle engines from NASA technical reports. Performance and control law of the VCTR engine along the flight trajectory with flight Mach number varying from 0.5 to 4.0 are obtained to maximize net thrust and compared with that of a conventional two-spool afterburning mixed-flow turbofan (MFTF). Results show that the VCTR's performance is highly dependent on the fan characteristics and limited by various operating constraints, such as fan surge margin, turbine inlet temperature, and compressor discharge temperature. In addition, the thrust level of the MFTF with the variable-area low-pressure turbine is close to the VCTR engine.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
Shaanxi Key Laboratory of Internal Aerodynamics in Aero-Engine, School of Power and Energy, Northwestern Polytechnical University , 127 West Youyi Road, Beilin District, Xi'an, Shaanxi 710072, China
Aero Engine Corporation of China (China)
AECC Guiyang Aero-Engine Research Institute , 602 Yuntan North Road, Guanshanhu District, Guiyang 550081, China
Shaanxi Key Laboratory of Internal Aerodynamics in Aero-Engine, School of Power and Energy, Northwestern Polytechnical University , 127 West Youyi Road, Beilin District, Xi'an 710072, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对马赫数4+飞行器，建立了高速变循环涡扇-冲压发动机的部件级仿真模型，采用变几何部件建模方法，并通过NASA双涵道变循环发动机数据验证。分析了飞行马赫数0.5~4.0轨迹下的性能与控制规律，发现性能高度依赖风扇特性并受喘振裕度等约束限制。
method: 部件级仿真建模，基于NASA双涵道变循环发动机实验数据验证，对比常规双轴加力混合排气涡扇发动机。
innovation: 建立了高速变循环涡扇-冲压发动机的变几何部件仿真模型，并揭示了风扇特性对性能的关键影响及多约束限制。
conclusions: 1. VCTR性能高度依赖风扇特性，受风扇喘振裕度、涡轮进口温度等约束限制。2. 带可变面积低压涡轮的MFTF推力水平接近VCTR。
limitations: 仅基于仿真模型，缺乏实验验证；未考虑叶尖间隙畸变等非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及风扇喘振裕度约束，与压气机稳定性相关，但主要关注发动机循环参数匹配，非叶尖间隙畸变或稳定性预测模型。

title: Numerical simulation method of surge experiments on gas turbine engines
abstract: In order to obtain the surge margin of an aero-engine during its operation, an engine surge experiment is required. A multi-dimensional simulation method for an aero-engine is established in this paper. The simulation of a surge experiment using high-pressure air-injection is then carried out on a turbo-shaft engine to obtain the surge boundary using this method. More specifically, firstly, a body-force model is employed to calculate the compressor performance owing to its capability of capturing the main three-dimensional features of compressor surge and avoiding excessive simulation time required by the traditional fully-three-dimensional Reynolds Averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) method. Then, a one-dimensional model combining a lumped-parameter plenum model is used for the combustor to account for the propagation of pressure waves and the heat-release process, and a zero-dimensional throttle model is used to mimic the choking effect at the turbine nozzle. Finally, the air-injection system is modeled by imposing an injection boundary condition, which can be used conveniently in changing injection parameters. Based on the established method, the influences of different test parameters, such as the air-injection location, the pressure, the orifice size, the number of injection orifices, and the injection time duration on the surge characteristics and boundary are further studied, which offer effective guidance to optimize an actual experimental design.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Institute for Aero Engine, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
School of Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 本文建立了一种航空发动机喘振实验的多维数值模拟方法，采用体力模型计算压气机性能，一维集总参数模型模拟燃烧室，零维节流模型模拟涡轮，并通过注入边界条件模拟高压空气喷射系统。研究了喷射位置、压力、孔径等参数对喘振特性的影响，为实验设计提供指导。
method: 数值模拟方法，结合体力模型（压气机）、一维集总参数模型（燃烧室）、零维节流模型（涡轮）及注入边界条件，研究不同喷射参数。
innovation: 采用体力模型替代全三维RANS方法，在捕捉喘振三维特征的同时大幅降低计算成本，并系统研究了多个喷射参数对喘振边界的影响。
conclusions: 1. 体力模型能有效模拟压气机喘振的三维特征。2. 喷射位置、压力、孔径等参数显著影响喘振边界，优化这些参数可提高实验设计效率。
limitations: 未考虑叶尖间隙畸变、旋转不稳定等复杂流动现象，且模型简化可能忽略部分物理细节。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及喘振边界预测和体力模型，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测有方法上的相关性，但未直接针对叶尖间隙畸变。

title: The Application of the Arbitrary-Order Galerkin Reduction Method to the Dynamic Analysis of a Rotor With a Preloaded Single-Pad Foil-Air Bearing
abstract: Abstract The compressible Reynolds equation (RE) is typically integrated within a fully coupled dynamical foil-air bearings (FABs)-rotor system via spatial Discretization transformation, e.g., finite difference (FD), finite element (FE). An alternative way of integrating the RE is through Galerkin reduction (GR). The motivation for using GR is the computational benefit coming from the drastic condensation of the problem due to the elimination of the two-dimensional grid used for the air film in FD or FE. This paper presents a novel application of arbitrary-order GR to both nonlinear and linearized analyses of rotor systems supported by single-pad FABs with variable radial clearance (preload). Simulations using FD gave a close correlation with those using GR for all preloads, with discrepancies increasing as the preload approaches the nominal clearance (c). The simulations show that the preload has to exceed a certain level in order to delay the onset of instability speed (OIS), and significant delay in OIS and suppression of subsynchronous vibration is possible when the preload is comparable to c. Experimental validation is provided.
affiliations: University of Manchester
Department of Mechanical, Aerospace and Civil Engineering, University of Manchester , Manchester M13 9PL, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文提出将任意阶伽辽金降阶方法应用于预载单垫箔片空气轴承支撑的转子系统动力学分析，替代传统有限差分或有限元方法求解可压缩雷诺方程。通过非线性与线性化分析，研究了预载对失稳起始转速和次同步振动的影响，并与有限差分结果对比验证。实验验证了预载接近名义间隙时能显著延迟失稳并抑制次同步振动。
method: 数值方法：任意阶伽辽金降阶方法求解可压缩雷诺方程，结合非线性与线性化分析；实验验证。工况参数：单垫箔片空气轴承，可变径向间隙（预载）。
innovation: 首次将任意阶伽辽金降阶方法应用于预载单垫箔片空气轴承-转子系统，大幅降低计算维度，并系统研究了预载对稳定性的影响。
conclusions: 1. 预载需超过一定水平才能延迟失稳起始转速；2. 预载接近名义间隙时，能显著延迟失稳并抑制次同步振动。
limitations: 仅针对单垫箔片空气轴承，未涉及多垫或不同轴承类型；预载范围有限。
relevance_reason: 研究转子振动控制与稳定性，但未涉及压气机叶尖间隙畸变或激盘模型，与用户研究方向间接相关。

title: Embedded Parameter Information in Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks for Compressor Airfoil Design
abstract: The use of conditional generative adversarial networks has become popular with the advancement of computer power, and in particular graphics processing units. Large hardware and software companies such as Google, IBM, and Facebook have been experimenting in this field for over a decade for facial recognition, image classification and pattern recognition, and deep fake facial and object design. One essential key to their success is access to large quantities of tagged and classified images, with millions of images typically being used. In contrast, relatively few similar advances have been seen in the engineering sector, mainly because engineering analyses that produce suitable images are often very expensive processes that absorb a considerable amount of effort to generate. In addition, feeding synthetically generated image data back into traditional engineering workflows is not entirely straightforward. In this paper we show how adversarial networks can be used if order [Formula: see text] images are available and focused on the problem in hand. In particular we show how such images can then be augmented with histograms and glyphs to enhance the image content with pictorial representations of numerical data. This is shown to significantly assist the network training process on our data when used in contexts where numerical data categorizing individual images are available and numerical performance measures of products must be predicted. Crucially, it allows for follow-on analyses without the need to use artificially generated flow fields.
affiliations: University of Southampton
University of Southampton, Southampton, England SO17 1BJ, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 本文提出在条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）中嵌入参数信息（如直方图和字形）以增强图像内容，用于压气机叶型设计。该方法在仅有少量图像（约O(10^2)张）时仍能有效训练网络，并预测产品性能，避免了使用人工生成流场。
method: 数值方法：使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），通过嵌入直方图和字形增强图像，训练数据为约O(10^2)张叶型图像。
innovation: 在cGAN中嵌入参数信息（直方图和字形）以增强图像内容，使少量图像即可有效训练，并直接预测性能，无需人工生成流场。
conclusions: 1. 嵌入参数信息显著辅助网络训练，尤其在数值数据可用时。2. 该方法允许后续分析无需使用人工生成流场。
limitations: 仅适用于少量图像（约O(10^2)张），且未涉及三维或复杂流动效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机叶型设计，但未直接研究稳定性或叶尖畸变，仅间接相关。

title: Kutta–Joukowski Theorem for Unsteady Linear Aerodynamics
abstract: This paper presents the extension of the Kutta-Joukowski theorem to unsteady linear aerodynamics. Starting from the formulation developed by Theodorsen for the solution of the velocity potential for circulatory flows around thin, rectilinear airfoils, the frequency response function between bound circulation and circulatory lift is derived. To provide a formulation suitable for time-domain applications, two finite-state approximations of the Kutta-Joukowski frequency response function, with different degrees of complexity and accuracy, are also proposed. The validity of the derived unsteady Kutta-Joukowski theorem is verified by correlation with numerical predictions of the circulatory lift given by a validated boundary-element-method solver for potential flows. Furthermore, the proposed finite-state approximations of the unsteady Kutta-Joukowski theorem are applied to problems concerning the circulatory lift response to damped oscillatory airfoil motion and gust perturbation. The higher-accuracy finite-state model provides predictions that correspond perfectly to those obtained by the convolution integrals of the step responses given by the theories of Wagner and Kssner. The results given by the simpler finite-state model derived from the linear approximation of the frequency response function are satisfactory for low-frequency problems, and are compared with those provided by a widely used approximate unsteady version of the Kutta-Joukowski theorem available in the literature.
affiliations: Roma Tre University
Rina Services (Italy)
Roma Tre University, 00146 Rome, Italy
Department of Engineering, Via della Vasca Navale, 79
summary_zh: 本文将Kutta-Joukowski定理推广到非定常线性空气动力学，基于Theodorsen理论推导了环量与升力间的频响函数，并提出了两种有限状态近似模型。通过边界元法验证了定理的正确性，并应用于振荡翼型和阵风响应问题。高精度模型与Wagner和Küssner理论结果一致，简化模型适用于低频问题。
method: 理论推导结合数值验证，采用边界元法求解势流，分析振荡翼型和阵风扰动下的环量升力响应。
innovation: 首次将Kutta-Joukowski定理严格扩展到非定常线性空气动力学，并提出了两种不同精度的有限状态时域近似模型。
conclusions: 1. 推导的非定常Kutta-Joukowski定理与边界元法数值预测吻合。2. 高精度有限状态模型与Wagner和Küssner理论结果完全一致。
limitations: 仅适用于线性势流，未考虑粘性效应和可压缩性，且简化模型仅适用于低频问题。
relevance_reason: 研究非定常气动力理论，与压气机叶片气动弹性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或旋转不稳定性。

title: Adaptive Sampling for Interpolation of Reduced-Order Aeroelastic Systems
abstract: A new strategy for the interpolation of parametric reduced-order models of dynamic aeroelastic systems is introduced. Its aim is to accelerate the numerical exploration of geometrically nonlinear aeroelastic systems over large design spaces or multiple flight conditions. The parametric reduced-order models are obtained from high-dimensional models by Krylov-subspace projection. They are subsequently interpolated to acquire realizations inexpensively anywhere in the parameter space, where having the state space as opposed to interpolating an output metric permits the use of linear analysis tools. The interpolation scheme is heavily conditioned by the available training points; thus, a novel methodology based on adaptive sampling and a combinatorial use of the available true-systems knowledge is presented, whereby we reuse all known data of the true models as different combinations of training and testing data to build statistical surrogates of the interpolation error across the parameter space and refine the sampling in those regions that need it. This minimizes the number of costly to evaluate function calls and ensures that parameter space regions are sampled according to the underlying system dynamics. The initial implementation of this adaptive sampling strategy is demonstrated on a very flexible wing with a complex stability envelope.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Imperial College London, London, England SW7 2AZ, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 提出一种自适应采样策略，用于插值气动弹性系统的参数化降阶模型，以加速几何非线性气动弹性系统在大设计空间或多飞行条件下的数值探索。通过Krylov子空间投影获得降阶模型，并利用自适应采样和组合使用真实系统知识来最小化昂贵函数调用次数，确保采样基于系统动力学。在柔性机翼上验证了该方法。
method: 数值方法：基于Krylov子空间投影的降阶模型，结合自适应采样和统计代理模型进行插值。工况参数未明确，但涉及大设计空间或多飞行条件。
innovation: 提出自适应采样策略，通过组合使用已知真实系统数据构建插值误差的统计代理模型，从而优化采样点分布，减少高保真模型调用次数。
conclusions: 自适应采样策略能有效减少高保真模型调用次数，并确保参数空间采样基于系统动力学。在柔性机翼上成功演示，具有复杂稳定包线。
limitations: 仅针对几何非线性气动弹性系统，未涉及压气机具体问题；未提供定量误差或效率提升数据。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性系统降阶模型和自适应采样，与压气机气动弹性相关但非直接针对压气机稳定性或叶尖畸变。

title: Prediction of Rotating Instabilities in Low Pressure Steam Turbines Operating at Low Load
abstract: Abstract Due to the increasing need for operational flexibility nowadays, the low-pressure (LP) steam turbine might face widely variable operation conditions up to extreme low volume flow situations. Hereby, rotating instabilities (RIS), well known from compressor aerodynamics, can initiate nonsynchronous blade excitations, which can lead to increased vibrations of the last stage moving blade (L-0R). This paper describes a numerical method able to be used in an applicable way for blade designing. To judge the onset and the shape of RIS, a numerical approach based on a transient three-dimensional unsteady Reynolds averaged Navier–Stokes flow computation of the single passage L-1 stage, a full row L-0 stage, and an axis-symmetric diffuser was established. Mesh size, solver settings, etc., were optimized to reduce the computational effort without losing prediction accuracy. The dominant harmonic compound of a spatial Fourier transform of all monitored L-0R blade forces over the blade row's circumference reveals the stall cell count and excitation amplitude for each time-step. The transient change of the corresponding phase lag provided the stall cell speed and, multiplied with the stall cell count, the excitation frequency. Their distribution over decreasing flow rates finally displays the likely onset of RIS. The approach is capable to run the analyses of several load conditions within a couple of days and was successfully validated using measured blade tip deflections and unsteady pressure probes in multistage test turbines. Furthermore, it is shown that the approach can be used to find LP blade designs, where the effects of RIS can be significantly suppressed.
affiliations: Siemens (Germany)
Siemens Energy Global GmbH & Co. KG, Steam Turbine Blading Technology , Rheinstr. 100, Mülheim (Ruhr) D-45478, Germany
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对低压蒸汽轮机低负荷工况下的旋转不稳定性（RIS），建立了基于三维非定常RANS的数值方法，通过单通道L-1级、全环L-0级和轴对称扩压器模型，结合空间傅里叶变换分析叶片力，预测RIS的失速团数目、转速和激励频率，并成功用实验验证。
method: 数值方法：三维非定常RANS（URANS）计算，单通道L-1级+全环L-0级+轴对称扩压器模型，空间傅里叶变换分析叶片力。
innovation: 提出一种工程适用的数值方法，能在数天内分析多个负荷工况，并用于叶片设计以抑制RIS。
conclusions: 1. 该方法可预测RIS的失速团数目、转速和激励频率；2. 通过优化叶片设计可显著抑制RIS效应。
limitations: 仅针对低压蒸汽轮机低负荷工况，未考虑其他工况或压气机。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究旋转不稳定性（RI）的预测方法，与用户关注的RI和稳定性分析高度相关。

title: TURBODYNA: A Generic One-Dimensional Dynamic Simulator for Radial Turbomachinery
abstract: Abstract The turbocharged piston-driven engines are widely used in high altitude long endurance unmanned aerial vehicles (HALE UAVs). Repeated actions of engine pistons and valves give rise to engine pulsations resulting in intensive unsteady flows in the turbocharger. One-dimensional (1-D) modeling, which is computationally effective, plays a crucial role in evaluating turbocharger performance and conducting turbocharger-engine matching under pulsating conditions. The present work introduces a newly developed 1-D software (TURBODYNA) for the sake of improving traditional 1-D modeling's accuracy and generality. The advantages and capabilities of TURBODYNA are illustrated by applying it to three different and typical sorts of turbocharger applications: the single-entry turbine, the twin-entry turbine, and the centrifugal compressor. The unsteady testing conditions include high frequent pressure pulses for the single-entry turbine, out-of-phase pressure pulses for the twin-entry turbine, and rotating stall and surge for the centrifugal compressor. Results show that, by contrast to traditional 1-D modelings, the current 1-D modeling has achieved exceptional improvements in both accuracy and applicability. The novel and powerful tool provides a solid framework for assessing turbocharger unsteady performances and addressing turbocharger-engine matching.

summary_zh: 本文介绍了一维动态模拟软件TURBODYNA，用于评估涡轮增压器在脉动条件下的非稳态性能。该软件应用于单入口涡轮、双入口涡轮和离心压气机三种典型场景，包括高频压力脉冲、异相压力脉冲以及旋转失速和喘振工况。结果表明，与传统一维模型相比，TURBODYNA在精度和适用性上均有显著提升。
method: 数值模拟，采用一维动态建模方法，应用于单入口涡轮（高频压力脉冲）、双入口涡轮（异相压力脉冲）和离心压气机（旋转失速和喘振）工况。
innovation: 开发了通用一维动态模拟软件TURBODYNA，提高了传统一维模型在脉动条件下的精度和通用性，适用于多种涡轮增压器类型和复杂非稳态工况。
conclusions: 1. TURBODYNA在模拟高频压力脉冲、异相压力脉冲及旋转失速和喘振时，精度优于传统一维模型。2. 该软件为评估涡轮增压器非稳态性能和发动机匹配提供了有效框架。
limitations: 一维模型可能无法捕捉三维流动细节，如叶尖间隙效应和局部畸变。
relevance_reason: 涉及离心压气机旋转失速和喘振，与压气机稳定性相关，但主要关注一维建模，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和三维激盘模型关联度一般。

title: Identification of Mistuning Based on Forced Response Measurements and Assessment for a Real Compressor Blisk
abstract: Abstract We develop a novel method for the identification of mistuned blisks. The method relies on forced response measurements in a certain target frequency band. Modal stiffness deviations and an overall structural damping coefficient are obtained using a least-squares fit, fully consistent with a component-mode-based reduced-order model. To achieve a high frequency resolution in a very short test, we carry out rapid frequency sweeps and use a noise-robust, wavelet-based estimation of the steady-state response. The forcing is eliminated from the equations governing the mistuning parameters, and it is identified separately to reconstruct the forced response if requested. We first validate the method numerically and then apply it experimentally to a compressor blisk with an alternating (B-A) mistuning pattern. While most previous works on mistuning identification are limited to the lowest 1-2 mode families, we assess the method for the seventh (1C) and eighth (3T) mode family. Measured and reconstructed frequency responses are in good to very good agreement. We conclude that the developed method is useful to obtain high-quality estimates of mistuning parameters, which can then be used for vibration prediction.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于强迫响应测量的失谐识别方法，用于真实压气机叶盘。通过最小二乘拟合获得模态刚度偏差和结构阻尼系数，采用快速频率扫描和小波估计稳态响应。数值验证后，在交替失谐叶盘上实验，成功识别第七和第八模态族的失谐参数，重构响应与测量吻合良好。
method: 数值验证与实验测量结合，采用快速频率扫描和小波估计稳态响应，基于分量模态降阶模型进行最小二乘拟合。
innovation: 方法适用于高阶模态族（第七、第八），且通过分离激励力实现失谐参数独立识别，提高了高频分辨率下的噪声鲁棒性。
conclusions: 1. 方法能高精度识别失谐参数，重构频率响应与测量吻合良好。2. 成功应用于第七（1C）和第八（3T）模态族，扩展了失谐识别的高阶模态适用性。
limitations: 仅针对特定交替失谐模式验证，未考虑其他失谐分布或非均匀阻尼的影响。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶盘振动预测，与转子叶片振动预测解析模型相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Fan Stability With Leading Edge Damage: Blind Prediction and Validation
abstract: Abstract This paper considers the impact of a damaged leading edge (LE) on the stall margin and stall inception mechanisms of a transonic, low-pressure ratio fan. The damage takes the form of a squared-off leading edge over the upper half of the blade. Full-annulus, unsteady CFD simulations are used to explain the stall inception mechanisms for the fan at low- and high-speed operating points. A combination of steady and unsteady simulations shows that the fan is predicted to be sensitive to leading edge damage at low-speed, but insensitive at high-speed. This blind prediction aligns well with rig test data. The difference in response is shown to be caused by the change between subsonic and supersonic flow regimes at the leading edge. Where the inlet relative flow is subsonic, rotating stall is initiated by the growth and propagation of a subsonic leading edge flow separation. This separation is shown to be triggered at higher mass flow rates when the leading edge is damaged, reducing the stable flow range. Where the inlet relative flow is supersonic, the flow undergoes a supersonic expansion around the leading edge, creating a supersonic flow patch terminated by a shock on the suction surface. Rotating stall is triggered by the growth of this separation, which is insensitive to the leading edge shape. This creates a considerable difference in sensitivity to damage at low- and high-speed operating points.

summary_zh: 研究前缘损伤对跨声速低压比风扇稳定性的影响，通过全环非定常CFD模拟和实验验证，发现低速时损伤显著降低稳定裕度，高速时则不敏感，原因在于亚声速与超声速前缘流态差异。
method: 全环非定常CFD模拟结合稳态/非稳态仿真，与台架实验数据对比，涵盖低高速工况。
innovation: 揭示了前缘损伤在不同马赫数下对失速裕度影响的根本机制，即亚声速分离与超声速激波分离的敏感性差异。
conclusions: 低速时前缘损伤使失速提前，稳定流量范围减小；高速时损伤对失速起始无影响。
limitations: 仅针对特定损伤形式（上缘平切），未考虑其他损伤类型或几何参数变化。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖畸变（前缘损伤）对稳定裕度的影响，与用户课题直接相关。

title: Unsteady Interaction Mechanisms of Axial-Slot Casing Treatment With Tip Region Flow in a Highly-Loaded Mixed-Flow Compressor
abstract: Abstract The influences of axial-slot casing treatment (ASCT) on the performance and unsteady tip region flow are experimentally and numerically investigated in a highly-loaded mixed-flow compressor. The total pressure ratio, stall margin, and efficiency of the compressor are improved with ASCT. Static wall pressure was measured using unsteady pressure taps installed on the casing to identify the stall inception and resolve the tip region flow. The compressor stalls through spike-stall inception with the spillage of tip leakage flow (TLF). FFT analysis of dynamic pressure data shows that unsteady tip clearance flow (TCF) characterized by a frequency band of 0.4–0.6 blade passing frequency exists for both cases with and without ASCT. The addition of ASCT alleviates fluctuating amplitude of TCF in the blade passage but enhances oscillating strength of the main flow located upstream of blade leading-edge. Time-averaged solutions of unsteady simulations indicate that ASCT suppresses the spillage of TLF through suction and injection effects. However, flow separation located downstream of slots is enlarged by ASCT, which is attributed to the increased blade tip load. To reveal the underlying mechanisms, the tip flow field was further studied at various time instants. The fluids with high enthalpy are injected from slots and then divided into two parts by the rotor blade. One part of the fluids attaches on blade pressure side causing the local high static pressure spot, which leads to the increment of pressure loading at blade tip. The other part interacts with TLF periodically, thus pushing it into passage and delaying rotating stall.

summary_zh: 针对高负荷混流压气机，实验与数值研究了轴向槽机匣处理对叶尖区域非定常流动的影响。结果表明，机匣处理提升了总压比、失速裕度和效率，通过吸/喷效应抑制叶尖泄漏流溢出，但增大了槽下游分离。揭示了射流与泄漏流周期性相互作用推迟旋转失速的机理。
method: 实验测量（机匣动态压力）与数值模拟（非定常RANS），研究对象为高负荷混流压气机，转速等工况未明确。
innovation: 揭示了轴向槽机匣处理在高负荷混流压气机中通过射流与叶尖泄漏流周期性相互作用推迟失速的详细非定常机理。
conclusions: 轴向槽机匣处理使压气机总压比、失速裕度和效率均提升；叶尖间隙流动存在0.4-0.6倍叶片通过频率的频带特征，机匣处理降低了其脉动幅值。
limitations: 仅针对单一几何的轴向槽机匣处理，未考虑不同槽参数的影响；未提供定量裕度提升数值。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦叶尖间隙畸变与机匣处理对稳定性的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Analysis of the Unsteady Flow Field at Stall Conditions for a Low-Speed Low-Pressure Ratio Axial Fan With Full-Annulus Simulation
abstract: Abstract The present work analyzes the three-dimensional unsteady flow structure of a low-speed low-pressure ratio axial fan stage operating at stall conditions. Unsteady numerical simulations were conducted with the elsA software, which solves the unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) equations on a full-annulus calculation domain for the rotor and the stator. The analyses will focus on a near stall operating point, the stall inception mechanisms, and the final rotating stall pattern. Numerical simulations are confronted with experimental measurements from high-frequency Kulite transducers mounted on the casing near the rotor blades and the stator blades. The results show that boundary layer separation occurs on the stator blade close to the hub region at near stall conditions. The reverse flow interacts with the main flow to form a vortex shedding phenomenon. The frequency is not clocked with the blade passage frequency, requiring unsteady full-annulus methodology even for a stable operating point. It is also shown that the final state of the rotating stall region is composed of a single part-span cell that occupies three-quarters of the circumference and rotates at 60% of the shaft speed. This pattern agrees with the experimental measurements in terms of both the number of cells and the rotational speed. Finally, the paper demonstrates that without inlet distortion, the mechanism of the onset of the rotating stall is incorrectly predicted by the simulation. However, when a total pressure inlet distortion is applied, the computational fluid dynamics produces the same inception mechanism that is observed experimentally.
affiliations: Institut Superieur de l'Aeronautique et de l'Espace (ISAE-SUPAERO)
