summary_zh: 实验研究了进口导叶（IGV）角度对航空离心压气机性能和稳定性的影响。发现喘振线随IGV角度增大向低流量移动，且高转速下移动更显著。低转速时，压气机失稳始于扩压器；高转速时，始于叶轮。旋转不稳定性（RI）出现在叶轮进口，其发生受进口相对气流角控制，增大IGV角度可推迟RI。
method: 实验研究，在Safran直升机发动机离心压气机级上测试三个IGV安装角，测量性能并分析子部件稳定性。
innovation: 首次系统揭示IGV角度对离心压气机喘振线移动和旋转不稳定性的影响，并区分了低/高转速下失稳首发部件。
conclusions: 1. 喘振线随IGV角度增大向低流量移动，高转速下移动显著。2. 低转速时扩压器先失稳，高转速时叶轮先失稳，IGV角度不改变此顺序。
limitations: 仅针对单一离心压气机级，未考虑不同几何或进口畸变条件。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及旋转不稳定性（RI）和失稳机理，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测部分相关。

title: Aeroelastic Control and Estimation with a Minimal Nonlinear Modal Description
abstract: Modal-based nonlinear moving horizon estimation (MHE) and model predictive control (MPC) strategies for very flexible aeroelastic systems are presented. They are underpinned by an aeroelastic model built from a one-dimensional intrinsic (based on strains and velocities) description of geometrically nonlinear beams and an unsteady vortex lattice aerodynamic model. Construction of a nonlinear modal-based reduced-order model of the aeroelastic system, employing a state-space realization of the linearized aerodynamics around an arbitrary reference point, allows us to capture the main nonlinear geometrical couplings at a very low computational cost. Embedding this model in both MHE and MPC strategies, which solve the system continuous-time adjoints efficiently to compute sensitivities, lays the foundations for real-time estimation and control of highly flexible aeroelastic systems. Finally, the performance and versatility of the framework operating in the nonlinear regime are demonstrated on two very flexible-wing models, with notably different dynamics, and on two different control setups: a gust-load alleviation problem on a very high-aspect-ratio wing with slower dynamics, which involves substantial deflections; and flutter suppression on a flexible wing with significantly faster dynamics, where an unconventional nonlinear stabilization mechanism is unveiled.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Imperial College London, London, England SW7 2AZ, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 本文提出基于非线性模态的移动时域估计和模型预测控制策略，用于柔性气动弹性系统。采用几何非线性梁和涡格气动模型构建降阶模型，实现高效计算。在两种柔性机翼模型上验证了阵风载荷缓解和颤振抑制性能，揭示了非线性稳定机制。
method: 数值方法：基于一维本征梁和非定常涡格气动模型，构建非线性模态降阶模型，采用连续时间伴随求解灵敏度。
innovation: 将非线性模态降阶模型嵌入移动时域估计和模型预测控制，实现高柔性气动弹性系统的实时估计与控制，并揭示非常规非线性稳定机制。
conclusions: 1. 所提框架能有效控制高柔性机翼的阵风载荷和颤振。2. 在快速动力学颤振抑制中发现了非线性稳定机制。
limitations: 仅针对柔性机翼模型，未考虑真实发动机压气机叶片等旋转结构。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性控制与颤振，与压气机叶片振动相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙、畸变等核心方向。

title: Transient Flutter Stability Analysis of Structural Mistuned Blisk by Energy Growth Method
abstract: Abstract Blisks suffer from flutter, a self-sustained vibration caused by aerodynamic coupled forces. This instability could cause serious damage to the blades and the machine. Flutter stability is usually analyzed based on the eigenvalue method in the aspect of the linear structural dynamic system, which transforms a dynamics stability analysis into a point of equilibrium in an infinite time scale. However, in reality, most of the blisk vibrations arise on a finite time horizon. The transient vibration amplification may cause serious damage. This paper proposes a transient flutter stability analysis method in a finite time for structural mistuned blisk based on the energy growth method. First, two common blisk models coupled aerodynamic force with different complexity are built and are all expressed in the state space representation. A novel energy growth method is then employed to analyze the transient stability and to find the maximum energy growth of the models. The optimal initial condition which leads to the maximum energy growth is obtained. A new flutter stability criterion is developed to consider the transient stability based on the energy growth method and the infinite time stability based on the eigenvalue method. The new transient stability method is verified by two numerical studies. It is found that the structural mistuned blisk model which is traditionally predicted stable still has a transient instability in a finite time due to the non-normal property of the dynamic state matrix.
affiliations: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
State Key Laboratory of Mechanical System and Vibration School of Mechanical Engineering, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Shanghai 200240, China
Dalian Maritime University
Marine Engineering College, Dalian Maritime University, Dalian 116026, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对结构失谐整体叶盘在有限时间内的颤振稳定性问题，提出基于能量增长法的瞬态稳定性分析方法。通过建立两种不同复杂度的气动耦合叶盘模型，采用能量增长法分析瞬态稳定性并获取最大能量增长的初始条件，结合特征值法提出新的颤振稳定判据。数值研究表明，传统预测稳定的失谐叶盘模型因状态矩阵非正态性在有限时间内存在瞬态不稳定。
method: 数值研究；建立两种气动耦合叶盘模型，采用状态空间表示，应用能量增长法分析瞬态稳定性，结合特征值法提出新判据。
innovation: 首次将能量增长法用于叶盘颤振瞬态稳定性分析，提出结合有限时间瞬态稳定与无限时间特征值稳定的新判据，揭示非正态性导致的瞬态不稳定。
conclusions: 1. 传统特征值法预测稳定的失谐叶盘模型在有限时间内可能因非正态性出现瞬态不稳定。2. 能量增长法能有效识别最大能量增长初始条件及瞬态失稳风险。
limitations: 仅针对结构失谐叶盘，未考虑气动阻尼非线性及实际工况中的多物理场耦合。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振稳定性分析，与压气机叶片振动预测相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或激盘模型。

title: Hierarchical model updating strategy of complex assembled structures with uncorrelated dynamic modes
abstract: In structural simulation and design, an accurate computational model directly determines the effectiveness of performance evaluation. To establish a high-fidelity dynamic model of a complex assembled structure, a Hierarchical Model Updating Strategy (HMUS) is developed for Finite Element (FE) model updating with regard to uncorrelated modes. The principle of HMUS is first elaborated by integrating hierarchical modeling concept, model updating technology with proper uncorrelated mode treatment, and parametric modeling. In the developed strategy, the correct correlated mode pairs amongst the uncorrelated modes are identified by an error minimization procedure. The proposed updating technique is validated by the dynamic FE model updating of a simple fixed–fixed beam. The proposed HMUS is then applied to the FE model updating of an aeroengine stator system (casings) to demonstrate its effectiveness. Our studies reveal that (A) parametric modeling technique is able to build an efficient equivalent model by simplifying complex structure in geometry while ensuring the consistency of mechanical characteristics; (B) the developed model updating technique efficiently processes the uncorrelated modes and precisely identifies correct Correlated Mode Pairs (CMPs) between FE model and experiment; (C) the proposed HMUS is accurate and efficient in the FE model updating of complex assembled structures such as aeroengine casings with large-scale model, complex geometry, high-nonlinearity and numerous parameters; (D) it is appropriate to update a complex structural FE model parameterized. The efforts of this study provide an efficient updating strategy for the dynamic model updating of complex assembled structures with experimental test data, which is promising to promote the precision and feasibility of simulation-based design optimization and performance evaluation of complex structures.

summary_zh: 针对复杂装配结构（如航空发动机机匣）的有限元模型修正，提出分层模型更新策略（HMUS），通过误差最小化识别非相关模态中的正确相关模态对，结合参数化建模简化几何并保证力学特性一致。在固定梁和航空发动机静子系统上验证，表明该方法能高效处理非相关模态，提升大型复杂结构动态模型精度。
method: 数值方法：分层模型更新策略（HMUS），结合参数化建模和误差最小化识别相关模态对；验证于固定梁和航空发动机机匣。
innovation: 提出分层模型更新策略，有效处理非相关模态并精确识别相关模态对，适用于几何复杂、参数众多的装配结构。
conclusions: (A) 参数化建模可在简化几何的同时保证力学特性一致；(B) HMUS能高效处理非相关模态并精确识别相关模态对。
limitations: 仅验证于简单梁和航空发动机机匣，未涉及旋转部件或气动弹性耦合。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及航空发动机机匣的模型更新，与压气机结构相关，但未直接涉及气动热力学或稳定性问题。

title: On the Dispersion Mechanism of the Flutter Boundary of the AGARD 445.6 Wing
abstract: The variation in the flutter boundary of the AGARD 445.6 wing in transonic and low supersonic states is an unresolved issue in the field of aeroelasticity. This well-known variation phenomenon is mainly reflected in three aspects: 1) the discrepancy between the computational and the experimental results; 2) the large dispersion of the computational results between different solvers; 3) the sensitivity of calculated flutter boundary to many factors, such as computational fluid dynamics discretization scheme and spatial resolution. However, the root cause of this phenomenon is not clear yet. In this paper, the physical mechanism of the dispersion phenomenon is investigated in the case of using the reduced-order model (ROM)–based aeroelastic analysis model. A dominant least stable flow mode, which has an important effect on the flutter characteristic, is captured by the ROM. The variation in the damping of this dominant flow mode significantly affects the flutter boundary or even changes the instability branch of the structural mode. By adjusting the aerodynamic damping of the dominant flow mode, the flutter boundary curve under the aerodynamic damping variation is predicted. When comparing with the available literature results, the scattered literature data fall around the predicted curve, which indicates that the sensitivity of the damping of the dominant flow mode is the root cause for the dispersion phenomenon of the flutter boundary.
affiliations: Northwestern Polytechnical University
Northwestern Polytechnical University, 710072 Xi’an, People’s Republic of China

summary_zh: 针对AGARD 445.6机翼在跨声速和低超声速状态下的颤振边界分散现象，采用基于降阶模型的气动弹性分析方法，发现主导最稳定流动模态的阻尼变化是颤振边界分散的根本原因，并通过调整该模态阻尼预测了颤振边界曲线，与文献数据吻合。
method: 数值模拟结合降阶模型（ROM）进行气动弹性分析，研究跨声速和低超声速状态下的颤振边界。
innovation: 首次揭示主导流动模态的阻尼变化是颤振边界分散的物理机制，并利用ROM预测阻尼变化下的颤振边界曲线。
conclusions: 1) 主导最稳定流动模态的阻尼显著影响颤振边界，甚至改变结构模态失稳分支；2) 文献中分散的颤振边界数据落在预测曲线附近，验证了阻尼敏感性是分散根源。
limitations: 仅针对AGARD 445.6机翼，未考虑其他几何或流动条件；ROM方法可能依赖特定工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及气动弹性与颤振，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但非核心方向。

title: The Impact of Various Modeling Decisions on Flow Field Predictions in a Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract Computational tools have become increasingly important in design and research applications in recent years due to increasing computational resources. In most cases, model geometry and flow physics are simplified to reduce the complexity of the computational model. While this was necessary historically, modern computational tools are capable of including realistic features such as fillets, surface roughness, and heat transfer. This work presents extensive and systematic numerical results from a simulation of a centrifugal compressor stage for an aero-engine application. Numerical results are compared to detailed experimental data to investigate the effect of various modeling decisions, including turbulence models, on the predicted aerodynamics developing through the diffuser passage. Roughness and the inclusion of fillets significantly impact the flow development, especially with the shear-stress transport (SST) turbulence model. This approach leads to the conclusion that the BSL-EARSM model is best able to predict the experimentally determined diffuser flow profiles and overall performance trends with the inclusion of the previously mentioned model features. Additionally, misleading conclusions can be reached if modeling decisions are based on merely matching overall performance values. Finally, frozen rotor simulations are used to roughly approximate the impact of unsteadiness on the flow field. The results show a significant impact and also that the inclusion of approximate unsteady effects tends to further improve the predictive capability of the computational models that were considered.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University, West Lafayette, IN 47906-1757
School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University, West Lafayette, IN 47906
School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University, West Lafayette, IN 47907
summary_zh: 该研究系统评估了离心压气机建模决策（如湍流模型、圆角、粗糙度、非定常效应）对扩散段流场预测的影响。通过与实验数据对比，发现BSL-EARSM模型结合圆角和粗糙度能最佳预测流场和性能趋势，且仅匹配总体性能可能得出误导性结论。冻结转子模拟表明非定常效应显著影响流场，考虑后能提升预测能力。
method: 数值模拟（RANS/URANS），对比实验数据，采用SST、BSL-EARSM等湍流模型，考虑圆角、粗糙度，使用冻结转子近似非定常效应。
innovation: 系统量化了多种建模决策（包括圆角、粗糙度、非定常性）对离心压气机流场预测的耦合影响，并指出仅匹配总体性能的局限性。
conclusions: BSL-EARSM模型结合圆角和粗糙度能最佳预测扩散段流场和性能；冻结转子模拟显示非定常效应显著，考虑后能改善预测精度。
limitations: 仅针对单一离心压气机级，未涉及叶尖间隙或畸变进气等稳定性相关因素。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦建模决策对压气机流场预测的影响，与叶尖间隙畸变下的稳定裕度预测间接相关，但未直接涉及稳定性分析。

title: Development and Validation of a Model for Centrifugal Compressors in Reversed Flow Regimes
abstract: Abstract Turbochargers are widely used to help reduce the environmental impact of automotive engines. However, a limiting factor for turbochargers is compressor surge. Surge is an instability that induces pressure and flow oscillations that often damages the turbocharger and its installation. Most predictions of the surge limit are based on low-order models, such as the Moore–Greitzer model. These models tend to rely on a characteristic curve for the compressor created by extrapolating the constant speed lines of a steady-state compressor map into the negative mass flow region. However, there is little validation of these assumptions in the public literature. In this article, we develop further the first-principles model for a compressor characteristic presented in Powers, K., Brace, C., Budd, C., Copeland, C., & Milewski, P., 2020, “Modeling Axisymmetric Centrifugal Compressor Characteristics From First Principles,” J. Turbomachinery, 142(9), with a particular emphasis on reverse flow. We then perform experiments using a 58 mm diameter centrifugal compressor provided by Cummins Turbo Technologies, where we feed air in the reverse direction though the compressor while the impeller is spinning in the forward direction to obtain data in the negative mass flow region of the compressor map. This demonstrated experimentally that there is a stable operating region in the reverse flow regime. The recorded data showed a good match with the theoretical model developed in this article. We also identified a change in characteristic behavior as the impeller speed is increased, which, to the authors’ knowledge, has not been observed in any previously published experimental work.

summary_zh: 本文针对离心压气机在反向流动工况下的特性，基于第一性原理发展了模型，并通过实验验证。实验发现反向流动存在稳定运行区域，且随转速增加特性发生变化，为喘振预测提供了新依据。
method: 理论建模结合实验验证，采用58mm直径离心压气机，在叶轮正向旋转时反向供气，获取负质量流量区数据。
innovation: 首次实验观察到反向流动中随转速增加的特性变化，并验证了第一性原理模型在反向流区域的适用性。
conclusions: 1. 反向流动存在稳定运行区域；2. 实验数据与理论模型吻合良好，且发现转速增加时特性行为改变。
limitations: 仅针对单一尺寸压气机，未考虑不同几何或进口畸变的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定性建模与实验，与用户关注的稳定裕度预测相关，但非直接针对叶尖畸变。

title: Numerical and Experimental Aerodynamic Investigation of an S-Shaped Intermediate Compressor Duct With Bleed
abstract: Abstract A series of computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations are performed to analyze the effects a rotor off-take bleed has on the performance of an intermediate compressor duct (ICD). To validate the CFD results, a comparison is made to measurements obtained from an experimental facility located at GKN Aerospace Engine Systems in Sweden. To achieve a deeper understanding of the flow physics, hybrid Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes/large eddy simulation (RANS/LES) simulations are performed for a single operating condition. The CFD simulations are capable of predicting the behavior when extracting large amount of air through the bleed pipe, where an improved prediction is obtained with the hybrid simulation. The performance of the ICD is severely compromised with increased amount of bleed as the flow delivered to the downstream component is highly disturbed. The disturbed flow is caused by the extraction of axial flow through the bleed pipe, increasing the incidence into the low-pressure compressor’s outlet guide vanes (OGVs) resulting in unfavorable velocity profiles into the ICD. This behavior causes the flow to separate at the OGV blades, where the separation increases with increasing bleed. Furthermore, when including the full bleed system, significant circumferential distortions are observed, showing the necessity of the integrated design.
affiliations: Chalmers University of Technology
Division of Fluid Dynamics, Chalmers University of Technology, Gothenburg SE-41296, Sweden
GKN (Sweden)
Department of 9600-TLab3, GKN Aerospace Engine Systems Sweden, Trollhättan SE-46181, Sweden
summary_zh: 通过CFD和混合RANS/LES模拟，研究了S形中间压气机管道中转子引气对性能的影响。实验验证表明，引气量增加会严重恶化管道性能，导致下游流动畸变和分离，并产生周向不均匀性，强调了一体化设计的必要性。
method: 数值模拟（CFD和混合RANS/LES）结合实验测量，分析不同引气量下的流动特性。
innovation: 首次对S形中间压气机管道中的引气效应进行混合RANS/LES模拟，揭示了引气引起的周向畸变和流动分离机制。
conclusions: 引气量增加导致下游流动高度畸变，OGV叶片分离加剧；全引气系统产生显著周向畸变，需一体化设计。
limitations: 仅针对单一工况进行混合模拟，未考虑不同转速或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气，但与叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测无直接关联。

title: Aerodynamic Investigation of a Composite Low-Speed Fan for UHBR Application
abstract: Abstract A composite fan stage representative of a modern Ultra High Bypass Ratio (UHBR) architecture has been investigated experimentally on a novel test facility at Ecole Centrale de Lyon. These measurements show indications for strong overloading of the tip region resulting in extensive blockage of the blade passage. The performance of the fan is analyzed with extensive instrumentation including radial profiles upstream and downstream of the rotor. Unsteady pressure measurements help to interpret the flow structure in the tip region. The results are presented across a range of operating points on the design speedline. At the stability limit, the machine suffers from non-synchronous vibrations, which result from small-scale aerodynamic disturbances propagating between the leading edges. Detailed analysis of the occurring waveforms is presented for two operating speeds. In order to further analyze the observed phenomena, a numerical study has been conducted using the Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solver elsA. The results of steady calculations are discussed in comparison with the detailed experiments. Unsteady simulations near the stability limit accurately predict the aerodynamic disturbances observed during non-synchronous vibrations (NSV). The obtained results are unusual for typical state-of-the-art transonic fans, as they show the same behavior as high-pressure compressor front stages, dominated by a blockage caused by tip-leakage flow. Even though flutter is not observed, the observed non-synchronous vibration mechanism is a critical aeroelastic phenomenon which is of great interest for future designs of low-speed fans.

summary_zh: 实验和数值研究了UHBR复合材料低速风扇级，发现叶尖过载导致通道堵塞，稳定极限处出现非同步振动（NSV），源于叶尖小尺度气动扰动。稳态RANS计算与实验吻合，非稳态模拟准确预测NSV。
method: 实验测量（径向剖面、非稳态压力）与RANS数值模拟（elsA求解器），设计转速线多个工况点。
innovation: 揭示了低速风扇中类似高压压气机前级的叶尖泄漏堵塞主导行为，以及NSV机制，对UHBR设计有指导意义。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖过载导致通道堵塞，稳定极限处出现NSV。2. 非稳态RANS模拟准确预测了NSV中的气动扰动。
limitations: 未涉及颤振，仅针对单一设计转速线，缺乏变转速分析。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙畸变导致的堵塞和NSV，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Acoustic Resonance in an Axial Multistage Compressor Leading to Non-Synchronous Blade Vibration
abstract: Abstract Significant non-synchronous blade vibrations (NSVs) have been observed in an experimental three-stage high-speed compressor at part-speed conditions. High-amplitude acoustic modes, propagating around the circumference and originating in the highly loaded stage-3, have been observed in coherence with the structural vibration mode. In order to understand the occurring phenomena, a detailed numerical study has been carried out to reproduce the mechanism. Unsteady full-annulus Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes simulations of the whole setup have been performed using the solver elsA. The results revealed the development of propagating acoustic modes which are partially trapped in the annulus and are in resonance with an aerodynamic disturbance in rotor-3. The aerodynamic disturbance is identified as an unsteady separation of the blade boundary layer in rotor-3. The results indicate that the frequency and phase of the separation adapt to match those of the acoustic wave and are therefore governed by acoustic propagation conditions. Furthermore, the simulations clearly show the modulation of the propagating wave with the rotor blades, leading to a change of circumferential wave numbers while passing the blade row. To analyze if the effect is self-induced by the blade vibration, a non-coherent structural mode has been imposed in the simulations. Even at high vibration amplitude, the formerly observed acoustic mode did not change its circumferential wave number. This phenomenon is highly relevant to modern compressor designs, since the appearance of the axially propagating acoustic waves can excite blade vibrations if they coincide with a structural eigenmode, as observed in the presented experiments.

summary_zh: 实验发现三级高速压气机在部分转速下出现非同步叶片振动（NSV），伴随高幅值周向传播声模态，源于第三级高负荷区。全环非定常RANS模拟揭示声波部分被困于环形通道，与转子3叶片边界层非定常分离共振，分离频率和相位受声波传播条件控制。声波通过转子叶片排时周向波数改变。即使施加高幅值非相干结构模态，声模态波数不变。
method: 实验测量与全环非定常RANS数值模拟（elsA求解器），部分转速工况。
innovation: 首次通过全环非定常RANS模拟揭示声波与叶片边界层分离的共振机制，并证明声模态非由叶片振动自激产生。
conclusions: 1. 声波与转子3叶片边界层非定常分离共振导致NSV，分离频率和相位由声波传播条件决定。2. 声波通过转子排时周向波数改变，且非叶片振动自激。
limitations: 仅针对单台三级压气机特定部分转速工况，未考虑叶尖间隙等影响。
relevance_reason: 研究非同步振动与声共振机制，与用户关注的压气机稳定性及振动预测高度相关。

title: Lock-in phenomenon of tip clearance flow and its influence on aerodynamic damping under specified vibration on an axial transonic compressor rotor
abstract: In this study, the lock-in phenomenon of Tip Clearance Flow (TCF) instabilities and their relationship to blade vibration are investigated numerically on an axial transonic rotor with a large tip clearance. The capabilities of simulating instability flow and lock-in phenomenon are verified on a transonic rotor and a NACA0012 airfoil by comparing with the test data, respectively. The lock-in phenomenon is first numerically confirmed that may occur to TCF instabilities when its frequency is close to the blade vibration frequency. The lock-in region becomes wider with the vibration amplitude increasing, and it is also affected by modal shapes. For the rotor at the simulation conditions in this study, the bending mode results in a wider lock-in region than the torsional mode. In the lock-in region, the phase difference between the Tip Clearance Vortex (TCV) and the blade vibration changes with the flow condition and the frequency ratio of the blade vibration and the TCV instabilities. The frequency of the TCV instabilities reduces with the mass flow decreasing. Therefore, reducing mass flow and increasing frequency ratio have similar effects on the TCV phase, which causes a significant variation on the unsteady pressure amplitude in the blade tip area. Thus, the aerodynamic damping changes significantly with the TCV phase. The aerodynamic damping displays a nonlinear relationship with the vibration amplitude, and it changes from negative to positive with the vibration amplitude increasing at the same frequency ratio. The negative damping is mainly provided by the tip area of the blade. For unlocked conditions, the period of the TCF instabilities fluctuates over time, and it cannot be directly separated by their frequency features. Inter Blade Phase Angle (IBPA) also has an important influence on the feature of the TCV instabilities. The occurrence of frequency lock-in also requires “appropriate” IBPA. For the examined working conditions, the frequency lock-in occurs under 0 ND (Nodal Diameter), but not under 8 ND. However, no matter 0 ND or 8 ND, the phase of TCV always locks onto the IBPA at the examined conditions.

summary_zh: 本研究数值模拟了轴流跨声速转子大叶尖间隙下叶尖间隙流不稳定性与叶片振动的锁频现象。发现锁频区域随振幅增大而变宽，弯曲模态比扭转模态锁频区更宽。锁频时叶尖间隙涡相位变化显著影响非定常压力幅值，导致气动阻尼非线性变化，可从负变正。
method: 数值模拟，采用跨声速转子和大间隙NACA0012翼型验证，研究不同振动模态、振幅、频率比和节径数的影响。
innovation: 首次数值确认叶尖间隙流不稳定性可发生锁频，并系统揭示了锁频区域、相位关系及对气动阻尼的非线性影响。
conclusions: 锁频区域随振幅增大而变宽，弯曲模态锁频区宽于扭转模态；气动阻尼随振幅增大从负变正，负阻尼主要由叶尖区域提供。
limitations: 仅针对特定转子及工况，未考虑实际非定常来流及三维效应。
relevance_reason: 核心研究叶尖间隙流与振动耦合，直接关联叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测课题。

title: Experimental investigation of cavitation instabilities in inducer with different tip clearances
abstract: To investigate the effect of tip clearance size on cavitation characteristics in a turbopump inducer, a series of experiments have been conducted in a newly developed visualization test facility using room temperature water as working fluid. The pressure fluctuations near the tip region were collected, and the cavity structures under various conditions were documented by a high-speed camera. It is found that large tip clearance distinctly reduces both the non-cavitation and cavitation performance. Three cavitation instabilities, super-synchronous rotating cavitation, synchronous rotating cavitation and cavitation surge have been carefully identified through combination of cross-correlation analysis of pressure signals and visualization results. Large tip clearance displays a remarkable stabilization effect on pressure fluctuation, cavitation surge totally disappears, and the range of occurrence of synchronous rotating cavitation becomes smaller for the large tip clearance, whereas super-synchronous rotating cavitation only occurs in the large tip clearance. The cavitation areas are smaller at large tip clearance, while the flow channels are more seriously choked when cavitation occurs heavily in comparison with those at small tip clearance, which may be responsible for the worse cavitation performance.

summary_zh: 通过可视化实验研究了涡轮泵诱导轮中不同叶尖间隙对空化不稳定性的影响。发现大间隙降低非空化和空化性能，抑制空化喘振和同步旋转空化，但诱发超同步旋转空化。空化面积更小但流道堵塞更严重。
method: 实验研究，采用可视化试验台，以室温水为工质，采集叶尖区域压力脉动并用高速相机记录空化结构。
innovation: 系统揭示了叶尖间隙尺寸对三种空化不稳定性（超同步、同步旋转空化和空化喘振）的差异化影响，并关联了空化面积与流道堵塞。
conclusions: 大间隙使空化喘振完全消失，同步旋转空化范围缩小，但超同步旋转空化仅在大间隙出现；大间隙下空化面积更小，但流道堵塞更严重。
limitations: 仅针对特定诱导轮几何和室温水工质，未涉及高温高压或非均匀来流条件。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对旋转不稳定性影响，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变及稳定性相关，但对象为泵诱导轮而非压气机。

title: Effect of system response on partial surge initiated instability in a transonic axial flow compressor
abstract: Partial surge is a type of instability inception in transonic compressors and occurs in the form of axisymmetric low-frequency disturbances localized in the hub region. Previous studies illustrate that the frequency of partial surge is set by the Helmholtz frequency of the entire system, which motivates to propose a hypothesis that the system response performs an important role in the formation of partial surge. For further verification, a series of experiments are conducted to explore the link between the propagating of the partial surge and the system feedback in this study. In the first case, an additional test point is set on the wall of the plenum to detect the system response. Combining the flow behaviors inside the plenum with the disturbances in the rotor tip and stator hub/tip regions, the effects of the system feedback on the occurrence of the continuous disturbances and the rotating stall cells are illustrated. In the second case, a screen is mounted at the compressor outlet to prevent positive feedback from the plenum. The experimental results demonstrate that in the absence of system feedback, it is the occurrence of spike-type stall inception that leads to the flow instability instead of that of partial surge. In addition, three flow phenomena in the second case are discussed, including the occurrence of the single pulse, the unstable process during the stall evolution and the switch of instability inception.

summary_zh: 该研究通过实验探究系统响应在跨声速轴流压气机局部喘振引发失稳中的作用。在压气机出口安装筛网阻断系统反馈后，失稳起始由局部喘振转变为突尖型失速。结果表明系统反馈对局部喘振的形成至关重要。
method: 实验研究，在压气机出口安装筛网以改变系统反馈，测量集气腔及转子/静子区域的流动行为。
innovation: 通过对比有无系统反馈的实验，直接验证了系统响应在局部喘振形成中的关键作用，揭示了系统反馈对失稳起始类型的影响。
conclusions: 1. 系统反馈缺失时，失稳起始由局部喘振变为突尖型失速。2. 局部喘振频率由系统亥姆霍兹频率决定。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机，未考虑不同几何或工况的影响。
relevance_reason: 研究压气机失稳起始机理，与用户关注的稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Response and stabilization of a two-stage axial flow compressor restricted by rotating inlet distortion
abstract: This paper considers effects of Rotating Inlet Distortion (RID) on a two-stage axial compressor and the stabilization effects of a casing treatment subjected to the considered RID. In multi-spool engines, the downstream compressor suffers a RID when the upstream fan/compressor is in rotating stall. A controlled rotating sectional screen upstream of the compressor was adopted to generate the RID in different intensities, and co- or counter spinning direction compared with the rotor. The response of the compressor to inlet distortion was interpreted as the changes of stall margin. Results show that there are two peaks for the stall margin degradation where the distortion screen rotates near 20% and 70% of the rotor’s rotational frequency, respectively. Based on the measurements taken during the pre-stall process, it is suggested that the two frequencies are associated with the eigen frequencies of the compressor. Specifically, the first is associated with a stall precursor that is suspected as an initial disturbance existing in compressor and the second is related to a spike-type stall precursor. At last, a kind of Stall Precursor-Suppressed (SPS) casing treatment was applied to enhance the compressor stability in RID conditions. The result indicates that the stall margin is improved by 6% at an average level and there is nearly no efficiency loss caused by the application of such casing treatment.
affiliations: Beihang University
Fluid and Acoustic Engineering Laboratory, School of Energy and Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
summary_zh: 本文实验研究旋转进气畸变对两级轴流压气机的影响，采用旋转扇形筛网产生不同强度和旋转方向的畸变，发现畸变屏转速在转子频率的20%和70%时失速裕度下降出现两个峰值，分别与初始扰动和突尖型失速前兆相关。应用失速前兆抑制型机匣处理可平均提升失速裕度6%且几乎无效率损失。
method: 实验方法，采用旋转扇形筛网模拟旋转进气畸变，测量不同畸变强度和旋转方向下的失速裕度变化，并应用SPS机匣处理进行稳定性增强。
innovation: 揭示了旋转进气畸变下失速裕度下降的两个特征频率及其与失速前兆的关联，并验证了SPS机匣处理在畸变条件下的有效性且无效率损失。
conclusions: 旋转进气畸变在畸变屏转速为转子频率的20%和70%时导致失速裕度显著下降；SPS机匣处理平均提升失速裕度6%，且效率损失可忽略。
limitations: 仅针对两级轴流压气机，未涉及多级或跨音速压气机；畸变模拟采用筛网，与实际旋转失速畸变可能存在差异。
relevance_reason: 研究旋转进气畸变对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Effect of Axial Casing Groove Geometry on Rotor-Groove Interactions in the Tip Region of a Compressor
abstract: Abstract This experimental study characterizes the interactions of axial casing grooves (ACGs) with the flow in the tip region of an axial turbomachine. The tests involve grooves with the same inlet overlapping with the rotor blade leading edge, but with different exit directions located upstream. Among them, U grooves, whose circumferential outflow opposes the blade motion, achieve a 60% reduction in stall flowrate, but degrade the efficiency around the best efficiency point (BEP) by 2%. The S grooves, whose outlets are parallel to the blade rotation, improve the stall flowrate by only 36%, but do not degrade the BEP performance. To elucidate the mechanisms involved, stereo-PIV measurements covering the tip region and interior of grooves are performed in a refractive index-matched facility. At low flowrates, the inflow into both grooves, which peaks when they are aligned with the blade pressure side (PS), rolls up into a large vortex that lingers within the groove. By design, the outflow from S grooves is circumferentially positive. For the U grooves, fast circumferentially negative outflow peaks at the base of each groove, causing substantial periodic variations in the flow angle near the blade leading edge. At BEP, interactions with both grooves become milder, and most of the tip leakage vortex (TLV) remains in the passage. Interactions with the S grooves are limited; hence, they do not degrade the efficiency. In contrast, the inflow into and outflow from the U grooves reverses direction, causing entrainment of secondary flows, which likely contribute to the reduced BEP efficiency.
affiliations: Johns Hopkins University
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Johns Hopkins University, 217 Latrobe Hall, 3400 N. Charles Street, Baltimore, MD 21218
summary_zh: 该实验研究轴向机匣槽（ACG）几何形状对压气机叶尖区域转子-槽相互作用的影响。U型槽（出口周向流动与叶片运动相反）使失速流量降低60%，但最佳效率点（BEP）效率下降2%；S型槽（出口平行于叶片旋转）使失速流量降低36%，且不降低BEP效率。通过折射率匹配设施中的立体PIV测量揭示了流动机制。
method: 实验研究，采用折射率匹配设施和立体PIV测量，覆盖叶尖区域和槽内部，在不同流量条件下进行。
innovation: 对比了两种出口方向相反的轴向机匣槽（U型和S型）对压气机性能和流动结构的影响，揭示了槽内涡旋和出口流动方向对稳定性和效率的不同作用机制。
conclusions: U型槽可大幅提升失速裕度（60%），但导致BEP效率下降2%；S型槽提升失速裕度36%且不降低效率。槽内涡旋和出口流动方向是影响性能的关键。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何和工况，未考虑不同转速或非均匀进气条件。
relevance_reason: 直接研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Super Aggressive S-Ducts for Air Breathing Rocket Engines
abstract: Abstract Air breathing rocket engines require turbomachinery and ducting that is substantially lighter than that used in ground-based or aerospace gas turbines. In order to reduce the weight of the axial compressor, the design of the inter-spool swan neck duct is targeted. In this paper, a circumferential splitter blade is used to reduce loading and diffusion on the duct endwalls. The splitter and duct geometry are coupled and optimized together using 2D CFD. A design is selected that is 30% shorter than ducts that are currently used in aerospace gas turbines, and the 3D flow features are investigated in further detail using an experimental rig and 3D CFD. This paper shows that the “splittered” duct has three benefits over a conventional duct design: first, separation of the endwalls is prevented even at short duct lengths, this will reduce distortion into the downstream compressor. Second, losses generated by corner separations on structural struts can be reduced by 20%, enabling short ducts to achieve high performance. Third, splittered ducts are shown to be twice as robust to uncertain inlet flow conditions as conventional ducts. This allows a designer to target high-performance short designs with reduced risk.
affiliations: University of Cambridge
Sainsbury Laboratory
University of Cambridge Whittle Laboratory, , Cambridge CB3 0DY , UK
summary_zh: 针对吸气式火箭发动机的轻量化需求，研究超紧凑S型过渡段设计。采用周向分流叶片降低端壁载荷，结合二维CFD优化几何，使过渡段长度缩短30%。实验与三维CFD表明，分流叶片可防止端壁分离、减少支墩角区损失20%，并对入口条件不确定性具有两倍鲁棒性。
method: 二维CFD优化耦合分流叶片与过渡段几何，三维CFD与实验验证流动特征。工况为亚音速过渡段流动。
innovation: 首次提出周向分流叶片用于超紧凑S型过渡段，实现长度缩短30%同时抑制分离、降低损失，并显著提升对入口畸变的鲁棒性。
conclusions: 1. 分流叶片可防止短过渡段端壁分离，降低下游压气机畸变。2. 支墩角区损失降低20%，且对入口条件不确定性鲁棒性提高一倍。
limitations: 仅针对特定几何优化，未考虑高马赫数或旋转效应，且未涉及压气机级间耦合。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对下游压气机的影响，与叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测课题部分相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙或激盘模型。

title: Experimental Investigation of Over-the-Wing Propeller–Boundary-Layer Interaction
abstract: This experimental study focuses on the aerodynamic interaction between an over-the-wing (OTW) propeller and a wing boundary layer. An OTW propeller is positioned above the hinge line of a wing with a trailing-edge flap. Measurements are carried out with and without axial pressure gradients by deflecting the flap and by extending the flat upper surface of the wing in the streamwise direction, respectively. Surface-pressure taps, microphones, and particle image velocimetry are combined to quantify both the time-averaged and unsteady interaction effects. Results show that the propeller generates an adverse pressure gradient on the wing surface that scales linearly with thrust and decreases with increasing blade-tip clearance. The pressure gradient is partially caused by slipstream contraction, which decelerates the flow near the wall. Additionally, the surface-pressure fluctuations generated beneath the propeller blades and slipstream are stronger than the time-averaged pressure increase due to flow deceleration. Consequently, the propeller triggers flow separation over the hinge line when the flap is deflected. A parametric study of different propeller locations indicates that increasing the tip clearance is not an effective way to mitigate flow separation. However, displacing the propeller half a radius upstream of the hinge line creates a Coandă effect, which allows the flow to remain attached.
affiliations: Delft University of Technology
Delft University of Technology, 2629 HS Delft, The Netherlands
summary_zh: 实验研究了机翼上方螺旋桨与边界层的相互作用，发现螺旋桨在机翼表面产生与推力线性相关、随叶尖间隙增大而减小的逆压梯度，并触发铰链线处流动分离。增大叶尖间隙并非有效缓解分离的方法，而将螺旋桨前移可产生柯恩达效应保持附着流。
method: 实验研究，采用表面压力传感器、麦克风和粒子图像测速仪，通过偏转襟翼和延伸机翼上表面改变轴向压力梯度。
innovation: 系统量化了机翼上方螺旋桨与边界层相互作用的时均和瞬态效应，揭示了叶尖间隙和轴向位置对流动分离的影响规律。
conclusions: 螺旋桨产生的逆压梯度与推力线性相关，且随叶尖间隙增大而减小；增大叶尖间隙不能有效缓解分离，但将螺旋桨前移半个半径可产生柯恩达效应保持附着流。
limitations: 仅针对特定翼型和螺旋桨布局，未考虑真实发动机进气畸变等复杂条件。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙对流动分离的影响，但研究对象为螺旋桨-机翼相互作用，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测无直接关联。

title: Efficient Flutter Prediction Using Reduced-Order Modeling
abstract: Typical aerodynamic shape optimization and multidisciplinary optimization algorithms omit high-fidelity flutter predictions due to the associated computational costs. This paper presents a model order reduction framework as a step toward flutter-constrained aircraft optimization. The Euler equations linearized about a steady-state solution of the nonlinear Euler equations are used as the governing unsteady flow equations. Using a proper orthogonal decomposition approach, a reduced basis is constructed onto which the governing equations are projected. The result is a linear reduced-order model (ROM) with significantly fewer degrees of freedom capable of rapidly approximating aerodynamic forces. This ROM is coupled to a linear structural model to create a single monolithic aeroelastic system. The eigenvalues of the resulting system are analyzed for various flow conditions to determine the onset of flutter in the system. To ensure the stability of the ROM, the use of a stabilizing inner product is demonstrated. The flutter boundaries obtained for both a two-degree-of-freedom airfoil structure and the AGARD 445.6 wing model show good agreement with the full-order model and with the literature.
affiliations: University of Toronto
University of Toronto, Toronto, Ontario M3H 5T6, Canada
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于本征正交分解的降阶模型框架，用于高效预测颤振边界。将线性化欧拉方程投影到降阶基上，构建气动降阶模型，并与线性结构模型耦合形成气弹系统。通过特征值分析确定颤振起始点，并采用稳定化内积保证ROM稳定性。在二自由度翼型和AGARD 445.6机翼上验证，结果与全阶模型及文献吻合良好。
method: 数值方法：基于POD的降阶建模，线性化欧拉方程，特征值分析。工况参数：二自由度翼型、AGARD 445.6机翼，多种流动条件。
innovation: 提出一种稳定化内积方法确保降阶模型稳定性，实现颤振约束优化中高效且稳定的气弹分析。
conclusions: 1. 降阶模型能准确预测颤振边界，与全阶模型吻合。2. 稳定化内积有效保证ROM稳定性。
limitations: 仅基于线性化欧拉方程，未考虑黏性效应；仅验证了亚音速/跨音速工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振预测，但未涉及压气机叶尖间隙、畸变或旋转不稳定性等核心方向。

title: Numerical and Experimental Study on Rotating Stall in Industrial Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract Centrifugal compressors employed in the oil and gas industry are operated at high gas pressure conditions and are used in a wide operation range. Accurate prediction of the rotating stall and the destabilizing aerodynamic force is one of the key technologies for these compressors. The aim of this study is to establish a method of accurately predicting the inception of rotating stall and its effect on shaft vibration. To achieve this, numerical investigations are carried out by unsteady flow and rotordynamic simulations. To validate the accuracy, an experiment is carried out at relatively high gas pressure conditions. In the first part of the study, the accuracy of compressor performance prediction is studied by steady computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulation. It is found that by taking the wall roughness effect into account, the predicted performance shows good agreement with the experimental result. In the second part of the study, the accuracy of predicting the rotating stall is studied. In the experiment, two types of rotating stalls are measured. One is a multiple-cell stall induced in the vaneless diffuser and the other is a one-cell stall induced in the impeller. It is found that the simulation can predict the inception of the rotating stall with relatively high accuracy as the predicted results show good agreement with the experimental results in terms of cell count, rotation speed, pressure fluctuation level, and the effect on shaft vibration. Through this study, the effectiveness of simulation is validated for the stall and vibration prediction.
affiliations: Kawasaki Heavy Industries (Japan)
Technical Institute, Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Co., Ltd., Akashi, Hyogo 673-8666, Japan
Plant & Infrastructure Company, Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Co., Ltd., Kobe, Hyogo, 673-8670, Japan
summary_zh: 该研究通过非定常CFD和转子动力学仿真，结合高压气体实验，预测工业离心压气机的旋转失速及其对轴振动的影响。实验测得无叶扩压器中的多胞失速和叶轮中的单胞失速，仿真在失速胞数、转速、压力脉动和振动影响方面与实验吻合良好，验证了仿真方法的有效性。
method: 采用非定常CFD和转子动力学仿真，实验在高压气体条件下进行，通过稳态CFD考虑壁面粗糙度提高性能预测精度。
innovation: 建立了同时预测旋转失速起始及其对轴振动影响的仿真方法，并通过高压实验验证了失速胞数、转速和振动效应的准确性。
conclusions: 1. 考虑壁面粗糙度的稳态CFD可准确预测压缩机性能。2. 非定常仿真能准确预测两种旋转失速（多胞和单胞）的胞数、转速和压力脉动水平。
limitations: 研究仅针对特定工业离心压缩机，未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或机匣处理等稳定性控制手段。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦旋转失速预测，与压气机稳定性直接相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Reconstructing Compressor Non-Uniform Circumferential Flow Field From Spatially Undersampled Data—Part 1: Methodology and Sensitivity Analysis
abstract: Abstract The flow field in a compressor is circumferentially non-uniform due to the wakes from upstream stators, the potential field from both upstream and downstream stators, and blade row interactions. This non-uniform flow impacts stage performance as well as blade forced vibrations. Historically, experimental characterization of the circumferential flow variation is achieved by circumferentially traversing either a probe or the stator rows. This involves the design of complex traverse mechanisms and can be costly. To address this challenge, a novel method is proposed to reconstruct compressor non-uniform circumferential flow field using spatially under-sampled data points from a few probes at fixed circumferential locations. The paper is organized into two parts. In the present part of the paper, details of the multi-wavelet approximation for the reconstruction of circumferential flow and use of the particle swarm optimization algorithm for selection of probe positions are presented. Validation of the method is performed using the total pressure field in a multi-stage compressor representative of small core compressors in aero engines. The circumferential total pressure field is reconstructed from eight spatially distributed data points using a triple-wavelet approximation method. Results show good agreement between the reconstructed and the true total pressure fields. Also, a sensitivity analysis of the method is conducted to investigate the influence of probe spacing on the errors in the reconstructed signal.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
School of Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University , West Lafayette, IN 47907
summary_zh: 本文提出一种利用空间欠采样数据重构压气机非均匀周向流场的方法，采用多小波逼近和粒子群优化算法选择探针位置，通过八点数据重构三级压气机总压场，验证了方法的准确性，并分析了探针间距对重构误差的影响。
method: 数值方法，采用多小波逼近和粒子群优化算法，基于八点空间欠采样数据重构总压场，工况为多级小核心压气机。
innovation: 提出利用少量固定探针重构周向非均匀流场的方法，避免复杂周向遍历机构，结合多小波逼近和粒子群优化实现高效重构。
conclusions: 1. 八点数据结合三小波逼近可准确重构总压场；2. 探针间距影响重构误差，需优化布置。
limitations: 仅验证了总压场重构，未涉及其他流动参数或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机周向非均匀流场重构，与叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接研究畸变或稳定裕度。

title: The Effect of Blade Count on Body Force Model Performance for Axial Fans
abstract: Abstract Body force models enable inexpensive numerical simulations of turbomachinery. The approach replaces the blades with sources of momentum/energy. Such models capture a “smeared out” version of the blades’ effect on the flow, reducing computational cost. The body force model used in this paper has been widely used in aircraft engine applications. Its implementation for low speed, low solidity (few blades) turbomachines, such as automotive cooling fans, enables predictions of cooling flows and component temperatures without calibrated fan curves. Automotive cooling fans tend to have less than 10 blades, which is approximately 50% of blade counts for modern jet engine fans. The effect that has on the body force model predictions is unknown, and the objective of this paper is to quantify how varying blade count affects the accuracy of the predictions for both uniform and non-uniform inflow. The key findings are that reductions in blade metal blockage combined with spanwise flow redistribution drives the body force model to more accurately predict work coefficient as the blade count decreases and that reducing the number of blades is found to have negligible impacts on upstream influence and distortion transfer in non-uniform inflow until extremely low blade counts (such as 2) are applied.
affiliations: University of Windsor
Turbomachinery and Unsteady Flows Research Group, Department of Mechanical, Automotive and Materials Engineering, University of Windsor, Windsor ON, N9B 3P4, Canada
summary_zh: 本文研究了叶片数对轴流风扇体力模型性能的影响。体力模型通过动量/能量源替代叶片，降低计算成本。研究发现，叶片数减少时，金属堵塞降低和展向流动再分布使功系数预测更准确；在非均匀入流中，叶片数减少对上游影响和畸变传递影响很小，直至极低叶片数（如2片）。
method: 数值模拟，采用体力模型，研究不同叶片数（从少于10片到现代喷气发动机风扇的约50%叶片数）在均匀和非均匀入流下的性能。
innovation: 首次量化了低叶片数（如汽车冷却风扇）对体力模型预测精度的影响，揭示了叶片数减少时功系数预测更准确的机制。
conclusions: 1. 叶片数减少时，金属堵塞降低和展向流动再分布使功系数预测更准确。2. 非均匀入流中，叶片数减少对上游影响和畸变传递影响很小，直至叶片数降至2片。
limitations: 仅针对低速、低稠度轴流风扇，未涉及高速或高稠度压气机。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及体力模型在畸变进气下的应用，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或稳定裕度。

title: Efficient Steady and Unsteady Flow Modeling for Arbitrarily Mis-Staggered Bladerow Under Influence of Inlet Distortion
abstract: Abstract Accurate and efficient predictions of the steady and unsteady flow responses due to the blade-to-blade variation as well as due to the nonaxisymmetric inlet distortion have been continually pursued. Computation of two problems concurrently has been rarely done in the past partly because of the need to perform whole annulus bladerow simulations, despite the advances in the current state-of-the-art methods with the phase-shift single passage simulations. The current work attempts to deal with this challenge by developing a new computational approach based on the principle of the multiscale method in the framework of a commercial solver (CFX). The methodology formulation relies on summation of the constituent source terms, each of which corresponds to a particular flow perturbation. The source term element corresponding to the blade-to-blade variation effect is linearly superimposed as in the classical Influence Coefficient Method. The unsteady flow field around a blade at any time instant depends only on its relative position to all its neighboring blades, so that the influences of an arbitrarily mis-staggered bladerow can be computed efficiently. In addition, the source term arisen due to the inlet distortion is calculated based on the spatial Fourier transform. A key enabler is that the source terms can be precomputed using a small set of identical blade passages. The source term is then propagated to different spatial and temporal locations depending on the combination of the mis-staggering pattern and the inlet distortion. The multiscale treatment makes it possible to predict a high-resolution flow field effects on the base coarse mesh as if a fine mesh were locally solved, while achieving a considerable computational efficiency gain. The proposed influence-coefficient and source term based method has been validated for test cases with a uniformly staggered bladerow, and for an arbitrarily mis-staggered bladerow, under a clean inflow condition as well as that subject to an inlet distortion.
affiliations: University of Oxford
Department of Engineering Science, University of Oxford, Oxford OX2 0ES, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种基于多尺度方法和源项叠加的计算方法，用于高效预测任意错排叶片排受进气畸变影响的稳态和非稳态流场。方法结合影响系数法和空间傅里叶变换，通过少量叶片通道预计算源项，并在粗网格上实现高分辨率效果，显著提升计算效率。
method: 数值方法，基于多尺度方法和源项叠加，在CFX框架内实现，结合影响系数法和空间傅里叶变换处理叶片排错排和进气畸变。
innovation: 首次将多尺度方法应用于同时处理叶片排错排和进气畸变问题，通过源项叠加和预计算实现高效全环模拟，避免全环网格计算。
conclusions: 该方法在均匀错排和任意错排叶片排下均得到验证，能准确预测清洁进气和畸变进气条件下的流场，计算效率显著提升。
limitations: 方法依赖预计算源项，可能对复杂非线性效应捕捉不足；仅验证了亚声速工况，未涉及跨声速或超声速。
relevance_reason: 该研究涉及进气畸变下的流场预测，与用户关注的叶尖畸变稳定裕度预测高度相关，且方法基于多尺度模型，与三维激盘模型有共通之处。

title: Design of a Tip Appendage for the Control of Tip Leakage Vortices in Axial Flow Fans
abstract: Abstract This article reports on numerical investigations of passive control techniques used for the performance enhancement of a large diameter axial flow cooling fan through modification of the blade tip geometry. Using open-source software, a novel meshing strategy is developed to carry out both steady and unsteady numerical computations of a periodic section of an axial flow fan. Analyzing the flow near the blade tip with a reduction in tip clearance, two predominant flow phenomena are identified. These two flow phenomena are further investigated with the aim of controlling them through implementation of a tip appendage design. Both introduced end-plate designs indicate effective control of each relevant flow phenomena. The constant thickness (CT) end-plate design is found to increase all fan performance characteristics at lower than design point (DP) flowrates, while increasing the fan’s peak efficiency plateau toward the rotor stall margin. However, none of the CT end-plate designs are able to improve the fan’s performance characteristics at its DP. The introduction of a novel trailing-edge (TE) end-plate design is found to increase all fan performance characteristics across the entire evaluated stable operating range, with an indicated increase of 37.3 percent in total-to-static pressure rise and a 2.9 percentage point increase in total-to-static efficiency at the fan’s DP flowrate. The aerodynamic performance results attest to the associated benefits of the investigated passive control techniques.
affiliations: Stellenbosch University
Department of Mechanical and Mechatronic Engineering, Stellenbosch University, Stellenbosch, Western Cape 7599, South Africa
Sapienza University of Rome
Dipartimento di Meccanica e Aeronautica, Universitádi Roma “La Sapienza”, 00185 Rome, Italy
summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究了大直径轴流冷却风扇的被动控制技术，通过修改叶尖几何形状（端板设计）来控制叶尖泄漏涡。研究发现，恒定厚度端板在低流量下提升性能，而新型尾缘端板在整个稳定运行范围内提升性能，在设计点总静压升增加37.3%，效率提高2.9个百分点。
method: 采用开源软件进行稳态和非稳态数值模拟，开发了新型网格策略，研究周期性扇区，并对比了两种端板设计（恒定厚度和尾缘端板）。
innovation: 提出两种叶尖端板设计（恒定厚度和尾缘端板）以控制叶尖泄漏涡，其中尾缘端板设计首次实现全工况性能提升。
conclusions: 尾缘端板设计在设计点使总静压升增加37.3%，总静效率提高2.9个百分点，且在整个稳定运行范围内提升性能。
limitations: 仅针对特定大直径轴流冷却风扇，未考虑实际工况中的畸变进气或非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖间隙和被动控制，与叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测间接相关，但未直接涉及稳定裕度建模。

title: Flow Distortion Into the Core Engine for an Installed Variable Pitch Fan in Reverse Thrust Mode
abstract: Abstract The flow distortion at core engine entry for a variable pitch fan (VPF) in reverse thrust mode is described from a realistic flow field obtained using an integrated airframe-engine model. The model includes the VPF, core entry splitter, complete bypass nozzle flow path wrapped in a nacelle, and installed to an airframe in landing configuration through a pylon. A moving ground plane to mimic the rolling runway is included. 3D Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) solutions are generated at two combinations of VPF stagger angle and rotational speed settings for the entire aircraft landing run from 140 to 20 knots. The internal reverse thrust flow field is characterized by bypass nozzle lip separation, pylon wake, and recirculation of flow turned back from the VPF. A portion of the reverse stream flow turns 180 deg with separation at the splitter leading edge to feed the core engine. The core engine feed flow exhibits circumferential and radial nonuniformities that depend on the reverse flow development at different landing speeds. The temporal dependence of the distorted flow features is also explored by an unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) analysis. Total pressure and swirl angle distortion descriptors, as defined by the Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE) S-16 committee, and, total pressure loss into the core engine are described for the core feed flow at different operating conditions and landing speeds. It is observed that the radial intensity of total pressure distortion is critical to core engine operation, while the circumferential intensity is within acceptable limits. Therefore, the baseline sharp splitter edge is replaced by two larger rounded splitter edges of radii, ∼0.1x and ∼0.2x times the core duct height. This was found to reduce the radial intensity of total pressure distortion to acceptable levels. The description of the installed core feed flow distortion, as described in this study, is necessary to ascertain stable core engine operation, which powers the VPF in reverse thrust mode.
affiliations: Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Cranfield University
Rolls-Royce UTC, Centre for Propulsion Engineering, Cranfield University, Cranfield, Bedfordshire, MK43 0AL, UK
summary_zh: 本研究通过集成机身-发动机模型，数值模拟了反推力模式下变距风扇核心机入口的流动畸变。采用RANS和URANS方法，分析了不同着陆速度下总压和旋流畸变，发现径向总压畸变强度对核心机运行至关重要，并通过增大分流器前缘半径将其降至可接受水平。
method: 采用三维RANS和URANS数值模拟，集成机身-发动机模型，包含变距风扇、核心分流器、短舱和起落架，模拟着陆速度140至20节。
innovation: 首次详细描述了反推力模式下变距风扇核心机入口的流动畸变特征，并提出了通过增大分流器前缘半径来降低径向总压畸变强度的工程解决方案。
conclusions: 径向总压畸变强度是核心机运行的关键，通过将分流器前缘半径增大至核心管道高度的0.1~0.2倍，可将其降至可接受水平。
limitations: 仅针对特定构型和着陆工况，未考虑其他飞行阶段或发动机状态。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及畸变进气对核心机稳定性的影响，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Large-Eddy Simulation of a Single Airfoil Tip-Leakage Flow
abstract: A large-eddy simulation is performed on a single nonrotating airfoil with tip gap in order to highlight the noise sources in the tip-leakage flow. The geometry is composed of a NACA 5510 airfoil (5% camber, 10% thickness) mounted between two flat plates, with a 10 mm tip gap between the airfoil and one of the plates. The Reynolds number based on the chord is 960,000 and the Mach number is 0.2. The aerodynamic results from the simulation show the formation of the tip-leakage vortex and the interaction of the turbulent structures that exit the gap with the external flow near the trailing edge. Then, a Ffowcs Williams and Hawkings analogy is used to compute the far-field noise levels and an acoustic decomposition is performed to highlight the main surface contributions to the tip-leakage noise. The numerical simulation shows very good agreement compared with experiments and allows identification of the main noise source in the tip gap. The main noise source results from the interaction of the turbulent structures created in the tip gap close to the pressure side corner with the suction side tip edge. The scraping of turbulent structures along the tip edge is shown to be an efficient noise mechanism.
affiliations: Université de Sherbrooke
University of Sherbrooke, Sherbrooke, Quebec J1 K 2R1, Canada
Université du Québec à Montréal
School of Higher Technology–University of Quebec, Montreal, Quebec H3C 1 K3, Canada
summary_zh: 对单个非旋转NACA 5510翼型（弦长0.2m，间隙10mm）进行大涡模拟，研究叶尖泄漏流噪声源。模拟捕捉了叶尖泄漏涡及湍流结构，结合Ffowcs Williams-Hawkings声类比计算远场噪声，发现主要噪声源为压力侧角部湍流与吸力侧叶尖边缘的刮擦作用。
method: 大涡模拟（LES）结合Ffowcs Williams-Hawkings声类比，雷诺数960,000，马赫数0.2，非旋转翼型。
innovation: 首次通过LES详细解析非旋转翼型叶尖间隙内湍流结构对噪声的贡献，识别出叶尖边缘刮擦为主要噪声机制。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖泄漏流噪声主要源于压力侧角部湍流与吸力侧叶尖边缘的相互作用。2. 湍流结构沿叶尖边缘的刮擦是高效噪声机制。
limitations: 仅针对单个非旋转翼型，未考虑旋转效应及多排叶片相互作用。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙流动与噪声，与压气机叶尖间隙畸变及稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究稳定裕度。

title: Flow Physics During Surge and Recovery of a Multi-Stage High-Speed Compressor
abstract: Abstract Stall followed by surge in a high-speed compressor can lead to violent disruption of the flow, damage to the blade structures and eventually engine shutdown. Knowledge of unsteady blade loading during surge is crucial for compressor design such as axial gap optimization. The aim of this paper is to demonstrate the feasibility of using three-dimensional full assembly unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) CFD for modeling surge cycles of an eight-stage high-speed compressor rig. Results from this work show stalling of the mid-stages is the surge trigger. During the flow reversal, a strong acoustic reflection occurs when the convected entropy perturbations reach the intake opening, which increase the blade loading significantly. During recovery, a hysteresis loop was recorded due to hot air re-ingestion, which led to a strong shear at mid-span of the inlet guide vane (IGV)/R1 domain and the formation of rotating helical flow structures. The final phase of recovery was accompanied by a four-cell multi-row tip rotating stall, which was cleared as the compressor recovered to the forward flow characteristic. It was also shown that the single passage model, despite its limitations and shortcomings in modeling recovery, can predict reasonably accurate transient flow features during surge and thus provide considerable insight to the flow behavior, which can be used to obtain a first approximation of casing and blade loading.

Department of Mechanical Engineering, Imperial College London, London SW7 2AZ, UK
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Rolls-Royce plc, PO Box 31, Derby, DE24 8BJ, UK
summary_zh: 本文通过三维全环非定常URANS CFD模拟八级高速压气机喘振循环，发现中间级失速触发喘振，回流时熵扰动与进气口声反射导致叶片载荷剧增，恢复阶段存在热空气再吸入引起的迟滞环和旋转螺旋流结构，最终四胞多排叶尖旋转失速清除后恢复正向流动。
method: 采用三维全环非定常RANS（URANS）数值模拟，研究八级高速压气机整机喘振循环，并与单通道模型对比。
innovation: 首次利用全环URANS成功模拟多级高速压气机完整喘振循环，揭示了熵扰动声反射和热空气再吸入等复杂物理机制。
conclusions: 1. 中间级失速是喘振触发机制；2. 回流时熵扰动声反射显著增加叶片载荷，恢复阶段存在迟滞和四胞旋转失速。
limitations: 单通道模型在恢复阶段预测能力有限，且未考虑结构变形或流固耦合效应。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦压气机失速/喘振机理，与用户关注的稳定裕度预测高度相关，且涉及叶尖间隙畸变和旋转不稳定性。

title: Experimental Study of Vaneless Diffuser Rotating Stall Development and Cell-Merging Phenomena
abstract: Abstract This paper describes the vaneless diffuser rotating stall (VDRS) development and cell-merging phenomena. A centrifugal compressor’s lifespan may be limited by flow instabilities occurring in off-design operation. One such instability is the VDRS, which generates oscillating, asymmetrical flow fields in the diffuser and, thus, undesired forces acting on the rotor. Understanding and prevention of VDRS behavior are crucial for achieving safe and undisturbed compressor operation. Experimental measurements of centrifugal compressors operating under the influence of VDRS have been presented. Two different approaches were used for the identification of VDRS: pressure measurements and two-dimensional (2D) particle image velocimetry (PIV). Frequency analysis based on spectral maps and cell development processes were investigated. The presented results showed that mass flowrate has an impact on the rotating frequency of both the entire structure and single cells. Additionally, it affects radial cell size, which grows with compressor throttling and ultimately reaches the length of the diffuser. During the experiments, the cell-merging phenomenon was observed which has not been widely described in the literature. The results presented in this paper allow a better understanding of vaneless diffuser rotating stall behavior. The phenomenon of the change of cell size and frequency could be very important for machine fatigue. Cell-merging could also have an impact on the machine’s vibrations and flow stability. Since it is believed that VDRS is one of the factors inducing surge, its understanding and prevention may have a positive influence on surge margins.
affiliations: Lodz University of Technology
Institute of Turbomachinery, Lodz University of Technology, Wólczanska 219/223, 90-924 Łódź, Poland
summary_zh: 本文实验研究离心压气机无叶扩压器旋转失速（VDRS）的发展与失速团合并现象。采用压力测量和二维粒子图像测速（PIV）识别VDRS，发现质量流量影响旋转频率和径向失速团尺寸，并观察到失速团合并现象，对理解失速行为及喘振裕度有重要意义。
method: 实验研究，采用压力测量和二维PIV技术，在不同质量流量工况下测量无叶扩压器旋转失速。
innovation: 首次详细描述无叶扩压器旋转失速中的失速团合并现象，并揭示质量流量对失速团尺寸和频率的影响。
conclusions: 质量流量降低导致失速团旋转频率变化，径向尺寸增大直至扩压器长度；失速团合并现象被观测到，可能影响机器振动和流动稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定离心压气机几何，未涵盖不同尺寸或转速的影响。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究旋转失速发展及合并现象，与压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Nonlinear Stability Analysis of a Generic Fan With Distorted Inflow Using Passage-Spectral Method
abstract: Abstract The dependence of the aerodynamic stability of fan blades with the nodal diameter and amplitude of the inlet perturbations is studied. The analysis is conducted using a block-wise spatial Fourier decomposition of reduced passages to reconstruct the full-annulus solution. The method represents very efficiently the unsteady flow generated by inlet non-uniformities. The explicit spatial Fourier approximation is exploited to characterize the relevance of each nodal diameter of the inlet perturbation in the fan stall process and study the nonlinear stability in a harmonic by harmonic basis. This approximation allows studying the contribution to stall of each circumferential mode separately. The methodology has been assessed for the NASA rotor 67. The maximum amplitude of total pressure distortion at which the compressor becomes unstable and triggers a stall process has been mapped. It has been proven that despite the complexity of a screen-induced total pressure distortion the only relevant parameter for the nonlinear stability of the fan is the most unstable nodal diameter. The equivalence in terms of stability between realistic distortion screens and single harmonic distortions has been assessed. Full-annulus simulations have been conducted to assess the accuracy of the simplified nonlinear stability limit. It is concluded that performing a nonlinear simulation with the proper single harmonic perturbation is enough to assess fan stability. The total pressure error with respect the full annulus simulation including a screen-induced pressure deficit at the intake is below 10%. It is shown that for the NASA rotor 67 running at the nominal speed, the most unstable nodal diameter is the first. This study not only shows a reduction in computational time to assess nonlinear fan stability by a factor of 7 but also creates an efficient methodology for understanding the nonlinear instability of fans due to inlet distortion profiles.
affiliations: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid
School of Aeronautics and Space, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, Madrid 28040, Spain
Advanced Engineering Direction, Industria de TurboPropulsores S.A.U., Madrid 28830, Spain;
Department of Fluid Mechanics and Aerospace Propulsion, School of Aeronautics and Space, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, Spain
summary_zh: 本文采用通道-谱方法对NASA转子67在畸变进气下的非线性稳定性进行分析。通过分块空间傅里叶分解重构全环解，研究了进气扰动节径和幅值对风扇稳定性的影响。发现最不稳定节径是决定非线性稳定性的唯一关键参数，单谐波扰动足以评估风扇稳定性，总压误差低于10%。
method: 数值方法：基于通道-谱方法的块状空间傅里叶分解，重构全环非定常流场。工况：NASA转子67，额定转速，进气总压畸变。
innovation: 提出通道-谱方法，将全环非线性稳定性分析简化为单谐波扰动下的计算，计算时间减少7倍，并揭示了最不稳定节径的主导作用。
conclusions: 1. 风扇非线性稳定性仅由最不稳定节径决定，NASA转子67在额定转速下最不稳定节径为第1节径。2. 单谐波扰动模拟畸变进气的总压误差低于10%。
limitations: 仅针对NASA转子67在额定转速下的总压畸变，未考虑其他畸变类型或转速的影响。
relevance_reason: 该研究直接针对叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测，且采用三维激盘模型类似的思想（空间傅里叶分解），与用户课题高度吻合。

title: Azimuthal Mode Characteristics of Rotating Instability in Axial Compressor Using Compressed Sensing Method
abstract: Abstract A signal reconstruction algorithm based on the compressed sensing (CS) theory with dual-uniform sampling point (DUSP) distribution is developed and applied to identify the azimuthal mode of axial compressor. A regular failure signal pattern is found, and the corresponding explanation is presented with validation. Azimuthal mode analysis is applied to both numerical and experimental pressure fluctuation signals of rotating instability (RI) in the axial compressor tip region. For numerical calculations, the signal in the azimuthal mode domain is reconstructed by the CS with random measurement points and DUSP, respectively. The success rates and reconstruction errors are discussed in detail. It is shown that the azimuthal mode reconstruction method based on CS combined with DUSP is capable of identifying the complex flow modes in the tip region of the axial compressor. For the experimental results, high azimuthal mode orders are reconstructed based on dynamic pressure signals measured by DUSP. Azimuthal mode analysis efficiency is thereby significantly improved. The time-resolved characteristics of the RI are discussed. Moreover, a robustness analysis is conducted, demonstrating the ability of the CS-based method with DUSP to address sensor failure problems.
affiliations: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
School of Mechanical Engineering, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Dongchuan Road, Shanghai 200240, China
summary_zh: 本文基于压缩感知（CS）理论，结合双均匀采样点（DUSP）分布，开发了一种信号重建算法，用于识别轴流压气机的周向模态。该方法应用于压气机叶尖区域旋转不稳定性（RI）的数值和实验压力脉动信号分析，成功重建了高周向模态阶数，显著提高了模态分析效率，并验证了其在传感器故障情况下的鲁棒性。
method: 数值模拟与实验测量结合，采用压缩感知（CS）与双均匀采样点（DUSP）分布进行周向模态重建，分析叶尖区域旋转不稳定性（RI）信号。
innovation: 提出基于CS与DUSP的周向模态重建方法，解决了传统方法采样点不足和传感器故障问题，提高了高模态阶数识别效率。
conclusions: 1. CS结合DUSP方法能有效识别轴流压气机叶尖区域的复杂流动模态。2. 该方法显著提高了周向模态分析效率，并具备处理传感器故障的能力。
limitations: 研究未涉及不同工况（如转速、流量）对方法性能的影响，且仅针对旋转不稳定性（RI）模态。
tags: 旋转流动不稳定性 RI
relevance_reason: 研究涉及旋转不稳定性（RI）和叶尖区域流动，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Mistuning Identification Technique Based on Blisk Detuning
abstract: The structural dynamics of turbomachinery bladed disks is of paramount importance to ensure safety and reliability. Due to their sensitivity to mistuning (that is, any deviation from nominal properties), bladed disk vibrations encountered in practical applications can be significantly amplified. Thus, it is important to identify mistuning of as-manufactured blisks so that computational models can be updated to include mistuning and used to accurately characterize the behavior of blisks in operating conditions. Several mistuning identification techniques based on bench tests have been developed. This paper focuses on the techniques based on blade isolation through mass detuning and modal testing: methods that require a simple experimental setup. The typical shortcoming of these methods is that they rely on measured blade frequencies as a proxy for blade mistuning. However, as presented in this study, it is often impossible to completely isolate a blade from the neighboring ones using mass detuning; as a result, the measured frequencies do not represent the cantilevered blade frequencies that many reduced-order models use to model mistuning. This is especially true for blisks in which the blade-to-disk stiffness ratio is not negligible: a scenario that could become more and more prevalent as the trend to design thinner disks to reduce blisk mass continues. A technique based on modal testing that is able to accurately identify mistuning by appropriately capturing the effect of residual blade-to-blade and blade-to-disk coupling is introduced in this paper. A validation is carried out using an academic blisk model and surrogate data, and the results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the direct use of blade frequencies as proxies for mistuning.
affiliations: University of Michigan–Ann Arbor
University of Michigan
University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, Michigan 48109
summary_zh: 本文针对整体叶盘（blisk）的失谐识别问题，提出了一种基于模态测试的新技术。该方法通过质量失谐和模态测试实现叶片隔离，并准确捕捉残余叶片间及叶片-盘耦合效应，从而更精确地识别失谐。与直接使用叶片频率作为失谐代理的传统方法相比，新方法在学术blisk模型和替代数据验证中表现更优。
method: 数值方法：使用学术blisk模型和替代数据进行验证，通过质量失谐和模态测试实现叶片隔离。
innovation: 提出一种基于模态测试的失谐识别技术，能够准确捕捉残余叶片间及叶片-盘耦合效应，克服了传统方法中叶片无法完全隔离的缺陷。
conclusions: 1. 新方法在识别失谐方面优于直接使用叶片频率作为代理的传统方法。2. 对于叶片-盘刚度比不可忽略的blisk，该方法尤其有效。
limitations: 研究基于学术模型和替代数据，未在真实发动机或实验台上验证。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动和失谐识别，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但非核心方向。

title: Transonic Fan Blade Redesign Approach to Attenuate Nonsynchronous Vibration
abstract: Abstract Due to manufacturing tolerance and deterioration during operation, different blades in a fan assembly exhibit geometric variability. This leads to asymmetry which will be amplified in the running geometry by centrifugal and aerodynamic loads. This study investigates a phenomenon known as Alternate Passage Divergence (APD), where the blade untwist creates an alternating pattern in passage geometry and stagger angle around the circumference. After the formation of alternating tip stagger pattern, APD's unsteady effect, APD-induced Non-Synchronous Vibration (APD-NSV), can cause the blades from one group to switch to the other creating a traveling wave pattern around the circumference. Thus, it can potentially lead to high cycle fatigue issues. More importantly, this phenomenon occurs close to, or at, peak efficiency conditions and can significantly reduce overall efficiency. Therefore, it is vital to attenuate the NSV behavior. In this study, a redesign approach is investigated.

Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Rolls-Royce Vibration University Technology Centre, Imperial College London, London SW7 2AZ, UK
Rolls-Royce plc, Derby DE24 9HY, UK
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Imperial College London, London SW7 2AZ, UK

summary_zh: 本研究针对跨声速风扇叶片因制造公差和运行退化导致的几何变异性，研究了交替通道发散（APD）现象及其诱发的非同步振动（APD-NSV）。通过叶片重新设计方法，旨在衰减NSV行为，避免高频疲劳和效率损失。
method: 基于数值模拟的叶片重新设计方法，研究APD形成机制及其对非同步振动的影响，工况接近峰值效率点。
innovation: 首次提出通过叶片重新设计来衰减APD诱发的非同步振动，而非传统被动控制方法，直接针对几何不对称性根源。
conclusions: APD-NSV发生在峰值效率附近，可导致高频疲劳和效率显著下降；重新设计方法有望衰减NSV行为。
limitations: 未提供具体重新设计参数及实验验证，仅基于数值研究。
relevance_reason: 直接研究非同步振动（NSV），与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测相关，但未涉及激盘模型。

title: Structural Dynamic and Inherent Damping Characterization of Additively Manufactured Airfoil Components
abstract: Abstract The push for low cost and higher performance/efficient turbine engines has introduced a demand for novel technologies to improve robustness to vibrations resulting in high cycle fatigue (HCF). There have been many proposed solutions to this, some passive and some active. With the advent of additive manufacturing (AM), new damping techniques can now be incorporated directly into the design and manufacture process to suppress the vibrations that cause HCF. Recent work has been investigating new ways of using AM for turbine engine applications. A specifically innovative approach using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) is of particular note. The use of internal pockets filled with the build powder but left unfused has proved to have damping quality with &gt;90% force response reduction. This study will investigate the as-manufactured parts, damping endurance, and structural dynamic changes when this technology is applied to a compressor-like blade. This will be done by using multiple testing methods to investigate the performance and dynamics of the blade. The study will use a computed tomography (CT) scans to investigate the pockets, structured light scans to investigate the external geometry, modal assurance criteria (MAC) to investigate the structural dynamics, and a sinusoidal strain step test to investigate endurance. This study found similar endurance and damping capabilities as previously observed, in addition to finding that the inclusion of the unfused powder pockets did not affect mode shapes measured by the MAC.

Wright-Patterson Air Force Base

Aerospace Systems Directorate, U.S. Air Force Research Laboratory, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, OH 45433; U.S. Air Force Institute of Technology, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, OH 45433
U.S. Air Force Institute of Technology, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, OH 45433
Aerospace Systems Directorate, U.S. Air Force Research Laboratory, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, OH 45433
