summary_zh: 本文针对T100微型燃气轮机连接不同容积的试验台，采用小波分析和高阶统计量分析等信号处理技术，从声学和振动测量中提取不稳定量化指标，用于检测旋转失速和喘振。研究发现，次同步范围内所有自双谱分量模之和可作为可靠的早期喘振检测指标。
method: 实验研究，基于T100微型燃气轮机试验台，连接不同容积的模块化容器，采集麦克风和加速度计信号，采用小波分析和HOSA方法处理。
innovation: 利用高阶统计量分析（HOSA）中的自双谱方法，定义次同步范围自双谱模之和作为量化指标，优于传统FFT，适用于非线性非高斯过程。
conclusions: 1. 次同步范围内所有自双谱分量模之和可可靠预测不稳定工况。2. 该指标可用于早期喘振检测诊断系统。
limitations: 仅针对特定T100微燃机和大容积系统，未涉及压气机叶尖间隙或畸变等细节。
relevance_reason: 涉及失速/喘振检测，但未聚焦叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Analysis of Friction-Saturated Flutter Vibrations With a Fully Coupled Frequency Domain Method
abstract: Abstract Flutter stability is a dominant design constraint of modern turbines. Thus, flutter-tolerant designs are currently explored, where the resulting vibrations remain within acceptable bounds. In particular, friction damping has the potential to yield limit cycle oscillations (LCOs) in the presence of a flutter instability. To predict such LCOs, it is the current practice to model the aerodynamic forces in terms of aerodynamic influence coefficients for a linearized structural model with fixed oscillation frequency. This approach neglects that both the nonlinear contact interactions and the aerodynamic stiffness cause a change in the deflection shape and the frequency of the LCO. This, in turn, may have a substantial effect on the aerodynamic damping. The goal of this paper is to assess the importance of these neglected interactions. To this end, a state-of-the-art aero-elastic model of a low pressure turbine blade row is considered, undergoing nonlinear frictional contact interactions in the tip shroud interfaces. The LCOs are computed with a fully coupled harmonic balance method, which iteratively computes the Fourier coefficients of structural deformation and conservative flow variables, as well as the a priori unknown frequency. The coupled algorithm was found to provide excellent computational robustness and efficiency. Moreover, a refinement of the conventional energy method is developed and assessed, which accounts for both the nonlinear contact boundary conditions and the linearized aerodynamic influence. It is found that the conventional energy method may not predict a limit cycle oscillation at all while the novel approach presented here can.

venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮叶片摩擦阻尼引起的极限环振荡（LCO），采用全耦合谐波平衡法，同时考虑非线性接触和气动弹性耦合，发现传统能量法可能无法预测LCO，而新方法能有效预测。
method: 全耦合谐波平衡法，迭代计算结构变形、流动变量和频率，用于低压涡轮叶片排的摩擦饱和颤振分析。
innovation: 提出全耦合频域方法，同时考虑非线性接触和气动弹性耦合对LCO频率和振型的影响，改进了传统能量法。
conclusions: 传统能量法可能无法预测极限环振荡，而全耦合方法能有效预测；耦合算法具有出色的计算鲁棒性和效率。
limitations: 仅针对低压涡轮叶片排，未考虑其他阻尼机制或复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振，但研究对象为涡轮而非压气机，且未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: A tip clearance prediction model for multistage rotors and stators in aero-engines
abstract: Tip clearances of multistage rotors and stators greatly affect aero-engines’ aerodynamic efficiency, stability and safety. The inevitable machining and assembly errors, as well as the complicated error propagation mechanism, cause overproof or non-uniform tip clearances. However, it is generally accepted that tip clearances are difficult to predict, even under assembly state. In this paper, a tip clearance prediction model is proposed based on measured error data. Some 3D error propagation sub-models, regarding rotors, supports and casings, are built and combined. The complex error coupling relationship is uncovered using mathematical methods. Rotor and stator tip clearances are predicted and analyzed in different phase angles. The maximum, minimum and average tip clearances can be calculated. The proposed model is implemented by a computer program, and a case study illustrates its performance and verifies its feasibility. The results can be referred by engineers in assembly quality judgement and decision-making.

summary_zh: 针对多级转子/静子叶尖间隙难以预测的问题，提出基于实测误差数据的预测模型，构建三维误差传播子模型并揭示误差耦合关系，可计算不同相位角下的最大、最小和平均间隙，通过案例验证可行性。
method: 基于实测误差数据建立三维误差传播子模型（转子、支承、机匣），采用数学方法揭示误差耦合关系，通过计算机程序实现预测。
innovation: 首次将实测误差数据与三维误差传播模型结合，实现多级转子/静子叶尖间隙的定量预测，并考虑相位角影响。
conclusions: 模型可预测不同相位角下的最大、最小和平均叶尖间隙，案例验证了其可行性和有效性，为装配质量判断提供参考。
limitations: 模型依赖实测误差数据，未考虑运行状态下的热变形和离心力影响。
relevance_reason: 该文聚焦叶尖间隙预测，与用户研究的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测直接相关，且用户提及使用三维激盘模型，本文的误差传播模型可为其提供间隙输入。

title: Design and Testing of a Rig to Investigate Buoyancy-Induced Heat Transfer in Aero-Engine Compressor Rotors
abstract: Abstract The change in compressor blade-tip clearance across the flight cycle depends on the expansion of the rotor, which in turn depends on the temperature and stress in the disks. The radial distribution of temperature is directly coupled to the buoyancy-driven flow and heat transfer in the rotating disk cavities. This paper describes a new test rig specifically designed to investigate this conjugate phenomenon. The rig test section includes four rotating disks enclosing three cavities. Two disks in the central cavity are instrumented with thermocouples to provide the radial distribution of temperature; the two outer cavities are thermally insulated to create appropriate boundary conditions for the heat transfer analysis. An axial throughflow of air is supplied between a stationary shaft and the bore of the disks. The temperature of the throughflow air is measured by thermocouples in rakes upstream and downstream of the central cavity. For a cold throughflow, the outer shroud of the central cavity is heated. Two independently controlled radiant heaters allow differential shroud temperatures for the upstream and downstream disks, as found in aero-engine compressors. Alternatively, the throughflow can be heated above the shroud temperature to simulate the transient conditions during engine operation where stratified flow can occur inside the cavity. The rig is designed to operate in conditions where both convective and radiative heat transfer dominate; all internal surfaces of the cavity are painted matt black to allow the accurate calculation of the radiant heat transfer. Separate attachments can be fitted to the cobs of both central disks; the attachments reduce the axial gap between the cobs—reducing the gap to zero creates a closed cavity, which can occur in some compressor designs. Other instrumentation includes heat-flux gages on the shroud and high-frequency pressure transducers embedded into the disk diaphragm to capture unsteady flow structures. Attention has been given to experimental uncertainty, including the computation of the thermal-disturbance errors, caused by thermocouples embedded in the rotating disks; a Bayesian statistical model is used to reduce the effect of uncertainties in temperature measurements on the calculation of the Nusselt number. The effect of relevant nondimensional parameters on the radial distribution of the disk and throughflow temperatures has been shown for some typical cases.
affiliations: University of Bath
Department of Mechanical Engineering, University of Bath, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文设计并测试了一种用于研究航空发动机压气机转子中浮力驱动传热的新实验台。该实验台包含四个旋转盘和三个空腔，可模拟冷/热通流及不同盘罩温度条件，通过热电偶、热流计和压力传感器测量盘温度分布和流动结构，并采用贝叶斯统计模型降低测量不确定性。
method: 实验研究，设计专用旋转盘腔实验台，控制冷/热通流和辐射加热，测量温度、热流和压力，分析无量纲参数影响。
innovation: 首次针对压气机转子盘腔浮力驱动传热设计专用实验台，可独立控制上下游盘罩温差，并模拟瞬态分层流动，同时考虑辐射传热。
conclusions: 实验台能有效模拟发动机工况下的浮力驱动传热；通过贝叶斯模型降低了热电偶嵌入旋转盘的热扰动误差，提高了努塞尔数计算精度。
limitations: 实验台为简化几何，未包含真实叶片和叶尖间隙，且仅针对稳态和特定瞬态工况。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机转子盘腔传热，与叶尖间隙热变形间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定性。

title: Investigation of the Low-Frequency Oscillations in the Flowfield About an Airfoil
abstract: The present investigation shows that a triad of three vortices is behind the quasi-periodic self-sustained low-frequency flow oscillation phenomenon. Large-eddy simulations are carried out at , , and sixteen angles of attack at near-stall conditions. It is shown that the best description of the underlying mechanism is that of a button whirligig. A globally oscillating flow whirls around the airfoil in the clockwise direction and stores energy in the triad of vortices. When the oscillating flow loses momentum and comes to an equilibrium, the energy stored in the triad of vortices reaches a threshold. Thus, the triad of vortices reverses the direction of rotation of the oscillating flow, gives it a pulse of energy to whirl in the anticlockwise direction, and starts a new disequilibrium. When the oscillating flow rotates in the clockwise direction (in the streamwise direction on the suction surface of the airfoil), it adds momentum to the boundary layer and helps it to remain attached, and vice versa. Consequently, the instantaneous flowfield switches between an attached phase and a separated phase in a periodic manner with some disturbed cycles.
affiliations: University of Khartoum

summary_zh: 本研究通过大涡模拟（LES）在近失速条件下对翼型绕流中的低频自持振荡现象进行了分析，发现三个涡组成的涡三元组是振荡的核心机制，类似于“按钮陀螺”的旋转储能与反转过程，导致附体与分离相周期性切换。
method: 采用大涡模拟（LES）数值方法，在近失速条件下对翼型进行16个攻角工况的模拟。
innovation: 首次提出涡三元组（triad of vortices）作为低频振荡的驱动机制，并用“按钮陀螺”类比解释能量存储与方向反转过程。
conclusions: 1. 低频振荡由涡三元组的储能与释放驱动，导致流动在附体与分离相间周期性切换。2. 振荡方向影响边界层动量：顺时针（流向）增加动量保持附体，逆时针则相反。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型，未考虑三维效应及旋转机械中的叶尖间隙等复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 研究翼型低频振荡机制，与压气机失速/喘振机理相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或旋转流动不稳定性等核心方向。

title: Numerical Model of a Deep Surge Cycle in Low-Speed Centrifugal Compressor
abstract: Abstract In this article, a numerical model of the full surge cycle is presented for the low-speed centrifugal blower and compared with the experiment. Surge phenomenon is very dangerous for the compressor operation. Therefore, the possibility of studying its physics experimentally is strongly limited. The application of numerical methods allows one to safely analyze surge physics without causing risks to the operating crew. This article presents a description of the applied numerical method and exhaustive analysis of the flow structures observed at consecutive stages of the surge cycle. The surge is known to be very difficult to be simulated due to large timescale and region of influence. This study also shows the importance of an appropriate choice of the simulation definition and the boundary conditions. The presented method allows gathering information about features such as the regions of flow reversal, pressure distributions, pressure rise, cycle frequency, and others. All the aforementioned information provides important input to the efficient antisurge system design. The model has been validated by a comparison with the experimental data. Thanks to simulation, standardized antisurge solutions could be possibly replaced with more efficient protection schemes tailored to a given machine.
affiliations: Lodz University of Technology
Institute of Turbomachinery, Lodz University of Technology, 90-924 Lodz, Poland
University of Strathclyde

summary_zh: 本文针对低速离心鼓风机建立了完整喘振循环的数值模型，并与实验对比验证。通过数值方法安全分析了喘振物理机制，揭示了循环各阶段流动结构，包括回流区、压力分布、压力升和循环频率等特征，为高效防喘系统设计提供依据。
method: 采用数值模拟方法（CFD），模拟完整喘振循环，边界条件经适当选择，并与实验数据对比验证。
innovation: 首次实现低速离心压缩机完整喘振循环的数值模拟，克服了大时间尺度和影响区域的模拟困难，可替代标准化防喘方案。
conclusions: 1. 数值模型能准确捕捉喘振循环中的回流区、压力分布和循环频率。2. 模拟结果与实验吻合，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对低速离心鼓风机，未涉及高速或轴流压气机；未考虑叶尖间隙等几何细节。
relevance_reason: 研究喘振机理，与压气机稳定性相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: An Efficient Aeroelastic Eigenvalue Method for Analyzing Coupled-Mode Flutter in Turbomachinery
abstract: Abstract In this paper, a method for analyzing flutter for a turbomachinery row with aerodynamically coupled structural modes is presented. The majority of observed turbomachinery flutter incidents involve only one structural mode family due to high mass ratio, high solidity and significant natural frequency separation for blades of traditional design. However, with the trend of higher aerodynamic loading, the wide usage of light weight composite materials and lower blade counts, the likelihood of coupled-mode flutter increases, particularly for turbofans or open rotors. Under such circumstances, the widely used energy method for flutter analysis is not valid. To model this situation, a novel aeroelastic eigenvalue method that is capable of modeling both single- and coupled-mode flutter is proposed. This method takes into account the aerodynamic coupling effects between different vibration modes through the influence coefficient cross sub-matrices, which can be efficiently computed by a harmonic balance solver. The new method is efficient as the required computational effort is only two times that of the traditional single mode analysis approach. The new method is demonstrated and validated by presenting results for Standard Configuration Eleven and NASA Rotor 67 flutter test cases in this paper.

Yangtze River Delta Research Institute of NPU, and School of Power and Energy, Northernwestern Polytechnical University, Xi’an 710072, China

Principal Engineer RPMTurbo, Brisbane, Queensland 4000, Australia
summary_zh: 本文提出一种高效气动弹性特征值方法，用于分析涡轮机械中耦合模态颤振。该方法通过谐波平衡求解器计算影响系数交叉子矩阵，考虑不同振动模态间的气动耦合，计算量仅为传统单模态分析的两倍。通过标准构型11和NASA Rotor 67颤振算例验证了方法的有效性。
method: 数值方法：基于谐波平衡法的气动弹性特征值方法，分析单模态和耦合模态颤振。工况参数未明确，但涉及标准构型11和Rotor 67。
innovation: 提出能同时处理单模态和耦合模态颤振的气动弹性特征值方法，通过影响系数交叉子矩阵高效考虑模态间气动耦合，计算成本低。
conclusions: 1. 新方法能准确预测耦合模态颤振，计算量仅为传统单模态分析的两倍。2. 通过标准构型11和Rotor 67算例验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 方法基于线性化假设，未考虑非线性效应；仅验证了两个算例，通用性需进一步检验。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与颤振分析，与用户研究方向相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Dual stability enhancement mechanisms of axial-slot casing treatment in a high-speed mixed-flow compressor with various tip clearances
abstract: The influence of Axial-Slot Casing Treatment (ASCT) on the performance and stability enhancement mechanisms of ASCT were experimentally and numerically investigated in a high-speed mixed-flow compressor under three different tip clearances. Unsteady simulations showed the compressor stalled through end-wall stall route, i.e. the spike stall inception originating from rotor tip region, which was validated by dynamical measurements. When the ASCT was applied, greater than 20% of Stall Margin Improvement (SMI) could be achieved for the compressor under each tip clearance size. The streamwise velocity contours and flow structures in the tip region and axial slots were deeply analyzed to explore how the so called “suction and injection effects” generated by the ASCT manipulate tip clearance flow and enhance the stability of compressor under different tip clearances. It was found that the dominant stability enhancement mechanisms of ASCT varies with tip clearance size for the mixed-flow compressor. (A) For the small tip clearance, the dominant mechanism of stability enhancement is the blockage reduction generated in the blade passage by the suction effect of ASCT. (B) For the large tip clearance, the injection effect of the ASCT is the dominant mechanism of stability enhancement with ASCT, which plays the leading role in delaying the spillage of incoming/tip leakage flow interface at the rotor Leading Edge (LE) plane.

summary_zh: 针对高速混流压气机，实验与数值研究了轴向槽机匣处理在不同叶尖间隙下的双稳定增强机制。非定常模拟表明失速源于叶尖突尖型失速，ASCT可提供超过20%的失速裕度改善。小间隙时主导机制为抽吸效应减少堵塞，大间隙时主导机制为喷射效应延迟前缘泄漏流溢出。
method: 实验与数值模拟结合，非定常RANS模拟，三种叶尖间隙（小、中、大）工况，高速混流压气机。
innovation: 揭示了轴向槽机匣处理在混流压气机中随叶尖间隙变化的双稳定增强机制，区分了抽吸与喷射效应的主导作用。
conclusions: ASCT在不同叶尖间隙下均能实现超过20%的失速裕度改善；小间隙时抽吸效应主导，大间隙时喷射效应主导。
limitations: 仅针对特定混流压气机，未考虑不同转速或进气畸变的影响。
relevance_reason: 直接研究叶尖间隙与机匣处理对稳定性的影响，与用户课题高度相关。

title: Reduced order model for unsteady aerodynamic performance of compressor cascade based on recursive RBF
abstract: Based on Recursive Radial Basis Function (RRBF) neural network, the Reduced Order Model (ROM) of compressor cascade was established to meet the urgent demand of highly efficient prediction of unsteady aerodynamics performance of turbomachinery. One novel ROM called ASA-RRBF model based on Adaptive Simulated Annealing (ASA) algorithm was developed to enhance the generalization ability of the unsteady ROM. The ROM was verified by predicting the unsteady aerodynamics performance of a highly-loaded compressor cascade. The results show that the RRBF model has higher accuracy in identification of the dimensionless total pressure and dimensionless static pressure of compressor cascade under nonlinear and unsteady conditions, and the model behaves higher stability and computational efficiency. However, for the strong nonlinear characteristics of aerodynamic parameters, the RRBF model presents lower accuracy. Additionally, the RRBF model predicts with a large error in the identification of aerodynamic parameters under linear and unsteady conditions. For ASA-RRBF, by introducing a small-amplitude and high-frequency sinusoidal signal as validation sample, the width of the basis function of the RRBF model is optimized to improve the generalization ability of the ROM under linear unsteady conditions. Besides, this model improves the predicting accuracy of dimensionless static pressure which has strong nonlinear characteristics. The ASA-RRBF model has higher prediction accuracy than RRBF model without significantly increasing the total time consumption. This novel model can predict the linear hysteresis of dimensionless static pressure happened in the harmonic condition, but it cannot accurately predict the beat frequency of dimensionless total pressure.

summary_zh: 基于递归径向基函数（RRBF）神经网络建立了压气机叶栅非定常气动性能的降阶模型（ROM），并引入自适应模拟退火（ASA）算法优化基函数宽度，提出ASA-RRBF模型。该模型在强非线性条件下对无量纲静压的预测精度优于RRBF，且计算效率高，但无法准确预测无量纲总压的拍频现象。
method: 数值方法，采用RRBF神经网络和ASA算法构建降阶模型，以高负荷压气机叶栅为对象，验证工况包括线性和非线性非定常条件。
innovation: 提出ASA-RRBF模型，通过自适应模拟退火算法优化基函数宽度，提高了降阶模型在线性非定常条件下的泛化能力和强非线性参数的预测精度。
conclusions: 1. RRBF模型在非线性非定常条件下对无量纲总压和静压识别精度高，但线性条件下误差大。2. ASA-RRBF模型显著提高了强非线性无量纲静压的预测精度，且总耗时未显著增加。
limitations: ASA-RRBF模型无法准确预测无量纲总压的拍频现象，可能对复杂非定常流动的捕捉能力有限。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机叶栅非定常气动性能的降阶模型，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙、畸变或稳定性裕度预测。

title: Experimental and Numerical Quantification of the Aerodynamic Damping of a Turbine Blisk
abstract: Abstract Aerodynamic damping is the key parameter to determine the stability of vibrating blade rows in turbomachinery design. Both, the assessments of flutter and forced response vibrations need an accurate estimate of the aerodynamic damping to reduce the risk of high cycle fatigue that may result in blade loss. However, only very few attempts have been made to measure the aerodynamic damping of rotating blade rows experimentally under realistic operating conditions, but always with friction damping being present. This study closes the gap by providing an experiment in which a turbine blisk is used to eliminate friction damping at the blade roots and thereby isolate aerodynamic damping. The blades are excited acoustically and the resulting nodal diameter modes are measured using an optical tip-timing system in order to realize a fully non-intrusive setup. The measured vibration data are fitted to a single degree-of-freedom model (SDOF) to determine the aerodynamic damping. The results are in good accordance with the time-linearized CFD simulation. It is observed, however, that not only the sweep rate of the acoustic excitation but also the variation of the rotational frequency during the sweep excitation, and the excitation frequency influence the apparent damping.
affiliations: Leibniz University Hannover
Institute of Turbomachinery and Fluid Dynamics, Department of Mechanical Engineering, Leibniz Universität Hannover, Hannover 30167, Germany
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和数值方法量化涡轮叶盘的气动阻尼，采用声激励和光学叶尖定时系统非侵入式测量旋转叶片的振动，并利用单自由度模型拟合数据以提取气动阻尼。实验消除了摩擦阻尼，结果与时间线性化CFD模拟吻合良好，同时发现扫频速率、转速变化和激励频率影响表观阻尼。
method: 实验结合数值模拟，使用声激励和光学叶尖定时系统测量旋转涡轮叶盘的振动，通过单自由度模型拟合提取气动阻尼，并与时间线性化CFD对比。
innovation: 首次在真实旋转条件下通过消除摩擦阻尼（使用整体叶盘）来隔离并测量气动阻尼，实现了完全非侵入式实验设置。
conclusions: 1. 实验测得的气动阻尼与时间线性化CFD模拟结果吻合良好。2. 扫频速率、转速变化和激励频率均会影响表观阻尼值。
limitations: 仅针对涡轮叶盘，未考虑压气机；声激励可能无法完全模拟实际气动激励。
relevance_reason: 研究涡轮叶盘气动阻尼，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但方法（实验+CFD）和概念（气动阻尼）可借鉴。

title: Boundary Layer Ingestion Propulsion: A Review on Numerical Modeling
abstract: Abstract The present paper focuses on the numerical modeling approaches adopted in boundary layer ingestion (BLI) studies. Three driving aircraft concepts have been identified, namely propulsive fuselage concept (PFC), rear engines concept (REC), and distributed fans concept (DFC). The affiliation to relevant research projects has been considered. Specifically, European projects DisPURSAL and CENTRELINE, NASA projects STARC-ABL, D8, and N3-X, as well as ONERA projects NOVA and DRAGON have been examined, together with other significant works. The methodologies adopted by the reviewed analyses have been investigated and summarized for each concept, in order to assess the main trends of BLI modeling strategies.
affiliations: University of Padua
Department of Industrial Engineering, University of Padova, Via Venezia 1, Padova 35131, Italy
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文综述了边界层吸入推进的数值建模方法，识别了三种主要飞机概念：推进机身概念、后置发动机概念和分布式风扇概念，并回顾了相关研究项目（如DisPURSAL、CENTRELINE、STARC-ABL等），总结了各概念的建模策略趋势。
method: 综述性研究，基于文献调研分析数值建模方法，未涉及具体工况参数。
innovation: 系统梳理了BLI推进的数值建模方法，按飞机概念分类并关联项目，为后续建模提供参考。
conclusions: 1. BLI推进研究主要围绕三种飞机概念展开。2. 各概念建模策略存在差异，但均需考虑进气畸变影响。
limitations: 仅综述数值建模，未涵盖实验验证或实际应用效果。
relevance_reason: 涉及畸变进气，与叶尖畸变相关，但主要关注推进系统而非压气机稳定性。

title: Closed-loop flow control of an ultra-compact serpentine inlet based on nondimensional model
abstract: Ultra-compact serpentine inlet faces serve inlet-engine compatibility issues due to flow distortion. To ensure inlet-engine compatibility over a wide range of Mach number, novel active flow control techniques with the ability of being opened or adjusted as needed draw many attentions in recent years. In this paper, a feedback control system was developed based on the method of microjet blowing. The proposed system includes a pressure adjusting valve to adjust the control effort, a dynamic pressure sensor to sense the inlet distortion intensity, a signal processing instrument to calculate the Root-Mean-Squared (RMS) pressure, and a controller to implement feedback control. To achieve high quality closed-loop controls at dynamic conditions, a novel nondimensional feedback method was developed. The advantage of this nondimensional method was validated at both off-design and arbitrarily changing Mach number conditions. With a sectional PI control law, the RMS control error reduced more than 56% at arbitrary changing conditions. Works in this paper also showed that the dynamics of this nondimensional system can be simplified as a stable second-order overdamped system.
affiliations: China Aerodynamics Research and Development Center
High Speed Aerodynamics Institute, China Aerodynamics Research and Development Center, Mianyang 621000, China
summary_zh: 针对超紧凑蛇形进气道畸变导致的进发兼容性问题，提出基于微射流吹气的闭环反馈控制系统。采用无量纲反馈方法，结合分段PI控制律，在变马赫数条件下将RMS控制误差降低56%以上，系统动态可简化为稳定的二阶过阻尼系统。
method: 实验方法，采用微射流主动控制、动态压力传感器、信号处理及控制器，在变马赫数条件下验证无量纲反馈方法。
innovation: 提出无量纲反馈方法实现动态条件下高质量闭环控制，显著降低控制误差，并简化系统动态为二阶过阻尼系统。
conclusions: 1. 无量纲反馈方法在变马赫数条件下有效，RMS控制误差降低56%以上。2. 系统动态可简化为稳定的二阶过阻尼系统。
limitations: 仅针对超紧凑蛇形进气道，未涉及压气机内部流动稳定性或叶尖间隙效应。
relevance_reason: 研究进气道畸变控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或激盘模型等核心方向。

title: Deep Learning Based Reduced Order Model for Airfoil-Gust and Aeroelastic Interaction
abstract: This work aims to model transonic airfoil–gust interaction and the gust response on transonic aileron-buzz problems using high-fidelity computational fluid dynamics (CFD) and the Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) based deep-learning approach. It first explores the rich physics associated with these interactions, which show strong flowfield nonlinearities arising from the complex shock–boundary-layer interactions using CFD. In the transonic regime, most linear reduced-order models (ROMs) fail to reconstruct the unsteady global parameters such as the lift, moment, and drag coefficients and the unsteady distributive flow variables such as velocity, pressure, and skin friction coefficients on the airfoil or in the entire computational domain due to the nonlinear shock–gust interaction. As it is well known that a deep-learning framework creates several hypersurfaces to generate a nonlinear functional relationship between the gust or structural input and the unsteady flow variables, an algorithm is proposed to overcome the limitations of linear ROMs. This algorithm consists of two integral steps, namely, a dimensionality reduction where the Discrete Empirical Interpolation Method based linear data compression approach is applied and the reduced state is trained using the LSTM based Recurrent Neural Network for the reconstruction of unsteady flow variables. The present work shows its potential for predicting transonic airfoil gust response and the aileron-buzz problem demonstrating several orders of computational benefit as compared to high-fidelity CFD.
affiliations: National University of Singapore
National University of Singapore, Singapore 117575, Republic of Singapore
summary_zh: 本研究采用高保真CFD和基于LSTM的深度学习降阶模型，模拟跨声速翼型-阵风相互作用及副翼嗡鸣问题。该方法通过离散经验插值法降维，再用LSTM递归神经网络重构非定常流场变量，克服了线性降阶模型在非线性激波-阵风相互作用中的局限性，计算效率比高保真CFD提升数个数量级。
method: 数值方法：高保真CFD结合LSTM深度学习降阶模型，采用离散经验插值法降维，工况为跨声速翼型-阵风及副翼嗡鸣问题。
innovation: 提出基于LSTM的深度学习降阶模型，通过非线性超曲面映射阵风或结构输入与非定常流场变量的关系，克服线性ROM在跨声速非线性相互作用中的失效问题。
conclusions: 1. 深度学习降阶模型能准确重构跨声速翼型阵风响应和副翼嗡鸣的非定常全局及分布参数。2. 计算效率比高保真CFD提升数个数量级。
limitations: 仅针对二维翼型-阵风及副翼嗡鸣问题，未涉及三维或旋转机械等复杂几何。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性与数值方法，但研究对象为翼型而非压气机，与压气机稳定性核心方向间接相关。

title: Effect of Tip Clearance on the Aeroelastic Stability of a Wide-Chord Fan Rotor
abstract: Abstract This research presents a series of simulations that investigate the effects of tip clearance on the aeroelastic stability of a wide-chord high-speed transonic fan rotor. The results show that the stall margin and the total pressure ratio decreases as the tip clearance increases. The effect of tip clearance on the blade loading can extend to 30% span. The phase of the influence coefficient without tip clearance is different from that with clearance, which causes the most unstable aerodynamic damping to shift in the nodal diameter. As the clearance increases from 0.25 mm to 2 mm, the damping decreases. The nonmonotonic behavior found by other researchers was not observed in this study. We conclude that the tip clearance affects the aeroelastic stability in two ways. The first is to change the blade loading so that the amplitude of the unsteady pressure increases or decreases, while the phase hardly changes, resulting in changes in aerodynamic damping. The second is to change the local flow so that the unsteady pressure amplitude and the phase change locally.
affiliations: Institute of Engineering Thermophysics
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
Key Laboratory of Light-Duty Gas-Turbine, Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing 100190, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究通过数值模拟探究了叶尖间隙对宽弦高速跨声速风扇转子气动弹性的影响。结果表明，增大间隙会降低失速裕度和总压比，影响叶片载荷至30%展高，且无间隙时影响系数相位与有间隙时不同，导致最不稳定气动阻尼的节径偏移。间隙从0.25mm增至2mm时阻尼下降，未观察到非单调行为。间隙通过改变叶片载荷和局部流动两种途径影响气动弹性稳定性。
method: 数值模拟，采用影响系数法分析气动阻尼，研究不同叶尖间隙（0.25mm至2mm）对宽弦高速跨声速风扇转子的影响。
innovation: 揭示了叶尖间隙影响气动弹性的两种机制：改变叶片载荷（影响非定常压力幅值）和改变局部流动（同时影响幅值和相位），并发现无间隙与有间隙时影响系数相位差异导致最不稳定节径偏移。
conclusions: 叶尖间隙增大降低失速裕度和总压比；间隙从0.25mm增至2mm时气动阻尼单调下降，未发现非单调行为。
limitations: 仅针对单一宽弦风扇转子，未考虑其他几何参数或非均匀进气条件。
relevance_reason: 研究聚焦叶尖间隙对气动弹性稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖间隙畸变和稳定裕度预测高度相关。

title: Efficient Passage-Spectral Method For Unsteady Flows Under Stall Conditions
abstract: Abstract This paper presents an efficient method of approximating unsteady flows using a block-wise discrete spatial Fourier series for the modeling of three-dimensional non-axisymmetric flows without making any hypothesis about its temporal periodicity. The method aims at capturing the long-wavelength flow patterns that are present in many unsteady problems of industrial interest, such as compressor stability, with a drastic reduction in computational resources. The method is intended to be used to compute flows exhibiting large-scale instabilities and where the fundamental frequency of the problem is not known beforehand. The approach discretizes the domain using a finite number of blocks or passages, where the flow variables at the supposedly periodic boundaries are continuously updated using the spatial Fourier coefficients of a uniformly spaced set of reduced-passage domains. The NASA rotor 67 under the effect of distorted inflow conditions has been used as verification case to demonstrate the effectiveness and viability of the method. The comparison between the passage-spectral method and the full-annulus solution shows that sound solutions can be obtained with a low number of harmonics. The new method has also been applied to investigate the rotating stall inception of the NASA rotor 67 for distorted inlet flows near stall operating conditions. The method is shown to accurately reproduce the full-annulus solution with a few spatial harmonics, capturing the characteristic features of the complex flow induced by the tip leakage vortex breakdown. The computational cost in this application has been reduced by a factor of between three and seven. This number heavily depends on the ratio between the number of retained harmonics to the number of blades.
affiliations: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid
School of Aeronautics and Space, Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, Madrid 28040, Spain
Advanced Engineering Direction, Industria de TurboPropulsores S.A.U., Madrid 28830, Spain
summary_zh: 本文提出一种高效的通道谱方法，利用分块离散空间傅里叶级数近似三维非轴对称非定常流动，无需预先假设时间周期性。该方法旨在以大幅降低计算资源的方式捕捉长波流动模式，适用于压气机稳定性等工业问题。以NASA转子67在畸变进气条件下的流动为验证案例，结果表明仅需少量谐波即可准确复现全环解，并成功应用于旋转失速起始研究，计算成本降低3-7倍。
method: 数值方法：通道谱方法，采用分块离散空间傅里叶级数，在有限通道/扇区上离散，通过空间傅里叶系数更新周期边界。验证工况为NASA转子67畸变进气，近失速状态。
innovation: 提出无需时间周期性假设的通道谱方法，利用空间傅里叶级数高效模拟非轴对称非定常流动，显著降低计算成本，适用于未知基频的大尺度失稳问题。
conclusions: 1. 通道谱方法仅需少量空间谐波即可准确复现全环解，捕捉叶尖泄漏涡破裂等复杂流动特征。2. 计算成本降低3-7倍，取决于保留谐波数与叶片数之比。
limitations: 方法依赖谐波截断，可能无法捕捉极短波长或高非线性流动；计算加速比受叶片数和谐波数影响。
relevance_reason: 该论文提出的通道谱方法直接针对压气机稳定性问题，特别是畸变进气下的失速起始，与用户研究方向（叶尖畸变下的稳定裕度预测）高度吻合。

title: High Dimensional Matching Optimization of Impeller–Vaned Diffuser Interaction for a Centrifugal Compressor Stage
abstract: Abstract The matching and interaction between the impeller and vaned diffuser is the most important aerodynamic-coupling between the components of a high-speed centrifugal compressor. Many research studies have been carried out during the last decade, both experimentally and numerically, on the flow mechanisms underlying impeller–vaned diffuser matching and interaction, with the aim of achieving a high-performance stage. However, the published work lacks any study that optimizes the matching of the impeller–vaned diffuser components in the environment of a full compressor stage due to two unresolved issues, i.e., identifying an effective matching optimization strategy and the high dimensional nature of the problem. To tackle these difficulties, four different optimization strategies (i.e., (1) integrated, (2) single component, (3) parallel, and (4) sequential optimization strategies) have been proposed and validated through a high dimensional matching optimization of the Radiver compressor test case published by the Institute of Jet Propulsion and Turbomachinery at Rheinisch-Westfälische Technische Hochschule (RWTH) Aachen University. Particular attention has been paid to the slope of the diffuser total pressure ratio characteristic near the surge point to further extend the stage surge margin. The results showed that the integrated optimization strategy was the most effective one for achieving good matching of the impeller–vaned diffuser interaction due to its inherently strong coupling optimization. Compared with the baseline compressor, the optimized stage achieved a gain of 1.2% in total-to-total isentropic efficiency at the peak efficiency point as well as a predicted 26.17% increase in stable operating range. For the stage examined in this study, a fore-loaded design of impeller blade as well as an increased vane angle for the diffuser vane was beneficial to the impeller–vaned diffuser matching. The more uniform spanwise distributions of the impeller discharge flow angle and the diffuser vane incidence presented the opportunity for a more optimized matching of the flow field between the 3D impeller and the 2D vaned diffuser. The outcomes of this work are particularly relevant for the advanced design of high-speed centrifugal compressors.
affiliations: Xi'an Jiaotong University
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Xi'an Jiaotong University, Xi'an 710049, Shaanxi, China
Queen's University Belfast
School of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, Queen's University Belfast, Belfast BT9 5AH, UK
State Key Laboratory for Strength and Vibration of Mechanical Structures, School of Energy and Power Engineering, Xi'an Jiaotong University, Xi'an 710049, Shaanxi, China
summary_zh: 针对离心压气机叶轮与有叶扩压器的高维匹配优化问题，提出了四种优化策略（集成、单部件、并行、顺序），并以RWTH Aachen的Radiver压气机为对象进行验证。集成策略效果最佳，优化后峰值效率提升1.2%，稳定运行范围扩大26.17%。
method: 数值优化方法，结合四种优化策略（集成、单部件、并行、顺序），基于Radiver压气机测试案例，关注扩压器总压比特性斜率以扩展喘振裕度。
innovation: 首次在整级环境下进行叶轮-扩压器高维匹配优化，比较了四种策略，并引入扩压器总压比特性斜率作为优化目标以改善喘振裕度。
conclusions: 集成优化策略最有效，优化后峰值效率提升1.2%，稳定运行范围扩大26.17%；叶轮前加载设计和扩压器叶片角度增大有利于匹配。
limitations: 仅针对单一压气机级，未考虑变工况或非设计点性能，且优化策略的通用性需进一步验证。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及压气机稳定裕度优化，但未直接聚焦叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型，与用户课题间接相关。

title: Multiwave Vibrations in Mistuned Cascades With Tip-Shroud Friction
abstract: Abstract Measurements taken during aero engine tests and in the field showed that flutter vibrations of shrouded blades can feature rich wave content (multiwave flutter vibrations). In a previous work, we demonstrated that this behavior can be explained by the nonlinear interaction of aeroelastically unstable traveling wave modes. The resulting vibrations are quasi-periodic. In this work, we show that the nonlinear modal interaction is not strictly needed, but actually mistuning alone can explain the multiwave form of flutter vibrations. The resulting vibrations are periodic and dominated by only a single mode shape of the mistuned system. However, unrealistically high mistuning intensities are needed to obtain significant contributions of multiple wave forms under the considered strong inter-blade coupling. Thus, we conclude that mistuning cannot explain the rich wave content observed in the measurements. Moreover, mistuning tends to hamper the nonlinear modal interactions and, thus, the occurrence of quasi-periodic multiwave flutter vibrations. This implies that intentional mistuning is not only useful to stabilize flutter but might also play an important role in developing flutter-tolerant blade designs.
affiliations: University of Stuttgart
Institute of Aircraft Propulsion Systems, University of Stuttgart, Stuttgart 70569, Germany
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文研究带叶冠摩擦的失谐叶栅中的多波颤振振动。通过数值分析，发现失谐本身可导致周期性多波振动，但需要极高失谐强度；非线性模态相互作用才是实测准周期多波颤振的主因，且失谐会抑制这种相互作用。
method: 数值方法，基于非线性模态相互作用和失谐叶栅模型，分析强叶间耦合下的振动特性。
innovation: 揭示了失谐单独可解释多波颤振但需极高强度，并指出失谐抑制非线性模态相互作用，为颤振容错设计提供新视角。
conclusions: 1. 失谐可产生周期性多波颤振，但需极高失谐强度；2. 失谐抑制非线性模态相互作用，从而抑制准周期多波颤振。
limitations: 仅考虑强叶间耦合，未涉及弱耦合或实际发动机工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性颤振和失谐效应，与压气机叶片振动相关，但非核心研究方向。

title: Deficiencies in the Spalart–Allmaras Turbulence Model for the Prediction of the Stability Boundary in Highly Loaded Compressors
abstract: Abstract Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) equations are employed for aerodynamic and aeroelastic modeling in axial compressors. Their solutions are highly dependent on the turbulence models for closure. The main objective of this work is to assess the widely used Spalart–Allmaras model suitability for high-speed compressor flows. For this purpose, an extensive investigation of the sources of uncertainties in a high-speed multi-stage compressor rig was carried out. The grid resolution near the casing end wall, which affects the tip leakage flow and casing boundary layer, was found to have a major effect on the stability limit prediction. Refinements in this region led to a stall margin loss prediction. It was found that this loss was exclusively due to the destruction term in the SA model.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Imperial College London, London, UK
Rolls-Royce (United Kingdom)
Rolls-Royce.plc, Derby, UK
summary_zh: 本研究采用RANS方程评估Spalart-Allmaras湍流模型在高负荷压气机稳定性边界预测中的适用性。通过多级高速压气机台架实验，发现机匣端壁网格分辨率显著影响叶尖泄漏流和边界层，进而影响失速裕度预测。SA模型中的破坏项是导致预测偏差的关键因素。
method: 数值模拟（RANS）结合实验验证，研究对象为高速多级压气机，重点分析机匣端壁网格分辨率的影响。
innovation: 首次系统揭示SA模型破坏项对高负荷压气机失速裕度预测的负面影响，并指出网格分辨率在机匣端壁区域的关键作用。
conclusions: 1. 机匣端壁网格细化导致失速裕度损失预测。2. 该损失完全由SA模型中的破坏项引起。
limitations: 仅针对SA模型，未涉及其他湍流模型；研究基于特定高速压气机台架，通用性待验证。
relevance_reason: 直接涉及压气机稳定性边界预测，与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度高度相关。

title: Numerical Investigation of a Mistuned Academic Bladed Disk Dynamics With Blade/Casing Contact
abstract: Abstract This contribution focuses on the combined analysis of mistuning and unilateral blade-tip/casing contacts. A two-dimensional (2D) phenomenological finite element (FE) model of an aircraft engine fan stage is considered. It is reduced by means of the Craig–Bampton component mode synthesis method and contact treatment relies on a Lagrange multiplier algorithm within an explicit time-integration scheme. Blade-tip/casing contacts are initiated through the deformed shape of a perfectly rigid casing. Mistuning is accounted for on the blades only. Monte Carlo simulations are carried out in both linear and nonlinear configurations, which allows to compare amplifications predicted in both context due to mistuning. Following a thorough convergence analysis of the proposed numerical strategy, the influence of mistuning level as well as the configuration of the external forcing are investigated. Presented results underline the detrimental consequences of mistuning in a nonlinear structural context, yielding even higher vibration amplifications than in a linear context. A cross-analysis between linear and nonlinear computations reveals that no correlation is found between linear and nonlinear amplifications which suggests that the effect of existing strategies to mitigate vibration amplifications within a linear context may not be suitable within a nonlinear context.
affiliations: Polytechnique Montréal
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Polytechnique Montréal, C.P. 6079, Succursale Centre-ville, Montréal H3C 3A7, Canada
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文采用二维有限元模型研究失谐与叶尖/机匣接触耦合下的叶片盘动力学。通过Craig-Bampton模态综合法降阶，结合拉格朗日乘子法处理接触，进行蒙特卡洛模拟。结果表明非线性接触下失谐导致比线性情况更高的振动放大，且线性与非线性放大无相关性。
method: 数值研究：二维有限元模型，Craig-Bampton降阶，拉格朗日乘子接触算法，显式时间积分，蒙特卡洛模拟。
innovation: 首次在非线性叶尖/机匣接触背景下系统分析失谐效应，揭示线性与非线性放大无相关性，挑战线性减振策略的适用性。
conclusions: 1. 非线性接触下失谐导致振动放大高于线性情况。2. 线性与非线性放大无相关性，线性减振策略在非线性下可能无效。
limitations: 仅考虑二维模型和刚性机匣，未涉及三维效应及机匣变形。
tags: 转子叶片振动预测解析模型
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖接触和振动放大，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测，与用户课题间接相关。

title: High cycle fatigue failure with radial cracks in gears of aero-engines
abstract: The gears in aero-engines perform energy and motion transfer between the High-Pressure Rotor (HPR) and accessories. Firstly, an occurred fault with radial cracks in the driven gear disk was diagnosed as High Cycle Fatigue (HCF) failure through necessary examinations. Analysis of fault tree and test signals indicated that the fracture was relevant to the swing vibration of the driven gear excited by the unbalance excitation on HPR. Secondly, a corresponding mechanism model was established, in which the gear meshing effect was considered, with lateral and swing vibration mode. The Governing Equations (GEs) and the Finite Element Model (FEM) were established and verified. Then, the modal shapes, harmonic response, and transient response were analyzed, indicating that the swing vibration of the driven gear could be significantly excited by the unbalance on HPR, which induced the cracks in the driven gear disk to extend radially. Furthermore, influences of factors on the unbalance response were obtained, in which the unbalance response appeared local minimum points and maximum points. Meanwhile, 1# and 2# bearing stiffness had rather significant influences on the response. Thus it is efficient to modify them to achieve vibration control.
affiliations: Beihang University
Aero Engine Corporation of China (China)
Collaborative Innovation Center of Advanced Aero-Engine, Beijing 100083, China
School of Energy and Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
summary_zh: 针对航空发动机齿轮高周疲劳失效问题，通过故障诊断和测试信号分析，确定径向裂纹由高压转子不平衡激励引起的从动齿轮摆动振动导致。建立了考虑齿轮啮合效应的横向-摆动振动模型和有限元模型，分析了模态、谐响应和瞬态响应，揭示了不平衡激励对裂纹扩展的影响，并研究了轴承刚度等参数对响应的影响。
method: 结合故障树分析、测试信号诊断与数值模拟（有限元法），建立齿轮横向-摆动振动模型，进行模态、谐响应和瞬态响应分析。
innovation: 将齿轮啮合效应纳入横向-摆动振动模型，揭示了高压转子不平衡激励对从动齿轮摆动振动及径向裂纹扩展的机理。
conclusions: 1. 高压转子不平衡显著激发从动齿轮摆动振动，导致轮盘径向裂纹扩展。2. 1#和2#轴承刚度对不平衡响应影响显著，存在局部最小和最大点。
limitations: 研究聚焦于特定齿轮故障案例，未考虑齿轮非线性接触和润滑等因素。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制，但研究对象为齿轮而非压气机叶片，与压气机稳定性核心方向部分相关。

title: Modeling Axisymmetric Centrifugal Compressor Characteristics From First Principles
abstract: Abstract Turbochargers are a vital component for aiding engine manufacturers in meeting the latest emissions standards. However, their range of operation is limited for low mass flows by compressor surge. Operation in surge results in pressure and mass flow oscillations that are often damaging to the compressor and its installation. Since surge is a highly complex flow regime, full unsteady three-dimensional models are generally too computationally expensive to run. The majority of current low-dimensional surge models use a cubic compressor characteristic that needs to be fitted to experimental data. Therefore, each time a compressor is studied using these models, costly experimental testing is required. In this paper, a new technique for obtaining an axisymmetric centrifugal compressor characteristic is presented. This characteristic is built using the equations of mass, momentum, and energy from first principles in order to provide a more complete model than those currently obtained via experimental data. This approach enables us to explain the resulting cubic-like shape of the characteristic and hence to identify impeller inlet stall as a route into surge. The characteristic is used within a quasi-steady, map-based surge model in order to demonstrate its ability to predict the onset of surge while only providing geometric data as input. Validation is provided for this model by a discussion of the qualitative flow dynamics and a good fit to experimental data, especially for low impeller speeds and pressure ratios.
affiliations: University of Bath
Department of Mathematical Sciences, University of Bath, Claverton Down, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
Department of Mechanical Engineering, University of Bath, Claverton Down, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
Simon Fraser University
School of Sustainable Energy Engineering, Simon Fraser University, University Drive, Surrey V3T 0N1, BC, Canada
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于第一性原理（质量、动量、能量方程）建立轴流离心压气机特性的新方法，无需实验数据拟合，仅需几何输入即可预测喘振起始。通过分析特性曲线的三次型形状，识别出叶轮进口失速是进入喘振的路径，并用准稳态喘振模型验证，定性流动动力学和低转速低压比下的实验数据吻合良好。
method: 理论建模与数值验证：基于第一性原理推导压气机特性，结合准稳态喘振模型，输入仅为几何数据，验证采用定性流动动力学和实验数据对比。
innovation: 首次从第一性原理构建轴流离心压气机特性，无需实验拟合，直接解释特性曲线形状并识别失速路径，降低对实验数据的依赖。
conclusions: 1. 叶轮进口失速是导致喘振的关键路径；2. 模型在低转速和低压比下与实验数据吻合良好，能预测喘振起始。
limitations: 仅针对轴流离心压气机，且验证限于低转速低压比工况，高转速或复杂几何可能需扩展。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及失速/喘振机理和稳定性建模，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Spanwise Variations in Aerodynamic Damping of an Oscillating Annular Compressor Cascade
abstract: Aeroelastic instability in turbomachinery is one of the severe problems limiting its performance. Of particular interest is the phenomenon of stall flutter in compressors, which occurs when blades encounter large incidence flows. With the objective to understand the aerodynamics associated with stall flutter, the present experimental study is conducted on a subsonic annular compressor cascade. Five consecutive blades are oscillated, with the central blade instrumented for unsteady surface pressure measurements. The flow incidence is established using inlet guide vanes to provide three inflow profiles, representative of nominal, near-stall, and poststall incidences. With the blades oscillating at specific interblade phase angles and reduced frequencies, the stability of the cascade is determined globally and locally in terms of aerodynamic damping. The near-hub flow is distinctive due to the thickened boundary layer, resulting in an irregular variation of pressure with low magnitudes, eventually approaching negative stability. At larger incidences, due to the low-amplitude fluctuations in pressure at all spans, the overall stability is reduced. The present work also describes and rationalizes the nature of the dependence of blade unsteady pressure distribution on reduced frequency and incidence.
affiliations: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kanpur 208 016, Uttar Pradesh, India
summary_zh: 本研究通过亚音速环形压气机叶栅实验，研究失速颤振的气动弹性不稳定性。五片连续叶片振荡，测量中央叶片非定常表面压力，在三种进气攻角（额定、近失速、失速后）下分析全局和局部气动阻尼。发现近轮毂区因边界层增厚导致压力不规则变化，稳定性降低；大攻角下全展向压力波动小，整体稳定性下降。
method: 实验研究，采用亚音速环形压气机叶栅，五片叶片振荡，测量非定常表面压力，改变进气攻角和叶片间相位角、折合频率。
innovation: 首次在环形叶栅中通过实验详细测量展向气动阻尼变化，揭示近轮毂边界层对稳定性的影响，并系统分析折合频率和攻角对非定常压力分布的作用。
conclusions: 近轮毂区因边界层增厚导致局部负阻尼；大攻角下全展向压力波动幅度低，整体稳定性下降。
limitations: 仅针对亚音速环形叶栅，未考虑真实发动机中的旋转效应和三维流动。
relevance_reason: 研究压气机叶栅气动弹性稳定性，与用户关注的颤振/强迫响应相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或三维激盘模型。

title: Extension of continuous scanning laser Doppler vibrometry measurement for complex structures with curved surfaces
abstract: The continuous Scanning Laser Doppler Vibrometry (SLDV) developed on the base of the galvanometer scanner system has made it possible to quickly obtain the full field vibration responses within a rectangular area of the structure. In this paper, an arbitrary continuous scanning path generating method for Continuous Scanning Laser Doppler Vibometry (CSLDV) is further put forward in order to allow the CSLDV suitable for testing structures featured by complex shapes not just for regular areas. In the first step, the relationship between position of laser spot and the driving voltages of galvanometer scanner system has been described by a mathematical modeling. Then, a novel arbitrary scanning path generating strategy based on CSLDV is presented by deforming a normalization rectangular scanning path to an arbitrary continuous scanning path. The mapping relation between the normalization rectangular scanning path and arbitrary continuous scanning path is established using the reference points. In the second step, a compressor blade with curved surface was taken as an example for modal test using the proposed method. At the same time, a validated experiment was performed in SLDV. The results show the mode shapes derived from the extended CSLDV are in agreement with those from SLDV and the Modal Assurance Criterion (MAC) between the two are all greater than 0.96. They also demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method for CSLDV test and show strong potential on further practical engineering applications.
affiliations: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
Aero-engine Thermal Environment and Structure Key Laboratory of Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Nanjing 210016, China
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于连续扫描激光多普勒测振（CSLDV）的任意连续扫描路径生成方法，通过将归一化矩形扫描路径变形为任意连续路径，并建立映射关系，实现对复杂曲面结构（如压气机叶片）的模态测试。实验表明，该方法与标准SLDV的模态振型一致性良好，MAC值均大于0.96，验证了其可行性和有效性。
method: 实验方法：采用连续扫描激光多普勒测振（CSLDV）技术，通过数学建模和参考点映射生成任意连续扫描路径，对压气机叶片进行模态测试。
innovation: 提出一种任意连续扫描路径生成策略，将CSLDV的适用区域从矩形扩展至复杂曲面结构，解决了传统方法对不规则形状测试的局限性。
conclusions: 1. 提出的CSLDV方法能有效获取复杂曲面结构的模态振型。2. 与标准SLDV相比，模态置信准则（MAC）均大于0.96，验证了方法的准确性。
limitations: 研究仅针对单个压气机叶片进行验证，未涉及旋转状态或实际工况下的振动测量。
relevance_reason: 涉及压气机叶片振动测量，与转子叶片振动预测相关，但主要聚焦于实验方法而非稳定性或气动弹性机理。

title: Intrinsic physical relationships between rotor modal shapes and instantaneous vibrational energy flow transmission characteristics: Theoretical and numerical analysis and application
abstract: The modal vibration of the rotor is the main cause of excessive vibration of the aero-engine overall structure. To attenuate the vibration of the rotor under different modal shapes from the perspective of energy control, the intrinsic physical relationships between rotor modal shapes and instantaneous vibrational energy flow transmission characteristics is derived from the general equation of motion base on the structural intensity method. A dual-rotor-support-casing coupling model subjected to the rotor unbalanced forces is established by the finite element method in this paper. The transmission, conversion and balance relationships of the vibrational energy flow for the rotors in the first-order bending modal shape, the conical whirling modal shape and the translational modal shape are analyzed, respectively. The results show that the vibrational energy flow transmitted to the structure can be converted into the strain energy, the kinetic energy and the energy dissipated by the damping of the structure. The vibrational energy flow transmission characteristics of rotors with different modal shapes are quite different. Especially for the first-order bending modal shape, the vibrational energy flow and the strain energy are transmitted and converted to each other in the middle part of the rotor shaft, resulting in large deformation at this part. To attenuate this harmful vibration, the influences of grooving on the shaft on the first-order bending vibration are studied from the perspective of transmission control of vibrational energy flow. This study can provide theoretical references and guidance for the vibration attenuation of the rotors in different modal shapes from a more essential perspective.
affiliations: Chinese Academy of Sciences
Institute of Engineering Thermophysics
University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
Institute of Engineering Thermophysics, Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing 100190, China
School of Aeronautics and Astronautics, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing 100049, China
Key Laboratory of Light-duty Gas-turbine, Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing 100190, China
summary_zh: 本文从能量控制角度，基于结构强度法推导了转子模态振型与瞬时振动能量流传输特性的内在物理关系。通过建立双转子-支承-机匣耦合有限元模型，分析了不同模态振型（一阶弯曲、锥形涡动、平动）下振动能量流的传输、转换与平衡特性，并研究了开槽对一阶弯曲振动的衰减效果。
method: 理论推导结合有限元数值模拟，建立双转子-支承-机匣耦合模型，施加转子不平衡力，分析不同模态振型下的振动能量流。
innovation: 首次从能量流传输控制角度揭示转子模态振型与振动能量流的内在物理关系，并针对一阶弯曲振型提出开槽减振方法。
conclusions: 振动能量流可转化为应变能、动能和阻尼耗散能；一阶弯曲振型下，能量流与应变能在轴中部相互转换导致大变形，开槽可有效衰减该振动。
limitations: 仅针对双转子系统，未考虑气动载荷及复杂工况；开槽参数优化未深入。
relevance_reason: 涉及转子振动控制，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度。

title: CFD simulation of helicopter rotor flow based on unsteady actuator disk model
abstract: Actuator Disks (AD) can provide characterizations of rotor wakes while reducing computational expense associated with modeling the fully resolved blades. This work presents an unsteady actuator disk method based on surface circulation distribution combined with empirical data, blade element theory and rotor momentum theory. The nonuniform circulation distribution accounts for 3D blade load effects, and in particular, tip loses. Numerical simulations were conducted for the isolated pressure sensitive paint model rotor blade in hover and forward flight using the HMB3 CFD solver of Glasgow University. Validation of CFD results in comparison with published numerical data was performed in hover, for a range of blade pitch angles using fully turbulent flow and the k-ω SST model. In forward flight, the vortex structures predicted using the unsteady actuator disk model showed configurations similar to the ones obtained using fully resolved rotor blades. Despite the reduced grid cells number, the CFD results for AD models captured well the main vortical structures around the rotor disk in comparison to the fully resolved cases.
affiliations: University of Glasgow
James Watt School of Engineering, Glasgow University, Glasgow G12 8QQ, United Kingdom
Kazan State Technical University named after A. N. Tupolev
Department of Aerohydrodynamics, Kazan National Research Technical University named after A.N.Tupolev, Kazan 420111, Russia
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于非均匀环量分布的非定常激盘模型，结合经验数据、叶素理论和动量理论，用于直升机旋翼流场CFD模拟。在悬停和前飞状态下，使用HMB3求解器对孤立旋翼进行数值模拟，验证了模型能有效捕捉主涡结构，同时大幅减少网格数量。
method: 数值模拟，采用非定常激盘模型（基于表面环量分布、叶素理论和动量理论），使用HMB3求解器和k-ω SST湍流模型，在悬停和前飞工况下模拟。
innovation: 提出非均匀环量分布的非定常激盘模型，考虑三维叶片载荷效应和叶尖损失，在减少计算量的同时保持对主涡结构的捕捉能力。
conclusions: 1. 非定常激盘模型能准确捕捉旋翼尾迹主涡结构，与全解析叶片结果相似。2. 在悬停状态下，不同桨距角下的CFD结果与公开数值数据吻合良好。
limitations: 模型依赖经验数据和叶素理论，可能对复杂流动细节（如叶尖泄漏涡）的预测精度有限。
relevance_reason: 激盘模型与用户关注的叶尖畸变和稳定裕度预测有间接关联，但研究对象为直升机旋翼而非压气机，且未涉及稳定性分析。

title: Simple Approach for Modeling Fan Systems with a Computational-Fluid-Dynamics-Based Body-Force Model
abstract: This paper presents the use of a conventional computational-fluid-dynamics-based throughflow method to model the effects of a bypass fan in a propulsion system (for example, nacelle) under the restriction that information about the fan blade geometry is unavailable. Instead, the fan body-force model requires fan-performance data at different operating points as input. A simple implementation strategy is proposed to achieve this goal and extend the use of the body-force model to off-design operating conditions where fan-performance data are limited. This approach has been validated with axisymmetric calculations on three blade rows to demonstrate its capability at off-design conditions. The tool may be very useful to nacelle designers, who often have limited information about fan-performance data from engine suppliers.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Tsinghua University, 100084 Beijing, People’s Republic of China
Syracuse University
Syracuse University, Syracuse, New York 13203
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于CFD的体力模型方法，用于在缺乏风扇叶片几何信息时模拟推进系统中旁路风扇的效果。该方法利用风扇性能数据作为输入，并扩展到非设计工况。通过三排叶片的轴对称计算验证了其在非设计工况下的能力，对短舱设计者有用。
method: 数值方法：基于CFD的体力模型（通流方法），使用风扇性能数据作为输入，进行轴对称计算验证，工况包括设计和非设计点。
innovation: 提出一种简单实现策略，在风扇性能数据有限时扩展体力模型到非设计工况，无需叶片几何信息。
conclusions: 1. 基于CFD的体力模型能有效模拟风扇系统，无需叶片几何。2. 在非设计工况下，该方法通过轴对称计算得到验证。
limitations: 仅验证了轴对称计算，未考虑三维效应和实际复杂流动。
relevance_reason: 体力模型与激盘模型相关，可用于压气机稳定性分析，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Nonlinear dynamic behavior of a flexible asymmetric aero-engine rotor system in maneuvering flight
abstract: Aero-engine rotor systems installed in aircraft are considered to have a base motion. In this paper, a flexible asymmetric rotor system is modeled considering the nonlinear supports of ball bearings and Squeeze Film Dampers (SFDs), and the dynamic characteristics of the rotor system under maneuvering flight are systematically studied. Effects of the translational accelerative motions, the angular motions and the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions on nonlinear dynamic behavior of the rotor system are investigated. The results show that, due to the nonlinear coupled effects among the rotor, ball bearings and SFDs, within the first bending resonance region, responses of the rotor show obvious nonlinear characteristics such as bistable phenomenon, amplitude jumping phenomenon and non-synchronous vibration. Translational acceleration motion of the aircraft leads to axis offset of the rotor system and thus results in the reduction and the final disappearance of the bistable rotating speed region. The pitching angular motion mainly affects rotational vibration of the rotor system, and thus further induces their transverse vibrations. For the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions, a critical flight parameter is found to correspond to the conversion of two steady responses of the rotor system, in which one response displays small amplitude and synchronous vibration, and the other shows large amplitude and non-synchronous vibration.
affiliations: Tianjin University
Department of Mechanics, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
National Demonstration Center for Experimental Mechanics Education, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
Tianjin Key Laboratory of Nonlinear Dynamics and Control, Tianjin 300354, China
summary_zh: 本文建立了考虑球轴承和挤压油膜阻尼器非线性支撑的柔性不对称航空发动机转子系统模型，系统研究了机动飞行（平移加速、俯仰角运动及组合运动）对转子非线性动力学行为的影响。发现第一弯曲共振区内存在双稳态、振幅跳跃和非同步振动等非线性现象，并揭示了飞行参数对响应转换的关键作用。
method: 数值建模与仿真，采用非线性支撑模型（球轴承和SFD），研究平移加速、俯仰角运动及组合机动飞行工况下的转子动力学响应。
innovation: 首次系统研究了机动飞行中平移和俯仰运动对柔性不对称转子非线性动力学行为的耦合影响，并发现了临界飞行参数导致稳态响应转换。
conclusions: 1. 平移加速运动导致转子轴偏移，使双稳态转速区减小直至消失。2. 俯仰角运动主要影响旋转振动并诱发横向振动，组合飞行中存在临界参数使响应从小振幅同步振动转换为大振幅非同步振动。
limitations: 仅考虑特定机动飞行模式，未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或气动弹性耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 研究转子振动控制和非同步振动，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙畸变或激盘模型。

title: Linear Stability Analysis in Rotating Frames for Fan Blade Transition Prediction
abstract: A linear stability solver has been extended to rotating frames. The theoretical details of the linear stability theory in rotating frames are given. Validation is performed by comparing against the well-known Ekman layer case. Moreover, two new compressible validation cases are proposed for which very good agreement is well obtained. Linear stability analysis is then performed on a rotating fan blade with incoming flow, which is obtained by means of a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes computation. By neglecting or taking into account rotation in the linear stability equations, the effect of rotation on transition mechanisms is investigated. Moreover, factors are computed for transition prediction. The present results show that rotation hardly modifies the growth rate of Tollmien–Schlichting instabilities. However, rotation destabilizes stationary crossflow waves, but not enough to trigger transition.
affiliations: Université de Toulouse
ONERA–University of Toulouse, F-31055 Toulouse, France
Université Paris-Saclay
ONERA–Paris Saclay University, F-92190 Meudon, France
summary_zh: 该研究将线性稳定性分析扩展到旋转坐标系，用于预测风扇叶片转捩。通过Ekman层和两个可压缩算例验证后，对RANS计算的旋转风扇叶片进行稳定性分析，发现旋转对Tollmien–Schlichting不稳定性增长率影响很小，但会失稳驻定横流波，不过不足以触发转捩。
method: 数值方法：线性稳定性理论在旋转坐标系下的扩展，结合RANS计算获取叶片边界层，进行稳定性分析和转捩因子计算。
innovation: 将线性稳定性分析从静止坐标系扩展到旋转坐标系，并提出了两个新的可压缩验证算例，用于研究旋转对转捩机制的影响。
conclusions: 旋转对Tollmien–Schlichting不稳定性增长率影响很小；旋转失稳驻定横流波，但不足以触发转捩。
limitations: 仅针对单个风扇叶片工况，未考虑叶尖间隙、畸变等复杂因素。
relevance_reason: 涉及旋转坐标系下的稳定性分析，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或机匣处理。

title: A New Experimental Facility for Characterizing Bladed Disk Dynamics at Design Speed
abstract: An experimental facility for structural dynamics programs that uses an above-ground containment tank specifically designed to house bladed disks operating at design speed is described in this work. Key characteristics of the facility are discussed, and the configuration for a blade damping and mistuning study are presented. In particular, the development of an air-jet excitation system that can operate in different configurations to excite synchronous and nonsynchronous vibrations is detailed. Also, the measurement capabilities using a noncontact tip timing system as well as strain gauges are highlighted. Finally, results of data demonstrating the effectiveness of the facility for damping and mistuning studies are discussed.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
The Ohio State University, Columbus, Ohio 43210
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的实验设施，用于在设计转速下表征叶盘动力学特性。该设施采用地面安全壳，配备可配置的空气射流激励系统以激发同步和非同步振动，并利用非接触式叶尖定时系统和应变片进行测量。展示了该设施在阻尼和失谐研究中的有效性。
method: 实验方法，设计转速下进行，使用空气射流激励系统、叶尖定时系统和应变片测量。
innovation: 开发了可配置的空气射流激励系统，能同时激发同步和非同步振动，并集成非接触式叶尖定时系统，提升了阻尼和失谐研究的实验能力。
conclusions: 该设施能有效进行叶盘阻尼和失谐研究，空气射流激励系统可激发多种振动模式，叶尖定时系统提供高精度非接触测量。
limitations: 未提及具体转速范围或叶片类型，可能仅适用于特定设计工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及非同步振动和叶盘动力学，与压气机气动弹性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙畸变或稳定裕度预测。

title: Vortex Model and Blade Span Influence on Orthogonal Blade-Vortex Interaction Noise
abstract: The influence of the vortex impingement location on the aerodynamic and acoustic response of a rotating blade during an orthogonal interaction is studied by means of computational fluid dynamics. The objective is to identify and quantify precisely the noise reduction achieved by reducing the blade span. The Batchelor vortex model is primarily considered as it accounts for the axial velocity deficit observed in the core of realistic tip vortices. Separated simulations were also carried out for a Lamb–Oseen vortex and a purely axial velocity deficit to highlight and quantify the influence of the vortex velocity components on the interaction as well as to balance design optimizations performed relying on methods not able to model viscous effects. The analysis of the blade aerodynamic and acoustic responses shows that the magnitude of the thrust fluctuation and radiated noise are always higher for a Batchelor vortex than for a Lamb–Oseen vortex when the vortex core impinges below the blade tip. For both vortex models, the thrust fluctuation and radiated noise reach their peak for an interaction close to the blade tip. They decrease slowly as the vortex impingement moves inward the blade and decrease strongly as the vortex passes above the tip. Finally, the noise directivity pattern is dipolar for the interaction close to or above the blade tip and becomes more and more quadrupolar as the radius of the interaction moves toward the blade root.

summary_zh: 采用CFD方法研究正交叶尖涡-叶片相互作用中涡撞击位置对旋转叶片气动和声学响应的影响，重点分析Batchelor涡模型（考虑轴向速度亏损）与Lamb-Oseen涡模型的差异，以及叶片展长对噪声的影响。发现涡核撞击叶尖附近时推力和噪声最大，向内移动时缓慢减小，越过叶尖后急剧下降。
method: 基于CFD数值模拟，采用Batchelor涡、Lamb-Oseen涡和纯轴向速度亏损模型，研究不同涡撞击位置（叶尖、叶中、叶根）下的叶片气动和声学响应。
innovation: 首次精确量化了叶片展长减小对正交叶尖涡-叶片相互作用噪声的降噪效果，并对比了不同涡模型（考虑粘性效应）对气动和声学响应的影响。
conclusions: Batchelor涡引起的推力波动和辐射噪声始终高于Lamb-Oseen涡；涡核撞击叶尖附近时噪声最大，向内移动时缓慢减小，越过叶尖后急剧下降。
limitations: 仅考虑正交相互作用，未涉及斜向或平行相互作用；未考虑叶片弹性变形或流固耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 研究涉及叶尖涡与叶片相互作用，与叶尖间隙畸变相关，但主要关注噪声而非稳定性。

title: Dynamic Stall on Pitching Cambered Airfoil with Phase Offset Trailing Edge Flap
abstract: Dynamic stall on wind turbine blades often leads to severe fatigue that tends to decrease the lifespan of the blades. To mitigate cyclic loading on the blades, trailing edge flaps (TEFs) may be used to control the energy captured by the blades. In this study the influence of a TEF on a pitching S833 cambered airfoil is investigated at a Reynolds number of 170,000 and reduced frequencies of and 0.1. The lift and moment hysteresis cycles are presented for mean pitch angles of 0 and 10° to represent stall onset and deep stall. The flap, hinged at 0.8 chord, is pitching with different phase lags to study the influence of flap motion. Coefficient-of-pressure contour plots presented here clearly indicate the leading-edge vortex (LEV) formation and convection. It is concluded that even though the TEF was not capable of controlling the formation of the LEV, it was, however, capable of reducing the LEV magnitude and, more important, a reduction in cyclic loading. It is recommended to dynamically pitch the flap out of phase with the airfoil motion to reduce the min/max of the lift and moment cycles and reduce negative damping that can lead to stall flutter.
affiliations: University of Waterloo
University of Waterloo, Waterloo, Ontario N2L 3G1 Canada
summary_zh: 研究在雷诺数170,000和折合频率0.1下，带相位偏移后缘襟翼的俯仰S833弯板翼型的动态失速。通过压力系数云图分析前缘涡的形成与对流，发现襟翼虽不能控制前缘涡生成，但能降低其强度并减少循环载荷，建议襟翼与翼型反相俯仰以减小负阻尼。
method: 实验研究，在雷诺数170,000和折合频率0.1下，对俯仰S833弯板翼型进行动态失速测量，后缘襟翼铰链位于0.8弦长处，改变襟翼相位。
innovation: 首次系统研究相位偏移后缘襟翼对弯板翼型动态失速的影响，揭示襟翼对前缘涡强度和循环载荷的调控作用。
conclusions: 后缘襟翼可降低前缘涡强度并减少循环载荷；襟翼与翼型反相俯仰能减小升力和力矩极值，抑制失速颤振。
limitations: 仅针对特定翼型（S833）和低雷诺数（170,000），未考虑高雷诺数或三维效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及气动弹性（失速颤振）和动态失速，但与压气机叶尖间隙畸变、稳定裕度预测等核心方向关联较弱。

title: Influence of Upstream Total Pressure Profiles on S-Duct Intake Flow Distortion
abstract: For some embedded engine arrangements, the nature of the inlet distortion is influenced by the boundary layer characteristics at the inlet plane of the intake. This research presents the first quantitative assessment on the influence of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry on the swirl distortion at the exit of an S-shaped intake. Measurements of high spatial and temporal resolution have been acquired at the outlet plane of the S-duct using time-resolved particle image velocimetry. When boundary layer profiles typical of embedded engines are introduced, the characteristic secondary flows at the outlet plane are intensified. Overall, the peak swirl intensity increases by 40% for a boundary layer which is seven times thicker than the reference case. The unsteady modes of the S-duct remain, although the dominant fluctuations in the flow arise at a frequency 50% lower. When the inlet boundary layer profile becomes asymmetric about the intake centerline, the peak swirl events at the hub are reduced by up to 40%. At the tip, the peak swirl intensity increases by 29%. The results demonstrate that the effects of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry must be carefully considered as part of engine compatibility tests for complex intakes.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Cranfield University, Cranfield, England MK43 0AL, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 本研究首次定量评估了进口边界层厚度和不对称性对S形进气道出口旋流畸变的影响。通过高时空分辨率粒子图像测速测量发现，边界层增厚使峰值旋流强度增加40%，不对称性则导致轮毂处旋流降低40%、叶尖处增加29%。
method: 实验研究，采用高时间分辨率粒子图像测速（TR-PIV）测量S形进气道出口流场，改变进口边界层厚度和不对称性。
innovation: 首次定量评估进口边界层厚度和不对称性对S形进气道出口旋流畸变的影响，揭示了边界层特性与畸变强度的量化关系。
conclusions: 进口边界层厚度增加7倍使峰值旋流强度增加40%；不对称性使轮毂峰值旋流降低40%，叶尖增加29%。
limitations: 仅针对S形进气道，未考虑其他构型；未涉及发动机压气机耦合效应。
relevance_reason: 研究畸变进气对压气机进口流场的影响，与压气机稳定性相关，但未直接涉及叶尖间隙或机匣处理。

title: The Effect of Inlet Swirl on Brush Seal Bristle Deflections and Stability
abstract: Abstract This paper considers three-dimensional (3D) computational fluid dynamics (CFD) and structural modeling of brush seals, and investigates the effects of inlet swirl on the bristle pack. The model couples aerodynamic forces generated by CFD to a structural model that includes interaction between bristles. At a critical value of inlet swirl, aerodynamic forces cause circumferential slip of the upstream bristle row. In practice, this may lead to instability of the bristle pack and is consistent with anecdotal reports of seal behavior. The critical swirl velocity was reduced when the downstream pressure level was raised, keeping the same upstream total to downstream static pressure difference. This is caused by the increased dynamic head associated with the inlet swirl. Inclusion of a front plate in the seal design does not offer the intended protection to the bristle pack in highly swirling environments. This is associated with highly swirling flow impinging on the bristle tips. Fitting of roughness elements on the upstream face of the front plate could improve stability by reducing swirl of the flow impacting on the bristles. Increasing the bristle diameter and bristle stiffness does not necessarily prevent slip at higher inlet swirl velocities, but reduces the magnitude of slip of the upstream bristles.
affiliations: Dalian Maritime University
School of Marine Engineering, Dalian Maritime University, Dalian, Liaoning 116026, China
University of Surrey
Department of Mechanical Engineering Sciences, University of Surrey, Guildford, Surrey GU2 7XH, UK
School of Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Dalian Maritime University, Dalian, Liaoning 116026, China
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文通过三维CFD与结构模型耦合，研究进口旋流对刷式密封刷丝束偏转和稳定性的影响。发现临界旋流速度下气动力导致上游刷丝周向滑移，可能引发不稳定；下游压力升高会降低临界旋流速度；前板在高旋流环境中保护作用有限，而增加粗糙度可改善稳定性。
method: 采用三维CFD与包含刷丝间相互作用的结构模型耦合的数值方法，分析不同进口旋流速度和下游压力工况。
innovation: 首次系统揭示进口旋流对刷式密封刷丝束稳定性的影响机制，并评估前板保护和粗糙度改进效果。
conclusions: 1. 临界旋流速度下上游刷丝发生周向滑移，可能导致不稳定；2. 下游压力升高使临界旋流速度降低，因动压头增加。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未考虑刷丝磨损等长期效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及稳定性分析，但研究对象为刷式密封而非压气机，与用户研究方向部分相关。

title: Multistage Turbomachinery Design Using the Discrete Adjoint Method Within the Open-Source Software SU2
abstract: This paper documents a fully turbulent discrete adjoint method for three-dimensional multistage turbomachinery design. The method is based on a duality preserving algorithm and is implemented in the open-source computational fluid dynamics tool SU2. The SU2 Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes solver is first extended to treat threedimensional steady turbomachinery flow using a conservative formulation of the mixing-plane coupled to nonreflective boundary conditions. The numerical features of the flow solver are automatically inherited by the discrete adjoint solver, ensuring the same convergence rate of the primal solver. The flow solver is then validated against experimental data available for three turbine configurations, namely, a one-and-half axial turbine stage, a transonic radial turbine coupled to a downstream diffuser, and a supersonic mini-organic Rankine cycle radial turbine operating with a fluid made by a heavy molecule. Finally the adjoint-based optimization framework is applied to the concurrent shape optimization of three rows of the axial turbine, demonstrating the advantages deriving from adopting multirow automated design methods in the context of turbomachinery design.
affiliations: Delft University of Technology
Propulsion and Power, Aerospace Engineering, Delft University of Technology, 2629 HS Delft, The Netherlands
summary_zh: 本文在开源CFD软件SU2中实现了基于离散伴随方法的多级涡轮机械全湍流设计优化。通过混合平面与非反射边界条件处理三维稳态流动，验证了三种涡轮构型（轴流、径流、超临界ORC涡轮），并成功应用于三排轴流涡轮的联合形状优化。
method: 数值方法：基于SU2的RANS求解器，采用守恒混合平面与非反射边界条件，离散伴随方法基于对偶保持算法。
innovation: 在开源软件SU2中首次实现多级涡轮机械的离散伴随优化，自动继承流动求解器数值特性，支持多排叶片联合优化。
conclusions: 1. 离散伴随方法收敛速率与原始求解器一致；2. 多排联合优化相比单排优化能更有效提升涡轮性能。
limitations: 仅针对涡轮构型验证，未涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙等非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 涉及多级涡轮机械数值优化方法，与压气机稳定性间接相关，但未直接研究叶尖畸变或稳定裕度。

title: Effect of Gurney Flap on Performance and Aeroacoustics of Variable-Pitch Axial Fans
abstract: For a variable-pitch axial fan with guide vanes, the effect of three series of Gurney flaps (GFs) configured at the trailing edge of blades on the performance and dynamics is numerically investigated; and the aerodynamic noise is predicted. Simulated results show that GFs increase the total pressure rise of the fan; the higher the GF height, the more notable the lifting capacity. The working point of the highest efficiency moves toward the large flow rate. GF0.5-100 extends the high-efficiency scope and increases efficiency by an average of 2.09%; and GF2-50R raises efficiency by an average of 1.12%. After implementing a GF, the dynamics in the impeller distinctly. Compared with the original fan, a secondary tip leakage vortex generated at the blade tip aggravates the leakage loss; a pair of shedding vortices generated in the downstream of the trailing edge promotes the pressure difference between the suction and pressure surfaces. The prediction with the large-eddy simulation method indicates that GFs heighten the aerodynamic noise of the fan, and GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R increase the sound pressure level by 12 and 13 dB, respectively. Although the GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R are preferred choices for such axial fans, some necessary measures should be taken to reduce the acoustic noise in practical applications.
affiliations: North China Electric Power University
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People’s Republic of China
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 针对变桨距轴流风扇，数值研究了三种Gurney襟翼（GF）对性能和声学的影响。GF提高了总压升，高效点向大流量移动。GF0.5-100使效率平均提高2.09%，GF2-50R提高1.12%。GF产生了二次叶尖泄漏涡和尾缘脱落涡，但增大了气动噪声，声压级分别增加12和13 dB。
method: 数值模拟，采用大涡模拟（LES）预测噪声，研究三种GF高度和布置（GF0.5-100、GF2-50R等）对变桨距轴流风扇的影响。
innovation: 系统评估了Gurney襟翼对变桨距轴流风扇性能、内部流动和声学特性的综合影响，揭示了二次叶尖泄漏涡和脱落涡的生成机制。
conclusions: GF0.5-100和GF2-50R可分别提高平均效率2.09%和1.12%，但导致声压级增加12-13 dB，需采取降噪措施。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇和GF参数，未考虑不同工况或实验验证，噪声预测依赖LES精度。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖泄漏涡和流动不稳定性，但主要关注性能与噪声，与压气机稳定性预测模型间接相关。

title: A novel none once per revolution blade tip timing based blade vibration parameters identification method
abstract: The vibration caused blade High Cycle Fatigue (HCF) is seriously affects the safety operation of turbomachinery especially for aero-engine. Thus, it is crucial important to identify the blade vibration parameters and then evaluate the dynamic stress amplitude. Blade Tip Timing (BTT) method is one of the promising method to solve these problems. While, it need a high resolution Once Per Revolution (OPR) signal which is difficult to get for the aero-engine. Here, a Coupled Vibration Analysis (CVA) method for identifying blade vibration parameters by a none OPR BTT is proposed. The method assumes that every real blade has its own vibration performance at a given speed. Whereby, it can take any blade as the reference blade, and the other blades using the reference blade as the OPR for vibration displacement calculating and further parameter identifying. The proposed method is validated by numerical model. Also, experimental studies are carried out on a straight blade and a twisted three dimensional blade test rig as well as a large industrial axial compressor respectively. The results show that the proposed method can accurately identify the blade synchronous vibration parameters and quantitatively evaluate the mistuning in bladed disks, which lays a foundation for the reliability improvement of aero-engine.
affiliations: Beijing University of Chemical Technology
Beijing Key Laboratory of Health Monitoring Control and Fault Self-recovery for High-end Machinery, Beijing University of Chemical Technology, Beijing 100029, China
Key Lab of Engine Health Monitoring-Control and Networking, Beijing University of Chemical Technology, Beijing 100029, China
Rotor Bearing Solutions International, LLC, Charlottesville, VA 22911, USA
summary_zh: 提出一种无需每转一次（OPR）信号的叶尖定时（BTT）方法，通过耦合振动分析（CVA）识别叶片振动参数。该方法以任一叶片为参考，计算其他叶片振动位移，经数值和实验验证，能准确识别同步振动参数并定量评估失谐，为航空发动机可靠性提升奠定基础。
method: 数值模型验证结合实验研究，包括直叶片、三维扭叶片试验台及大型工业轴流压气机测试。
innovation: 无需高分辨率OPR信号，利用叶片自身振动特性作为参考，实现无OPR的BTT参数识别。
conclusions: 1. 所提方法能准确识别叶片同步振动参数。2. 可定量评估叶盘失谐程度。
limitations: 仅针对同步振动，未涉及非同步振动或颤振等复杂工况。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶片振动参数识别，与转子振动控制相关，但未直接涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。

title: An experimental method for squealer tip flow field considering relative casing motion
abstract: Squealer tip is widely used in turbines to reduce tip leakage loss. In typical turbine environment, the squealer tip leakage flow is affected by multiple factors such as the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The development of experimental methods which can accurately model the real turbine environment and influencing factors is of great significance to study the squealer tip leakage flow mechanism. In the present paper, a low-speed turbine cascade test facility which can model the relative casing motion and wide range of variable incidence angles (−25° to 55°) is built. Based on the similarity criteria, a high-low speed similarity transformation method of the turbine cascade is established by considering the thickness of the turbine blade. A combined testing method of Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) and local pressure measurement is proposed to obtain the complex flow structures within the tip cavity. The results show that the experimental method can successfully model the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The low-speed cascade obtained by the similarity transformation can model the high-speed flow accurately. The measurement technique developed can obtain the complex flow field and successfully capture the scraping vortex within the squealer tip.
affiliations: Beihang University
Collaborative Innovation Center for Advanced Aero-Engine, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
National Key Laboratory of Science and Technology on Aero-Engine Aero-thermodynamics, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮叶顶间隙泄漏流动，建立了可模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围变攻角（-25°至55°）的低速叶栅实验台。基于相似准则发展了高低速相似变换方法，结合PIV与局部压力测量获取叶顶空腔内复杂流场，成功捕捉了刮削涡结构。
method: 实验方法：低速涡轮叶栅实验台，模拟相对机匣运动和变攻角；PIV与局部压力测量结合；基于相似准则的高低速变换。
innovation: 建立了可同时模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围变攻角的实验方法，并提出了PIV与压力测量结合的测试技术，成功捕捉刮削涡。
conclusions: 1. 实验方法能有效模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围变攻角。2. 相似变换后的低速叶栅可准确模拟高速流场，并成功捕捉刮削涡。
limitations: 低速实验台与真实高速涡轮环境存在差异，且未涉及压气机稳定性或叶尖间隙畸变。
relevance_reason: 涉及叶尖间隙流动测量，但研究对象为涡轮而非压气机，且未涉及稳定性或畸变。

title: Effect of bent inlet pipe on the flow instability behavior of centrifugal compressors
abstract: Bent inlet pipes are often used in centrifugal compressors due to limited installation space, and an understanding of the effect on compressor stability is essential for safety and durability. This paper firstly investigates flow instability behaviors in two compressors, one with a straight inlet pipe and the other with an S-shaped bent pipe. In detail, it analyzes the resulting flow fields, instability evolution paths and surge boundaries. The results show that the S-shaped pipe obviously affects the flow field at high mass flow rates, while reverse flow mainly influences the flow field at low mass flow rates. Reverse flow first occurs at certain flow passages with a high pressure difference that is predominantly decided by the volute rather than the S-shaped bent pipe. In addition, centrifugal compressors can tolerate reverse flow to some extent so that surge would not occur immediately if reverse flow occurs unless the reverse flow region extends circumferentially and radially to a sufficiently large size. Since the S-shaped pipe is not dominant in the creation and extension of reverse flow, it does not exacerbate the stability of the central compressor to a great extent. Last but not least, the S-shaped pipe is noted to delay the occurrence of surge at 90% rotating speed, which suggests the possibility of improving compressor stability with bent inlet pipes. This result differs from the conventional understanding that inlet distortion usually deteriorates compressor stability and emphasizes the particularity of centrifugal compressors.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Department of Aerodynamics and Thermodynamics, Institute for Aero Engine, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
IHI Corporation (Japan)

summary_zh: 研究弯曲进气管对离心压气机流动不稳定性的影响，对比直管与S形弯管，发现S形管在高流量时影响流场，但喘振主要由蜗壳决定；在90%转速下S形管延迟喘振发生，表明弯曲进气管可能改善稳定性。
method: 数值模拟或实验，对比直管与S形弯管两种构型，分析不同流量下的流场、失稳演化路径及喘振边界。
innovation: 发现弯曲进气管在特定转速下可延迟喘振，挑战了进气畸变通常恶化稳定性的传统认知，强调离心压气机的特殊性。
conclusions: 1. 反向流动首先出现在蜗壳决定的高压差流道，而非S形管。2. 在90%转速下S形管延迟喘振发生，表明弯曲进气管可能改善稳定性。
limitations: 仅研究S形弯管一种构型，未涵盖其他弯曲形式；未定量给出延迟喘振的裕度变化。
relevance_reason: 研究进气畸变对压气机稳定性的影响，与用户关注的叶尖畸变下稳定裕度预测相关，但未涉及叶尖间隙或三维激盘模型。

title: Physical model for acoustic resonance in annular cavity structure
abstract: A physical model for acoustic resonance in the annular cavity structure is developed to represent the typical characteristic when acoustic resonance occurs. Firstly, the measurement of sound pressure in the casing and rotor blades vibration is operated in a multistage high pressure compressor. The sharp peak frequency and discrete multi-tone occur in the frequency spectrum of sound pressure in the compressor, and the vibration of the first stage of rotor blades synchronously presents the high amplitude. The frequencies associated with rotor blades vibration can be calculated with rotating sound source theory. It is also confirmed that acoustic resonance occurs in the multistage compressor. With acoustic similarity principle, an annular cavity model is established to simulate the typical characteristics of acoustic resonance in the compressor based on Large Eddy Simulation (LES) and Lighthill acoustic analogy. The coupling relationship between cavity acoustic mode and disc vibration mode shape is expounded when acoustic resonance occurs in the model. And acoustic resonance will be locked in the certain flow rate range. All these characteristics match well with those occur in the multistage high pressure compressor.
